chinese_item: 今天，我被“撞”了。不是被车撞的，而是被一位坐轮椅的女士撞的。难道我真的那么隐形吗？
english_item: Today, I got run over. Not by a car, but by a lady in a wheelchair. Am I really that invisible?

chinese_item: 今天我终于明白儿子为什么一直健身和上武术课了。原来他是为了揍他继兄一顿，把他打进医院，以此报复继兄偷了他4000多英镑的秘密现金。我年纪大了，也累了，实在受不了了。
english_item: Today, I found out why my son has been working out and taking martial arts classes. It was so he could beat his stepbrother up and put him in the hospital, as revenge for stealing his secret cash supply, over ￡4000. I'm too old and too tired for this.

chinese_item: 今天是我赢得公司抽奖的双人浪漫晚餐两周年纪念日。两年过去了，我仍然没有找到可以一起去的人。
english_item: Today, it's been two years since I won a romantic dinner for two from a work raffle. It's been two years and I still haven't found anyone to go with.

chinese_item: 今天我收到了一个月前订购的足球队外套。为了省钱，我选择了“无名字”选项，以避免额外的20美元刺绣费。结果现在外套侧面却绣着“NO NAME”两个字，而且我最终还是被收取了这20美元的额外费用。
english_item: Today, I received my soccer team jacket that I ordered a month ago. Trying to save money, I'd selected the "No name" option to avoid an extra $20 embroidering fee. My jacket now has "NO NAME" spelled out on the side of it, and I was charged the extra $20 dollars after all.

chinese_item: 今天，我的前男友结婚了。通常情况下，这根本不会让我难过，如果他的新娘不是我们恋爱期间一直争吵的那个女孩的话。那个他“对着奶奶的坟墓发誓永远不会和她有那种关系”的女孩。哦，对了，我们七个月前就分手了。
english_item: Today, my ex-boyfriend got married. Normally this wouldn’t bother me at all, had his bride not been the girl we constantly argued about all the time during our relationship. The one he “swore on his grandma’s grave he would never see that way.” Oh, and we broke up 7 months ago.

chinese_item: 今天，我爸妈对我进行了一次家庭干预，狠狠地训了我一顿，这是我22年来经历过的最严厉的一次。起因是我妹妹给他们看了一张照片，照片里我在派对上开玩笑地拿着三瓶百威淡啤。显然，我是个不承认自己酗酒的酒鬼。
english_item: Today, my parents staged a family intervention and gave me the grandest bollocking I've ever experienced in all my 22 years of life. They did this because my sister showed them a photo of me jokingly posing with three bottles of Bud Light at a party. Apparently, I'm an alcoholic in denial.

chinese_item: 今天，我在课堂上因为读到书中一个悲伤的情节而哭了起来。我被叫到走廊里，我的男老师问我：“这是你的特殊时刻吗？”
english_item: Today, I started crying in class because of a sad part in the book I was reading. I got pulled out into the hallway and my male teacher asked, Is it your special time?

chinese_item: 今天，我最好的朋友把我所有联系方式都拉黑了。为什么？她跟我分享了她重整生活的计划。我指出她那个控制欲极强、令人毛骨悚然的男朋友根本不可能让她这么做。结果她却误以为我爱上了她，想故意拆散他们。
english_item: Today, my best friend has blocked or ghosted me on everything. Why? She showed me her plan for getting her life back on track. I pointed out that her creepy, controlling boyfriend would never allow her to do any of it. Somehow, she took that to mean that I'm in love with her, and that I'm trying to break them up on purpose.

chinese_item: 今天上班时，有人表扬我“工作非常专注”，“不怎么玩手机”。我实在不忍心告诉我的经理，我不玩手机是因为我没有朋友可以聊天。
english_item: Today, I got congratulations at work for being so focused and not spending time on my phone. I didn't have the heart to tell my manager I don't spend time on my phone because I have no friends to talk to.

chinese_item: 今天我收到一条语气很冲的短信，问我为什么没参加员工聚餐。我已经缺席两周了，公司事先并没有通知我。
english_item: Today, I got an angry text, asking me why I wasn't at the staff dinner. I've been gone for the last 2 weeks, and I wasn't told about it.

chinese_item: 今天，为了防止我“变胖”，我的室友把厨房翻了个底朝天。她把饼干、冰淇淋、熟食肉类统统吃光了。现在家里只剩下蔬菜了。
english_item: Today, to keep me from "getting fatter", my roommate raided the kitchen. She ate everything from cookies and ice cream to deli meat. The only thing left in the house are vegetables.

chinese_item: 今天我试着刮掉车上的冰，但不太顺利。我气急败坏地踢掉了保险杠上的一块冰。冰块纹丝不动，结果整个前翼子板都掉了下来。
english_item: Today, I trying to scrape the ice off my car, but wasn't having much luck. Frustrated, I kicked a clump off from the bumper. The clump didn't budge, but the entire front quarter panel fell off.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友在收拾房间。我问他是否需要我帮忙，他回答说：“不用了，我不需要帮忙。”然后又补充道：“真希望你不要这么懒。”
english_item: Today, my boyfriend was tidying up around the room. I asked him if he'd like me to help, to which he responded, No, I don't need any help, then added, Wish you weren't so lazy.

chinese_item: 今天我发现，坐在我旁边那个什么都做不了的笨蛋同事，挣的钱竟然比我还多。
english_item: Today, I found out that the airhead sitting next to me at work who can't get anything done on her own, makes more money than I do.

chinese_item: 今天早上我起床后准备去洗澡，结果发现卧室门坏了，打不开了。我妈所谓的帮忙，就是从门缝里塞了张纸条，说她几个小时后就回来。
english_item: Today, I woke up and went to go have a shower. The trouble is, my bedroom door is broken and will no longer open. My mother's idea of helping was pushing a note under the door saying she'll be back in a couple of hours.

chinese_item: 今天，我在梦里接电话。我的工作就是这么糟糕。
english_item: Today, I was taking phone calls. In my dreams. That's just how horrible my job is.

chinese_item: 今天，我丈夫突然决定，每次他给女儿换完尿布，我都要感谢他；不然他就要大发脾气。现在我得照顾两个孩子了。
english_item: Today, my husband decided he needs to be thanked after every time he changes our daughter's diaper; if not he throws a temper tantrum. Now I have two babies to deal with.

chinese_item: 今天我结婚了。我收到爸爸送的一份包装精美的礼物。我兴奋极了，打开一看，竟然是两只标本兔子。就是我五年级时养的那两只。
english_item: Today, I got married. I received a beautifully wrapped gift from my dad. I was full of excitement until I opened it and found two taxidermied rabbits. The ones I had when I was in the fifth grade.

chinese_item: 今天，我在自己的毕业纪念册上用不同的笔迹写了东西，这样我妈妈就会以为我有朋友了。
english_item: Today, I wrote in my own yearbook with different styles of handwriting so my mom would think I have friends.

chinese_item: 今天我被解雇后回到家，发现老板正坐在我家客厅里。原来他和我妈交往好几个月了，他觉得这存在“利益冲突”，所以不得不解雇我。
english_item: Today, after getting fired, I went home only to find my boss sitting my living room. Apparently, he and my mom had been dating for months and he felt compelled to let me go because it was a conflict of interest.

chinese_item: 今天，我去赴朋友安排的相亲。一切都很顺利，直到我不小心叫错了两次对方的名字，叫成了我前任的名字。对方立刻借口去洗手间，之后就再也没回来。
english_item: Today, I went on a blind date set up by a friend. Everything was going great until I accidentally called my date by my ex’s name. Twice. My date promptly excused herself to the restroom and never came back.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友因为我查看了他的手机而和我分手了。我查看他手机的原因是想找到他妈妈的电话号码，这样我就可以安排把圣诞礼物寄给她，给她一个惊喜，因为我那天不在他身边。他问我是怎么做到的，我如实告诉了他。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend broke up with me because I checked his phone. The reason I did so was to get his mum’s number so I could arrange to send her his Xmas present in a parcel, as a surprise as I wouldn't be with him. He found out when he asked me how I managed it, and I told him honestly.

chinese_item: 今天，我在衣柜深处发现了一只腐烂的仓鼠。女儿一个月前不小心把它弄死了，然后藏了起来，说它跑丢了。我当时还信了她的话。
english_item: Today, I found a decomposing hamster deep in my closet. My daughter had hidden Peach after accidentally killing it and said it had ran away a month ago. And I'd believed her.

chinese_item: 今天，几个朋友生我的气，因为我不愿意提前下班骑车12英里去帮他们补胎，因为他们没有备用内胎和补胎工具。而这些朋友，平时总是嘲笑我骑车准备得太充分。
english_item: Today, some friends got upset with me as I wouldn't leave work early and cycle 12 miles to meet them to fix their punctures because they had no spare tubes or repair kits. The same friends that always mock me for being so prepared on bike rides.

chinese_item: 今天，我问那个暗恋我的女孩她是不是自闭症患者。她毫不犹豫地回答说：“我可以成为你想让我成为的任何人。”
english_item: Today, I asked the girl who has a crush on me if she was autistic. She replied without hesitation, I can be whatever you want me to be.

chinese_item: 今天，我坐在车里等上班。我一定是睡着了，因为醒来时接到老板的电话，说我被解雇了。当时我就在停车场。
english_item: Today, I was sitting in my car waiting my shift to start. I must've fallen asleep because I woke up to a call from my boss firing me. I was in the parking lot.

chinese_item: 今天，我给自己点了一份大号至尊芝心披萨。取餐的时候，我又要了几张盘子和餐巾纸，这样收银员就不会知道我没有朋友了。
english_item: Today, I ordered a large stuffed crust supreme pizza for myself. When I picked it up, I asked for extra plates and napkins so the cashier wouldn't know I don't have any friends.

chinese_item: 今天我交了作业。可惜的是，我不小心把从网上找到的打印版答案也交上去了，那份答案我本来是用来抄的。
english_item: Today, I turned in my homework. Too bad I accidentally handed in the printed answer sheet I found online to copy from.

chinese_item: 今天，我终于鼓起勇气约了暗恋一年的女孩。我们一起吃午饭的时候，她碰巧遇到了刚分手的前男友。他们聊了很久关于他们感情的事情，最后复合了。她开车送我回家。
english_item: Today, I finally got enough courage to ask out this girl that I've liked for a year. While we were out at lunch, she ran into her ex that she had just broken up with. They then had a long conversation about their relationship, and ended up getting back together. She was my ride home.

chinese_item: 今天，我丈夫的祖母私下告诉我，他小时候就被诊断出患有精神病态，所以很可能我丈夫根本无法爱我。我只是他用来伪装自己、让医生和治疗师不再纠缠他的工具而已。
english_item: Today, my husband's grandmother told me in confidence that he was diagnosed with psychopathy as a child, so in all likelihood my husband isn’t actually capable of feeling love for me. I’m just a useful tool to make him seem normal so doctors and therapists leave him alone.

chinese_item:
今天我家遭窃了。怎么回事？

我妈把钥匙放在门廊的花盆底下，还在门上留了张纸条。小偷偷走了我所有的吉他。
english_item:
Today, my house was broken into. How?
My mom left a key under a flower pot on the porch. She also left a note on the door saying so. He stole all of my guitars.

chinese_item: 今天下班回家，发现公寓地板上到处都是白色布料和水晶。我循着痕迹来到卧室，发现室友竟然忘了关衣柜门。显然，她的猫咪们把我的婚纱当成了它们的最新战利品。
english_item: Today, I came home from work to find white fabric and crystals all over the apartment floor. I followed the trail of destruction to my bedroom, where my roommate had left our closet door open. Apparently, her cats decided that my wedding gown was to be their newest conquest.

chinese_item: 今天我去参加了一个非常重要的面试。面试过程中，我不小心打了个嗝，接着又紧张地打起了嗝，然后当我试图悄悄地排出积聚的胀气时，却放出了一个又臭又大的屁。看来我又要失业一段时间了。
english_item: Today, I went to a really important job interview. During it, I accidentally let out a burp, came down with nervous hiccups, and when I tried to quietly ease out some painful gas that was building up, it came out as a massive, rancid fart. I'll definitely be unemployed for a while yet.

chinese_item: 今天，我丈夫让我把碗筷洗干净，把厨房收拾干净，结果儿子需要药的时候我没接电话，他就生气了。我当时正在倒垃圾、清理冰箱、洗碗，按他说的做了，所以没听到电话铃响。
english_item: Today, after my man told me to get the dishes done and clean up the kitchen, he got mad at me because I didn’t answer my phone when our son needed medicine that was downstairs. I didn’t hear it ring because I was throwing out the trash, cleaning out the fridge, and washing the dishes, like I was told to do.

chinese_item: 今天，女儿跟我说她宁愿上吊也不愿跟我待在一起。我只是提醒她要早点睡觉，好保证睡眠，以便她能去做自己喜欢的事情。
english_item: Today, my daughter told me she would rather hang herself than hang out with me. All I did was remind her to go to bed at a reasonable time to get some sleep for an activity she likes doing.

chinese_item: 今天开会时，我和一位同事聊天，我告诉他我升职了，而且这个职位是专门为我设立的。我忘了他是人力资源部的，他就开始问我部门是怎么设立这个职位的，还说他需要查一下。
english_item: Today, I was talking to a colleague at a meeting, and I told him about my promotion and how the position was created specifically for me. I forgot that the guy works in HR, and he started questioning me about how the division was able to create the position, and said that he will need to look at it.

chinese_item: 今天我在一家咖啡店买了两个甜甜圈和一杯咖啡，这是我经常买的常规套餐。今天的价格比平时便宜了1美元，我问为什么，店员告诉我：“我给了你老年人折扣。”他们的政策是55岁以上的人都可以享受老年人折扣。我上周刚满50岁。
english_item: Today, in a coffee shop, I purchased two doughnuts and cup of coffee, a regular order which I've bought many times before. Today the cost was $1 less and when I inquired why, I was told, "I gave you the senior's discount." Their policy is a senior discount for anyone over 55. I turned 50 last week.

chinese_item: 今天，我们结束了第二次蜜月旅行，去我妈家接孩子。出乎意料的是，他们俩都安静地坐在那儿看电视。我半开玩笑地问我妈有什么秘诀。她连犹豫都没犹豫就告诉我：“在他们的果汁里加了点苯海拉明，可以止咳。不用谢。”
english_item: Today, we got back from our second honeymoon and went to pick the kids up from my mom's. Surprisingly, they were both sat quietly watching TV. Half jokingly, I asked my mom what her secret was. Without even a guilty pause she told me, Benadryl for chesty coughs in their juice. You're welcome.

chinese_item: 今天，我老婆打电话给我最好的朋友，问他能不能帮我撒谎说我在哪里，结果他真的撒谎了。现在我老婆觉得我让朋友帮我撒谎，掩盖我出轨的事实。我从来没有出轨过。这感觉就像她梦里出轨一样，简直是疯了。
english_item: Today, my wife upset herself by ringing my best friend to see if he would lie about where I was, and he did. Now my wife thinks I get my friends to lie for me to cover up my cheating. I’ve never once cheated. This feels like the next level up from cheating on her in her dreams, because she's crazy.

chinese_item: 今天是我30岁生日，我妈、阿姨和姐姐没有给我办生日派对，而是给我来了个“干预”。她们说我体重300磅（约136公斤），单身五年，简直是在“毁掉自己的人生”，我必须“振作起来”。她们把我当罪犯一样对待，把我弄哭了。
english_item: Today, on my 30th birthday, my mom, aunt, and sister staged an intervention instead of throwing a party. Apparently I’m “ruining my life” by being 300lbs and being single for 5 years and I need to “get my act together.” They treated me like I’m some sort of criminal and reduced me to tears.

chinese_item: 今天我意识到，就算我昨天睡了一整天，也改变不了什么。我不跟任何人说话，也不做任何事。我在这个世界上的存在与否毫无意义，也不会影响任何人。
english_item: Today, I realized that I could have slept all day yesterday and it would've changed nothing. I don't talk to anyone and I don't do anything. My presence or lack of presence in this world means nothing and affects nobody.

chinese_item: 今天我终于明白为什么婆婆一直要看我们宝宝的那张照片了。原来她只是想在脸书上向朋友们炫耀她亲手做的毯子。她的第一个孙子几乎完全被裁剪掉了。
english_item: Today, I found out why my mother-in-law kept asking for one particular photo of our baby. She just wanted to show off the blanket that she had made to her friends on Facebook. Her first grandchild was almost completely cropped out of the picture.

chinese_item: 今天我打电话请病假了。老板说病假没有借口，因为她曾经带病上班，当时她得了肺炎。显然，这在她看来很了不起，很鼓舞人心。我不知道你怎么想，但对我来说，糟糕的医疗决定一点也不鼓舞人心。
english_item: Today, I called in sick to work. My boss told me there's no excuse for sick days, because she once came in to work while suffering from pneumonia. Apparently, that's supposed to be impressive and inspiring. I don't know about you, but bad medical decisions aren't very inspirational to me.

chinese_item: 今天，我带四岁的儿子去游乐场玩。到了该走的时候，他挣脱我的怀抱，又跑回了攀爬架上。我这人可不是那种会容忍孩子不听话的妈妈，于是我拍了一下他的屁股，告诉他我们得走了。这时我才意识到，我打错人了，打错了人，他穿着和我儿子一样的外套。
english_item: Today, I took my four year old son to the playground. When it was time to go, he squirmed out of my arms back to the jungle gym. Not being the type of mother to put up with bad behavior, I swatted his rear and told him we had to go. That's when I realized I'd just spanked the wrong child who was wearing the same coat as my son.

chinese_item: 今天我胳膊骨折了，就在脸书上发了张X光片，想让大家看看我伤得有多严重。结果竟然没人问我是否还好。
english_item: Today, I broke my arm, and posted a picture of my X-ray on Facebook to show everyone how bad the break is. Nobody even asked me if I was OK.

chinese_item: 今天我和爸爸去商店买卫生巾。我们买完后去收银台结账。这时他才发现卫生巾是有香味的。他从盒子里拿出一片闻了闻，又让我闻，然后坚持让收银员也闻一闻。
english_item: Today, I went to the store for some pads with my dad. We got them and then went to the cashier. That's when he realized that they were scented. He took one out of the box, sniffed it, made me sniff it, then insisted the cashier smell it.

chinese_item: 今天我办了个告别派对，因为我要永远离开这个国家了。邀请了130人，其中60人异口同声地说：“当然！我肯定会来！” 花了300美元准备派对所需的一切之后，最后只有两个人来了。而且因为没人来，他们也走了。
english_item: Today, I had a going-away party because I am leaving the country forever. Out of the 130 people invited, 60 were a resounding, Yes! Of course I will come! After paying $300 for everything needed at the party, two ended up coming. And left because nobody else was there.

chinese_item: 今天我才发现，最近邻居们一边窃窃私语一边用奇怪的眼神看着我的原因是，我开始用牵引绳遛猫，而这显然“引起了他们对我心理健康的担忧”。
english_item: Today, I discovered that the reason my neighbors have been giving me weird looks while whispering to each other lately is because I've started walking my cat on a leash, and this is apparently a cause for concern about my mental health.

chinese_item: 今天我在Instagram上偶然看到一个朋友。她订婚了……对象是我那个虐待我的前男友……他最近一直在跟踪骚扰我。她戴着他送我的戒指。
english_item: Today, I came across a friend on Instagram. She's engaged… to my abusive ex… who has been stalking and harassing me lately. She was wearing the ring he gave me.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友帮我拿药。我打电话给药房的时候，无意中看到他正让药瓶们互相打架，还配上各种音效和滑稽的声音。他33岁了。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend was helping me with my medications. While I called the pharmacy, I looked over and saw him making the pill bottles fight each other, with sound effects and funny voices. He's 33.

chinese_item: 今天，楼下的邻居冲我大吼大叫，说我制造的噪音太大，吵醒了他们的孩子，把他们弄哭了。其实，噪音只是我蹑手蹑脚地去卫生间，以及回房间睡觉时，地板松动发出的轻微声响。他们发誓要把我赶出去。
english_item: Today, my downstairs neighbours screamed at me for making so much noise that I woke their children up and made them cry. The noise was the sound of a loose floorboard shifting as I crept to my bathroom, and again on my way back to bed. They've sworn to get me evicted.

chinese_item: 今天，我终于结束了在医院的漫长而疲惫的轮班。我已经超过30个小时没睡觉了，所以能下班真是太好了。结果，我在停车场晕倒，摔破了头，很快就被送回了医院。
english_item: Today, I finally finished a gruelling shift at the hospital. I hadn't slept in over 30 hours, so I was happy to get out. I was quickly rushed back in after I collapsed in the parking lot and cracked my head open.

chinese_item: 今天我带约会对象去滑冰，虽然我滑得特别烂。我一直都知道自己平衡感很差，但几乎全程我都只能紧紧抓住墙壁，而她却像奥运选手一样优雅地在我身边滑来滑去。有一次，她笑着说：“你滑得像只猫……在结冰的露台上滑来滑去！”
english_item: Today, I took my date ice skating, even though I’m terrible at it. I always knew I had shit balance, but I practically spent the entire time clinging to the wall, while she glided gracefully around me like an Olympic skater. At one point, she laughed and said, You’re graceful like a cat… slipping across a frozen patio!

chinese_item: 今天早上，我的手机闹钟响了，把我吵醒了。还没到起床时间，我就按了贪睡键。闹钟又响了，这次提示“有一条新语音留言”。我竟然把侄子的留言给“贪睡”了。他驻扎在伊拉克。
english_item: Today, I woke up to my cell phone alarm buzzing. It wasn't time to wake up yet, so I snoozed it. It buzzed again, this time with One New Voicemail. I had snoozed my nephew. Stationed in Iraq.

chinese_item: 今天，在家工作两年后，我每隔五分钟就被一个亲戚打扰，于是我也反过来问了她一个问题。结果，我立刻被她狠狠地训了一顿，说我打扰了她正在做的事情。
english_item: Today, after two years of working from home, and being bugged by a relative every five minutes as I tried to work, I turned the tables by asking her something. I promptly got chewed out for interrupting something she was doing.

chinese_item: 今天我忙着写论文，爸妈就说要去给我买墨西哥菜。我特别想吃玉米片，就谢了他们。晚上九点他们还没回来，我就打电话过去。原来他们没出什么事，只是没跟我打招呼就突然买了辆新车。直到晚上十一点他们才回来，还带回来冷冰冰油腻腻的肯德基。
english_item: Today, I was busy working on a paper, so my parents offered to go get me some Mexican food. Eager for some nachos, I thanked them. At 9 p.m. they weren't back, so I called. They weren't in an accident, but spontaneously buying a new car without telling me. They didn't return until 11 p.m. with cold, greasy KFC.

chinese_item: 今天在Arby's餐厅排队时，我身后有两个帅哥。就在我准备点餐的时候，我爸大声说：“去拿卡路里表。你得先减减肥，才能考虑追他们。”
english_item: Today, at Arby's, there were two cute guys behind me in line. Right before ordering, my dad said loudly Go get the calorie sheet. You need to lose more weight before you think about going after those guys.

chinese_item: 今天，我梦寐以求的女孩问我想不想和她一起骑车。“就我们俩，”她说。我不得不拒绝她，因为我已经17岁了，却从来没学过骑自行车。
english_item: Today, the girl of my dreams asked me if I wanted to go biking with her. Just the two of us, she said. I had to turn her down because I'm 17 years old and never learned how to ride a bike.

chinese_item: 今天，我女朋友说她需要一个“抱抱伙伴”，因为我经常不在家陪她。她老是请病假，所以我得打两份工才能维持生计。
english_item: Today, my girlfriend suggested that she needs a "cuddle buddy" because I'm never home to spend with her. I have to work two jobs to pay the bills because she keeps calling in "sick" from her job.

chinese_item: 今天我和家人出去吃饭。服务员带我们入座时给了我一份儿童菜单。我今年24岁。
english_item: Today, I went out to dinner with my family. I was given a kids menu when the hostess sat us down. I'm 24.

chinese_item: 今天，我告诉男朋友我没办法请假和他一起去墨西哥，我们得把机票退了，改期。他说不用麻烦了，他已经想好带谁一起去了。
english_item: Today, I told my boyfriend I wouldn't be able to get any time off work to go to Mexico with him, and that we'd have to get our tickets refunded, and reschedule. He said not to bother, and that he already had someone else in mind to take with him.

chinese_item: 今天，我被赶出了田径队的更衣室，因为教练说储物柜不够用。队里有74个储物柜，但只有52个女生。
english_item: Today, I was kicked out of my track team's locker room because the coach said there weren't enough lockers for everyone on the team. There are 74 lockers and only 52 girls on the team.

chinese_item: 今天，我爸妈对我进行了一次“干预”。他们觉得我要变成哥特族了。就因为他们看到我把鞋带换成了黑色的，而不是白色的。
english_item: Today, my parents held an intervention for me. Apparently they think I'm turning into a goth. All because they saw me re-lacing my shoes with black shoelaces instead of white ones.

chinese_item: 今天，我的前夫第三次派他的新女友来接我们的孩子。法庭竟然觉得他带着这么多女人到处招摇过市没什么问题，这简直太荒谬了，这对我们的孩子来说非常危险。法官说，只要他按时探视孩子并支付抚养费，我就无能为力。
english_item: Today, for the third time, my ex-husband sent another new girlfriend to pick up our kids. It’s crazy that the court sees nothing wrong with his parading a stream of women, which could be dangerous to our kids. The judge said that as long as he keeps up with visitation and child support, there’s nothing I can do.

chinese_item: 今天，我参加了一个很长的会议，突然很想放屁。我小心翼翼地想慢慢放出来，结果当然是我这辈子放过的最响的屁。就在这时，我的老板看着我说：“这是你在这次会议上做出的最棒的贡献。”
english_item: Today, I was in a long meeting and desperately needed to fart. I carefully tried to release it slowly, but of course, it was the loudest fart I've ever made. Just after it happened, my boss looked at me and said, “That's the best contribution you've ever made in one of these meetings.”

chinese_item: 今天，我和我一个最好的朋友吵了一架。她最后说：“我奶奶中风了。拜拜。” 我不相信，就回了句“那太好了。拜拜。” 结果发现她奶奶真的在医院，情况危急。
english_item: Today, one of my closest friends and I got into a fight. She ended the conversation with, My grandma just had a stroke. Bye. I didn't believe her so I replied That's great. Bye. Turns out her Grandma is in the hospital in critical condition.

chinese_item: 今天，我第一次带女朋友回家。我本来很兴奋地想把她介绍给我的父母，结果却发现我妈妈挥舞着一把木剑，而我爸爸正试图把我妹妹推进烘干机里。
english_item: Today, I brought my girlfriend home for the first time. I was really excited to introduce her to my parents, until we found my mother waving around a wooden sword, and my father trying to shove my sister into the dryer.

chinese_item: 今天，在经历了一连串糟糕的面试之后，我又去参加了一次面试，竭尽全力想给对方留下好印象。回答了几个问题后，我惊恐地意识到，我说话的时候竟然像个紧张的孩子一样，不停地左右转动椅子。
english_item: Today, after a spate of bad ones, I was in another job interview trying my hardest to give a good impression. After answering a few questions, I realized to my horror that while I was talking I was swiveling my chair from left to right like a nervous child.

chinese_item: 今天我不小心把卸妆湿巾和我姐姐的晒黑湿巾搞混了。现在我的脸正在慢慢变橘，却无能为力。
english_item: Today, I got my make-up remover wipes mixed up with my sister's self-tan wipes. I am currently watching my face slowly turn orange and there is nothing I can do about it.

chinese_item: 今天，我升职加薪，这是我第一次升职。我兴奋地把这个好消息告诉了父母。妈妈却说：“真好啊，亲爱的，不过你妹妹刚刚订婚了。”说完就挂断电话，回去和妹妹庆祝了。
english_item: Today, I got my first big promotion at work. Excited, I shared the news with my parents. My mom responded with, That’s nice, dear, but your sister just got engaged, and hung up to go back to celebrating with her.

chinese_item: 今天半夜我还在学习的时候，我爸喝醉了回家。我扶他到沙发上坐下，收拾完他弄乱的东西后，他开始喋喋不休地说我妹妹瓦妮莎有多没用，又说我是个多么好的女儿。我就是瓦妮莎。
english_item: Today, while studying in the middle of the night, my dad came home drunk. I helped him to the sofa and after clearing up his mess, he started going on about how useless my sister Vanessa was, and how good a daughter I am. I am Vanessa.

chinese_item: 今天我刚交了个女朋友，我很喜欢她，但出于同情，我还是和另一个女孩保持着朋友关系。她明显很喜欢我，甚至为我做了很多事，但她真的不是我喜欢的类型。我无数次想过怎样才能不伤害她就和她断绝关系，但我就是下不了手。
english_item: Today, I just got a girlfriend who I love a lot, but I’m friends with this other girl out of pity. It’s so obvious she likes me a lot, and even goes the extra mile for me, but she’s just not my type. I’ve contemplated many times how to get rid of her without hurting her feelings. I just can’t bring myself to do it.

chinese_item: 今天，一个朋友搬进了我的新家。几年前他是个很棒的室友，但新冠疫情似乎把他逼疯了。他带了一大堆不易腐烂的食物，还一直念叨着要“加固”房子。他现在正在尝试建造一个堆肥式厕所。救命啊！
english_item: Today, a friend moved into my new house. He was a great roommate years ago, but COVID seems to have driven him mad. He brought a huge stockpile of non-perishable food, and keeps talking about "fortifying" the house. He's trying to build a composting outhouse right now. Send help.

chinese_item: 今天我拨打了自杀预防热线，但无人接听。
english_item: Today, I called a suicide prevention hotline. No one picked up.

chinese_item: 今天，一个三十多岁的家伙大摇大摆地走进我的办公室。他戴着百叶窗式墨镜，穿着破洞牛仔裤，自称是我们的新老板。我叫来保安把他赶出去，这时他拿出身份证，告诉我下周我要参加员工考核。
english_item: Today, a thirty-something guy swaggered into my workplace. He was wearing shutter shades and torn jeans, and claimed to be our new boss. I called security to throw him out, at which point he produced his ID and let me know I'd be attending an employee review session next week.

chinese_item: 今天，我的同事开始用第三人称说话。不仅如此，他还叙述自己的日常工作。“杰夫伸手去拿订书机”，“杰夫订了一份报告”。我每天不得不和这个“猩猩”坐在一起八个小时，无论我说什么都无济于事。
english_item: Today, my co-worker started talking in third person. Not only that, but he narrates his daily tasks. Jeff reached for a stapler, Jeff stapled a report. I have to sit beside this chimp for 8 hours a day, and nothing I say can end this.

chinese_item: 今天我结束了一夜的旅行回到家，发现房间乱得一塌糊涂。我那个吸了可卡因的室友邀请了一些陌生人来过夜，而那些人明明告诉她没地方睡。他们偷走了我的钱、音响、拍立得相机和护照，只留下了一包饼干。
english_item: Today, I came home from an overnight trip to find my room a complete mess. My coked up housemate had invited strangers to stay over when they told her they didn't have place to sleep. They stole my money, speakers, Polaroid camera, and passport. They left a packet of biscuits.

chinese_item: 今天我和一个很喜欢的男生一起滑冰。为了给他留下好印象，我使出了浑身解数。结果在跳跃的时候，我的冰鞋划破了他的嘴唇。现在他的嘴唇缝了十二针，用钢丝固定住了。
english_item: Today, I was out skating with a guy I really like. I put on my best moves, to impress him. I ended up slicing his lip open with my skate mid-jump. His lip is now wired shut by twelve stitches.

chinese_item: 今天我在超市碰到了前任。为了装作若无其事，我推着购物车试图和她闲聊几句。结果没过多久，我就发现自己径直撞上了一堆罐头食品，直到为时已晚。
english_item: Today, I ran into my ex at the supermarket. Trying to seem nonchalant, I attempted to make small talk while pushing my cart. I didn't notice that I was steering straight into a tower of canned goods until it was too late.

chinese_item: 今天，我终于知道了父母相识的经过。他们是在一家精神病院相遇的，当时两人都在那里接受治疗。
english_item: Today, I found out how my parents met. They met at a mental hospital, where they were both being hospitalized.

chinese_item: 今天，妻子和岳母批评我总是低头玩手机，于是我决定放下手机，以此证明她们错了。结果当我终于打开手机时，发现家人很伤心，因为我奶奶去世了，他们已经联系我好几个小时了。
english_item: Today, after my wife and mother in law criticized me for being glued to my phone, I set out to prove them wrong by being away from it. When I finally opened it, my family was upset because my grandma died and they had been trying to reach me for several hours.

chinese_item: 今天我回家时发现我丈夫和我们4岁的儿子同时在二楼阳台上小便。我丈夫像个小女孩一样咯咯地笑着。
english_item: Today, I came home to find my husband and our 4-year-old son simultaneously peeing off the second-floor balcony. My husband was giggling like a little girl.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友说他想吃糖霜。所以我给他烤了纸杯蛋糕，抹上糖霜，还做了装饰。我把蛋糕递给他的时候，他把装饰摘掉，舔了舔糖霜，然后把蛋糕递还给我，说：“我不是跟你说过我就想要这个吗？”
english_item: Today, my boyfriend said he felt like eating icing. So I baked him cupcakes, put icing on them and decorated them. When I handed them to him, he picked off the decoration, licked the icing and handed the cupcake back to me, saying, I told you that's all I wanted.

chinese_item: 今天是我的生日。爸爸来接我，但我把书包放到后座，关上车门后，他就开车走了。天开始下雨，而我的手机和钱包都丢了。
english_item: Today, it's my birthday. My dad came to pick me up, but after I had put my backpack in the back seat and closed the car door, he drove off without me. It started to rain, and I was without my phone or wallet.

chinese_item: 今天我才知道，搅拌机的搅拌杯没锁好就会飞出去，砸到你的头，然后厨房里到处都是。今天我还发现，每次被飞来的搅拌杯砸到之后，我男朋友第一句话就是问我还要不要给他做奶昔。
english_item: Today, I learned that when blender jars aren't locked, they fly off the blender, into the air, hit you in the head and explode all over your kitchen. Today, I also learned that after I'm attacked by a flying blender, the first thing my boyfriend asks is if I'm still gonna make him a smoothie.

chinese_item: 今天我帮一位做软件开发的朋友照看孩子。孩子睡着后，我用iPad看动漫。结果发现他开发了一个应用，一旦有疑似成人内容通过网络传输，他的手机就会收到提醒。虽然只是动漫而已，但他却认定我在看色情片。
english_item: Today, I was babysitting for a friend who develops software. After the baby was asleep, I was watching anime on my iPad. Turns out he created an app that alerts his phone whenever potential adult content streams through his internet. It was just an anime, but he's convinced I was watching porn.

chinese_item: 今天我结婚了。当着数百人的面，父亲把我交给新郎时说：“现在她就是你的问题了。”
english_item: Today, I got married. When my father gave me away, in front of hundreds of people, to my groom, he said, She's your problem now.

chinese_item: 今天我在超市自助结账时，机器突然失灵，开始随机广播“请等待工作人员协助”。没有人来帮忙，但机器却不停地大声重复这句话，直到所有人都像看偷葡萄一样盯着我看。
english_item: Today, I was using self-checkout at the grocery store, and the machine flipped out and started randomly announcing, "Please wait for assistance." No one came to help, but the machine just kept loudly repeating it until everyone stared at me like I was trying to steal grapes.

chinese_item: 今天是我的生日。没有人说什么，就连我的脸书好友也没说，尽管他们可能收到了通知。
english_item: Today, it was my birthday. Nobody said anything, not even my Facebook friends, who probably got a notification about it.

chinese_item: 今天整理衣服的时候，我发现了一件前任穿过的旧毛衣。经过一番纠结，我最终还是把它扔掉了。我感觉自己如释重负，直到后来我爸翻我的垃圾桶，把那件毛衣据为己有。
english_item: Today, while sorting through my clothes, I found one of my ex's old sweaters. After a lot of thought and difficulty, I threw it out. I felt empowered, until my father later rifled through my trash and claimed the sweater for himself.

chinese_item: 今天，我妈做了一个在线智商测试。对于“加拿大位于哪个洲？”这个问题，她回答说“南极洲”。如果智力是遗传的，那我可就惨了。
english_item: Today, my mom was taking an online IQ test. To the question "On which continent is Canada located?" she responded "Antarctica." If intelligence is genetic, I'm screwed.

chinese_item: 今天我食物中毒了，一大早就醒了，一直在吐。我妈给我所有老师都发了邮件，说我因为“晨吐”会迟到。谢谢老妈。
english_item: Today, I had food poisoning and woke up early in the morning to vomit. My mom emailed all of my teachers saying that I would be late to school because of "morning sickness". Thanks mom.

chinese_item: 今天，当我告诉家人我是素食主义者时，我预料到他们会嘲笑我，因为我的家人就是这样。但我没想到的是，我爸爸竟然用生肉当木偶，让它喊着“吃我！吃我！”，然后把肉扔到我脸上。
english_item: Today, when I told my family I was a vegetarian, I expected them to make fun of me because that's just my family. But what I wasn't expecting was my dad to use raw meat as a puppet and make it say, Eat me! Eat me! then throw it at my face.

chinese_item: 今天，我终于鼓起勇气向一个帅哥要了电话号码。他给了我之后，也问我要了我的。我最初的喜悦瞬间消失殆尽，因为他说道：“好了，现在我可以把你所有消息都拉黑了。”说完就走了。
english_item: Today, I finally worked up the courage to ask a cute guy for his number. Once he had given me his, he asked for mine. My initial happiness was deflated when he said, OK, now I can just block every message from you, and walked away.

chinese_item: 今天，我的焦虑和抑郁非常严重，以至于我去邮局时，三次平行停车都失败了，一位非常友善的女士提出帮忙，我立刻嚎啕大哭，道歉后开车离开了。
english_item: Today, my anxiety and depression were so bad that when I went to the post office and failed three times to parallel park, I promptly burst into tears, apologized, and drove off when a very nice lady offered to help.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友为了一个我认识的女孩离开了我。她就是我上一任男朋友为了她离开我的原因。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend left me for a girl I know. She was the girl my last boyfriend left me for.

chinese_item: 今天我和暗恋对象聊天的时候，笑得太厉害，都发出鼻音了。然后我装作若无其事地说：“我有时候故意这么做的。”现在他可能以为我故意装鼻音好玩了。
english_item: Today, I was talking to my crush when I laughed so hard that I snorted. Then I tried to play it cool by saying, "I do that on purpose sometimes." Now he probably thinks I fake-snort for fun.

chinese_item: 今天，我第一次见了丈夫的家人。比我噩梦中的场景好多了。
english_item: Today, I met my husband's family for the first time. My nightmare versions were better.

chinese_item: 今天，我跟一位朋友讲述了我弟弟意外去世的故事。讲完之后，我含着泪看着他，他也看着我的眼睛说：“我理解你的感受。这几乎和我去年春天失去我的猫一样难过。”
english_item: Today, I shared the story of my younger brother's unexpected death with a friend. After telling him the story, I looked at him with teary eyes and he looked back into my eyes and said I understand how you feel. That is almost as bad as when I lost my cat last spring term.

chinese_item: 今天我才知道，我男朋友最近没给我发短信的原因是他忘了自己还在和人交往。
english_item: Today, I found out that the reason my boyfriend hasn't texted me recently is that he'd forgotten he was dating anyone.

chinese_item: 今天，我试图克服自己的羞怯，上车时热情地向公交车司机问好。结果，我却大声地唱起了iPod里正在播放的歌曲。
english_item: Today, I tried to overcome my shyness by warmly greeting the bus driver while entering it. I instead blurted out really loudly the words of the song my iPod was playing.

chinese_item: 今天，我收到了人生中最棒的消息。我的癌症已经痊愈，不会在23岁的黄金年龄就此离世。我丈夫把他的日记本留在卧室的床头柜上。他写道：“我觉得自己很坏，但如果她死了，我就不用离婚了。”
english_item: Today, I was given the best news of my life. I am cancer free and am not, at the ripe age of 23 going to bite the dust. My husband left his journal on the nightstand in our bedroom. He wrote, I feel like a bad person, but if she dies, I don't have to get divorced.

chinese_item: 今天圣诞节，我给自己买了人生第一台游戏电脑。花了两个小时组装好之后，我不小心把一整杯咖啡洒了进去，眼睁睁看着它慢慢坏掉。我是个电子技术员，所以很清楚咖啡不该放在电脑附近。
english_item: Today, I bought myself my first gaming PC for Christmas. After two hours of setting it up, I proceeded to spill a full cup of coffee in to it and slowly watched it die. I'm an electronic technician so I knew better then to have my coffee anywhere near it.

chinese_item: 今天，我老婆用一种很撩人的语气叫我上楼。我有点怀疑，但还是跟着她上了楼。到了楼上，她递给我一把电钻，让我赶紧把那张平板包装的梳妆台组装起来。这就是我怀疑的原因。孩子们，浪漫都是骗人的，千万别结婚。
english_item: Today, my wife asked me to come upstairs, all sexy like. I was sceptical, but I went upstairs after her. When I got there, she handed me a drill and told me to finally get on with building the flat pack dressing table. This is the reason I am sceptical. Romance is a lie kids, never get married.

chinese_item: 如今，我在 Snapchat 上最好的朋友是我的妈妈。

chinese_item: 我以前一直以为，如果惹上麻烦，进了监狱，警察会打电话给你的父母。我非常尊重他们！感谢上帝，在我10到20岁那几年，我这辈子都没被捕过。

chinese_item: 你好，我小时候一直相信自己能在水上行走。但7月1日那天，我和表妹在一起，他跳进游泳池，结果她溺水了，幸好她的父母及时赶到救了她……我为表妹感到庆幸，但同时也为自己没能在水上行走而感到难过。
english_item: Hello when I was young, I used to believe I could walk on the water. But the first of july I was with my cousin and he jumped in the swimming-pool but she drown but fortunately her parents came to help in time... I was reamlived for my cousin but I was really sad because about not walking on the water.

english_item: The man who allegedly shot an 11-year-old boy during a road rage incident said he did not know there was a kid in the back seat of the vehicle when he opened fire.

english_item: David Muir speaks with Rachael DeWitt about her goal to raise awareness to protect America's lakes and oceans through the Skaneateles Lake Association.

english_item: Taiwan has evacuated 8,300 people and closed schools before a tropical storm brushes the southern part of the island later Wednesday

english_item: Across Chicago’s Latino neighborhoods, fear of a federal immigration crackdown has emptied the streets

english_item: Sea level rise caused by climate change could cause thousands of toxic sites in the U.S. to flood in the coming decades, according to new research.

english_item: Environmental groups are slamming Congress' move to overturn a Biden-era rule that limited the amount of land in the Arctic that could be used for oil and gas production.

chinese_item: 德克萨斯州总检察长肯·帕克斯顿起诉了泰诺的制造商，指控他们在明知该药物可能与自闭症有关的情况下，仍向孕妇虚假宣传。
english_item: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton sued the makers of Tylenol, claiming that they deceptively marketed the medication to pregnant women despite alleged links to autism.

english_item: Climate change may be putting millions more people at risk from an infection-causing fungi, which is likely spreading due to warming global temperatures.

chinese_item: 交通部长肖恩·达菲警告称，由于政府持续停摆，全国各地的航班可能会出现延误甚至取消。
english_item: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy warned that flights across the country could be delayed or even canceled due to the ongoing government shutdown.

english_item: Frame by frame, six photos released by federal investigators capture horrifying images of ill-fated Flight 2976 as it turned into a fireball along a Kentucky airport runway

english_item: Five years after the WHO declared COVID to be a pandemic, questions remain including how many people have died.

english_item: The 18-year-old cheerleader from Titusville, Florida, was reported dead while aboard the Carnival Horizon cruise ship on Nov. 8.
