chinese_item:
由渤健公司生产的托弗森已被证明能够减缓，甚至在某些情况下停止携带SOD1基因变异的运动神经元疾病患者的病情进展。
早期使用计划只有在NHS提供所需的人力和资源时才可获得。
莉莉娅·雅克曼女士现在需要使用轮椅。她说这种情况让她感到“非常沮丧和焦虑”。
“我每天早上醒来都害怕自己又失去了什么功能，如果我能用上托弗森，我就不会再有这种恐惧了。”
自从托弗森通过早期使用计划提供以来，全国范围内一些携带SOD1基因变异的患者已经在其他医院信托机构接受了治疗。
english_item:
Tofersen, made by Biogen, has been shown to slow and, in some cases, even halt the progress of MND for those with SOD1.
The early access programme is only available if the NHS provides the staff time and resources.
Lillia Jakeman Ms Jakeman now uses a wheelchairMs Jakeman said the situation had left her feeling "very depressed and anxious".
"I wake up every morning fearing that I've lost something and if I was to access Tofersen I wouldn't have that fear anymore," she said.
Since Tofersen was made available through the early access programme, some patients with the SOD1 gene variation around the country have been given the treatment at other hospital trusts.

chinese_item:
“听起来可能有些夸张，但歌唱课真的救了我的命。”
Sarah McCubbin说参加歌唱课程是“一个转折点”。一位女士表示，歌唱课不仅改善了她的呼吸问题，还提升了她的整体健康状况。
据一份报告显示，她是数百名通过参加歌唱活动改善肺部健康和整体福祉的人之一。
她参加了由Sounds Better CIC组织的“歌唱与呼吸”项目。“自从三年前开始唱歌以来，我就再也没有回头过，”她说。
Sounds Better CIC的负责人Liv McLennan表示，很多人，无论是否有呼吸困难的问题，都常常“忘记了如何以最有效的方式呼吸”。
english_item:
'It sounds dramatic but singing class saved my life'1 day ago Share Save Share SaveSarah McCubbin Sarah McCubbin said taking part in the singing sessions was "a game-changer"A woman says a singing class was a life-saver in improving her breathing and has boosted her overall wellbeing.
She is one of hundreds of people who have found joining a singing session has improved her lung health and overall wellbeing, a report has revealed.
She attends the Sing and Breathe project, organised by Sounds Better CIC.
"It's been three years since I started singing and I've not looked back since," she said.
Sounds Better CIC A project aimed at improving people's lung health by singing has reported a successLiv McLennan, Sounds Better CIC director, said it is common for a lot of people, whether they have respiratory difficulties or not to "forget how to breathe in the most efficient way".

chinese_item:
跨性别者可能会因为外表而被禁止使用某些服务。根据BBC看到的一份新指南草案，跨性别者在使用单性别服务时可能会被询问其外貌或行为是否适合。
该指南称：“这种担忧的证据可能包括个人的体格或外貌、行为或其他服务使用者提出的担忧。”
上个月，32名工党议员致信平等与人权委员会（EHRC），认为其4月份发布的临时指南“为对跨性别者的歧视和骚扰打开了大门”。
这份已于10月撤回的临时指南目前正在法院受到挑战。在高等法院的听证会上，代表政府的律师表示，临时指南可能过于简单化，并建议进入如厕所等空间的问题应根据具体情况来判断。
english_item:
Trans people could be barred from services based on appearance3 days ago Share Save Alison Holt , Social affairs editor , Ewan Somerville and Kate Whannel , Political reporter Share SaveGetty ImagesTrans people could be asked about whether they should be accessing single-sex services based on their physical appearance or behaviour, according to proposed new guidance seen by the BBC.
"Evidence of such concern might include the individual's physique or physical appearance, behaviour or concerns raised by other service users," the guidance says.
Last month, 32 Labour MPs wrote to the EHRC arguing that the interim guidance it issued in April, would "open the door to discrimination and harassment against trans people".
The interim guidance, which was withdrawn in October, is being challenged in the courts.
During the hearing in the High Court, the lawyer, representing the government, suggested the interim guidance may have been too simplistic and that access to spaces such as toilets could be judged on a case-by-case basis.

chinese_item:
这是自二战以来英国历史上最重大的事件。
从那时起，已有超过7000份文件被公开，包括WhatsApp聊天记录和电子邮件、私人日记以及机密文件。
但封锁限制的代价是巨大的：教育受到干扰，孤独感和心理健康问题加剧，工作和企业也受到影响。
有时这些文件表明首相支持更严格的限制措施，而有时他又似乎决心不惜一切代价避免再次实施严格的全国性封锁。
一周后，即2020年11月5日，英格兰确实进入了第二次全国性封锁，这次持续了四周，尽管大多数学校仍然开放。
english_item:
The private notes and secret documents that tell the inside story of the UK's Covid response5 days ago Share Save Jim Reed Health reporter Share SaveBBCIt was the most momentous event in UK history since World War Two.
Since then more than 7,000 documents have been made public from the time, including WhatsApp chats and emails, private diaries and confidential files.
But the cost of lockdown restrictions is huge: education is disrupted, loneliness and mental health problems get worse, and jobs and businesses are impacted.
At times the documents suggest the prime minister supports tougher restrictions, at others he appears determined to avoid another strict national lockdown at all costs.
A week later, on 5 November 2020, England does enter its second national lockdown, this time lasting four weeks, although most schools remain open.

chinese_item: 英国启动了一项重大计划，利用人工智能应对日益增多的耐药超级细菌。该项目由弗莱明倡议与制药公司葛兰素史克合作开展，是一场超级细菌与超级计算机之间的较量。据估计，超级细菌每年直接导致全球约一百万人死亡，并间接导致数百万人丧生。“这是我所知的英国抗生素项目中最大的一笔投资。”伦敦帝国理工学院的安德鲁·爱德华兹博士说道。爱德华兹博士提到，在乌克兰冲突中出现了一些病例，这些感染已经无法用任何抗生素进行治疗。
english_item:
Major UK project launched to tackle drug-resistant superbugs with AI7 days ago Share Save James Gallagher Health and science correspondent Share SaveImperial Dr Andrew Edwards researching antibiotics in the laboratoryThe UK is to use artificial intelligence (AI) to tackle the rising numbers of infections that have become resistant to treatment.
The project - a collaboration between the Fleming Initiative and the pharmaceutical company GSK - is a battle between superbugs and supercomputers.
Superbugs are now thought to directly kill around one million people a year worldwide and contribute to the deaths of millions more.
"This represents the single biggest investment in a UK antibiotic project I'm aware of," says Dr Andrew Edwards from Imperial College London.
Dr Edwards said there were cases coming out of the conflict in Ukraine now where infections could not be treated with any antibiotic.

chinese_item:
较短疗程的抗生素能治疗败血症吗？
这种疾病可以通过抗生素来治疗，但过度使用会导致危险的微生物对抗生素产生抗药性。
纽卡斯尔大学正在领导一项全英国范围内的试验，以研究较短疗程的抗生素是否能够有效治疗败血症，从而减少超级细菌的发展机会。
“我们希望Shorter试验能够帮助确定对于患有该病的患者来说，最安全有效的抗生素使用方法。”
Shorter试验将考察五天疗程的抗生素是否与通常为期七天的治疗一样安全。
english_item:
Could shorter courses of antibiotics treat sepsis?
The illness can be treated using antibiotics, but their overuse can lead to dangerous microorganisms becoming resistant to medication.
Newcastle University is leading a UK-wide trial to work out whether a shorter course of antibiotics can treat sepsis, giving superbugs less chance to develop.
"We hope that the Shorter trial will help to determine the most safe and effective use of antibiotics for patients with this condition."
The Shorter trial will examine whether a five-day course of antibiotics is as safe as the usual treatment, which takes place over seven days.

chinese_item:
TikTok创作者因谎称癌症诊断而道歉
2025年11月11日 分享 保存 伊桑·古奇 英格兰南部 分享 保存 brittanyhmiller 布里特妮·米勒周一在她的TikTok上发布了一段充满感情的道歉视频。
这位TikTok网红被迫道歉，因为她承认自己之前谎称被诊断出癌症。
布里特妮·米勒来自牛津郡，以在平台上向她的三百五十万粉丝发布美食和生活方式内容而闻名。
但这位29岁的女孩最近在该应用上遭到抨击，因为一段似乎显示她为胃癌筹款页面的材料在网上疯传。
在周一发布的一段社交媒体视频中，米勒女士承认了关于诊断结果的谎言，并表示这源于“一句我深感后悔的愚蠢话”。
BBC已联系米勒女士，但她尚未回应。
english_item:
TikTok creator 'so sorry' over cancer diagnosis lie11 November 2025 Share Save Ethan Gudge South of England Share Savebrittanyhmiller Brittany Miller posted the emotional apology video on her TikTok on MondayA TikTok influencer has been forced to apologise, after admitting that she had previously lied about being diagnosed with cancer.
Brittany Miller, who is originally from Oxfordshire, is known for posting food and lifestyle content to her three-and-a-half-million followers on the platform.
But the 29-year-old recently came under fire on the app, after material seeming to show a fundraising page claiming she had been diagnosed with gastric cancer went viral.
In a video posted on social media on Monday, Ms Miller admitted to lying about the diagnosis and said it came from "one stupid sentence that I deeply regret".
The BBC has contacted Ms Miller, which she has yet to respond to.

chinese_item:
一名九个月大的婴儿在托儿所窒息后不幸去世，其父母表示，在经历了四年“难以想象的痛苦、坚持和情感上的忍耐”之后，他们很高兴达成了经济赔偿协议。
奥利弗·斯蒂珀于2021年9月在医院去世，此前他在阿什福德的果冻豆日托中心吃切碎的意大利面时发生了窒息。
他的父母刘易斯和佐伊·斯蒂珀从这家现已关闭的日托中心获得了六位数的赔偿金，但对方并未承认责任。
果冻豆日托中心的前管理层在奥利去世后不久就关闭了该中心，并拒绝就此发表评论。
english_item:
The parents of a nine-month-old baby who died after choking at nursery say after four years of "unimaginable pain, perseverance and emotional endurance" they are glad to have reached a financial settlement.
Oliver Steeper died in hospital in September 2021, six days after he choked on chopped pasta at the Jelly Beans Day Nursery in Ashford.
His parents, Lewis and Zoe Steeper have received a six-figure settlement from the former nursery, without an admission of liability.
Former management of Jelly Beans nursery, which closed shortly after Oli's death, have declined to comment.

chinese_item:
英国汽车工业正处于一个转折点——它能否被拯救？
它们共同象征着英国汽车业看似长期的衰退。
隐藏的更深层次问题英国汽车工业规模庞大。
2016年，英国生产了182万辆新车——这是自1999年以来的最高产量。
JATO Dynamics的费利佩·穆尼奥斯解释说：“在英国运营的汽车制造商在欧洲及其他地区也有工厂，因此对他们来说找到替代英国生产的地点并不难。”
english_item:
The UK car industry is at a tipping point - can it be saved?
Together, they have come to symbolise an apparent long-term decline in the UK motor industry.
A concealed deeper problemThe UK car industry is sprawling.
In 2016, the UK produced 1.82m new vehicles – more than at any point since 1999.
"Car makers operating in the UK also have factories in Europe and elsewhere, so it's not hard for them to find a replacement for their UK production," explains Felipe Munoz of JATO Dynamics.

chinese_item:
劳伦斯一家前往塞拉利昂志愿工作一年
2025年6月12日 分享 保存 林兹·金霍恩 BBC新闻 分享 保存 慈善船组织

伊恩·劳伦斯和他的家人登上了“全球怜悯号”，准备在塞拉利昂度过10个月的志愿服务时间。在过去的一年里，这位海洋领航员和他的四口之家一直在塞拉利昂海岸的一艘医院船上做志愿者。

他从南安普敦的英国联合港口公司获得了为期一年的无薪假期，以便与国际医疗慈善机构慈善船组织合作。这家人于2024年7月离开了索尔兹伯里，劳伦斯先生担任船长，而医务人员则进行了1,600台手术。

“所以当我们听说慈善船组织正在寻找有资质的海员到他们的船上做志愿者时，我们就报名了。”

“塞拉利昂是一个美好的国家，”他说。
english_item:
Family move to Sierra Leone to volunteer for a year12 June 2025 Share Save Linzi Kinghorn BBC News Share SaveMercy Ships Ian Lawrence and his family boarded the Global Mercy to spend 10 months volunteering in Sierra LeoneFor the past year, marine pilot Ian Lawrence and his family of four have been volunteering on a hospital ship off the coast of Sierra Leone.
He was granted a year's unpaid leave from Associated British Ports in Southampton to work with the international healthcare charity Mercy Ships.
The family left Salisbury in July 2024, and Mr Lawrence captained the ship while medics carried out 1,600 surgeries.
"So when we heard that Mercy Ships were looking for qualified mariners to volunteer on board their ships we signed up."
"Sierra Leone is a wonderful country," he said.

chinese_item:
用刀制成的长凳向犯罪受害者致敬
3小时前 分享 保存 Eve Connor 东北及坎布里亚 分享 保存
诺森比亚警方希望这一活动能够教育人们了解刀具的危害，并解决这一问题的根本原因。艺术系学生花费了超过300小时，将没收的刀具制成了一张长凳，以此向犯罪受害者致敬。
这张座椅也是由布莱斯港北安普敦技能学院的学生们使用捐赠并钝化的刀具制作而成的。
在Sceptre活动周期间，这张长凳被揭幕。Sceptre是一系列旨在通过教育和参与来应对刀具犯罪及其根本原因的活动。
她的母亲艾莉森和姐姐卡莉创建了萨曼莎遗产公司，这是一家社区利益公司，旨在提高人们对刀具犯罪毁灭性影响的认识。
“希望这能让人们思考刀具犯罪的问题，并促使他们与家人讨论卷入其中的危险。”
english_item:
Bench made of knives tribute to crime victims3 hours ago Share Save Eve Connor North East and Cumbria Share SaveNorthumbria Police It is hoped the campaign will educate people on the dangers of knives and tackle the root causes of the problemArt students spent more than 300 hours fashioning a bench out of confiscated knives as a tribute to victims of crime.
The seat was also created by students of Northumberland Skills at the Port of Blyth from donated and blunted knives.
The bench was unveiled during Sceptre, a week of activities aimed at tackling knife crime and its root causes, through education and engagement.
Her mother Alison and sister Carly created Samantha's Legacy, a community interest company to raise awareness of the devastating impact of knife crime.
"Hopefully, it'll make people think about knife crime and lead them to have conversations with their families of the dangers of becoming involved in it.

chinese_item: 面临乳腺癌诊断的女性经历“创伤性的等待”5天前 分享 保存 玛丽-路易丝·康诺利 BBC新闻北爱尔兰健康记者 分享 保存奥哈根医生表示，患者面临着诊断和治疗的创伤性等待。安特里姆郡的一位全科医生说，她对北爱尔兰需要乳腺癌治疗的女性“非常担忧”，因为她的诊所中有三名患者被延迟诊断出癌症。“新的地区性乳腺癌服务没有正常运作——存在瓶颈，他们没有达到对高风险女性设定的目标，”奥哈根医生说。这位有家族乳腺癌病史的女性之前接受过两次年度乳房X光检查，结果都是正常的。“英国最糟糕的癌症等待时间”来自英国癌症研究中心的纳赛尔·图拉比表示，北爱尔兰的癌症等待时间是英国最糟糕的。“在今年6月之前的三个月里，近2000名患者在紧急转诊后接受了乳腺癌专家的诊治。”
english_item:
'Traumatic wait' for women facing breast cancer diagnoses5 days ago Share Save Marie-Louise Connolly Health correspondent, BBC News NI Share SaveDr Jilly O'Hagan says patients are facing traumatic waits for diagnosis and treatmentA County Antrim GP has said she is "hugely concerned" for women who need breast cancer treatment in Northern Ireland after three patients in her surgery received late cancer diagnoses.
"The new regional breast cancer service is not functioning - there is a bottleneck, they are not meeting the targets for women who are red-flagged," Dr O'Hagan said.
With a history of breast cancer in the family, the woman had received two previous annual mammograms both of which had been clear.
'UK's worst cancer waiting times'Naser Turabi, from Cancer Research UK, said Northern Ireland's cancer waiting times are the worst in the UK.
"In the three months prior to June of this year almost 2,000 patients were seen by breast cancer specialists following urgent referral for breast cancer," he said.

chinese_item: 一名NHS经理因在Snapchat上诱骗年轻女孩并对她们实施性侵犯和强奸被判入狱28年。警方发现，利普斯科姆还经营着一项副业，销售真实及AI生成的儿童色情图片。警方发现了利普斯科姆用来诱骗年轻女孩的多条信息。但奥利维亚认为这还不够。奥利维亚说，在遇到利普斯科姆之前，Snapchat似乎提供了一种“更容易与人交流的方式”。根据一份判刑前报告，利普斯科姆承认自20多岁起就开始对年轻女孩实施性犯罪。
english_item:
NHS manager who groomed young girls on Snapchat jailed for 28 years for rape and abuse11 November 2025 Share Save Tom Symonds News correspondent Share SaveWatch: Bodyworn camera shows moment police stop Paul Lipscombe in his Tesla at a KFC drive-throughAn NHS manager who sexually abused and raped young girls after grooming them on Snapchat has been jailed for 28 years.
Police discovered Lipscombe had also been running a side business selling both real and AI-generated images of child sexual abuse.
Police uncovered a number of messages Lipscombe groomed young girls withBut Olivia feels this doesn't go far enough.
Olivia said before her encounter with Lipscombe, Snapchat seemed to offer "an easier way to talk to people."
According to a pre-sentence report, Lipscombe admitted he had been committing sexual offences against young girls since he was in his 20s.

chinese_item: 这将推进两年前在迪拜举行的COP28上达成的一项协议，该协议承诺各国“逐步摆脱化石燃料”。巴西提出的第一份协议草案中包含了三个选项及其时间表，但最新版本中没有提到化石燃料。在会场的走廊里，一些活动人士高呼“淘汰化石燃料”，并悬挂着写有“停止亚马逊石油开采”和“1.5摄氏度目标受到威胁：行动起来”的横幅。但也有人指出，在应对气候变化方面取得了显著进展，包括可再生能源、电动汽车以及与COP协议相关的自然保护措施。此外，在COP会议上还讨论了富裕国家向受气候变化影响最大的发展中国家承诺提供的气候资金缺口问题。
english_item:
It would advance a deal made two years ago, at COP28 in Dubai, that committed countries to "transition away from fossil fuels".
A first draft of an agreement in Brazil offered three options including timeframes, but the latest version has no mention of fossil fuels.
In the hallways, groups of campaigners are chanting "fossil fuels out" and hanging banners saying "Stop Amazon oil" and "1.5C under threat: time to act".
But others point to the significant advances in measures to tackle climate change, including renewable energy, electric vehicles, and protection of nature in recent years linked to COP agreements.
Other issues discussed at the COP include the gap in climate finance promised by richer nations to developing nations that are most impacted by climate change.

chinese_item:
公共交通不足影响夜间经济——报告
2025年10月28日 分享 保存 安德鲁·道金斯 西米德兰兹 分享 保存Getty Images
National Express西米德兰兹公司表示，他们提供“全面的晚间公交网络”。
一份来自大学研究人员的报告显示，公共交通的缺乏正在影响西米德兰兹地区的夜间经济。
阿斯顿大学的帕特里夏·罗兹比卡博士发现，40%的观众乘坐公共交通前往活动地点，但由于深夜服务不佳，只有18%的人在返程时使用公共交通。
National Express西米德兰兹公司称其公交服务“通常在大多数主要线路上运营至凌晨1点”。
WMR表示理解“公共交通在当地经济中发挥的重要作用”。
National Express西米德兰兹公司还表示，其大部分线路运营至午夜。
english_item:
Poor public transport hits night economy - report28 October 2025 Share Save Andrew Dawkins West Midlands Share SaveGetty Images National Express West Midlands says it offers a "comprehensive evening bus network"A lack of public transport is having an impact on the West Midlands' night-time economy, a report from a university researcher suggests.
Dr Patrycja Rozbicka at Aston University found 40% of audiences took public transport to events, but only 18% used it for return journeys due to poor late-night services.
National Express West Midlands stated bus services "typically run until 1am on most of the key corridors".
WMR said it understood "the vital role public transport plays in supporting a strong local economy".
National Express West Midlands said the majority of its network runs until midnight.

chinese_item:
这份预算案会让Z世代变成负债的一代吗？
那么，这份预算案真的能帮助年轻一代吗？
即便如此，由于老龄化的支出压力，国家债务很可能还是会从当前水平大幅增加。
自2010年以来，政府的福利政策往往倾向于帮助年长一代，而从年轻一代那里拿走资金。
预算责任办公室预计，在未来几十年里，三重锁定机制将继续推高国家养老金支出。
english_item:
Could the Budget help turn Generation Z into generation debt?
So will this budget really help younger generations?
Even so, the national debt would still likely increase significantly from today's level because of these old age spending pressures.
Since 2010, government policy on benefits has tended to help older generations and to take money away from younger generations.
The OBR projects that the triple lock will continue to push up state pension spending further in the coming decades.

chinese_item: 议员们正在就一项可能在英格兰和威尔士合法化协助死亡的法案进行最后阶段的辩论。他们被允许根据个人观点投票，而不是按照政党路线。随着辩论开始，提出该法案的工党议员金·利德贝特表示，这项立法为希望做出选择的绝症患者提供了“一种富有同情心且安全的选择”。与此同时，保守党议员詹姆斯·克莱弗利提出了担忧，认为目前还没有足够的保障措施。请在我们的直播页面上关注辩论进展。
english_item:
MPs are debating the final stage of a bill which could legalise assisted dying in England and Wales.
They are allowed to vote in accordance with their personal views, rather than along party lines.
As the debate got under way, Labour's Kim Leadbeater, who put forward the bill, said the legislation offered "a compassionate and safe choice to terminally ill people who want to make it".
Meanwhile, Conservative MP James Cleverly raised concerns that sufficient safeguards were not in place.
Follow the debate on our live page.

chinese_item:
“为了婴儿”组织是由商人斯特利奥·斯蒂法诺在英格兰东南部建立的，旨在解决不利条件的根本原因，并重点关注非常年幼的婴儿。
“我们以前认为家庭暴力仅仅是指身体上的暴力。”
首席运营官朱迪思·里斯说：“我们知道30%的家庭暴力始于怀孕期间。”
“如果婴儿出生在一个存在家庭暴力的家庭中，这将影响他们的社交和情感发展以及身体发育。”
她补充说，如果没有支持，家庭暴力会对婴儿一生的人际关系产生影响。
english_item:
For Baby's Sake was set up in the south-east of England by businessman Stelio Stefanou with the aim of tackling the causes of disadvantage and focusing on very young babies.
"We thought domestic abuse was just violence.
"We know that 30% of domestic abuse starts in pregnancy," chief operating officer Judith Rees says.
"If the baby is born into that household where there is domestic abuse, that impacts their social and emotional development, their physical development."
Without support, domestic abuse would have an affect on a baby's relationships "throughout their life course", she adds.

chinese_item:
在2018年接受BBC印地语采访时，印度演员达门德拉表示，当人们谈论他的英俊外表时，他会感到“尴尬”。
“我不知道有什么特别之处——但后来我想，如果他们这么说，也许是真的吧，”他补充道。
这位传奇演员于周一去世，享年89岁。
观看2018年采访片段请点击这里。
english_item:
In a 2018 interview with BBC Hindi, Indian actor Dharmendra said he was "embarrassed" when people talked about his good looks.
"I wonder what's so special - but then I think, if they say it, maybe it's true," he added.
The legendary actor died on Monday, aged 89.
Watch an excerpt of the 2018 interview here.

chinese_item:
一位农业机械企业主表示，在本周财政大臣公布预算案前他感到“非常害怕”。
政府计划于周三公布其经济计划，其中包括遗产税改革。
政府表示，遗产税规则的改革将筹集20亿英镑用于资助公共服务。
博斯先生是在伍斯特大教堂广场的一次集会上发表这番言论的，约有20名农民带着他们的拖拉机参加了这次集会。
“这不仅影响到农民，遗产税还会影响到其他企业。”
english_item:
Business owner 'really scared' ahead of Budget2 hours ago Share Save Elliott Webb , BBC Hereford & Worcester and Elliot Ball , West Midlands Share SaveBBC Murray Boss said trade with farmers had "dropped off massively"An agricultural machinery business owner has said he is "really scared" ahead of the chancellor's Budget this week.
The government is set to unveil its plans for the economy on Wednesday with inheritance tax reforms set to be included.
The government has said the reforms to inheritance tax rules will raise ￡2bn to fund public services.
Mr Boss was speaking at a meet-up in Cathedral Square, in Worcester, which saw about 20 farmers attend with their tractors.
"It doesn't just affect farmers, IHT (inheritance tax) will affect other businesses.

chinese_item:
他说，大多数寻求庇护者都是“正派”的人，他们想要改善自己的生活，但他声称，在任何一群人中总会有那些会“利用”这种情况的人。
他们表示，对于该地区有男性寻求庇护者的想法并不在意。
Sipan先生建议可以对寻求庇护者实施宵禁，限制他们在离开难民营，或者将这些男性安置在城市里。
当10月份宣布计划在军营安置寻求庇护者时，这位母亲说她“不知道该笑还是该哭”。
Charlie Rose/BBC的Ally Nowell担心寻求庇护者会给当地服务带来额外的压力。
english_item:
Most asylum seekers were "decent", he said, and wanted to improve their lives, but he claimed that in any group of people there would be those who would "take advantage" of the situation.
They said they were not bothered by the idea of male asylum seekers in the area.
Mr Sipan suggested a curfew could be imposed on the asylum seekers, limiting their access outside the camp, or the men could be housed in a city.
When the plans to house asylum seekers at the army camp were announced in October, the mum said she "didn't know whether to laugh or cry".
Charlie Rose/BBC Ally Nowell is worried about the extra pressure asylum seekers will put on local services

chinese_item:
高端餐饮能否抵御经济风暴？
但如果有一个领域被认为能够经受住这场风暴的话，那就是高端餐饮业——在最佳环境中提供最好的食物。
安东纳表示，酒店业和高端餐饮业都在经历着艰难时期，情况好转还需要很长时间。
他说，当前的经济形势给许多企业带来了挑战，但高端餐饮“一直以韧性、创新和适应时代变化为特点”。
贝恩斯补充道：“虽然财务压力确实存在，但米其林星级餐厅通过专注于它们最擅长的事情——提供卓越的美食体验，处于独特的位置来应对这场风暴。”
english_item:
Can fine dining weather the financial storm?
But if there was one area expected to weather the storm, it was the fine dining sector - the best food in the best surroundings.
Antona said hospitality and fine dining were both going through the mangle and it would be a long time before things improved.
He said the current economic climate had posed challenges for many businesses, but fine dining "has always been about resilience, innovation and adapting to changing times".
Bains added: "While it's true that financial pressures are real, Michelin-starred restaurants are uniquely positioned to weather the storm by focusing on what they do best - providing exceptional culinary experiences.

chinese_item: 莱拉·道格拉斯和米基·布朗，两位都只有二十出头的年轻人，在周六格林尼治时间18:25于卢尔根路上发生的一起灰色斯柯达与灰色库普拉相撞的事故中不幸身亡。来自格拉纳维圣约瑟夫天主教堂的科姆·麦克布莱德神父表示，这“完全出乎意料”，是“如此可怕的浪费”。麦克布莱德神父说，这场悲剧“深深触动了人们的心”，整个社区都在为这个家庭着想。“这真是太令人难过了，”他说，尤其是现在“人们的注意力正转向圣诞节，大家都期待着节日的到来，却发生了这样的惨剧影响到这个家庭。”“许多人都会因此感到心痛。”
english_item:
Layla Douglas and Mikey Brown, both in their early 20s, died in the collision involving a grey Skoda and a grey Cupra on the Lurgan Road at 18:25 GMT on Saturday.
Canon Colm McBride, from St Joseph's Catholic Church in Glenavy, said it was "just totally unexpected" and "such a terrible waste".
Canon McBride said the deaths had "affected people quite deeply" and that the community was thinking about the family.
"It's just very sad," he said, adding: especially with "people's focus moving towards the Christmas season and people looking forward to it and then this terrible tragedy to affect the family".
'Terrible waste'Canon McBride says many people will "be touched by this

chinese_item: 教育大臣布丽奇特·菲利普森已致信各大学副校长，敦促他们采取切实措施保护犹太学生免受她所称的反犹太主义之毒。将为工作人员提供培训课程以帮助识别骚扰行为。周日在BBC一台与劳拉·库恩斯伯格交谈时，菲利普森女士表示，仇恨行为正成为一个日益严重的问题。点击此处阅读更多相关内容。
english_item:
Education Secretary, Bridget Phillipson, has written to university vice-chancellors urging them to take practical steps to protect Jewish students from what she calls the poison of antisemitism.
Training sessions will be offered to staff to help identify harassment.
Speaking on Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg on BBC One, Ms Phillipson said hateful behaviour was a growing problem.
Read more on this story here.

chinese_item:
阿斯顿·马丁警告称，由于特朗普的关税政策，工作岗位可能面临风险。该公司曾计划在该制造厂生产世界上第一款零排放豪华汽车。阿斯顿·马丁警告说，美国的关税政策以及中国市场需求疲软可能导致公司裁员。
这家豪华汽车制造商在其位于格拉摩根谷圣阿森的制造工厂雇用了多达700名员工。
阿斯顿·马丁在一份声明中表示，任何对工作岗位的影响都将与工会进行“适当的协商”。
2018年，阿斯顿·马丁宣布将在前皇家空军基地生产世界上第一款零排放豪华汽车。
今年，由于担心美国总统唐纳德·特朗普发起的贸易战的影响，该公司的股价承受了压力。
english_item:
Aston Martin warns jobs could be at risk due to Trump tariffsThe manufacturing plant was proposed to build the world's first zero-emissions luxury vehicleJobs at Aston Martin could be at risk over US tariffs and weak demand in China, the company has warned.
The luxury carmaker employs up to 700 people at its St Athan manufacturing plant in the Vale of Glamorgan.
In a statement, Aston Martin said any impact on jobs would involve "appropriate consultation" with unions.
In 2018 Aston Martin announced it would build the world's first zero-emissions luxury vehicle at the former RAF base.
The group has seen shares come under pressure this year over concerns about the impact of US President Donald Trump's tariff war.

chinese_item:
《东区人》中的凯莉·布莱特谈作为自闭症儿童家长面临的挑战
2025年10月6日 分享 保存 凯莉·布莱特 BBC全景节目主持人（道格·福克纳，BBC新闻补充报道） 分享 保存

我一直渴望制作一部关于特殊教育需求和残疾（Send）的纪录片。
这就是为什么我想为《全景》制作这部影片，这样我就可以见到其他经历同样情况的家庭，并与教师、地方政府以及政府官员讨论英格兰如何教育Send儿童。
政府表示已经投入了十亿英镑帮助地方政府支付EHCPs费用，并且投入了7.4亿英镑用于新增Send学校的名额。
雅姬·罗素说，当前的Send系统给地方政府带来了不可持续的压力。西萨塞克斯郡对EHCPs的需求现在已经超过了资金供给。
政府正计划对Send系统进行重大改革，尽管最终方案尚未确定。
english_item:
EastEnders' Kellie Bright on the challenges of being parent of an autistic child6 October 2025 Share Save Kellie Bright Presenter, BBC Panorama (with additional reporting by Doug Faulkner, BBC News) Share SaveKellie BrightI've been desperate to make a documentary about special educational needs and disabilities (Send) for ages.
That is why I wanted to make this film for Panorama, so I could meet other families who were going through the same thing, and speak to teachers, councils and the government about how Send children are educated in England.
The government says it has invested a billion pounds to help councils pay for EHCPs and ￡740m on new Send school places.
Jacquie Russell says the current Send system is putting unsustainable pressure on councilsDemand for EHCPs is now outstripping funding in West Sussex.
It is planning major reforms of the Send system, though final plans have not yet been agreed.

chinese_item:
英国将设立新的国家纪念日，以缅怀恐怖袭击的受害者和幸存者。选定的日期与联合国自2017年起设立的国际纪念和致敬恐怖主义受害者日相吻合。
威斯敏斯特桥袭击事件的幸存者特拉维斯·弗雷恩表示，他“不懈努力”推动英国采纳这样的国家纪念日，以帮助“教育下一代”。
此前，政府因对恐怖袭击受害者和幸存者的支持不足而受到批评。内政部恐怖主义受害者部门随后进行的一项审查发现，对恐怖袭击受害者和幸存者的支持“需要进一步加强”。
english_item:
UK to hold new national day to remember terror victims6 hours ago Share Save Ewan Somerville Share SaveAFP via Getty Images Tributes to the victims of the Manchester arena attacks filled the city centre in 2017The government has announced a new national day "to honour and remember" victims and survivors of terrorism in the UK.
The chosen date coincides with the UN International Day of Remembrance and Tribute to the Victims of Terrorism, which began in 2017.
Travis Frain, survivor of the Westminster Bridge attack, said he had "fought tirelessly" for the UK to adopt a national day of this kind to help "educate the next generation".
Ministers have previously been criticised over support provided to victims and survivors of terror attacks.
A subsequent review by the Home Office's Victims of Terrorism Unit found support for victims and survivors of terror attacks "needs to go further".

chinese_item:
前奥运选手表示，地方议会不应削减“至关重要的”体育活动。2025年10月23日

苏珊·埃格尔斯塔夫称体育活动对健康社会至关重要。

一位前奥运选手表示，在需要削减预算时，地方议会应优先考虑体育活动。

她是在公共支出监督机构——账目委员会指出，地方议会在文化和休闲服务上的支出未能跟上成本上升的步伐后发表上述言论的。

地方政府机构Cosla表示，尽管预算紧张，地方议会仍致力于提供尽可能好的休闲和文化服务。

该机构警告说，如果继续无限制地削减文化和休闲服务的开支，最贫困社区将面临“不平等和排斥”。

“体育活动的好处非常广泛——它关系到健康和心理健康——我认为这确实需要被优先考虑。”
english_item:
Councils should not cut 'vital' physical activity - former Olympian23 October 2025 Share Save Share SaveGetty Images Susan Egelstaff said physical activity was vital for a healthy societyA former Olympian has said physical activity should be prioritised by councils when they need to make budget cuts.
She was speaking after public spending watchdog, the Accounts Commission, said the sum of money councils were spending on culture and leisure services was not keeping up with rising costs.
Local government body Cosla said councils remained committed, within tight budgets, to ensuring that the best possible leisure and culture services were available.
It warned that the most deprived communities would face "inequality and exclusion" if cuts to spending on culture and leisure services continued unchecked.
"The benefits of physical activity are so far-reaching - it goes into health and mental health - I think it does have to be prioritised.

chinese_item:
根据英国气象局的说法，随着全球变暖，英国可能会出现更热、更干燥的夏季和更温暖、更湿润的冬季。
理查德·约翰逊教授研究了坎布里亚郡的山体滑坡以及它们在印度喜马拉雅山脉的影响。这些滑坡是如何发生的？
坎布里亚郡的山体滑坡
PA Media 苹果比是风暴德斯蒙德中受灾最严重的地区之一，达肖伍德博士表示这导致了坎布里亚郡发生大量山体滑坡。在过去十年中，有41起山体滑坡被报告给英国地质调查局，其中今年发生了3起。
虽然该地区不是英国山体滑坡最严重的区域，但英国地质调查局表示，历史上湖区曾多次发生滑坡，使其变得脆弱。
达肖伍德博士说，景观中的先前滑坡点可能因降雨或材料流失而“重新激活”。
english_item:
As the world warms, the UK is likely to have hotter, drier summers and warmer, wetter winters, according to the Met Office.
Richard Johnson Professor Richard Johnson has studied landslides across Cumbria as well as their impact in the Indian HimalayasHow do they occur?
Landslides in CumbriaPA Media Appleby was one of the worst affected areas in Storm Desmond which Dr Dashwood said led to lot of landslides across CumbriaIn Cumbria 41 landslides have been reported to the BGS in the past decade, with three this year.
While the region does not have the worst landslides in the UK, the BGS said many landslips had occurred historically in the Lake District, making it vulnerable.
Dr Dashwood said the previous sites in the landscape can be "reactivated by rainfall or loss of materials".

chinese_item:
来自斯塔福德郡的44岁的丽莎患有自闭症，她说自己在两年的时间里被骗子欺骗了，这些骗子冒充的是《邦迪兽医》中的克里斯·布朗医生。
“他最初是在通过Instagram联系我的，他的个人资料上有一个蓝色的勾，表明这是经过验证的。”她说。
浪漫诈骗是一种日益增长的犯罪行为，在过去的一个财政年度里，英国受害者估计损失了1.06亿英镑。
她在接受BBC Radio WM采访时说，她帮不上忙因为她没有那么多钱，但他让她感到内疚。
“比如，不给出你的私人电话号码，或者被要求为机票付钱。”她说。
english_item:
Lisa, 44, from Staffordshire, who is autistic, said she was tricked over a period of two years by fraudsters who were impersonating Bondi Vet's Dr Chris Brown.
"He first approached me on Instagram, his profile had a blue tick by it to show it was verified," she said.
Romance fraud is a growing crime and saw an estimated ￡106m lost by UK victims in the past financial year.
She told BBC Radio WM that she could not help as she did not have that much money, but he made her feel guilty.
"For instance, not giving out your personal phone number, being asked for money for a plane ticket," she said.

chinese_item: 在肯塔基州路易斯维尔，一架载有38,000加仑燃油的UPS货机在起飞时坠毁，留下了一股高大浓密的烟柱悬挂在空中。至少三人死亡，官方表示预计死亡人数还会增加。肯塔基州州长安迪·贝希尔称这一事件为“灾难性”的，并敦促路易斯维尔居民留在室内避难。
english_item:
A tall, thick plume of smoke has been left hanging in the air above Louisville, Kentucky after a UPS cargo plane crashed during takeoff carrying 38,000 gallons of fuel.
At least three people have died and officials say they expect the number of fatalities to grow.
Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear called the incident "catastrophic" and has urged residents of Louisville to shelter in place.

chinese_item: “我们必须迫使TikTok重新考虑其模式，”该委员会表示，他们听取了青少年和年轻受害者家属的证词。然而，该公司的措施并未给法国跨党派调查委员会留下深刻印象，该委员会将TikTok描述为最糟糕的社交媒体平台之一——对年轻人来说是“痛苦的生产线”。法国议会调查的建议紧随澳大利亚的一项将于12月10日生效的针对16岁以下儿童的社交媒体禁令之后。“年龄限制型社交媒体平台”如Facebook、Instagram、Snapchat和YouTube如果未能采取“合理措施”阻止16岁以下用户注册账户，将面临高额罚款。这项法国调查最初是在一群家庭指责TikTok让他们的孩子接触到可能导致自杀的内容后设立的。
english_item:
We must force TikTok to rethink its model," says the commission, which heard testimony from teenagers and the families of young victims.
The company's measures have however failed to impress the French cross-party commission of inquiry, which describes TikTok as one of the worst social media platforms - "a production line of distress" for young people.
The recommendations of the French parliamentary inquiry come hard on the heels of an Australian social media ban for children under the age of 16 which comes into force on 10 December.
"Age‐restricted social media platforms" such as Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat and YouTube will face steep fines if they fail to take "reasonable steps" to bar under-16s from holding accounts.
The French inquiry was originally set up after a group of families accused TikTok of exposing their children to content that could lead them to taking their own lives.

chinese_item:
Telegram就处理深度伪造色情材料一事道歉。Telegram已经删除了通过该消息应用程序创建和分享的露骨深度伪造视频。官方表示，Telegram已经从其平台移除了这些视频。
几天前，韩国警方称他们已对Telegram展开调查，指控其“协助”此类图像的分发。
最近的深度伪造危机在韩国引发了公愤，此前记者发现警方正在调查该国两所主要大学内的深度伪造色情团伙。
在韩国，被发现制作露骨深度伪造视频的人可被判处最高五年监禁，并处以最高5000万韩元（约合37,500美元；28,300英镑）的罚款。
女性权益活动人士指责韩国当局允许Telegram上发生性虐待行为。
english_item:
Telegram apologises for handling of deepfake porn materialTelegram has removed sexually explicit deepfakes created and shared via the messaging appAuthorities say Telegram has since removed such videos from its platform.
It comes days after South Korean police said they had launched an investigation into Telegram, accusing it of "abetting" the distribution of such images.
The recent deepfake crisis has been met with outrage in South Korea, after journalists discovered police were investigating deepfake porn rings at two of the country's major universities.
In South Korea, those found guilty of creating sexually explicit deepfakes can be jailed for up to five years and fined up to 50 million won ($37,500; ￡28,300).
Women's rights activists have accused South Korean authorities of allowing sexual abuse to take place on Telegram.

chinese_item:
印度南方铁路发布的一段视频显示，一名警察在一名乘客试图登上正在行驶的火车时不慎滑倒时将其救下。
据南方铁路在X平台上的帖子称，这起事件发生在周一，地点是泰米尔纳德邦的埃罗德枢纽站。
这名女子当时正跑着去搭乘埃罗德-金奈耶尔卡德特快列车，最终被铁路保护部队（RPF）的一名警长斯里·贾加迪山安全救下。
english_item:
Video released by India's Southern Railways shows the moment a policeman saved a passenger who slipped while trying to board a moving train.
The incident happened on Monday at the Erode Junction in Tamil Nadu, Southern Railway said in a post on X.
The woman, who was running to board the Erode-Chennai Yercaud Express, was safely rescued by Sri Jagadeesan, a head constable with the Railway Protection Force (RPF).

chinese_item:
欺诈受害者“被司法系统辜负”三天前 分享 保存 Dan Whitworth 斯托克顿镇 分享 保存BBC Joan Holdaway 在接到诈骗电话的狂轰滥炸后被盗取了1000英镑慈善机构警告称，欺诈受害者正被刑事司法系统所辜负，新的分析表明，只有极少数的报案最终导致了起诉。
国家欺诈情报局的数据显示，在截至6月的一年中，英格兰和威尔士记录在案的欺诈案件达到了120万起。
慈善机构受害者支持组织的全国欺诈负责人Wayne Stevens表示：“我们的经验是，受害者在整个刑事司法系统中得到的待遇相当糟糕。”
他说，受害者支持组织呼吁加强宣传活动，提高公众对欺诈真实风险的认识。
一位发言人补充说：“新的一年里，我们将发布一项雄心勃勃的欺诈策略，旨在减少欺诈行为、打击犯罪分子并保护受害者。”
english_item:
Fraud victims 'are being failed' by justice system3 days ago Share Save Dan Whitworth Stockton-on-Tees Share SaveBBC Joan Holdaway had ￡1,000 stolen after being bombarded with phone calls from scammersVictims of fraud are being failed by the criminal justice system, charities are warning, as new analysis suggests only a fraction of reports result in a prosecution.
There were 1.2 million recorded cases of fraud in England and Wales in the 12 months to June, data from the National Fraud Intelligence Bureau shows.
Wayne Stevens, the national lead for fraud at charity Victim Support, said: "Our experience is that victims get a pretty poor deal from the criminal justice system as a whole."
He said Victim Support was calling for improved campaigns to raise public awareness about the real risks of fraud.
A spokesperson added: "In the new year we will publish an ambitious Fraud Strategy, which will reduce fraud, target offenders and protect victims.

chinese_item: Dhinsa一家在2019年达灵顿街卫理公会教堂关闭后接手了这座位于伍尔弗汉普顿市中心的二级*保护建筑。Dhinsa先生与妻子卡马尔吉特以及他们的儿子古查兰和古文德花了大约一年半的时间对这座场所进行了改造。为了能够触及维多利亚式建筑的高天花板，他们搭建了宏伟宫殿脚手架。维多利亚协会表示，这座前教堂的屋顶漏水，墙壁也有裂缝。“它是独一无二的，拥有拱形天花板、柱子和美丽的穹顶，”Dhinsa先生补充道。他还提到，这次改造涉及“精心修复建筑的拱形天花板、马赛克细节、金色柱子和雄伟的穹顶”。
english_item:
The Dhinsa family took on the Grade II* listed Darlington Street Methodist Church in Wolverhampton city centre after it closed in 2019.
Mr Dhinsa with his wife Kamaljeet and their sons Gurcharan and Gurvinder, spent a year and half working on the venue's transformation.
The Grand Palace Scaffolding was put up to reach the high ceilings in the Victorian buildingThe Grand Palace The former church had a leaking roof and cracks in its walls, the Victorian Society said.
"It is one of a kind, with its vaulted ceilings, pillars and beautiful dome," Mr Dhinsa added.
Mr Dhinsa added it involved "carefully restoring the building's vaulted ceilings, mosaic details, gold pillars and majestic dome".

chinese_item:
艾薇儿·斯塔顿在60岁时被诊断出患有后部皮层萎缩症，她亲手递交了一封由150名支持者签名的公开信。
两位前军医将他们反对所谓“不公平痴呆税”的运动带到了威斯敏斯特。
根据菲洛项目所说，与其他永久性残疾不同的是，痴呆症护理在国民健康服务体系中并不是免费的，这使得家庭不得不自掏腰包。
发言人利比·普莱斯表示，“必要的痴呆症护理”不应该被视为一种“可征税的奢侈服务”。
“菲洛项目对我来说和其他许多家庭护理人员来说是救命稻草。”
english_item:
Avril Staunton, who was diagnosed with posterior cortical atrophy at just 60, hand-delivered an open letter signed by 150 supporters.
Two former army doctors have taken their campaign against what they call an "unfair dementia tax" to Westminster.
According to the Filo Project, unlike other permanent disabilities dementia care is not free on the NHS, leaving families to foot the bill.
Spokesperson Libby Price said "essential dementia care" should not be considered a "taxable luxury service".
"The Filo Project is a life saver to me and many other family carers.

chinese_item:
在竞选期间，佐兰·曼达尼主张让纽约市变得更加可负担，计划包括免费公共交通巴士、降低儿童保育费用以及冻结租金。
这位34岁的民主社会主义者将于2026年1月1日宣誓就任市长。
BBC询问了纽约市民希望曼达尼上任后优先处理哪些问题。
视频由吴美英制作
english_item:
During his campaign, Zohran Mamdani ran on making New York City affordable, with plans to make public buses free, lowering the cost of childcare and freezing rents.
The 34-year-old democratic socialist will be sworn in as the city's major on 1 January 2026.
The BBC asked New Yorkers what issues they want Mamdani to prioritise once he's in office.
Video by Meiying Wu

chinese_item: 日本NSK有限公司已告知员工，作为其欧洲业务重组的一部分，公司计划关闭位于达勒姆郡彼得利的两家工厂。联合工会秘书长莎伦·格雷厄姆表示，NSK轴承和AKS精密球厂的员工为了达到目标已经“竭尽全力”，他们原本以为这些工厂会继续运营下去。NSK表示，近年来由于“欧洲汽车产量减少以及来自亚洲的竞争加剧”，这两家工厂遭受了重创。这两家工厂生产的大部分轴承都运往欧洲，用于大众和雷诺汽车上。联合工会呼吁NSK撤销关闭这两个“有生存能力”工厂的决定。
english_item:
Japan-based NSK Ltd has told staff it is looking to end production at its two factories in Peterlee, County Durham, as part of a restructure of its European business.
Unite the Union general secretary Sharon Graham said staff at NSK Bearings and AKS Precision Ball had "broken their backs" to hit targets on the understanding the factories would remain open.
NSK said the factories had suffered in recent years because of the "shrinking European car production and the intensified competition from Asia".
Most of the bearings made in the factories are shipped to Europe for use in Volkswagen and Renault vehicles.
Unite has called on NSK to reverse its decision to close the two "viable" sites.

chinese_item:
最近，有关部门、记者和社交媒体用户发现大量聊天群组中存在成员制作并分享色情“深度伪造”图片的情况——其中还包括一些未成年女孩。
韩国媒体监管机构在这些发现后紧急召开会议。
尹锡悦总统在一次内阁会议上表示：“最近，针对不特定人群的深度伪造视频正在社交媒体上迅速传播。”
据韩国警方称，在线深度伪造性犯罪案件激增。
根据教育部的数据，在过去几年里，针对教师的深度伪造内容数量急剧增加。
english_item:
Authorities, journalists and social media users recently identified a large number of chat groups where members were creating and sharing sexually explicit "deepfake" images – including some of underage girls.
South Korea’s media regulator is holding an emergency meeting in the wake of the discoveries.
"Recently, deepfake videos targeting an unspecified number of people have been circulating rapidly on social media," President Yoon said at a cabinet meeting.
Online deepfake sex crimes have surged, according to South Korean police.
The number of deepfakes targeting teachers has surged in the past couple of years, according to the Ministry of Education.

chinese_item: 二十岁的伦尼住在彼得伯勒，根据当地商会的数据，这里未就业、未接受教育或培训的年轻人比例非常高。剑桥郡商会的首席执行官夏洛特·霍罗宾表示，如果不采取行动，“我们可能会给社区留下伤痕”。自新冠疫情以来，彼得伯勒和剑桥郡16岁至17岁年龄段未就业、未接受教育或培训的人数增加了57%，部分原因是学徒制参与度下降。该组织的首席课程官朱莉娅·贝茨说，他们试图帮助年轻人找到通往工作的“明确路径”。这位来自彼得伯勒的18岁青年表示，他希望能在工业环境中接受培训，并最终自己创业。
english_item:
Twenty-year-old Lennie lives in Peterborough, which has one of the highest rates of young people not in employment, education or training, according to the local chambers of commerce.
Charlotte Horobin, the chief executive of Cambridgeshire Chambers of Commerce, said that without action "we risk scarring our communities".
There has been a 57% increase in the number of 16 and 17-year-olds outside employment, education or training in Peterborough and Cambridgeshire since the Covid-19 pandemic, partly driven by a lower participation in apprenticeships.
Its chief curriculum officer, Julia Bates, said the group tries to help young people find a "clear pathway" to jobs.
The 18-year-old from Peterborough said he would like to train in industrial settings and eventually start his own business.

chinese_item:
现在，他的35岁母亲柯斯蒂·格兰迪森正在TikTok上记录他们的经历，希望能帮助其他有孩子住院的父母。
然而，那天晚上，医生们“蜂拥而至”进入他在爱丁堡医院的病房，因为他的小肺塌陷了，他停止了呼吸。
克里斯·瓦特摄影 科比被诊断出患有脑积水，这种病会导致大脑中危险的液体积聚。“他一天最多发作10次癫痫。”
这家人得到了爱丁堡儿童医院慈善机构的帮助，以应对住院生活的隐性费用。
克里斯·瓦特摄影 希望，科比的姐姐，希望他能在圣诞节时回家与他们团聚。
english_item:
Now his mother Kirsty Grandison, 35, is charting their experience on TikTok in a bid to help other parents of sick children in hospital.
However, that night doctors "came pouring" into his hospital room in Edinburgh as his tiny lung had collapsed and he had stopped breathing.
Chris Watt Photography Kobi has been diagnosed with hydrocephalus that causes a dangerous build-up of fluid on the brain"He was having up to 10 seizures a day.
The family are being helped with the hidden costs of hospital life by the Edinburgh Children's Hospital Charity.
Chris Watt Photography Hope, Kobi's big sister, is hoping he can be at home with them for Christmas

chinese_item:
能源大臣埃德·米利班德承诺将能源账单削减300英镑，但根据提出这一节省估算的专家表示，这一承诺可能会因电价上涨而“化为乌有”。
米利班德的承诺——尽管面对来自反对者的严厉批评，认为这是无法实现的，但他仍然坚持——是基于能源智库Ember在2023年发布的一份报告。
上周，能源大臣埃德·米利班德告诉BBC，工党政府坚持其到2030年降低能源账单300英镑的承诺。
Czyzak说：“现在的问题将是高昂的海上风电成本是否会破坏这些批发能源节省。”
DESNZ的一位发言人表示，该智库的报告“正确地认识到清洁能源是这个国家的正确选择”。
english_item:
Source of Miliband's energy bill pledge casts doubt on savings23 October 2025 Share Save Joshua Nevett Political reporter Share SavePA MediaEnergy Secretary Ed Miliband's promise to cut energy bills by ￡300 could be "wiped out" by rising electricity costs, according to the expert behind the savings estimate.
Miliband's pledge - which he has stood by in the face of fierce criticism from opponents who say it is unachievable - is based on a 2023 report by energy think tank Ember.
Last week, Energy Secretary Ed Miliband told the BBC the Labour government stood by its promise to lower energy bills by ￡300 by 2030.
"I think the question now will be whether the high cost of offshore wind doesn't disrupt some of these wholesale energy savings," Czyzak said.
A DESNZ spokesperson said the think tank's report "rightly recognises that clean power is the right choice for this country".

chinese_item:
一种季节性流感病毒在夏季突然发生了变异。
这其中有很多微妙之处和不确定性，但顶尖的流感专家告诉我，如果这成为十年来最严重的流感季，他们不会感到惊讶。
十年来最严重的流感季？
在一个典型的流感季节里，大约五分之一的人会被感染，但他警告说今年这个比例可能会更高。
去年，近8000人死于流感，在2022-23年的流感季节中，死亡人数接近16000人。
english_item:
A seasonal flu virus suddenly mutated in the summer.
There is a lot of nuance and uncertainty, but leading flu experts have told me they would not be shocked if this was the worst flu season for a decade.
Worst flu season for a decade?
In a typical flu season, around one-in-five of us get infected, but that could be higher this year, he warns.
Last year, nearly 8,000 people died from flu, and in the 2022-23 flu season there were nearly 16,000 deaths.

chinese_item:
三分之二的女性军人经历过性化行为，调查显示国防部（MoD）委托进行的这份报告称这些发现“完全不可接受”，并表示已经启动了一项预防计划来解决不当行为。
在英国武装部队全职服役的女性中，有三分之二的人报告在过去一年里经历过性化行为。
这项针对超过9万名军事人员——包括被称为正规军的全职人员和兼职预备役人员——的调查显示，骚扰行为范围广泛，从言语到身体接触都有。
67%的女性全职人员在过去一年中遇到过某种形式的性化行为——例如不恰当的笑话、色情内容或关于她们外貌的评论。
性化行为在军事驻地或训练单位的开放工作场所最为常见。
english_item:
Two-thirds of military women experienced sexualised behaviour, survey saysThe Ministry of Defence (MoD), which commissioned the report, called the findings "wholly unacceptable" and said it had launched a prevention programme to address unacceptable behaviour.
Two-thirds of women serving full-time in the UK's armed forces reported experiencing sexualised behaviour over the past year, according to a survey.
The survey of more than 90,000 military personnel - including full-time personnel referred to as regulars, and part-time reservists - highlights a wide spectrum of harassment – from verbal to physical.
Sixty-seven percent of female full-time personnel had encountered some kind of sexualised behaviour in the last year – such as inappropriate jokes, pornography, or comments about their appearance.
Sexualised behaviour was most common in an open workplace at the military home or training unit.

chinese_item:
雷夫斯会在预算案中打破50年的禁忌，提高所得税吗？
观看：BBC就竞选承诺质询财政大臣雷夫斯
这被称为50年的税收禁忌。
自上次财政大臣决定提高基本税率以来，已经过去了半个多世纪——那是在1975年4月15日，工党的丹尼斯·希利提交了他的预算案。
五十年后，雷切尔·雷夫斯会在三周后改变这一切吗？
当然，也许最终她会选择不提高所得税，并能够说“情况并没有你们想象的那么糟”。
english_item:
Could Reeves break a 50-year taboo by raising income tax in her Budget?
Watch: BBC quizzes Chancellor Reeves on manifesto promisesIt has been called the 50-year tax taboo.
It is more than half a century since a chancellor of the exchequer chose to put up the basic rate of income tax - that was Labour's Denis Healey, who delivered his Budget on 15 April 1975.
Five decades later, could Rachel Reeves change all of that in three weeks' time?
Of course, perhaps in the end she will choose not to put up income tax – and be able to say words to the effect of "it wasn't as bad as you thought".

chinese_item:
美国国际象棋特级大师丹尼尔·纳罗迪茨基在29岁时去世，离他30岁生日仅两周。这位广受欢迎的YouTube国际象棋评论员也被称为“达尼亚”。

国际象棋联合会表示，他在“在线推广国际象棋内容方面发挥了关键作用”。

“这对国际象棋界来说是一个巨大的损失。”世界排名第二的国际象棋选手中村光在社交媒体上写道。

纳罗迪茨基在青少年时期就获得了特级大师的称号——这是国际象棋联合会授予的最高级别称号，此前他在2013年赢得了美国青年锦标赛冠军。
english_item:
US chess grandmaster Daniel Naroditsky dies aged 2921 October 2025 Share Save Harry Sekulich and Gabriela Pomeroy Share SaveCharlotte Chess Center Daniel Naroditsky, also known to his online fans as 'Danya', died two weeks out from his 30th birthdayUS chess grandmaster and popular YouTube chess commentator Daniel Naroditsky has died aged 29.
He played a "pivotal role in popularising chess content online", the International Chess Federation said.
"This is a massive loss for the world of chess," chess world number two, Hikaru Nakamura, said in a social media post.
He earned the title of grandmaster - the international chess federation's highest-ranked chess competitor - while he was still a teenager, after winning the 2013 US Junior Championship.
International Chess Federation

chinese_item:
司法系统正在失效——拉米负责到底2025年11月5日分享保存克里斯·梅森 政治编辑 分享保存路透社上周，一名移民性犯罪者被错误释放后，司法大臣大卫·拉米表示他正在实施“有史以来最严格的释放检查”。
现在政府又面临另一个例子：一个明显、透明且反复失败的司法系统——旨在解决意外释放囚犯问题的措施并没有奏效。
目前，副总理兼司法大臣大卫·拉米对一周前误释24岁的阿尔及利亚性犯罪者布拉希姆·卡杜尔-谢里夫表示“极度愤怒”。
但真正重要的是更大的图景：司法系统在最基本的任务上一再失败——谁应该被关押，谁不应该。
如果你是司法大臣，这就是个大问题。
english_item:
The justice system is failing - the buck stops with Lammy5 November 2025 Share Save Chris Mason Political editor Share SaveReutersLast week, after a migrant sex offender was mistakenly released from prison, Justice Secretary David Lammy said he was implementing the "strongest release checks that have ever been in place".
Now the government confronts another example: a justice system that is palpably, transparently and repeatedly failing – and where measures designed to address the issue of letting prisoners out by accident aren't working.
Now, the Deputy Prime Minister and Justice Secretary David Lammy is saying he is "absolutely outraged" over the mistaken release a week ago of Brahim Kaddour-Cherif, a 24-year-old Algerian sex offender.
But it is the bigger picture here that really matters: the justice system is currently repeatedly failing in that most basic of its tasks – who should be in prison and who shouldn't.
And that, if you are the justice secretary, is a problem.

chinese_item: 英国对新冠疫情的应对措施“太少太迟”，导致第一波疫情期间死亡人数增加了数千人，一项针对政府决策的调查如此表示。报告指出，部长们在一定程度上依赖了“误导性的保证”，认为英国已经做好了准备。如果采取更有效的措施，到2020年7月1日为止的第一波疫情期间，死亡人数可能会减少48%。该报告审视了英国四个地方政府的行为，并对包括规划和决策在内的多个方面提出了批评。她强调，从这次调查中吸取的教训“必须为未来应对任何大流行病或全社会紧急情况的准备和响应提供参考”。
english_item:
UK did 'too little, too late', leading to thousands more Covid deaths, says inquiry4 days ago Share Save Nick Triggle Health correspondent Share Save'Too little, too late': What's in the Covid inquiry report... in 68 secondsThe UK response to Covid was "too little, too late" and led to thousands more deaths in the first wave, an inquiry into government decision-making says.
Ministers were in part relying on "misleading assurances" that the UK was prepared, she said.
The figure would have equated to 48% fewer deaths in the first wave to 1 July 2020.
The report considered the actions of all four governments within the UK with criticisms for the nations including over planning and decision-making.
She underlined that lessons from the inquiry "must inform our preparedness for, and response to, any future pandemic or society-wide emergency in the future".

chinese_item:
尼日利亚基督教协会表示，尼日尔州帕皮里圣玛丽学校有303名学生和12名教师被绑架，这一数字远超之前的估计。
修正后的被绑架人数超过了2014年臭名昭著的奇博克大规模绑架事件中的276人。
多米尼克·阿达姆的女儿们在这所学校上学但没有被带走，他告诉BBC：“大家都很虚弱……这件事让所有人都措手不及。”
周六，尼日尔州下令所有学校关闭以应对这起绑架事件。
尼日尔州当局表示，该校无视了在收到袭击风险增加的情报警告后要求关闭所有寄宿设施的命令。
english_item:
The Christian Association of Nigeria said 303 students and 12 teachers were taken from St Mary's School in Papiri, Niger state - substantially more than previously estimated.
The revised number of people taken surpasses the 276 abducted during the infamous Chibok mass abduction of 2014.
Dominic Adamu, whose daughters attend the school but were not taken, told the BBC: "Everybody is weak... it took everybody by surprise."
All schools in Niger state were ordered on Saturday to close in response to the kidnapping.
Authorities in Niger state said the school had disregarded an order to close all boarding facilities following intelligence warnings of a heightened risk of attacks.

chinese_item:
印度尼西亚爪哇岛上的最高峰塞梅鲁火山爆发了，喷发出高达2公里（1.2英里）的巨型火山灰云柱。
可以看到大量烟雾吞没了桥梁，并蔓延到周围的乡村地区，让当地居民停下脚步。
监控录像显示，从山顶7公里处涌出了一股火山碎屑流——这是一种快速移动的热气、火山灰和火山岩的混合物。
english_item:
The highest mountain on Indonesia's Java Island, a volcano called Mount Semeru, has erupted, spewing gigantic columns of ash clouds as tall as 2km (1.2 miles) above its peak.
Large plumes of smoke can be seen engulfing a bridge and spreading across the surrounding countryside, stopping locals in their tracks.
CCTV footage showed a pyroclastic flow – a fast-moving avalanche of hot gas, ash and volcanic rock – billowing from the mountain, with a distance of 7km from the summit.

chinese_item:
英格兰发布了寒冷健康警报，意味着老年人和有健康问题的人可能会受到“重大影响”，同时英格兰东北部地区还发出了黄色结冰警告。
在英格兰，英国健康安全局（UKHSA）对西北部、东北部以及约克郡和亨伯地区发布了琥珀色寒冷健康警报，直到周六格林尼治标准时间上午8点，其他地区则处于较轻的黄色警报之下。
这些警报提醒社区中的弱势群体面临风险，并且医疗服务和社会护理服务的需求可能增加。
早些时候，英格兰、苏格兰和威尔士部分地区都发布了黄色结冰警告，但到周五中午12点时，这些警告均已失效。
国家铁路公司已提醒乘客，在受寒冷天气影响的地区出行前要检查行程。
english_item:
Cold health alerts have been issued for England meaning there could be "significant impacts" to the elderly and people with health conditions, while a yellow ice warning is in place in the north-east of England.
In England, amber cold-health alerts have been issued by the UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) until 08:00 GMT on Saturday for the North West, North East, and Yorkshire and Humber, with all other areas under less severe yellow alerts.
The alerts warn of risks to vulnerable members of the community and higher demand for health and social care services.
Earlier, several yellow ice warnings were in place across parts of England, Scotland and Wales, but these had all expired by 12:00 on Friday.
National Rail had warned passengers to check their journeys before they travel in the areas affected by the cold weather.

chinese_item:
这一数字低于此前估计的每笔汽车交易不到950英镑，因为有数百万人正在等待因不当销售汽车金融产品而获得赔偿。
来自特伦瑟姆、斯托克-昂-特伦特的安德鲁·温驰是将这些公司告上最高法院的三人之一，原因是贷款中隐藏了佣金。
这些赔偿涉及放贷人与经销商之间的佣金安排、不公平合同以及向购车者提供的不准确信息。
金融行为监管局（FCA）表示，这可能适用于2007年4月至2024年11月期间签订的大约1400万笔贷款。
“他们本着诚信签订了这些合同，支付了款项，他们……应该得到合理的赔偿。”
english_item:
The figure is lower than a previous estimate of less than ￡950 per car deal, as millions of people await redress for car finance mis-selling.
Andrew Wrench – from Trentham, Stoke-on-Trent, was one of three people who took the companies to the Supreme Court over hidden commissions on loans.
The payouts are over commission arrangements between lenders and dealers, unfair contracts, and inaccurate information given to car buyers.
The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) said they could apply to about 14 million loans taken out between April 2007 and November 2024.
"They've taken those contracts in good faith, they've paid the payments and they... deserve a decent amount of compensation.

chinese_item:
电视节目《约克郡兽医》中的朱利安·诺顿支持心理健康运动
13小时前 分享 保存 理查德·爱德华兹 北约克郡政治记者 分享 保存DAISYBECK STUDIOS

朱利安·诺顿表示，他亲身经历了在偏远社区工作所面临的困境。兽医兼电视名人朱利安·诺顿支持北约克郡的一项旨在改善感到孤立的男性心理健康支持的运动。

诺顿因在第五频道的《约克郡兽医》中出镜而闻名，该系列节目记录了兽医们在北约克郡各地治疗动物的工作。

诺顿说，过去他很难谈论自己在心理健康方面的压力。“在我年轻的时候，根本不存在心理健康这个概念，你只能硬着头皮继续下去。”

今年七月，总部位于约克的心理健康慈善机构Mainstay的经理林恩·詹姆斯表示，她支持资金分配，但对资金如何分配有一些“保留意见”。
english_item:
TV's Yorkshire Vet backing mental health campaign13 hours ago Share Save Richard Edwards North Yorkshire political reporter Share SaveDAISYBECK STUDIOS Julian Norton says he has witnessed the struggles of working in isolated communities firsthandVeterinary surgeon and TV personality Julian Norton has backed a North Yorkshire campaign aiming to improve mental health support for men feeling isolated.
Norton is known for his appearances on Channel 5's The Yorkshire Vet, a series following the work of vets treating animals across North Yorkshire.
Norton said he has struggled in the past to talk about pressures on his own mental health.
"Mental health didn't exist when I was young, you just had to get on with it.
Speaking in July, Lynne James, manager of York-based mental health charity Mainstay, said she supported the allocation of funding but had "reservations" about how it would be distributed.

chinese_item: 在线市场Vinted表示，在一位母亲报告称在浏览衣物时看到一段她认为是色情场景的视频后，已经移除了含有性暗示的广告。来自卡莱尔的44岁女士克尔斯蒂·霍普利说，她在应用程序上寻找浴袍时突然弹出了这则广告。霍普利女士向Vinted举报了该内容，并随后联系了英国通信管理局Ofcom。她告诉BBC新闻，这段自动播放的视频展示了一段“令人作呕”的暴力性行为画面。克尔斯蒂·霍普利对BBC表示，这次经历意味着她将不再允许她的十几岁的女儿们使用Vinted。
english_item:
Vinted blocks 'sickening' sexually explicit ads4 days ago Share Save Shiona McCallum Senior Tech Reporter Share SaveGetty ImagesOnline marketplace Vinted says it has removed sexually explicit adverts, after a mum reported seeing a video depicting what she believed to be a pornographic scene while browsing for clothes.
Kirsty Hopley, 44, from Carlisle, said she was searching the app for a dressing gown when the ad popped up.
Ms Hopley reported the content to Vinted and later contacted Ofcom.
She told BBC News the video, which started playing automatically, showed a "sickening" graphic and violent sexual encounter.
Kirsty Hopley Kirsty Hopley told the BBC the experience meant she would no longer allow her teenage daughters to use Vinted

chinese_item:
SpaceX火箭再次爆炸，碎片从天而降2025年3月7日 分享 保存 马克斯·马扎 BBC新闻 分享 保存观看：SpaceX火箭在试飞失败中失控旋转周四，一枚SpaceX火箭从得克萨斯州发射后不久便发生了爆炸，导致航班停飞，并引发了关于飞船残骸坠落的警告。
这枚巨大的SpaceX星舰是迄今为止最大的火箭，在发射后不久就失去了控制。
目前没有人员受伤或财产损失的报告，但加勒比海岛屿国家的一些人拍摄到了燃烧的碎片从空中掉落的画面。
这是对该火箭进行的第八次测试任务，也是连续第二次失败。
声明称，碎片应该落在预先规划的区域内，而且火箭内不含任何有毒物质。
english_item:
SpaceX rocket explodes, raining debris from sky for second time in a row7 March 2025 Share Save Max Matza BBC News Share SaveWatch: SpaceX rocket spins out of control in test flight failureA SpaceX rocket exploded shortly after it was launched from Texas on Thursday, grounding flights and triggering warnings about falling spaceship debris.
The massive SpaceX Starship, the largest rocket ever created, spun out of control shortly after its launch.
No injuries or damage have been reported but images from those in Caribbean Sea island nations show fiery debris raining from the sky.
This was the eighth mission to test the rocket, and its second consecutive failure.
The statement says debris should have fallen within a pre-planned area and the rocket did not contain any toxic materials.

chinese_item:
英格兰东部的工人们希望预算案能帮助他们应对生活成本问题。两天前，BBC《东部政治》节目主持人阿米莉亚·雷诺兹和尼克·里格比分享了这一情况。皇家酒店总经理维姬·哈特表示，买房是她的首要任务。
在周三的公告发布前，BBC《东部政治》采访了餐饮业、一家工程公司以及服务业的人士。
埃塞克斯克莱克顿皇家酒店总经理维姬·哈特说，生活成本危机已经影响到了她。“对我来说，我每周工作超过50个小时，而且在餐饮行业工作，这些时间并不固定。”
默夫说：“在新冠疫情持续期间，我们一直是优先考虑的对象，因为我们一直在不停地工作。”
english_item:
East of England workers hope for help with living costs in Budget2 days ago Share Save Amelia Reynolds , BBC Politics East presenter and Nic Rigby , BBC Politics East Share SaveRichard Knights/BBC Hotel general manager Vicki Hart said buying a house was her main priorityWorkers in the East of England have been talking about their hopes for the 2025 Budget.
BBC Politics East spoke to people in the hospitality trade, an engineering firm and service sector ahead of Wednesday's announcement.
ReutersVicki Hart, general manager of the Royal Hotel in Clacton, Essex, said the cost of living crisis had hit her.
"Whereas for me, I am working over 50 hours every week and, working in hospitality, they are not very sociable hours.
Merv said: "When Covid was going on, we were very much the priority because we continued working all the time.

chinese_item:
英国失业率在截至9月的三个月内上升至5%，显示出就业市场有所疲软，这是根据最新的官方数据得出的结论。
失业率的增长超出了预期，高于许多分析师在11月26日预算案公布前预测的4.9%。
“与此同时，最新季度的失业率达到了疫情后的最高点。
如果排除新冠疫情期间的异常水平，周二公布的失业率是自2016年8月以来的最高值。
工作与养老金大臣帕特·麦克法登承认“劳动力市场面临挑战”，但坚持认为“英国经济仍在创造就业机会。”
english_item:
UK unemployment rate rises to 5% as jobs market weakens11 November 2025 Share Save Michael Sheils McNamee Business reporter Share SaveReutersThe rate of UK unemployment has risen to 5% in the three months to September, showing signs the jobs market has weakened, according to new official figures.
The increase in the unemployment rate was higher than expected, coming in above the 4.9% projected by many analysts ahead of the Budget on 26 November.
"Meanwhile the unemployment rate is up in the latest quarter to a post pandemic high.
Taking out the skewed levels seen during the Covid-19 years, Tuesday's unemployment rate was the highest seen since August 2016.
Work and Pension Secretary, Pat McFadden acknowledged "there are challenges in the Labour market" but insisted the "British economy is still generating jobs.

chinese_item:
在土耳其中部城市开塞利，一名女子走上了有轨电车轨道，就在电车飞速驶来前几秒钟，一名保安迅速将她带到了安全地带。
该市的交通运营商凯塞利运输公司发布了这段最后时刻救援的视频。
运营商对保安表示了感谢，并提醒人们使用人行横道过马路时要先看两边，同时“记住戴耳机可能让你听不到周围的声音”。
english_item:
A woman who stepped out onto tram tracks in the city of Kayseri, Turkey was whisked to safety by a security guard moments before a tram came hurtling along.
The city's transit operator, Kayseri Ula??m A.?., released footage of the last-minute rescue.
The operator thanked the guard and warned people to use pedestrian crossings, check both directions before crossing, and "remember that wearing headphones can prevent you from hearing your surroundings".

chinese_item:
当地政府计划在普通学校中支持更多有特殊教育需求和残疾（SEND）的儿童，以减少不断上升的成本。
高先生表示，减少对私立特殊学校的依赖以及其中涉及的“巨大”成本，将使更多的资金能够投入到普通学校中。
河畔学习信托基金的首席执行官保罗·詹姆斯说，只有为普通学校提供更多资金，才能实现包容性教学。
他负责牛津郡和斯温顿地区的31所学校，并指出如果要在普通学校环境中教授更多SEND儿童，强有力的领导至关重要。
但詹姆斯先生也提到，“包容性的领导与教学”没有额外的资金支持是无法实现的。
english_item:
A local authority is planning to support more children with special educational needs and disabilities (SEND) in mainstream schools, to reduce spiralling costs.
Mr Gaul says that reducing the council's reliance on private special schools, and the "enormous" costs involved, will allow more funding to go into mainstream schools.
Paul James, chief executive of the River Learning Trust, says inclusive teaching is only possible with more funding for mainstream schools.
He's responsible for 31 schools in Oxfordshire and Swindon and says strong leadership is key if more SEND children are being taught in mainstream settings.
But Mr James said "inclusive leadership and teaching" cannot be done without additional funding for mainstream schools.

chinese_item: 卫生大臣韦斯·斯特林正在“积极审查”是否禁止或限制向年轻人开具跨性别激素的私人处方，这是提交给高等法院的证据所显示的。活动人士认为也应该解决跨性别激素处方的问题，并批评政府未能介入。跨性别激素是给予那些认同与自己生理性别不同的性别的人。他们希望禁止非NHS机构（如私人诊所和海外提供者）开具跨性别激素处方。贝尔女士在青少年时期曾在到现已关闭的由塔维斯托克诊所运营的NHS性别身份发展服务就诊，并在那里获得了跨性别激素。
english_item:
Health Secretary Wes Streeting, is "actively reviewing" banning or restricting the private prescription of cross-sex hormones to young people, according to evidence given to the High Court.
Campaigners argued that the prescription of cross-sex hormones should also be addressed and criticised the government's failure to intervene.
Cross-sex hormones are given to people who identify as a gender that is different to their biological sex.
They wanted a ban on the prescription of cross-sex hormones by non-NHS organisations, such as private clinics and overseas providers.
As a teenager, Ms Bell was given cross-sex hormones after attending the now closed NHS Gender Identity Development Service (GIDS) run by the Tavistock clinic.

chinese_item:
德国一名护士因谋杀10名患者以减轻工作负担而被判终身监禁。2025年11月6日，这名在姑息治疗部门工作的护士被判处终身监禁，罪名是谋杀10名患者并企图谋杀另外27人。
这些犯罪行为发生在2023年12月至2024年5月期间，在德国西部伍尔斯伦的一家医院内。
法庭得知，他在夜班期间给患者注射大剂量的吗啡和咪达唑仑（一种镇静剂），以此来减少自己的工作量。
在宣判终身监禁时，法庭表示该男子的罪行具有“特别严重的罪责”，这将阻止他在服刑15年后获得提前释放。
检察官告诉法新社，正在进行挖掘工作以确认更多潜在受害者，这可能导致该男子再次受审。
english_item:
German nurse gets life in jail after murdering 10 to reduce workload6 November 2025 Share Save Tabby Wilson Share SaveGetty ImagesA palliative care nurse in Germany has been sentenced to life in prison after he was convicted of the murder of 10 patients and the attempted murder of 27 others.
The offences were committed between December 2023 and May 2024 in a hospital in Wuerselen, in western Germany.
The court was told that he injected patients with large doses of morphine and midazolam, a type of sedative, in an effort to reduce his workload during night shifts.
When issuing the life sentence, the court said that the man's crimes carried a "particular severity of guilt" which should bar him from early release after 15 years.
Prosecutors have told AFP that exhumations are taking place to identify further potential victims, which could see the man put on trial again.

chinese_item: 根据Carers UK的研究，在英国共有580万名无偿照顾者，他们通常在照顾家人、伴侣或朋友，其中约有120万人生活在贫困之中。慈善机构Action for Carers Surrey表示，这些数字并未完全反映出问题的全貌，许多人不清楚该向何处求助。Action for Carers Surrey估计，该县有12万名无偿照顾者。“被认定为照顾者是作为无偿照顾者最重要的权利之一。”马丁先生的伴侣患有痴呆症，现在住在养老院，他确实站出来寻求了帮助。
english_item:
There are 5.8 million unpaid carers across the UK, often caring for family members, partners or friends, and about 1.2 million of those are living in poverty, according to research from Carers UK.
The charity Action for Carers Surrey said the figures do not paint a full picture of the problem, with many unsure where to turn.
Action for Carers Surrey estimates there are 120,000 unpaid carers in the county.
"Being identified as a carer is one of the most important rights someone as an unpaid carer has."
'Crisis moment'Mr Martin, whose partner has dementia and now lives in a care home, did come forward for help.

chinese_item: 自那时起，人们已经发现了近6000颗太阳系外的行星。其中许多是所谓的气态巨行星，就像我们太阳系中的木星和土星。如果发现简单的生命形式存在，并不能保证更复杂的生命形式也存在于那里。Madhusudhan教授认为，如果得到证实，简单生命在银河系中应该是“相当普遍”的。“但是从简单生命进化到复杂生命是一个巨大的飞跃，这仍然是一个未解之谜。”
english_item:
Since then, nearly 6,000 planets outside our solar system have been discovered.
Many are so-called gas giants, like Jupiter and Saturn in our solar system.
Reducing human 'specialness'If simple life forms are found to exist that is no guarantee that more complex life forms are out there.
Prof Madhusudhan believes that, if confirmed, simple life should be "pretty common" in the galaxy.
"But going from that simple life to complex life is a big step, and that is an open question.

chinese_item:
NHS对私营公司的支出翻倍
2025年6月11日

将医疗服务外包给营利性公司，指的是NHS将服务转移给这些企业。英格兰西南部的NHS信托机构在过去三年中，对私营公司的支出几乎翻了一番。
由GMB工会提交的信息自由请求显示，该地区的NHS信托机构每年至少向私营公司支付1.51亿英镑。
工会成员声称，NHS服务的外包威胁到了医疗服务的财务可行性与可持续性。
“健康结果与贫困、住房及工作条件密切相关，因此重建NHS也必须解决这些不平等问题。”
他补充说，只有11个西南部信托机构回应了信息自由请求——这意味着实际上支付给私营部门的金额可能远高于1.51亿英镑。
english_item:
NHS doubles amount its spending on private companies11 June 2025 Share Save Bea Swallow BBC News, West of England Share SaveGetty Images Outsourcing healthcare refers to the transfer of services from the NHS to for-profit firmsNHS trusts in the South West have almost doubled the amount they are spending on private companies over the past three years.
A Freedom of Information (FOI) request submitted by the GMB Union showed NHS trusts across the region pay at least ￡151m a year to private companies.
The outsourcing of NHS services threatens the financial viability and sustainability of the health service, union members claim.
"Health outcomes are tied to poverty, housing, and working conditions, so NHS rebuilding must also address these inequalities.
He added that only 11 South West trusts responded to the FOI - meaning the true figure being paid to the private sector could be far higher than ￡151m.

chinese_item: 一名55岁男子被判定在肯尼郡谋杀了他的75岁母亲。2022年8月15日，75岁的米里亚姆·伯恩斯被发现死于她在基拉尼阿德沙纳沃利住宅区的家中。她的儿子比利·伯恩斯以精神错乱为由对谋杀罪名表示不认罪。庭审中提到，在其母亲遇害时，比利·伯恩斯正流落街头。米里亚姆·伯恩斯最后一次被人看到是在当地时间晚上8点到10点半之间，透过她家的窗户。
english_item:
Man found guilty of murdering his 75-year-old mother2 hours ago Share Save Share SaveGoogle Maps Miriam Burns, who was 75, was found dead at her home in the Ardshanavooly housing estate in KillarneyA 55-year-old man has been found guilty of murdering his mother in County Kerry.
Miriam Burns, who was 75, was found dead at her home in the Ardshanavooly housing estate in Killarney on 15 August 2022.
Her son, Billy Burns, had pleaded not guilty by reason of insanity to the murder.
The trial was told Burns was living rough in Killarney at the time of his mother's murder.
Miriam Burns was last seen alive through a window of her house some time between 20:00 and 22:30 local time.

chinese_item: 学院负责人称智能手机禁令具有变革性。金斯布里奇社区学院的蒂娜·格雷厄姆表示，教职工注意到与智能手机使用相关的行为发生了“真正的转变”。这位校长说，自9月份实施智能手机禁令以来效果“非常好”。她提到，老师们在发现学生对智能手机依赖日益增加以及网络安全和不当在线内容问题增多后，推动了这一改变。她还说，在4月份咨询了家长意见后，她很快决定全面禁止智能手机，但仍允许使用简单的“砖头”手机，以便学生在紧急情况下能够联系家人。她表示，更广泛的社会群体对此给予了“极大的支持”，教职工也描述了学生行为方面的变革性改善。
english_item:
College head calls smartphone ban transformativeTina Graham said staff had noticed "a real shift in behaviour" linked to smartphone useA college principal has said a smartphone ban introduced in September has been "fantastic".
Tina Graham, of Kingsbridge Community College, said teachers had pushed for change after noticing a growing dependence on smartphones among pupils, and rising issues around safeguarding and inappropriate online content.
She said parents were consulted in April and said she decided "quite quickly" to move to an outright ban on smartphones while still allowing simple "brick" phones so students could contact their families in emergencies.
She said the wider community had been "incredibly supportive" and staff had described transformative improvements in students' behaviour.

chinese_item:
偶遇邻居家的猫

我跑步路线尽头有一户人家养了一只户外猫。她是一只漂亮的三花猫，有点爱说话。每次路过我都会叫她过来打招呼，顺便挠挠她的屁股。

我觉得她好像开始认出我了。有两次，我离她家只有两户之隔的时候，她突然从灌木丛底下跑出来，跟我聊起了最近的趣事。

最近两周我都没见到她。我猜是因为天气转冷，她的主人就没让她出来了。不过，这并没有阻止一位邻居看到我站在附近“啧啧啧”地叫着。

今天她探出头来！我很高兴地摸了摸她，也好好地“回应”了她的抱怨，然后跟她道别，祝她一路平安。
english_item:
Saw the neighborhood cat
There is a house at the end of my running route that has an outdoor cat. She’s a beautiful calico who is a little chatty. I always call for her when I pass to say hello and give 
 butt scritches. I think she started to recognize me. On two occasions she came trotting out from under a bush, filling me in on the latest tea, when I was two houses away.

The last two weeks, I hadn’t seen her. I figured her owner hasn’t been letting her out since it’s getting colder. Though that didn’t stop a neighbor from witnessing me stand around and make “tsk tsk tsk” calls. 

Today she popped her little head out! I very gladly gave her some pets and responded adequately to her complaints, before bidding farewell and stay safe.

chinese_item:
我去参加了一个派对，穿了一身闪亮的礼服，完美契合当晚的场合。

我感觉自己格外妩媚、优雅、温柔。我喜欢这种充满艺术气息又略带个性的搭配。我原本以为自己会穿得有点过于隆重，但事实证明，这身打扮恰到好处。

我还遇到了一位非常有趣的人，因为他喜欢我礼服上那些闪闪发光的元素。

中学时代的我根本无法想象自己会出现在这样的社交场合。

我通常会在参加完活动后有点紧张……但那天晚上，我却感到无比轻松自在。
english_item:
I went to a party and wore a dazzling outfit that was perfect for the occasion
I felt so feminine, elegant, soft. I loved putting together something artsy and eccentric. I thought I’d maybe be overly dressed but it was the exact right thing to wear that night. 

I even met someone really interesting specifically because he likes visuals like the sparkles in my outfit 

middle school me wouldn’t have ever been able to even imagine this version of myself in this sort of social situation 

I usually get a bit worried socially after events… but I just felt so at peace with the evening

chinese_item:
终于有机会用上我的技能了！

今天我开车经过停车场时，看到一只小麻雀停在免下车通道的路中间。我开车离它很远，它似乎没什么反应，于是我靠边停车，走过去查看。

过去六个月左右，我一直在学习如何处理野生鸟类，所以我把它抱起来，放在鸟类环志员的手套里，然后把它带到路边附近的灌木丛里。它看起来很小，而且一只成年鸟过来冲我叫，所以我不想把它移得太远。这只小麻雀随时可能被车撞到，所以我很高兴当时我在场，把它安全地带到了灌木丛里。??
english_item:
Finally got to use my skills
Today while I was out driving in a parking lot, I saw a small house sparrow sitting right in the way of a drive thru. It seemed unusually unresponsive to me driving a safe distance next to it so I pulled over and walked over to it.

For the past 6 months or so I've been learning how to handle wild birds, so I scooped it up, put it in a bander's grip, and carried it out of the road to a nearby bush. It seemed young, and an adult came over to scream at me, so I didn't want to move it too far. The fledgling was at serious risk of being run over, so I'm glad I was able to be there and carry it safely to shelter ??

chinese_item:
单身派对

在一次单身派对上，我们去了我单身哥哥家，打算用卫生纸恶作剧一下，把房子缠起来。

他后来回家发现碗碟都洗干净了，厨房水槽和台面都用漂白剂消毒过，房子里到处都是便利贴（上面写着各种奇奇怪怪的东西）。就连药柜和冰箱里都有。

他说之后好几年他都时不时能发现这些便利贴。

我们确实用卫生纸把房子缠了一遍，但我记得好像只缠了一棵树……？
english_item:
Bachelorette party
During a bachelorette party, we went to my bachelor brother’s house, with the intent to toilet paper it as a joke.

He came home later to find the dishes washed, the kitchen sink and countertops bleached, and post-it notes (with various craziness) throughout the house. Even in the medicine cabinet & refrigerator. 

He said he continued to find them for years. 

And we did TP the house, but I believe it was only one tree…?

chinese_item:
候诊室里的那本书总是翻到同一页。

牙医诊所的茶几上放着一本关于候鸟的书。每次有人翻阅，最终都会翻到第四十二页。

那一页是一群燕子列队飞行的照片。书脊磨损严重，上面的字迹几乎都看不清了。

今天，一个小女孩想从头开始读，结果书页又翻到了同一张照片。她妈妈笑了笑，把书放回了桌上。

没有人读过第三章之后的内容。接待员说这本书已经放在那里七年了。
english_item:
The waiting room book always opens to the same page.
In the dentist's office there is a book about migratory birds on the coffee table. Every time someone flips through it, they always end up opening to page forty-two.

The page shows a photograph of a group of swallows flying in formation. The spine of the book is so worn at that point that the words have almost been erased.

Today a girl tried to start from the beginning, but the pages fell open again on the same photograph. Her mother smiled and placed the book back on the table.

No one has read beyond chapter three. The receptionist says the book has been there for seven years.

chinese_item:
公交车司机看到我跑着，特意多等了我30秒。

我当时快迟到了，看到公交车停在站台上，就开始跑。司机看到我，等了一会儿，然后笑着打开车门说：“别着急。”
english_item:
Bus driver waited an extra 30 seconds for me when he saw me running
I was running late and saw my bus at the stop. Started sprinting and the driver saw me, waited, and opened the door with a smile saying "no rush.

chinese_item:
我载了一位陌生人一程

我（女，28岁）下午两三点开车回家，这里的阳光非常刺眼。我看到一位六十多岁的外国女士推着行李箱上坡。我摇下车窗问她要去哪里。结果发现她家正好在我回家的路上。于是我告诉她我可以载她一程。我可能吓了她一跳，但她还是上了车。她说直到爬上那座坡，她才意识到自己已经六十岁了。我说我也很讨厌那座坡，我在这里长大，我们终有一天都会六十岁。我把她送到家，她向我道谢。这次偶遇让我心情愉悦。

补充：虽然这座城市以司机乱按喇叭而臭名昭著，但当我停在路中间时，后面的司机竟然没有一个按喇叭。
english_item:
I gave a stranger a lift
I (F,28) was driving home around 2-3 pm where the sun is brutal here when I saw a small foreign in her sixties woman going uphill pushing a suitcase. I rolled down my window and asked her where she was going. Turns out her place was on my way anyway. So I told her I'll give her a ride. I scared her a bit maybe but she got in. She told me she's hadn't realised she had turned sixty until that hill. I told her I hate that hill too, I grew up here and we are all going to turn sixty one day. I dropped her off and she thanked me. The interaction made my day. 

Edit to add that even though this city is notorious for drivers honking you not a single driver behind me honked when I stopped in the middle of the road.

chinese_item:
没人知道我多大了。

最近我和未婚夫去玩迷你高尔夫，刚进门的时候，前台问我多大了。“呃……我是成年人啊？” 她好像在问我是不是12岁以下，哈哈。

她开始道歉，但我告诉她别在意，因为这也不是第一次发生这种事了。第一次是我12岁的时候，在酒吧被认真地要求出示身份证（当时我根本不知道那是酒吧）。

人们通常会先认定我和我妈是姐妹，然后再认定我们是父母子女，不过在餐厅里被问要不要儿童菜单也并不罕见！话虽如此，也有人曾经以为我和我爸在餐厅约会，所以……我也不确定！

最奇怪的一次是陪我妈去看医生，他们居然要确认我和她的关系。 “你是她妈妈吗？”呃……不是。不，应该是她妈妈。

从来没有人知道我多大了，每次有人猜测我的年龄，我都会觉得好笑。
english_item:
Nobody has any idea how old I am
I recently went minigolfing with my fiance, and when we walked in, the person at the front desk asked me how old I was. “Uh… I’m an adult?” Apparently she was asking whether I was 12 or under, lol

She started to apologize about it, but I told her not to worry about it, because it’s not the first time something like that has happened. The first time was when I got earnestly carded at a bar when I was 12 (didn’t realize it was a bar).

People usually assume that my mom and I are siblings before they assume parent and child, but it’s also not uncommon for me to be asked if I want the kids menu at restaurants! That being said, someone also once assumed that my dad and I were a couple on a date at a restaurant, so… not sure about that one!

By far the weirdest is when I was with my mom at the doctor’s, and they wanted to confirm my relationship with her. “Are you her mother?” Uh… no. No, other way around. 

Nobody ever has any idea how old I am, and it makes me laugh every time someone goes to assume my age.

chinese_item:
在办公室工作了20年后，我来到一家面包店工作，很喜欢同事们播放的音乐。

这是我第一份以音乐为背景音乐的工作。老板是一位来自东欧的中年移民，他非常喜欢轻摇滚/流行乐。我说“轻柔”，是真的非常轻柔。他喜欢蒂朵，其他的歌手我一时想不起来了。不过有时候他会放松一下，让电脑播放蝎子乐队（Scorpion）的歌，然后电脑就会播放一阵重金属摇滚。我的直属主管很年轻（在我看来她非常年轻，大概二十多岁），认真专注，她不太在意音乐，但她喜欢查佩尔·罗恩（Chappell Roan）的歌。偶尔，当听到她非常讨厌的歌（比如绿洲乐队的歌）时，她会让电脑跳过，这总是让我笑个不停。我的一位同事是一位和我同龄的大学教授，这份工作是她的副业，她（在我看来）对乡村音乐的品味无可挑剔，我很喜欢她当DJ。我开始在家听一些音乐（我的手机几乎一直都在播放音乐）。人工智能每天晚上都会播放某些特定的歌曲，我们经常拿这些歌开玩笑——有一段时间它一直在播放《500 Miles》，尽管没人喜欢这首歌。这份工作很辛苦（大多数工作都很辛苦吧？），我做得也不好，但音乐却是一个亮点。
english_item:
Working in a bakery after 20 years of office jobs and enjoying the music my coworkers play
This is the first job I've ever had where music was a background presence. The owner is a middle-aged Eastern European immigrant who really likes soft rock/pop. When I say soft, I mean SOFT. He loves Dido, I'm having trouble remembering other specific artists. But sometimes he'll let his hair down and tell the computer to play Scorpion and the AI will go on a little hair metal kick for a while. My immediate supervisor is young (to me she seems very young, in her twenties), serious, and focused, she doesn't waste much time with the music but she likes Chappell Roan and every once in a while when a song that she really hates (Oasis) comes on she'll tell the computer to skip it, which always makes me laugh. One of my coworkers is a college professor my age doing this as a side job who has (to me) impeccable taste in country music, I love when she DJs. I've started listening to some of this music at home (I have music playing on my phone pretty much constantly). There are certain songs that the AI plays every single night, which we laugh about--for a while it was playing "500 miles" even though no one liked that song. This is a hard job (most jobs are hard?) and I'm not good at it but the music is a bright spot.

chinese_item:
??

这是我第一次完全离开家过暑假（我在学校找到了一份工作），每天早上我都会用 Snapchat 给妈妈发我上班路上的视频，因为我知道她很喜欢我的校园。我知道她总会回复我几个固定的表情，每次看到都会让我会心一笑。

我上班的路上会经过一个湖，我喜欢找青蛙。就算我什么也不说，只是把镜头拉近到一只青蛙，她也总会回复一个“??”。

第二个固定的表情是，每次我按下过马路的按钮，当自动语音提示响起时，她都会回复“等等”。

虽然要过好几个小时，但感觉就像在上班路上和她聊天一样，这种感觉真好。开学后我可能会很想念这种感觉。
english_item:
??
This is my first summer spent fully away from home (got a job at my college) and I've been sending my mom Snapchat videos of my walk to work every morning because I know she loves my campus. There's a couple responses that I know to always expect and they make me smile every time. 

My walk takes me by a lake and I like looking for frogs, even if I don't say anything and just zoom in on a frog found she'll always respond with a '??'

The second is Everytime I press the button to cross the street, she'll respond with 'WAIT' when the automated voice does.

Even though it's hours later, it's nice feeling like I'm chatting with her on my way to work and I'll probably miss it when the semester starts.

chinese_item:
每次散步我都会去看一棵小树苗。

我家住在一条小河边，有人在河边种了一棵枫树，因为过去几年里很多老树都被砍掉了。

我在Lens上搜了一下，发现它是一棵紫叶枫，现在到我腰那么高。去年它比立起来的支架还矮，今年长高了，树顶还长出了第二根树枝。

我每次都会摸摸它，然后想着十年后它长成参天大树的时候，抬头仰望它，会觉得很有趣，因为我知道，嘿，我每天都摸过这棵树的顶端。所以我每次都会摸摸它，不只是叶子，还要摸摸树枝。
english_item:
i visit a baby tree every time i walk
i live on a small river and someone planted a maple near the water, since a lot of older trees had to get cut down these past years

i searched it on lens and it's an amur maple and it comes up to my waist. last year it was shorter than the stake they gave it and this year its taller and has a second branch up top

i pet it every time and think how funny it'll be to come back in a decade when it's big and look up at it and think, hey i touched the top of that tree every day. so i make sure to pet more than just the leaves, gotta get the branches too

chinese_item:
工作中一段令人惊喜的暖心时刻

大约一年前，一位同事告诉我，等老板们休假回来后，她打算递交辞呈。一周后，她真的递交了辞呈，这让所有人都感到震惊——之前没有任何迹象表明她想离开。

不久之后，我和一位老板在办公室外，我们聊起了她的辞职。我告诉他我没有辞职的打算，并表示很抱歉这件事让他的妹妹（我们的另一位老板）感到难过。他说员工辞职对他来说并不是什么大事，因为这是公司运营的一部分——但短暂的沉默后，他又补充说，如果我真的离开，他会非常难过。他还说，我本可以提前告诉他同事的计划，这样我就不用独自承担这份压力了。

他这番暖心的话让我之后很长一段时间都感到很开心。
english_item:
A surprisingly kind moment at work
About a year ago, a coworker told me she planned to hand in her resignation once our bosses returned from their holidays. A week later, she did, and it came as a shock to everyone — there had been no signs she wanted to leave.

A little while later, I was out of the office with one of our bosses, and we ended up talking about her resignation. I told him I had no intention of quitting and that I felt bad the news had upset his sister (our other boss). He said staff quitting never bothered him much because it’s part of business — but after a brief pause, he added that he would have a very difficult time if I ever left. He also said I could have told him about my coworker’s plans so I didn’t have to carry that burden alone.

His kind remarks made me happy for quite a while afterward.

chinese_item:
那位总能记住我自带购物袋的超市员工，让我整整一周都心情愉悦。

我家附近的超市里有一位收银员，她在那里工作好几年了。大约六个月前，她开始记住我总是自带购物袋，甚至在我伸手之前就把袋子准备好了。

上周一和周二她都没来，我有点小失望。周三她回来后，笑着问我：“我推荐的苹果怎么样？”

你们猜猜我这周的心情如何？ :D
english_item:
The grocery store employee who always remembers my reusable bags brightened my entire week
There's a checkout clerk at my local grocery store who's worked there for years. About 6 months ago, she started remembering that I always bring my own bags and would have them ready before I even reached for them.

Last week she wasn't there Monday or Tuesday and I found myself slightly disappointed. When she returned Wednesday, she smiled and said "How were those apples I recommended?"

I want y'all to guess how I feel the whole week! :D

chinese_item:
早上八点，我坐在咖啡馆里，等着妹妹考完大学入学考试。

身后，一群男生互相提问，准备着稍后在同一所大学参加下一批同样的考试。

右边，几位妈妈正在享用早餐，她们闲聊着，无所不谈。

不远处角落里，两位女士静静地坐着，一位在写日记，另一位在看书。

还要等两个小时才能去接妹妹。她说她可以自己应付。但她去考场时那轻快的步伐却说明了一切。

回家前，我会请她吃午饭，再给她买一本新书。
english_item:
I'm sitting in a cafe at 8AM, waiting for my little sister to be done with uni entrance exams
Behind me—a group of boys quizzing each other, preparing for the next batch of the same exams later at the same university

To my right—mothers who are catching up for a morning breakfast, calmly discussing everything and nothing

A little bit away over to the corner—two women sitting in peaceful silence, one scribbling down a journal, the other reading a book.

There's two more hours to wait before I come pick my sister up. She claims she can handle herself on her own. The giddiness in her step when she walked towards the test center said otherwise. 

I'll be treating her to lunch and a new book before we go home.

chinese_item:
谢谢奶奶，我爱你。

我在一家餐厅工作。大多数老年人都会冷嘲热讽地要求调低空调温度，但这位和蔼可亲的法国老太太却不一样。她要了一件毛衣。我只能拿出一条羊毛毯。她离开时给了我一个拥抱。我差点哭了，这真是一次美好的互动。

更令人惊喜的是，我的下一桌客人也用了那条毯子，尽管他们一开始有些犹豫。

人们真可爱，我爱他们。
english_item:
Thanks Grandma, I love you.
I work in a restaurant. Most older folks snidely ask for the AC to be turned down, not this sweet French lady. She asked for a sweater. I could only produce a fleece blanket. She gave me a hug when she left. I almost cried it was a lovely interaction.
