chinese_item: 我因为社交焦虑而感到绝望。  我是一个16岁的女孩，高三最后一年，人们都说这应该是人生中最美好的时光，但对我来说却只有无尽的沮丧。我毁了一切，因为我无法像个正常人一样生活。我想，大概是从童年的某个阶段开始，我极度厌恶自己的外貌，以至于害怕和别人说话时，他们会注意到我脸上的每一处瑕疵，或者我会说错话，让他们觉得我很奇怪。我甚至到了痴迷的地步，每次自拍都要修图，哪怕只是一根头发不听话，我都会把它修掉。我知道大多数人并不在意我的外貌，过段时间他们就会忘记我们之间的互动，但我的大脑却不这么认为，这种非理性的恐惧让我无法停止像个怪人一样行事。我几乎没有朋友，认识我的人大多都觉得我有点问题。这一切听起来都很愚蠢，因为其他人都有真正的问题，而我却连人类唯一应该做的事情——与人交往——都做不好。我不明白为什么我会变成这样，我害怕我的余生都会像在学校一样。如果有人知道摆脱这种诅咒的有效方法，请告诉我
english_item: i feel hopeless because of social anxiety im a 16 year old girl, im in the last year of highschool and people say these are supposed to be the best years of my life but they have been nothing but depressing. i ruined everything because i cant act like a normal person. i guess that at some point in my childhood i started hating my looks so much that im afraid that if i talk to people they will notice every flaw in my face or that ill say something that will make them think im weird. ive became obsessed to the point that whenever i take a picture of myself ill edit everything like literally if a hair strand is out of place ill edit it out, and i know most people dont care about how i look and that they will forget about our interactions in a while, but my brain doesnt know that and i cant stop acting like a weirdo because of this irrational fear. i barely have any friends and most people who know me must think i have some kind of problem. and all of this sounds so stupid because everyone else has real problems meanwhile i failed at the only thing humans are supposed to do, to be able to interact with other human beings. i dont understand why did i have to turn out this way and im afraid that the rest of my life will be just like in school, if anyone knows an effective way to get rid of this curse please tell me

chinese_item: 我完全无法应对冲突。  哪怕是再小的事，都会毁掉我一整天的心情。我在新工作三个月了，第一次因为客户不满案子转交给我处理而惊恐发作。客户勃然大怒，破口大骂，还非常具有攻击性。我知道，尤其是当男人对我大声说话时，我的情绪会受到刺激，因为我的童年经历让我父亲是个自恋且暴力的人。虽然在他面前我还能勉强应付，保持冷静，但他一走，我就躲到洗手间里哭了起来。我完全控制不住自己的情绪。他一走，我就彻底崩溃了。尽管我的理智告诉我这不是我的错，这跟我无关，也不是什么值得如此大惊小怪的事，但我的情绪却无法平静下来。接下来的一整天，只要想起这件事，我都会忍不住流泪。最令人沮丧的是，即使我确信自己在这些情况下并没有错，却仍然无法控制自己的情绪。过去两个月来的积极经历，竟然会被一个糟糕的客户玷污，这让我对未来从事这份需要与公众打交道的工作感到更加担忧，也让我感到非常难过
english_item: Can’t handle confrontation at all It ruins my entire day no matter how small it is.. I’m on month three at my new job and had the first experience where I had a panic attack bc a client was upset their case got transferred to me and blew up, cussed, was very combative. I know that especially when men raise their voice at me, I get triggered due to my childhood with a narcissist and aggressive father. Although I handled it fine and maintained composure while he was with me, I had to go cry in the bathroom as soon as he was gone. I had no control of my emotions. I just had a full panic melt down literally the second he walked out. Even though my brain was certain that this was not on me, it was not a reflection of me, and it’s not something to be this upset over, my emotional brain could not calm down. Then the rest of the day at work I would form tears just thinking about the negative event. It’s so frustrating that I can’t control my emotions even though I’m confident in the fact I am not in the wrong in these situations. It’s sad how these last two months of positive experiences can be tainted by a negative client and make me feel much worse about my future in this role working with the public.

chinese_item: 我被骗了！  好吧，昨天我鼓起勇气跟一个男生聊天，结果拿到他的Instagram账号后，他一开始说自己单身，后来又说他有女朋友，还问我要Instagram账号。他居然还敢这么做！虽然这也不能怪他，但我还是被骗了。我也不知道怎么回事，可能是因为他没穿大号连帽衫，也没戴眼镜吧。要是没有这两样，老天爷啊，救救我！他是穆斯林，我是基督徒，我本来不会在意??他的外表，但他居然撒谎说有女朋友，还问我要Instagram账号，我做错什么了吗？就算他没这么做，我的宗教也不允许我这么做。所以我感谢上帝，不然我肯定被骗得更惨

chinese_item: 我是不是太敏感了？  我和伴侣在玩游戏，我们队里有个女生玩得特别好。一局结束后，我伴侣在聊天框里打字说：“我可能流口水了。” 我不知道为什么，但这句话真的让我很生气。我平时挺冷静的，不会把事情看得太重，但不知怎么的，这句话让我感觉很奇怪。我不确定是我太敏感了，还是她真的太过分、没必要这样
english_item: Am i being overly sensitive I was playing a game with my partner, and there was a girl on our team who was really good at it. chinese_item: 新家让我感觉糟透了  完成学业后，我搬回父母家住，想在新工作开始前有个更稳定的环境。一年多后，我决定找房子，而且成功买到了一套，这在如今可不容易。我搬进去四个星期了，但从那以后就一直感到极度焦虑，甚至有自杀倾向。我好像对厨房里的霉菌过敏（可能是），而且我卧室新铺的强化复合地板（LVP）似乎也让我过敏。总之，我觉得在新家呼吸都困难，快要疯了。现在我又回到父母家过周末，终于可以放松一下了（之前搬进去就病倒了）。这一切都让我感觉压力巨大，我满脑子想的都是自杀和再次卖掉房子。我对父母感到非常内疚，他们几个月来一直帮我粉刷房子，还在经济上帮助了我。我只是想倾诉一下。欢迎大家给我一些建议
english_item: Feeling horrible in new house After my study I moved back in with my parents to be in a more stable environment when I would start with my new job. After a little over a year I decided to look for a house and I managed to buy one which is hard enough nowadays. I moved 4 weeks ago but I've been feeling extreme anxiety and suicidal ever since. It seems like I have an allergic reaction to (maybe) mold in my kitchen, also I put a new LVP floor in my bedroom and I also seem to have some allergic reaction to that. Moral of the story is I feel like I can barely breath in my new house and it's driving my insane. Currently I'm back at my parents again for the weekend and I'm finally able to relax again after 4 weeks (got sick right away). This whole situation seems completely overwhelming and all I can think about is suicide and selling the house again. I feel extreme guilt towards my parents who both helped painting the house for months and also helped me financially. Just needed to vent. Any advice is welcome :)

chinese_item: 我总是忍不住胡思乱想，不知道该怎么办。  只要有人说了什么让我不高兴的话，我就会每天每夜、每天至少纠结一个月。哪怕是最愚蠢的评论，我都会因此失眠。上次，老师不相信我，当着全班同学的面说了句“好吧……”。还有一次，一个朋友让其他朋友嘲笑我，她居然还露出了得意的笑容。现在，我又在纠结一个女生说我的头发是蓬松的，我说我的头发比较松散，她居然不相信。她甚至都没见过我披散着头发的样子，也没看过照片。我真不明白自己到底是怎么了。是缺乏自信？还是自卑？我真希望自己能停止每天、每天、每时每刻都在想着别人说的话。我好不容易才从其他事情中走出来。我现在根本无法转移注意力，也睡不着觉。我只想做个正常人
english_item: I can’t stop ruminating and I don’t know what to do. Anytime someone says something that upsets me, I obsess over it for at least a month every day, all day and night. chinese_item: 我的同事  我是个18岁的男生，目前在我父母开的外卖店工作。我算是店里的经理，负责员工管理。大约一个月前，我招了个新员工，17岁的女生（今年八月就满18岁了），她工作非常出色，学东西很快，也很有干劲。大约两周后，我发现自己喜欢上了她。店里不忙的时候，我们经常聊天。当我发现自己喜欢她之后，我甚至以借充电器为借口去了她家（这很奇怪吗？我不知道。但我实在太想她了）。我开始每天都想念她，迫不及待地想等到下一个班次再见到她。但很快，我通过一次聊天得知她有男朋友，她的男朋友比她高一年级。得知真相后，我感觉自己快要崩溃了，她（我觉得）对一切都如此坦诚，我们之间也进行过一些我不会和别人进行的对话。我不知道该怎么办，也不知道该怎么面对她。我不想表白，因为那样会让她很尴尬，毕竟她要和我一起工作一整天。我真的非常需要帮助，才能忘记她
english_item: My coworker So I’m 18M who is currently working at a takeaway shop that is owned by my parents. I’m like the manager of the shop who sorts out the staff. chinese_item: 室友不打扫卫生，也不尊重彼此的界限。我租住的公寓是和另外两个室友合租的，房东是主租客。我觉得其中一个室友不太尊重别人的时间。比如，有一次我在房间里，她发短信问我“你能出来一下吗？我需要帮忙开罐头”。我答应帮忙，结果她打断我讲解，非要让我帮她试试开罐器，“好让她学学”。这种情况她已经发生过四五次了，每次都不一样。我觉得很烦，想请她别再这样了。我们和主租客口头约定每周轮流打扫卫生（轮流负责厨房、浴室和客厅的清洁；厨房使用后每个人负责清理自己的用具）。我一直尽力遵守约定（我患有慢性疾病，能力有限）。但是，由于这周轮到我打扫客厅，我发现浴室和厨房的清洁工作严重滞后。这种情况以前也发生过，他们总是说“我们没时间”。我不知道该如何处理，因为他们似乎既没有清洁技能，也没有时间去学习。我希望尽量减少这件事对我的影响，因为我正在忙着搬走。
english_item: Roommates don't clean and don't really respect boundaries I rent from a head tenant in an apartment with two other roommates.  One of them, I think, has not been great about respecting other people's time. For instance, she texted me saying can you come out? I need help opening canned food while I was in my room. I decided to help, and then she interrupted me mid-explanation to let her try using my can opener so she can learn. She's done this 4-5 times in different scenarios. I find it draining and I'd like to ask her to stop.  We have a verbal agreement with the head tenant to do a weekly cleaning rotation (rotate who takes full responsibility in the kitchen --> bathroom -----> living room; everyone cleaning up after themselves in the kitchen after use. I've been following it as best as I can (i have chronic health conditions that limit my ability to do as much as I can). However, since I'm on living room duty this week, I've seen the bathroom and kitchen get overly neglected. This has happened before and they say we don't have time.  Im not sure how to move forward since they don't seem to have cleaning skills nor the time to develop them. I want to minimize the impact to me while I focus on moving out.

chinese_item: 你们有没有因为别人认识自己过去的自己而感到尴尬？  其实我也不确定这是不是高敏感人群的通病，还是其他什么原因，哈哈。我十几岁到刚成年那会儿在感情方面做了很多糟糕的选择，所以每次回老家都觉得很尴尬，尽管我现在和以前完全不一样了（我觉得我现在的生活完全不一样了，哈哈），而老家的人根本不知道。当然，他们的看法对我来说也无关紧要。不过，我想这大概是人之常情吧，就是渴望被喜欢和接纳，不想在超市里被人看到后说“天哪，还记得以前吗？”  我现在才二十几岁，也许过段时间就好了。其实也没什么大不了的，只是有一两个男朋友当众劈腿，把我甩了而已，我也就接受了，哈哈
english_item: Do any of you feel so embarrassed that some people know a past version of you? Not actually sure if this is a HSP thing or just something else LOL. But my teens to young adulthood was full of crap choices with relationships and it makes me feel embarrassed to go back to my hometown, even though I’m literally 150% different than I was before (I think I’m living a diff life completely LOL) and the people there just don’t know that. Not that their opinions really matter to me? But I guess it’s the normal human thing just wanting to be liked and accepted and for them to not see me at the grocery store and be like “omg remember when”  I’m still in my 20’s so maybe this is just something I’ll grow out of. None of it was even bad really just a bf or two who hung me out to dry cheating wise very publicly and I accepted it lol

chinese_item: 有没有人跟我一样，一想到到处都是摄像头就觉得精疲力竭？  真的太累了，我感觉自己每时每刻都被人盯着。身处公共场合，总觉得有人**时刻**在看着我，感觉24小时都有人盯着我。  我唯一能真正放松的地方就是森林深处
english_item: Anyone else get exhausted from the thought of cameras being everywhere Its exhausting, i honestly feel like i'm being watched every second. Being in public and thinking someone is **always** watching, that theres eyes on you 24/7.   Only place i can truly relax is deep in the woods.

chinese_item: 他看完我的演出后送了我花，我简直要疯了！！！！  好吧，这周我演了一场戏，而且身体也不太舒服。结果他来看了两次，第二次他居然和他妈妈一起等我，还送了我花，真的太出乎我的意料了。花上还有一个特别的吊坠，我只提过一两次，所以他居然还记得，我真的太惊喜了。  而且，过去一周他一直问我感觉怎么样，还特意带了两种止痛药和纸巾到学校，以防万一我需要，真的太贴心了。之前他从来没给我任何暗示，也许这只是他平时对朋友的关心，也许他送花只是因为这个传统，我也不知道。你们觉得我还有希望吗?? 我需要鼓励，我需要建议
english_item: ??,"He got me flowers after my play and I am freaking outt!!!! Okay, so I had a play this week and was quite sick too and what happened is that he came to my play twice and the second time he actually waited for me with his mother and gifted me flowers like it was sooo unexpected. There was also a charm on it with a special meaning that I only mentioned it once or twice so I was so so so surprized that he actually rwmembered that.   ALSO he kept asking me if I have been better for the last week and actually brought two types of painkillers and tissues to school in case I needed them and it was soo nice. He never gave me any signs before that and it might as well just be his normal behaviour towards his friends and maybe he got flowers because of the tradition Idk. Do you think there is hope for me ?? I need encouragement, I need advicee ??

chinese_item: 我真的搞不懂那些口口声声反对家庭博主，却又很喜欢看孩子受伤视频的人。  难道就因为他们没拿钱，就没问题了吗？我觉得嘲笑幼童受伤的羞辱和不幸，正是我们反对家庭博主的原因之一，因为他们把孩子放到网上，让全世界的人看到，甚至可能遭到嘲笑，或者更糟。  我知道我可能有点玻璃心，但我就是不明白，一方面声称反对家庭为了赚钱和点击量而让孩子暴露在公众视野中，另一方面又去嘲笑孩子受伤或出丑的视频，这种逻辑到底是怎么回事？我能理解他们觉得好笑，但更多的是觉得这不就是免费版的“曝光孩子”吗
english_item: ？,"I really don't understand people who say they're against family vloggers but then say how much they love watching videos of kids getting hurt. Like what, just cause they're not getting paid, it's perfectly fine? I just feel like laughing at the humiliation and misfortune of young kids getting hurt is among why we're against family vloggers cause how they're putting their kids on the internet for the world to see and potentially mock or worse.   I know I'm coming across as a snowflake but I just don't understand the logic of claiming you're against family exposing their kids for money and views but then proceed to laugh at videos of kids getting hurt and/or humiliated. Like part of me can see the amusement but mostly I just feel like it's the free version of exposing your kids.

chinese_item: 那些不尊重动物界限的人我是一名动物收容所的志愿者，主要负责陪伴猫咪。人们根本不懂得如何对待猫咪。我见过的85%的人都会在某种程度上虐待它们，这让猫咪对人类充满了恐惧。当然，幼儿无法理解猫咪的行为是可以理解的，但他们的父母却什么都不做，不教他们猫咪想表达什么！成年人为了取乐和满足自己的抱猫欲望，竟然折磨和骚扰猫咪！我亲眼看到一个女人竟然揪着一只猫（它最近刚和兄弟姐妹走散，想独自待着）的骨盆，把它从藏身之处拖了出来。这只可怜的猫拼命地抓住藏身之处，发出凄厉的叫声，可她还是不停地抓着它！猫咪明明已经吓得瑟瑟发抖，人们却仍然强迫它们做任何事！它们会拼命地尖叫、嘶嘶叫、撕咬，但人们还是不停地骚扰它们！我努力让猫咪们更习惯与人类相处，我会耐心陪伴它们，但总有人会立刻破坏我所有的努力！我真的非常讨厌没有人尊重它们。总之：请尊重收容所猫咪的界限。否则，你会给它们造成心理创伤。
english_item: People who can't respect an animal's boundaries For context, I volunteer at an animal shelter and mainly just keep the cats company. People do NOT know how to treat cats. 85% of the people I see will mistreat them on some level, and it makes the cats terrified of humans. Of course it's a given that toddlers won't understand cats' behavior well, but their parents do NOTHING to teach them what a cat is trying to say!! Grown adults will torture and annoy the cats for laughs and their want to hold the cats!!! I saw a woman literally drag a cat (who had recently been separated from his sibling and wanted to be alone) out of its hiding spot by the pelvis. This poor cat was holding on to its hiding spot for dear life and screaming, and yet she still kept grabbing it! Cats will be cowering in fear and people will still force them to do whatever the person wants!!! They'll literally be screaming at the top of their lungs and hissing and biting but the people keep trying to bother them!!! I try to help the cats get more used to humans by sitting with them and being patient but there's ALWAYS someone to instantly ruin any progress I made!!! I really hate how nobody respects them. In summary: please listen to the boundaries of shelter cats. You will traumatize them if you do not.

chinese_item: 21岁生日焦虑  我有点不想庆祝我的21岁生日，但我父母基本上是强迫我庆祝的。加上亲朋好友，大概会有100人。  一想到要成为众人瞩目的焦点/听人讲话，我就很焦虑，而且我焦虑到极点就会呕吐。所以，害怕在大家面前呕吐让我的焦虑雪上加霜。  我知道这听起来有点奇怪，但这已经困扰我好几个月了??。  需要一些让自己平静下来或者转移注意力的方法
english_item: st Birthday Anxiety Im a bit opposed to celebrating my 21st birthday but my parents are essentially forcing me to celebrate. With friends and family it will be about 100 people.  The thought of being the centre of attention/speeches is giving me anxiety, and when I get very anxious I throw up. So the fear of throwing up in front of everyone is making my anxiety even worse.   Ik this is a bit of an odd scenario but it has been giving me grief for a couple months now ??.  Need some tips to calm myself or shift my thinking.

english_item: A woman was sued for the return of a 1 million yuan dowry, which had been borrowed by her mother-in-law to buy a house, after her relationship broke down.

chinese_item: 今天是我的生日。在办公室，我的办公桌旁，我发现了一个包装精美的礼盒和一张卡片，上面写着：“我们所有人都很关心你，希望你喜欢这份礼物！”我打开盒子，里面有沐浴露、止汗剂、香皂、香水喷雾和“防毛躁洗发水”。我明白了。
english_item: Today, it’s my birthday. At work, at my desk, I found this beautiful gift-wrapped box and a card that read, “From all of us, we really care about you, and hope you like your present!” I opened the box. It had body shower gel, deodorant, soap, fragrance spray, and “frizz shampoo.” Hint taken.

chinese_item: 今天我生病在家休息，邻居收到了包裹。我们这栋楼最近盗窃案频发，所以出于邻里友好，我帮她把东西拿到屋里等她回来。她回家后，我立刻把包裹交给了她。结果她不但不谢我，反而告诉物业我才是小偷。
english_item: Today, while I was home sick from work, my neighbor got packages delivered. Our apartments have had a lot of thefts lately so, being neighborly, I brought her stuff inside to wait. When she came home, I gave them right to her. Instead of thanking me, she told the office that I was the thief all along.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友在我生日两天前跟我分手了。更糟糕的是，我发现他竟然给我妈发短信教他怎么跟我分手。更可气的是，我妈还给他出主意呢。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend broke up with me two days before my birthday. Only to make it worse, I found out that he had been texting my mother on how to break up with me. To make it even worse, she was giving him tips.

chinese_item: 今天，我考虑过离开我的丈夫，因为他最好的朋友太专横跋扈，不尊重我们关系的界限，而且还经常在他面前说我的坏话。
english_item: Today, I contemplated leaving my husband because his best friend is overbearing and doesn't respect the boundaries of our relationship, all while talking bad about me to him.

chinese_item: 今天是我实习的第一周。早上到公司的时候，我看到门上贴着一张纸条，上面写着：“公司放假，两周后回来！”我的实习还有两周就结束了。他们完全把我忘了。
english_item: Today, I began the first week of my internship. When I arrived in the morning, I saw a paper on the door that said, “Business holidays. Back in two weeks!” My internship ends in two weeks. They completely forgot about me.

chinese_item: 今天我和室友一起去上课。她戴着耳机，没注意到身后驶来的车。我赶紧把她拉开，她以为我在开玩笑，又把我推了回去……结果我被撞到了车前。我被撞了，从引擎盖上滚了下来。
english_item: Today, I was walking to class with my roommate. She didn't notice the car coming up behind her because her headphones were in. As I pulled her out of the way, she thought I was goofing around and shoved me back... in front of the car. I got hit and rolled off the hood.

chinese_item: 今天我下车时，我7岁的儿子帮我打开了车门。我觉得他这样做很绅士，直到他用车门夹到了我的拇指。
english_item: Today, as I was getting out of the car, my 7-year-old son opened the door for me. I thought it was very gentlemanly of him to do that, until he smashed my thumb with the car door.

chinese_item: 今天，我注意到一位邻居竟然把旧马桶放在自家前院草坪的中央。另一位邻居把厨房水槽放在车道上已经一年了，还有一位邻居把沙发放在草坪上。这些人就是因为我牵着猫在外面散步就嘲笑我的人。
english_item: Today, I noticed one of my neighbors has decided to place an old toilet in the middle of their front lawn. Another one has had a kitchen sink in their driveway for a year, and yet another has a sofa in their grass. These are the people who taunt me for just walking my cat outside on a leash.

chinese_item: 今天，作为一名科学老师，我在课堂上做了一个科学实验。其中一个学生问我，实验结果是不是“PS过的”。他是认真的。
english_item: Today, as a science teacher, I did a science experiment in front of a class. One of my students asked me if it was "photoshopped." He was being serious.

chinese_item: 今天我发现自己怀孕了，特别兴奋。我们之前从来没讨论过孩子的事，因为我们才交往一年，但我真的太高兴了……直到我告诉他，他的脸色瞬间垮了下来。他喝得烂醉如泥后我就离开了，现在我在我妈妈家。
english_item: Today, I found out I’m pregnant and got excited. We’d never discussed kids before since we’ve only been dating a year, but I was so happy… until I told him, and his face just fell. I left after he drank himself unconscious and I’m now at my mum's house

chinese_item: 今天是我上班的第一天，新老板请我吃午饭。我觉得她人真好，就道了谢。她却冷冷地、面无表情地盯着我，说：“哦，别谢我。我拿工资就是干这个的。”
english_item: Today, on my first day of work, my new boss treated me to lunch. Thinking she was really nice, I thanked her for the treat. She fixed me with a cold, unsmiling stare and said, Oh, don't thank me. I'm being paid to do this.

chinese_item: 今天，我收到了一份来自妻子的“礼物”——离婚协议书。她特意等到新年之后才给我，这样就不会出现在她2011年的报税单上。
english_item: Today, I got a gift from my wife in the form of divorce papers. She waited till after New Year's so it wouldn't show up on her taxes for 2011.

chinese_item: 今天，我妹妹说我喜欢一个男生的唯一原因是因为他长得跟甩了我的男生一模一样。我给她看了两张照片反驳她，结果反而证明她是对的。
english_item: Today, my sister told me that the only reason I like one guy is because he looks exactly like the guy that dumped me. I showed her two pictures to argue against it, and ended up proving her right.

chinese_item: 今天是我的生日。妻子送了我一张卡片，上面写着：“你36岁了！” 今天是我35岁生日。
english_item: Today, it's my birthday. My wife gave me a card that read, "You made it to 36!" It's my 35th birthday.

chinese_item: 今天，我跟我的婚姻咨询师朋友说了我老公的一些让我讨厌的习惯，比如打鼾声大、吃饭张着嘴。我没想寻求建议，但她直勾勾地看着我的眼睛说：“离婚吧。” 我对人性的信心彻底崩塌了。
english_item: Today, I told my friend, who's a marriage counsellor, about some of the things my husband does that I hate, like snoring loudly and eating with his mouth open. I wasn't asking for advice, but she just looked me dead in the eyes and said, Divorce. Bye-bye, faith in humanity.

chinese_item: 今天，我看到一个女孩穿着和我一样的衬衫。我兴奋地指给她看。结果她一拳打在我脸上。我没想到人们真的会因为这种事生气。
english_item: Today, I saw a girl with the same shirt as me. I excitedly pointed it out. She punched me in the face. I didn’t think people actually got mad about that.

chinese_item: 今天我和未婚妻闹矛盾了，起因是万圣节派对上一个喝醉的女孩走过来夸我的装扮。我几乎没理她，只是礼貌地和她闲聊了几句，直到她走开。显然，我太热情了，应该立刻粗鲁地把她赶走。
english_item: Today, I'm at odds with my fiancée because a drunk girl approached me at a Halloween party and complimented my costume. I barely acknowledged the woman and made polite small talk until she walked away. Apparently, I was too friendly and should have shooed the woman away rudely and immediately.

chinese_item: 今天，我没有买一块足够我一个人吃的猪排，而是买了两个小一点的猪排，这样收银员就不会认为我是一个人吃饭了。
english_item: Today, rather than buying one pork chop big enough for myself, I bought two smaller chops just so the cashier wouldn't think I was eating by myself.

chinese_item: 今天，有个男的在我家门口放了束花。我回家后发现我爸说花是给我妈买的。我跟爸妈说花是我的，他们却嘲笑我。
english_item: Today, a guy left flowers on my doorstep. I got home to find my dad claiming he bought them for my mum. I told my parents they were mine, they laughed in my face.

chinese_item: 今天我18岁了。爸妈记得我爱吃德式巧克力蛋糕，所以早上起来就给我准备了一个热乎乎的、里面夹着浓郁巧克力酱的蛋糕，还特意为我切了一块。我已经乳糖不耐受8年了。我哭的时候，妈妈递给我纸巾，自己则吃着蛋糕上“快乐”那块。
english_item: Today, I turned 18. My parents remembered that I loved German chocolate cake, so I awoke to a hot, fudge-filled chocolate cake with a slice cut out just for me. I've been lactose-intolerant for 8 years. As I cried, my mom handed me tissues, while eating the Happy part of my cake.

chinese_item: 今天我才意识到，唯一夸我漂亮的男生是我五岁的弟弟。姐姐因此责怪他撒谎。
english_item: Today, I realized that the only boy who ever called me pretty was my 5-year-old brother. My sister then scolded him for lying.

chinese_item: 今天我跑了三英里。我为此感到非常自豪，直到我从梦中醒来，发现自己躺在床上，周围全是空汽水瓶和快餐袋。我已经好几年没锻炼了。
english_item: Today, I went for a three-mile run. I was really proud of myself until I woke up from my dream in my bed, surrounded by empty soda bottles and fast food bags. I haven't worked out in years.

chinese_item: 今天，一位顾客来到我工作的麦当劳，点了一份开心乐园餐。因为他是成年人，我以为是给他们孩子买的，因为孩子不在他们身边。我问他玩具是给男孩还是女孩的，他说玩具是给他们自己的。但我还是问了一遍，才确定是给男孩还是女孩的。
english_item: Today, a person came into McDonald's, where I work. They ordered a Happy Meal. As they were an adult, I assumed the meal was for their child, who wasn't with them. When I asked if the toy was for a boy or a girl, they said the toy was for them. I still had to ask if it was for a boy or a girl.

chinese_item: 今天，我和丈夫用我们仅剩的20美元中的10美元买了披萨。到家后，我下车时踩到泥地滑倒了，失去平衡，打开的披萨盒掉进了泥里。
english_item: Today, my husband and I spent 10 of our last $20 on pizza. Upon arriving home, I stepped out of the car and slipped on some mud, losing my balance and dropping the open box right into the mud.

chinese_item: 今天我下班回家，听到公寓里有人。公寓里应该没人，所以我进去准备跟小偷搏斗。我冲进去，在灯亮之前打中了离我最近的一个人。原来是个惊喜派对。我打断了我女朋友的颧骨。
english_item: Today, I came home from work when I heard people in my apartment. My apartment was supposed to be empty, so I entered ready to fight some thieves. I rushed in and hit the closest person to me before the lights switched on. It was a surprise party. I broke my girlfriend's cheek-bone.

chinese_item: 今天，我撞见爸爸用漱口水，然后又把一些吐回瓶子里，我这才明白为什么最近漱口水的用量没有减少多少。
english_item: Today, I found out why the amount of mouthwash hasn't been decreasing much recently when I walked in on my dad using it and then spitting some of it back in the bottle.

chinese_item: 今天，我在整理家谱的时候发现，至少四代以来，所有娶我妻子家的男士都在婚后十五年内去世了。下个月就是我们结婚十三周年纪念日了，还有两年。大家帮我祈祷一下吧。
english_item: Today, as I’ve been doing our family tree, it's become clear to me that every man who has married into my wife’s family for at least 4 generations has died within 15 years of the wedding. It’s our 13th anniversary next month. Two years to go. Someone help me by keeping their fingers crossed.

chinese_item: 今天我冒雨送披萨。一位女士开了门，看到我浑身湿透，说道：“哇，这雨真大，冒雨送外卖肯定很痛苦。”然后她给了我21美分的小费。
english_item: Today, I was delivering pizza in the rain. A woman answered the door, saw me soaking wet and said, Wow this rain is terrible, it must be horrible to be out delivering in it. She then tipped me 21 cents.

chinese_item: 今天，我姑姑说我看起来瘦了一些。我很高兴，因为我一直在努力减肥。但我妈不知为何觉得这话很伤人。她把我拉到一边，向我保证我绝对没有变瘦。
english_item: Today, my aunt said that it looked like I lost some weight. I was pleased with this, since I've been trying to lose some. My mom, for some reason, thought it was insulting. She pulled me to aside to assure me that I most definitely don't look any skinnier.

chinese_item: 今天我老婆一整天都闷闷不乐，因为她又把三个月前我们和平解决的那场争吵翻出来了。好像她突然又可以毫无理由地重提旧事似的。我原则上拒绝继续争论，所以她才这么生气。
english_item: Today, my wife has been grumpy all day, because she decided to get herself worked up over an argument we had and then peacefully settled three months ago. Like she suddenly gets to reopen the argument for no reason. I’m refusing to continue the argument on principle, hence her grumpiness.

chinese_item: 今天，三个月来第三次，我怀孕的妻子因为我梦见自己出轨而把我打醒，还扇了我一巴掌。我永远不会背叛我的妻子，而她却把这一切都归咎于“孕傻”。距离预产期还有五个月呢。
english_item: Today, for the third time in 3 months, my pregnant wife woke me up by slapping me because I cheated on her in her dreams. I would never cheat on my wife, and she blames it on pregnancy brain. There's still 5 months to go.

chinese_item: 今天，我伸手进口袋，摸到了妈妈的车钥匙。我开车要四个小时才能到家，她显然不可能过来取钥匙。
english_item: Today, I reached into my pocket and found my mom's car keys. I'm a four hour drive away, and she obviously can't come to pick them up.

chinese_item: 今天我和男朋友玩闹的时候，他不小心用手肘撞到了我的眼睛，我眼前一黑。他翻了个身，打开电视看足球比赛，让我上楼去拿冰块。他还说，等我上楼的时候，他想喝杯可乐。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend and I were messing around when he accidentally elbowed me in the eye and I couldn't see. He rolled over, turned on the football game, and told me to just walk upstairs and get ice. He also added that he would like a coke while I am up there.

chinese_item: 今天我交了5000字的作业。回家后，妈妈问我有没有像她一直叮嘱我的那样再检查一遍。我没有，所以没注意到她在第11页写的那段话，提醒我注意细节。
english_item: Today, I submitted my 5000 word assignment. When I got home, my mother asked if I'd checked it through one more time like she always warned me to do. I hadn't, therefore hadn't noticed the paragraph on page 11 that she'd written, telling me to pay attention to the small details.

chinese_item: 今天，我给一个我喜欢的男生发了条短信，说：“亲爱的圣诞老人，我想谈恋爱。”他回复说：“等到明年圣诞节吧……”
english_item: Today, I sent a text message to a guy I like, saying, Dear Santa, I want to fall in love. He replied: Wait for next Christmas...

chinese_item: 今天，我女朋友跟我分手了，还把我的东西全烧了。为什么？因为她发现了我的Tinder账号。自从认识她之后，我就没用过那个账号了。
english_item: Today, my girlfriend dumped me and set all my stuff on fire. Why? Because she found my Tinder account. I haven’t even used it since I met her.

chinese_item: 今天，我妈承认她带我出去吃午饭的唯一原因是因为她替我妹妹疯狂购物，害得我一个人待在家里，她觉得很愧疚。不过，我还是谢谢她请我吃温蒂汉堡。
english_item: Today, my mom admitted that the only reason she took me out for lunch was because she felt guilty over going on a massive shopping spree for my sister while I was forced to stay home alone. I thanked her for the Wendy's meal anyway.

chinese_item: 今天我结束了一周的假期，假期里我完全没有网络。我打开手机查看通知，希望能看到一两条我休假期间错过的消息。结果只有一条通知，告诉我我不在的时候有多少条消息发布了。
english_item: Today, I came back from a week-long vacation where I had no internet whatsoever. I turned on my phone to get notifications, hoping to see a message or two that I'd missed while gone. There was 1 notification, telling me how many s were posted while I was away.

chinese_item: 今天，在朋友的生日派对上，我不小心从楼梯上摔了下来，和室友吵了一架，还因为喝多了弄脏了朋友的衣服。我估计明天就得找新住处了。
english_item: Today, while celebrating at my friend's birthday party, I fell down a flight of stairs, got into a fight with my flatmate, and ruined my friend's outfit after drinking too much. I'm expecting I'll need to find a new place to live tomorrow.

chinese_item: 今天，我们部门最懒的一个人跑来跟我抱怨，说不知道为什么今天的工作进度落后这么多。然后他就去跟朋友聊天45分钟了。我知道为什么。
english_item: Today, the laziest person in my department came and complained to me, while I was working, that they didn't know why we were so far behind today. Then they went to chat to their friend for 45 minutes. I know why.

chinese_item: 今天，我妈妈指责我的猫是“操控者”，并说我们应该把它送走。
english_item: Today, my mom accused my cat of being a manipulator, and said that we should get rid of him.

chinese_item: 今天，我搬回父母家住，帮他们还房贷，以免他们失去这栋传承了三代的房子。我还发现，我现在、我丈夫和我们三岁的儿子都有门禁时间了。
english_item: Today, I moved back in with my parents in order to help them with the mortgage, so they don't lose the house that has been in our family for three generations. I also found out that I now have a curfew, and so does my husband and our 3 year old son.

chinese_item: 今天我从楼梯上摔下来，胳膊骨折了。我去医院打了石膏，但之后还是去上学了。因为没有医生证明，我被记旷课了。当时我的胳膊上还打着石膏。
english_item: Today, I fell down the stairs and broke my arm. I went into hospital to get it put in a cast, but still went into school afterwards. I got written up for truancy because I didn't have a doctor's note. The cast was still on my arm.

chinese_item: 今天我剪了个新发型来上班，到目前为止，每个人都问我是不是输了什么赌。
english_item: Today, I came into work with a new hair cut and so far everyone has asked me If I lost a bet.

chinese_item: 今天，我试图和男朋友谈谈我们之间的沟通问题，但他睡着了。
english_item: Today, I tried to talk to my boyfriend about our communication problems. He fell asleep.

chinese_item: 今天，我睡在床上，突然惊醒，发现我34岁的表哥（他昨晚在我家过夜）正盯着我看。他发现我醒了之后，就悄悄地离开了房间。我告诉了妈妈，妈妈却让我别告诉任何人，就当什么都没发生过。
english_item: Today, I was sleeping in my bed when I woke up in horror to see that my 34-year-old cousin, who was spending the night, was watching me sleep. Once he noticed that I was awake, he quietly left the room. I told my mom, who then told me not to tell anyone and pretend that it never happened.

chinese_item: 今天，我刮了胡子，之前胡子已经留了好几个月了。如果我四岁的女儿还跟我说话，这倒也没什么。但她显然认不出我了，而且觉得我吓人。
english_item: Today, I shaved my face after several months of growth. This would be OK if my 4-year-old daughter would still talk to me. Apparently she doesn't recognise me, and I'm scary.

chinese_item: 今天，我女朋友跟我分手了。她说这是件好事，因为这是“双方共同的决定”，虽然她并不介意继续在一起，但还是我想分手，她尊重我的决定。我真希望自己当时也在场，参与了这场自欺欺人的对话。
english_item: Today, my girlfriend broke up with me. She said it's a good thing, because it was a mutual decision, and that while she wouldn't mind staying together, I was the one who wanted to split, and she respected my decision. I wish I had been a part of this delusional conversation.

chinese_item: 今天，我去看了一场喜剧表演，本以为能让这段糟糕的感情好过一些。结果，我看到的却是一部由爱着我丈夫的女孩创作的、关于我丈夫以及她如何爱他的剧。
english_item: Today, I went to a comedy show, expecting to feel better about a difficult relationship. Instead, I saw a performance written by the girl who loves my husband, about my husband, and how she loves him.

chinese_item: 尽管我已经独自生活了四年，并且有了一份收入不错的工作，但今天，我的父亲仍然抱怨说：“为什么我32岁了还在玩电子游戏？”
english_item: Today, despite the fact that I've lived alone for four years, and have a well-paid job, my father is still whining about, Why am I still playing video games at age 32?

chinese_item: 今天我第一次见了女朋友的父母。没过几分钟，他们就让我走了。理由？显然，我嘲笑她爸爸的口吃。我自己也有口吃，但他们根本不相信。
english_item: Today, I met my girlfriend's parents for the first time. Within minutes, they said I needed to leave. Their reason? Apparently, I was mocking her dad's speech impediment. I also have one but they wouldn't believe me.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友邀请我去他家“玩他的蜥蜴”。我兴奋地冲过城市，才意识到这不是委婉的说法，他真的买了一只鬣蜥。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend invited me over to "play with his lizard." After excitedly rushing across town, I realized this wasn't a euphemism, he actually bought an Iguana.

chinese_item: 今天，我发现我男朋友的妈妈发明了一种新蛋糕，并以我的名字命名：不是因为它好吃，而是因为它的脂肪含量很高。
english_item: Today, I found out my boyfriend's mother has invented a new kind of cake and named it after me: not because it's delicious, but because of the amount of fat in it.

chinese_item: 今天我得向老板提交过去三个月的每日工作报告。她昨天告诉我的。虽然是强制性的，但我在这儿工作三年了，从来没人想看，所以我早就放弃了。现在凌晨三点了，我七点半上班，可我还没做完呢。
english_item: Today, I have to show my boss daily reports on my work over the last three months. She told me this yesterday. They're mandatory, but nobody has ever wanted to see them in the three years I've been working here, so I have long since stopped doing them. It's now 3 am, I start work at 7.30, and I'm not even close to done.

chinese_item: 今天，尽管我们结婚 18 年，育有两个孩子，我的岳父仍然坚持认为，我的妻子总有一天会长大，意识到我只是她叛逆期的产物，然后和我离婚，嫁给家乡一个正派的男孩。
english_item: Today, despite 18 years of marriage and two kids together, my father-in-law still insists my wife will one day grow up, realise I was the result of some rebellious phase she’s going through, divorce me and marry a decent boy from her hometown.

chinese_item: 今天，我帮以前的邻居打扫浴室，因为他让我去，我不想显得没礼貌。而且，还有报酬。他让我“把地板擦得像珍珠一样白”。于是我使劲擦啊擦啊擦。结果发现，地砖本身就是暗淡的黄色。最后，我没拿到报酬。
english_item: Today, I was cleaning my old neighbor's bathroom, because he asked me to and I didn't want to be rude. Plus, I was getting paid. He told me to "get the floor pearly white." So I scrubbed, and scrubbed, and scrubbed. Turns out the floor tiles are naturally a dull yellowish. I didn't get paid.

chinese_item: 今天，我开车去医院看望我的新生儿。我走进病房，把他从婴儿箱里抱出来，搂在怀里。这时，我听到冲水声，看到一个我不认识的女人走了出来。她尖叫起来。我的妻子当时就在隔壁房间。
english_item: Today, I drove to the hospital to see my newborn. I went to the room, picked him out of the crate and held him. Then I heard the toilet flush and saw a woman who I didn't know come out. She screamed. My wife was in the room next door.

chinese_item: 今天上班的时候我得倒垃圾，我一直试图把垃圾袋扔进垃圾箱。试了五次才终于成功。因为垃圾袋很重，我感觉还不错。直到我转过身，看到大约30个同事正在鼓掌大笑。
english_item: Today, I had to take out the trash at work and I kept trying to throw it in the dumpster. After five tries I finally made it in. I was feeling pretty good since the bag was heavy. That was until I turned around and saw about 30 of my coworkers applauding and laughing at me.

chinese_item: 今天，我负责照顾我儿子三年级班上的兔子霍珀斯。明天我儿子要把霍珀斯送回去，让下一个学生照顾它。可是明天就没戏了，因为霍珀斯从我家五楼的窗户跳出去了。
english_item: Today, I was responsible for taking care of Hoppers, the rabbit belonging to my son's third grade class. Tomorrow my son returns Hoppers so the next student can care for him. That won't be happening because Hoppers hopped out my fifth story window.

chinese_item: 今天我去参加了前男友的生日派对。一个烦人的朋友提议我们应该重新开始。当时我们俩都和各自的新伴侣在一起，她这么说的时候，他们就站在附近。
english_item: Today, I went to an old boyfriend's birthday party. An annoying friend suggested that we should try dating again. We were both with our new partners, who were standing nearby when she said that.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友总是跟我说我还没见过他亲生母亲，尽管我已经认识她一年了。然而，今天我碰巧跟她意见不合，她就开始像疯了一样尖叫打人。他不得不把她拽出门外。我现在明白了；我终于见到他“亲生”母亲了。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend is always telling me I haven’t met his real mother yet, even though I’ve known her a year. However, when I happened to disagree with her today, she started screaming and hitting like a psycho. He had to wrestle her out the door. I get it now; I’ve now met his “real” mother.

chinese_item: 今天，我妈在商店给我买了一件T恤。上面印着美国海军陆战队的标志，还写着“海军陆战队员的女朋友”。我是个16岁的直男，我妈只会说西班牙语。
english_item: Today, my mom bought me a t-shirt from the store. It has the U.S. Marines logo on it and says "Marine's Girlfriend." I'm a straight 16 year-old boy and my mom only reads and speaks Spanish.

chinese_item: 今天，在经历了一场痛苦的离婚后，我终于鼓起勇气向一位新朋友敞开心扉，一切都很顺利，直到他回到了前妻身边。
english_item: Today, after I finally got up the courage to open myself up to someone new after going through a brutal divorce, it was going great until he went back to his ex.

chinese_item: 今天，我梦寐以求的女孩，我生命中唯一遇到的、我觉得可以共度余生的人，告诉我她爱我。然后她特意补充道：“……但不是那种爱，所以我们永远不可能在一起。”
english_item: Today, the girl of my dreams, the one person I've met in my life that I could see myself spending the rest of it with, told me she loves me. She then specifically added ...but not in that way, so we could never be together.

chinese_item: 今天，那个因为跟我说“不想谈恋爱，不想认真交往”而不得不跟我分手的男生，竟然开始跟别人确定恋爱关系了。这已经是第四个发生这种事的男生了。我到底哪里出了问题？为什么我不够好，没人愿意跟我谈恋爱？
english_item: Today, the guy I had to let go because he told me he didn’t “want a relationship or anything serious” started becoming exclusive with someone else. This is the fourth guy this has happened with. What’s wrong with me? Why am I not good enough to date?

chinese_item: 今天，我把房东在社交媒体上拉黑了，因为他一直试图联系我，而我们住在一起，他还带着妻子和孩子。我对他没兴趣，我想尊重他，也想保护我的居住环境。我的冷淡让他很不高兴。现在我必须在下个月之前搬出去。
english_item: Today, I blocked my landlord on social media messengers because he wouldn't stop trying to get with me, while living in a house with him, his wife, and kids. I wasn't interested, and wanted to be respectful and protect my living situation. My disinterest upset him. I now have until next month to move out.

chinese_item: 今天是我和男朋友交往三周年纪念日。我问他有没有为我们准备什么，他说有。我爸妈主动提出帮忙照顾女儿，我兴奋极了，结果我们的“计划”居然是去看场足球赛。我该干什么呢？给他做三明治。
english_item: Today, it is my three-year-anniversary with my boyfriend. I asked if he had planned anything for us, and he said yes. My parents volunteered to watch our daughter, I got all excited, and apparently our plans are to watch a football game. What do I get to do? Make sandwiches. For him.

chinese_item: 今天，我好几次被我男朋友的家人误认为是他的母亲。
english_item: Today, on more than one occasion, I was mistaken for my boyfriend's mother, by his own family.

chinese_item: 今天，我得在公司做汇报，为此我做了充分的准备。然而，刚一开口，我就突然恐慌发作，把之前准备的全都忘得一干二净。我磕磕绊绊地完成了汇报，在同事面前的尴尬感与日俱增。我差点晕过去。
english_item: Today, I had to give presentation at work, for which I'd extensively prepared. However, as soon as I started speaking, I had a sudden panic attack and forgot everything I'd rehearsed. I stumbled through the presentation, feeling the embarrassment steadily grow in front of my colleagues. I almost passed out.

chinese_item: 今天，我终于鼓起勇气约我暗恋多年的女孩出去。我紧张得要命，结果搞错了，把原本发给我闺蜜的短信发给了她，内容是：“我准备约她出去。祈祷我别吐在她身上。” 她回复了一个笑哭的表情，说：“你真的需要好好练练撩妹技巧。”
english_item: Today, I finally got the courage to ask out the girl I’ve had a crush on for years. I was so nervous, I got confused and sent her a text meant for my best friend that said, "I’m about to ask her out. Pray I don’t puke on her." She responded with a laughing emoji and said, "You really need to work on your game.

chinese_item: 今天，我偷偷借了我爸的车去商店，结果撞上了我妈的车，当时她和爸妈正从奶奶家回来。两辆车都报废了，我妈锁骨骨折住院了，我也终于明白，爸爸们要是真生气了，真是会气得冒烟。
english_item: Today, I illicitly borrowed my dad's car to go to the store, but crashed into my mom's car as she and dad were returning from my grandma's house. Both cars are totalled, my mom is in hospital with a broken collarbone, and I realised dads really can make steam come out their ears if they’re really mad.

chinese_item: 今天我换了牙刷，因为刷毛磨损了。后来我弟弟问我为什么给他换牙刷。原来我们俩过去几周一直共用一支牙刷。
english_item: Today, I changed my toothbrush because the bristles were wearing down. My brother later asked me why I changed his toothbrush. Apparently we've been sharing the same one for the past several weeks.

chinese_item: 今天，唯一祝我生日快乐的竟然是一个调查网站。出于感激，我还是填了他们那份愚蠢的调查问卷。
english_item: Today, the only person to wish me a happy birthday was a survey website. I took their stupid survey out of appreciation.

chinese_item: 今天，我收到我喜欢的那个男生的短信，感谢我昨晚扶他醉醺醺地回到公寓。短信最后他问：“你待了多久？” 显然，他已经不记得自己向我表白过，也不记得之后那个美妙的吻了。
english_item: Today, I received a text from the guy I'm into, thanking me for helping him drunkenly stumble back to his apartment last night. He ended it with, How long did you stay? Apparently, he doesn't remember confessing his secret love for me, or the fantastic kiss that followed.

chinese_item: 今天，当我快16岁的女儿问我911电话号码是不是以911事件命名时，我原谅了她，因为911事件发生时她还没出生。但是当我18岁的女儿问我果冻是不是来自水母时，我开始怀疑自己是不是作为父母的失败了。
english_item: Today, when my almost-16-year-old asked if the 9-1-1 phone number was named after 9/11, I forgave her because she wasn't even born when it happened, but when my 18-year-old asked if jelly comes from jellyfish, I wondered if I've failed as a parent.

chinese_item: 今天，我跟爸爸开了个玩笑，把他的椅子腿松了，让他一坐椅子就散架。作为惩罚，他罚我站在外面，看着他从车头到车尾，把我的车两侧都划花了。
english_item: Today, I played a friendly prank on my dad, loosening the legs of his chair so it would fall apart when he sat on it. He responded by making me stand outside and watch as he keyed both sides of my car, front to back, as punishment.

chinese_item: 今天，我和丈夫备孕一年仍未成功。我丈夫失业的弟弟和他的未婚妻（法律上仍与他人保持婚姻关系）宣布他们怀孕了。他们两人加起来已经有7个孩子了。
english_item: Today, my husband and I have been trying to get pregnant for a year, with no success. My husband's unemployable brother and (still legally married to another man) fiancée announced they are expecting. They have 7 kids between the two of them already.

chinese_item: 今天我去照看孩子。到那儿的时候，孩子的父母正匆匆忙忙地出门，告诉我他们在桌子上留了给孩子们的注意事项。第一条就说，最大的孩子坚信自己被魔鬼附身了，但让我别理会。还有三个小时呢。
english_item: Today, I had a babysitting job. When I got there, the parents were rushing out the door and told me they'd left instructions for the kids on the table. The first bullet point stated that the oldest was convinced she is possessed by the devil, but just to ignore it. Three more hours to go.

chinese_item: 今天我跟妈妈坐下来想告诉她我怀孕了，结果还没等我开口，她就开始给我讲安全性行为。我觉得这事儿不会有好结果。
english_item: Today, I sat my mom down to tell her I was pregnant, but before I could say anything, she started to lecture me on safe sex. I don't see this ending well.

chinese_item: 今天我妈休假了，我帮????她照顾宠物。我还得把整个房子打扫一遍。不，她没让我这么做。只是每次打开冰箱我都得屏住呼吸，而且房子里没有哪个表面干净到可以随便碰，所以我实在忍不住就自己动手了。
english_item: Today, my mom is on vacation and I’m taking care of her pets. I also get to clean the entire house. No, she didn’t ask me to do that. It’s just that I had to hold my breath every time I opened the fridge, and there is no surface clean enough to actually touch, so I simply couldn’t help myself.

chinese_item: 今天，连续工作了一周，每天18个小时之后，我终于坐下来好好吃顿饭，而不是只吃个三明治。可惜的是，我的厨房乱成一团，我没用放在台面上的干净碗，而是用猫的脏食盆吃了冰淇淋。
english_item: Today, after a week of working 18-hour days, I finally sat down to eat more than a sandwich. Unfortunately my kitchen has become a mess and I bypassed the clean bowl I'd put on the counter and ate my ice cream out of the cat's dirty food bowl.

chinese_item: 今天是母亲节，我给了妈妈一个惊喜，告诉她我六月份会去看她。我们上次见面还是四年前，我们相距4000英里，而且路费非常昂贵。她说：“不行，明年六月见你吧，我想在见你之前再减减肥。”
english_item: Today, for Mother's Day, I surprised my Mother with the news I that I'll be visiting in June. The last time we got to visit was 4 years ago, we live 4000 miles apart and it's a very expensive trip. She said, No, come next June, I want to lose some more weight before seeing you.

chinese_item: 今天，我哥哥宣布订婚了。我将担任伴娘。我的前男友，在交往五年后告诉我他不相信婚姻，现在却要当我的伴郎。我将和他一起走上红毯。
english_item: Today, my brother announced his engagement. I'm going to be the Maid of Honor. My ex, who told me after five years of dating that he didn't believe in marriage, is going to be the Best Man. I get to walk down the aisle with him.

chinese_item: 今天我在排队等候，一边用手机发短信。我听到一声像是打喷嚏的声音，就对前面的男人说了声“保佑你”。他狠狠地瞪了我一眼，然后我闻到一股难闻的气味。那根本不是喷嚏声。
english_item: Today, I was waiting in a line, texting on my phone. I hear what sounded like a sneeze and said, "Bless you" to the man in front of me. He gave me a dirty look as I began to smell something awful. It wasn't a sneeze.

chinese_item: 今天我去看了医生，结果发现自己不孕。我打电话给交往两年的男友，想和他谈谈这件事，我一直希望和他能有未来。可他却只说了一句：“那是不是意味着我以后不用戴安全套了？”
english_item: Today, I went to the doctor and found out that I am infertile. When I called my boyfriend of 2 years, with whom I was hoping to have a future, to talk to him about it, all he said was, So does this mean I don't have to wear a condom anymore?

chinese_item: 今天，我发现了一首很棒的歌，叫《我不想死》，是韩国乐队VINCIT唱的。为了了解更多信息，我搜索了歌名。结果搜出来的不是相关的结果，而是一个自杀预防热线的电话号码。更糟糕的是，现在我的所有社交媒体都被自杀预防广告刷屏了。
english_item: Today, I discovered a cool song called, I Don't Wanna Die by a Korean band, VINCIT. Wanting to find out more about it, I googled its title. Instead of relevant results, I got the phone number to a suicide prevention hotline. To make things worse, now all my social media are filled with ads about suicide prevention.

chinese_item: 今天我和男朋友睡在一起。半夜他看到我的手机收到一条短信，上面写着：“宝贝，我好想你！我过几天就去看你，希望还能见到你，我爱你！”他很生气，就离开了家。原来是我爸爸，他在俄亥俄州。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend and I slept together. In the middle of the night, he saw my phone receiving a text from someone saying, Hey baby, I missed you so much! I'm going to be visiting in a couple of days, hope to see you again, I love you! He got mad and left my house. It was my dad in Ohio.

chinese_item: 今天，我第一次约会。他坚持要去麦当劳，两人分吃一份开心乐园餐，因为他“不想在第一次约会上浪费钱”。
english_item: Today, I went out on a first date. He insisted we go to McDonald's and split a Happy Meal because he didn't want to waste any money on a first date.

chinese_item: 今天我因为“盯着老板看”而被公司记过。很抱歉，我因为睡眠不足导致眼睛酸痛。
english_item: Today, I was written up at work for "leering at my boss". I'm so sorry for having my eyes sore due to lack of sleep.

chinese_item: 今天，我在我最好的朋友的婚礼上致辞。我本来想说“你们俩在一起真好看”，结果紧张得说不出话来，脱口而出“你们俩光着身子真好看”。当时在场的还有一百位宾客和一位牧师。
english_item: Today, I gave a speech at my best friend’s wedding. I wanted to say, “You both look beautiful together.” Instead, nerves took over, and I blurted out, “You both look beautiful naked.” In front of 100 people. And a priest.

chinese_item: 今天，我那疏远已久的父亲——他是一名警察——竟然出现在我的17岁生日派对上。他一到场就开始逮捕未成年饮酒的人。老爸，你这修复关系的功力真不错啊！
english_item: Today, my estranged father, who is a cop, decided to show up to my 17th birthday party. He immediately began arresting people for underage drinking. Way to mend fences, dad.

chinese_item: 今天，我给朋友们发了一条群发短信，问她们有没有时间一起出去玩。其中一个朋友以为我是在跟她聊天，结果她向我表白了。
english_item: Today, I sent a group text round to my friends asking if they wanted to hang out sometime. One of my friends thought this was aimed directly at her and confessed her love for me.

chinese_item: 今天，我试图辞职。我的老板把我叫到办公室，给了我一份辞职警告信，告诉我他知道我住在哪里，还威胁我明天最好来上班，否则他就要来把我拖进公司。
english_item: Today, I tried to quit my job. My boss pulled me into his office and gave me a write-up for quitting, told me that he knows where I live, and that I'd better be at work tomorrow or he's going to come and drag me into work.

chinese_item: 今天，我和一位大学毕业后就没见过面的老朋友喝咖啡。我问起她丈夫的情况，她回答说“他去世了”，然后就走开了。我感到很困惑，于是站起来追了上去。这时她提醒我，我刚才是在参加他丈夫的葬礼，然后就扇了我一巴掌。
english_item: Today, I was having coffee with an old friend I hadn't seen since university. I asked about her husband; she replied, "He died" and walked off. I was confused, so I stood up and took off after her. She then reminded me that I was at his funeral, and then slapped me in the face.

chinese_item: 今天我受邀参加一个派对。因为我很少被邀请，所以特别兴奋。我爸妈都工作到很晚，所以我给几个人发了短信，问能不能搭个便车。结果发现所有人的车都满了。最后，我错过了我人生中为数不多的几次受邀参加的派对之一。
english_item: Today, I was invited to a party. Since I rarely get invited to any, I was super pumped. Both my parents work late, so I texted a couple of people to see if I could catch a ride. It turned out everyone's cars were full. I ended up missing one of the only parties I've ever been invited to.

chinese_item: 今天，我在公司电梯里贴了告示，上面写着我的名字和办公桌电话号码，以防电梯发生故障。我在IT部门工作，所以大楼里有几百个男同事。已经有人在我名字旁边画了个歪歪扭扭的心形。
english_item: Today, I put signs up in the lifts at work with my name and desk phone number as the contact in case the lifts break down. I work in IT so there are hundreds of men in the building. Someone has already drawn a very wonky heart next to my name.

chinese_item: 今天我有点便秘，待在家里，吃了两片泻药。这时我男朋友打电话来说他父母来城里了，想今晚一起吃晚饭，这是我第一次见他们。我已经跑了五趟厕所了。
english_item: Today, I was at home with slight constipation, so I took two laxatives. That's when my boyfriend called me, saying his parents are in town and want to have dinner tonight, this being the first time I've met them. I've already been on the toilet five times.

chinese_item: 今天早上醒来，我心情特别好，几乎是跳下床的，结果却一头栽倒在地。半梦半醒间，我竟然忘了自己少了一条腿。
english_item: Today, I woke up in an amazing mood and practically jumped out of bed, only to fall flat on my face. In my half-asleep daze I'd forgotten that I'm missing a leg.

chinese_item: 今天，老板走进来，说了些什么，我没听清，但我同事轻笑了一声，出于礼貌，我也跟着笑了。他们都用奇怪的眼神看着我。其实老板是在说他妻子的肿瘤，而我的同事一直在咳嗽。
english_item: Today, my boss walked in and said something I didn't quite hear, but my co-worker chuckled so to be polite, I laughed with him. They gave me some weird looks. My boss was actually talking about his wife's tumor and my co-worker was coughing.

chinese_item: 今天我正式入读一所新大学。我买了课本，去上了第一节课，结果发现学校没通知我就改了课表。我已经翻开了书。200美元也退不回来了。
english_item: Today, I started at a new college. I bought my textbooks and went to my first class only to find out that they changed my schedule without telling me. I'd already opened the book. I could not get $200 back.

chinese_item: 今天，我发现我女朋友患有暴食症。更糟糕的是，我发现这件事是因为她把我们所有的房租都花在了食物上。
english_item: Today, I found out my girlfriend is bulimic. Like that wasn't bad enough, I found out because she spent all of our rent money on food.

chinese_item: 今天，我女朋友指责我出轨，因为我为了省钱一直买的是普通品牌的食品，而不是名牌产品。她肯定觉得我把省下来的钱花在别的女人身上了。
english_item: Today, my girlfriend accused me of cheating because I've been buying generic groceries instead of name brand to save money. Apparently, I must be using the extra money on another woman.

chinese_item: 今天晚上睡觉前，我决定把晾好的衣服收起来。结果不小心碰倒了我男朋友心爱的正在酿造的姜汁啤酒。我花了整整一个小时才把地板、橱柜、门、冰箱内外都清理干净。现在到处都黏糊糊的，还散发着一股酵母味。
english_item: Today, just before bed, I decided to put away the dry washing. I ended up knocking over my boyfriend's precious brewing ginger beer. It took me an hour to clean it off the floor, cupboards, door, outside and inside of the fridge. Everything is still sticky and smells of yeast.

chinese_item: 今天，在和丈夫争吵了三个星期之后，我终于发现他并没有真的在出轨网站上注册账号并用信用卡支付费用。是我们的女儿恶作剧做的，她之所以坦白，是因为我们吵架让她压力很大。
english_item: Today, after three weeks of fighting with my husband, I found out that he really didn't create an account on a website for cheaters and charge the bill to his credit card. Our daughter did it as a prank, and only confessed because our fighting was stressing her out.

chinese_item: 今天，我坐在医院的候诊区。一位老太太在哭，我五岁的女儿问她：“您还好吗？”老太太轻轻地点了点头，我女儿顿时扯着嗓子大喊：“那你闭嘴！”
english_item: Today, I was sitting in the hospital waiting area. An old lady was crying, and my five year-old daughter asked her, "Are you okay?" The woman quietly nodded, prompting my daughter to scream at the top of her lungs, "Well shut up then!

chinese_item: 今天，我未来的婆婆要求我把订婚戒指还给她，因为那是她曾祖母的，她现在想把戒指送给她小儿子的未婚妻。我的未婚夫同意了，说他会再给我买一枚。他也不明白我为什么这么生气。
english_item: Today, my almost-mother-in-law demanded I give my engagement ring back because it was originally her great-grandmother's, and she has now decided she wants it to go to her youngest son’s fiancée instead. My fiancé agreed and told me he’d just buy me another. He doesn’t get why I’m so upset either.

chinese_item: 今天，我洗了个澡，穿上性感内衣。我在沙发上坐了一个半小时，最后实在受不了，只好穿上男朋友的旧T恤。就在这时，他开始评论我穿的那件T恤。
english_item: Today, I took a bath and dressed in a skimpy lingerie. I sat on the couch for an hour and a half before giving up and putting on my boyfriend's old t shirt. It was then that he decided to comment. On the t shirt I was wearing.

chinese_item: 今天我跟男朋友分手了。他居然趁我上班的时候把我的狗绑架了。他还发给我一张他拿着一块巧克力放在嘴边的照片，威胁我说如果我不跟他复合，他就把巧克力喂给狗吃。我还是跟他复合了，因为我不能没有我的狗。
english_item: Today, I dumped my boyfriend. He responded with kidnapping my dog while I was at work. He texted me a picture of him holding a piece of chocolate to his mouth, threatening to feed it to him if I didn’t get back with him. I took him back because I can’t bear my life without my dog.

chinese_item: 今天，我10岁的儿子问我什么是平等权利，我解释说这意味着你要平等对待所有人。今天早上，他狠狠地打了一个一直欺负他的女孩，打掉了她的一颗牙。因为，“平等权利：如果她是个男孩，我早就打她了，但平等权利说不管她是男孩还是女孩都无所谓，所以我打她。”
english_item: Today, after my 10 year-old son asked what equal rights were and I'd explained it means you treat everyone the same, this morning he punched a girl who's been bullying him so hard, he broke her tooth, because, Equal rights: if she was a boy I'd have hit her before, but equal rights says it doesn't matter if she's a girl, so I hit her.

chinese_item: 今天，女儿问我能不能用贴纸画画。我当然同意了，于是她就去拿贴纸。她走进浴室的时候，我有点好奇她要去哪儿，但也没问。我离开房间回来，发现她的纸上空空如也，我的贴纸本子都粘在墙上了。
english_item: Today, my daughter asked me if we could make sticker art. Of course I said it was OK so she went to get some stickers. I wondered where she was going when she walked into the bathroom, but I didn't ask. I left the room and when I came back, her paper was blank and my pads were stuck to the wall.

chinese_item: 今天，我告诉我相识十年的挚友，不知不觉中我爱上了他，我觉得我们应该在一起。他的回答是？“我感谢你的好意。”
english_item: Today, I told my best friend of 10 years that somewhere along the way I fell in love with him and I think we should be together. His response? I appreciate the sentiment.

chinese_item: 今天，我实在太无聊了，就决定给六个月大的儿子穿女装。他坐在我腿上，穿着蓬蓬裙，我正给他戴上一个粉嫩的蕾丝蝴蝶结时，婆婆突然走了进来。她现在觉得我精神有问题，应该去看心理医生。
english_item: Today, in a state of extreme boredom, I decided to dress my 6-month-old son in girl's clothes. As he sat in my lap in a frilly dress, and as I was placing a very pink and lacy bow on his head, my mother-in-law unexpectedly walked in. She now thinks I'm mentally unstable and should be in therapy.

chinese_item: 今天，我被解雇了，因为用我老板的话说，我“过于遵守公司政策，以至于顾客开始讨厌我”。
english_item: Today, I was fired from my job because I, in my boss's words, Abided by company policy to such an extent that customers were starting to hate me.

chinese_item: 今天，我不得不告诉女儿WWE的比赛都是演出来的。她哭了起来。然而，上个月在她祖母的葬礼上，她却一滴眼泪都没掉。
english_item: Today, I had to be the one to break it to my daughter that WWE fighting was staged. She began crying. However, last month she didn't shed a single tear at her grandmother's funeral.

chinese_item: 今天，我和朋友坐在她妈妈的车里，聊着演员和艺术家哪个工作更难。我说：“艺术很简单，你只要在纸上随便涂涂画画，就叫它抽象艺术。”她妈妈从后视镜里眯起眼睛看着我，我朋友就停了下来。然后她说：“我妈妈就是个艺术家。”
english_item: Today, my friend and I were in her mom's car talking about which job was harder: actor or artist. I said, Art is easy. You just scribble on a piece of paper and call it abstract art. Her mom squinted at me in the rear-view mirror and my friend stopped talking. Then she said, My mom is an artist.

chinese_item: 今天上课时，坐在我旁边的一个男生问我要笔。我不小心递给他的是卫生棉条。
english_item: Today, a guy sitting next to me in class asked me for a pen. I accidentally handed him a tampon instead.

chinese_item: 今天，我和哥哥吵架，把妈妈的生日搞砸了。她76岁了，我们一个55岁，一个54岁，居然还像个大人一样不讲理。她冲我们大吼大叫，然后“教训”了我——他做的菜我吃了，我做的却没吃。我瞬间又回到了青少年时期的应对方式，把自己完全隔绝在外，躲进了房间。这绝对是我经历过的最糟糕的家庭聚会。
english_item: Today, my brother and I ruined our mother's birthday by fighting. She's 76, we're 55 and 54 and yet still unable to comport ourselves like adults. She yelled at us and then showed me by eating the dish he made but not mine. I reverted to teenage coping tactics, dissociating like a boss, and hiding in my room. Worst family visit ever.

chinese_item: 今天，我妈想尝试点新鲜事，借了我的几件衣服。她现在穿着一条很短的短裤和一件很紧身的背心。我们要去一个很高级的高尔夫球场，她不肯换衣服。
english_item: Today, my mom decided to do something new and borrowed some of my clothes. She's currently wearing a very small pair of short shorts and a very tight tank top. We're going to a very prestigious golf course and she won't change.

chinese_item: 今天，我的老板宣布他要休丧假，因为他父亲去世了。不知为何，我突然很想笑。我努力忍住，但还是忍不住笑了出来。如果眼神能杀人，我就没法写这篇文章了。
english_item: Today, my boss announced he will be taking bereavement leave due to his father passing away. For some reason I’ll never understand, I got the urge to laugh. I tried so hard to hold it in but it was very obvious. If looks could kill, I wouldn’t be able to write this.

chinese_item: 今天，我得知自己可能要流落街头了。我的未婚夫在我们两周年纪念日那天和我分手了，因为我的精神状况急剧恶化。我最近失去了工作和一位亲人。我一直把自己封闭起来，没有任何人可以依靠。我只希望我的生活能重新找到意义。
english_item: Today, I learned that I am probably going to be homeless. My fiancé broke up with me on our two year anniversary because my mental health is declining rapidly. I recently lost my job and a parent. I have been isolating and no longer have supports. I just want my life to have meaning again.

chinese_item: 今天，一位顾客对我给她做的圣代冰淇淋里的杏仁过敏了。除非顾客另有要求，否则我们都应该放杏仁。她向我的老板投诉说我让她食物中毒了。
english_item: Today, a customer had an allergic reaction to the almonds in the sundae I made for her. We're supposed to put the almonds on unless the customer asks otherwise. She complained to my boss that I'd poisoned her.

chinese_item: 今天，我在公寓前门上发现一张纸条，上面写着：“你把钥匙落在车库门上了，所以我把它放到了你的信箱里。”猜猜我的信箱钥匙在哪儿？
english_item: Today, I found a note on the front door of my flat saying, "You left your keys in your garage door so I put them in your letter box". Guess where my letter box key is.

chinese_item: 今天，我因为被评为本周最佳员工而获得了一张25美元的礼品券。但是这张礼品券已经过期6个月了。
english_item: Today, I was given a $25 gift certificate for being Employee Of The Week. The gift certificate was 6 months past its expiration date.

chinese_item: 小时候，我一直以为路灯会在我走过的时候自动亮起，好像它们认得我似的。我坚信自己拥有超能力！有一天，我跑到路灯下面想“打开它们”，结果什么也没发生……这时我才意识到，那不是我的错——只是个定时器在起作用。
english_item: When I was little, I used to believe that streetlights turned on automatically when I walked under them, like they recognized me. I was convinced I had a superpower! One day, I ran underneath to "turn them on," but nothing happened... That’s when I realized it wasn’t me—just a timer.

chinese_item: 小时候，我一直以为从幼儿园到毕业考试，我们都必须待在学校里，不能回家。叔叔这么跟我说的时候，我特别害怕上学。开学第一天，我舍不得妈妈，哭了起来！可是老师还是把我带进了学校。虽然很害怕，但那天过得很顺利。晚上，当我再次见到妈妈时，我既惊讶又舍不得离开老师和学校，因为我终于爱上了这一天！
english_item: When I was young, I used to believe we had to stay at school from nursery school to the final exam without going back home. When my uncle said that's to me, I was afraid of the school and when my first day happen, I didn't want to leave my mother and I started crying! But the teacher took me into the school. Despite the fear, the day was well and in the evening, when I saw again my mother I was suprised and at the same time I didn't want to leave my teacher and the school because finally I loved my day!

chinese_item: 你们都听过那首卖冰淇淋的歌吧？歌里有个女的会说“你好”？我八岁的时候，真的以为冰淇淋小贩录了我妈的声音，用在了歌里。其实那声“你好”听起来就像我妈接电话时的声音。直到现在，这声“你好”在我们家还是个梗呢。
english_item: Y'all know that ice cream man song that has the lady that says "HELLO" right? Well when I was 8, I literally thought the ice cream man recorded my mom's voice and used it in the song.The hello actually sounds like my mom when she answers the phone. That hello is a running joke in my family still to this day.

chinese_item: 我三年级的时候，学校考拼写。其中一个单词是“beach”（海滩），我把它拼成了“bech”。交卷后不久，我就开始慌了，因为我以为“bech”可能是“bitch”（婊子）的拼写（因为我只听过这个词的发音），所以我一整天都提心吊胆，生怕因为在试卷上写了脏话而被老师批评。
english_item: When I was in 3rd grade, we had this spelling test. One of the words we had was "beach" which I misspelled it as "bech". Shortly after turning it in, I started freaking out, since I thought "bech" might be how you spell "bitch" (as I'd only ever heard it that word out loud), and thus I spent most of the day terrified that I'd get in trouble for writing a swear word on my test.

chinese_item: 我小时候一直相信有一部电话可以打给圣诞老人，父母会告诉他我表现好不好。
english_item: When i was young i use to beleive that there existed a phone to call the santa claus and the parents will tell him if i'm well behaved or not

chinese_item: 小时候，我一直相信迪士尼公主是真实存在的。因为我特别喜欢迪士尼公主，所以每天都会看一部迪士尼电影。有一天，我大概四岁的时候，我和父母还有其他家人一起去了巴黎迪士尼乐园。我看到了很多公主，非常开心。后来，我才知道公主并不存在，我非常失望。我的父母骗了我！
english_item: When I was young, I used to believe that the Disney princess were real. Every day, I watched a Disney movie because I really loved the Disney princess. One day, I think I was four years old, and my parents, me and others members of my family were going to Disneyland Paris. I saw a lot of princesses and I was very happy. Later, I learnt that the princess didn't exist and I was very disapointed. My parents lied to me !

chinese_item: 小时候，我一直以为红绿灯里有几个小人，用小按钮控制着灯光颜色。有一天，我和妈妈走在街上，觉得红绿灯等的时间太长，就对着灯大声喊：“谁能帮我换个颜色啊？”妈妈很惊讶，给我解释了红绿灯的工作原理，说里面可不止几个小人。我当时真是震惊了 ;-;.
english_item: When I was a child, I used to believe that there were little guys inside traffic lights changing lights colours with small buttons. One day, I was walking with my mother in the street and I judged that it took too much time and I slamed at the light saying "Can anyone change colours, please?". My mother was surprised and she said to me how a traffic light worked and that there were not a few guys who change colour. I was shocked ;-;.

chinese_item: 他们在网上发帖说讨厌虚伪的人，却当面对我笑眯眯的，背地里却议论我。
english_item: They post about how they hate fake people but smile to my face and talk behind my back

chinese_item: 朋友向我借某件贵重物品时，我稍微犹豫了一下他就表现得很生气
english_item: Friend asked to borrow something expensive then acted offended when I hesitated

chinese_item: 他们说已经放下了，但显然还在纠结每一个细节。
english_item: They said they're over it but clearly holding onto every detail

chinese_item: 朋友说他们想更了解我，但却从不问真正的问题。
english_item: Friend said they wanted to understand me better but never asks any real questions

chinese_item: 我的室友说他们会更负责任一些，但我还是得替他们收拾烂摊子。
english_item: My roommate said they'd be more responsible but I'm still cleaning up after them

chinese_item: 朋友说他们希望我过得好，但前提是这不会给他们带来不便。
english_item: Friend said they wanted what's best for me but only when it's convenient for them

chinese_item: 我伴侣的Instagram上全是诱惑照，但如果我给别人的照片点赞他们就会吃醋。
english_item: My partner's Instagram is full of thirst traps but they get jealous if I like someone's photo

chinese_item: 我的朋友们当着我的面计划了一次旅行，很明显他们不希望我参加。
english_item: My friends made plans right in front of me for a trip they clearly don't want me on

chinese_item: 每个人都在需要的时候得到了安慰，而我却被要求自己解决
english_item: Everyone got reassurance when they needed it and I got told to figure it out

chinese_item: 我的家人说他们愿意听我说任何事情，但之后会把这些都用来对付我。
english_item: My family said I could tell them anything but use everything against me later

chinese_item: 他们发帖说重视高质量的相处时光，但每次我们聚会时他们都在玩手机。
english_item: They post about how they value quality time but are on their phone whenever we hang out

chinese_item: 我的家人总是问我什么时候要孩子，却从不关心我过得怎么样。
english_item: My family keeps asking when I'll have kids but won't ask how I'm actually doing

chinese_item: 我的同事说他们会指导我，但实际上却让我感到自卑。
english_item: My coworker said they'd mentor me but makes me feel inferior instead

chinese_item: 大家在需要的时候都得到了灵活性，而我却被要求去适应。
english_item: Everyone got flexibility when they needed it and I got told to adapt

chinese_item: 每个人都得到了支持度过了他们的过渡期，而我却被期望独自应对我的难关。
english_item: Everyone got support through their transition and I was expected to handle mine alone

chinese_item: 我的家人说我的感受是合理的，但接着又告诉我为什么我不应该有这种感觉。
english_item: My family said my feelings are valid but then tell me why I shouldn't feel that way

chinese_item: 我的同事午餐时间很长，还早退，但不知怎么的，反倒是我在被谈论时间管理的问题。
english_item: My coworker takes long lunches and leaves early but somehow I'm the one who gets talked to about time management

chinese_item: 每个人都被问到了意见，唯独我没有，然后他们还抱怨缺乏反馈。
english_item: Everyone got asked their opinion except me and then they complained about lack of input

chinese_item: 他们说他们很感激我的耐心，但还是不断地考验它。
english_item: They said they appreciated my patience but continue to test it

chinese_item: 我给他们准备了一份非常用心的生日礼物，他们却给了我一张礼品卡……感觉有点不对劲
english_item: Got a really thoughtful gift for their birthday, they got me a gift card... the vibe is off

chinese_item: 除了我之外，每个人都被邀请参加了婚礼派对……我们可是从小玩到大的朋友。
english_item: Everyone got invited to the bridal party except me... we've been friends since childhood

chinese_item: 我的家人说他们为我感到骄傲，但希望我能更像别人一些。
english_item: My family said they're proud of who I am but wish I was more like someone else

chinese_item: 我的室友说他们理解我的担忧，但什么都没有改变。
english_item: My roommate said they understood my concerns but nothing changed

chinese_item: 他们发帖谈论成长与改变，但实际上还是在做着一模一样的事情。
english_item: They post about growth and change but are still doing the exact same things

chinese_item: 他们说他们理解了，但他们的行为表明他们并不愿意去尝试。
english_item: They said they understand but their actions show they don't care to try

chinese_item: 人人都夸自己的伴侣有多好，而我的却忘了来机场接我。
english_item: Everyone talks about how great their partner is and mine forgot to pick me up from the airport

chinese_item: 我的家人总是不停地问我工作的事情，但当我问起他们的生活时，他们就变得沉默了。
english_item: My family asks about my job constantly but gets quiet when I ask about their lives

chinese_item: 我的同事说我们应该多合作，但却把我排除在外。
english_item: My coworker said we should collaborate more but excludes me from everything

chinese_item: 我最好的朋友订婚了，我是通过他们的Instagram故事得知的，而不是通过电话或短信。
english_item: My best friend got engaged and I found out through their Instagram story not a call or text

chinese_item: 大家都在晒自己完美的晨间例行公事，而我今天能刷牙就已经很自豪了。
english_item: Everyone's posting their perfect morning routines meanwhile I'm proud I brushed my teeth today

chinese_item: 他们说会保持透明，但我对所有事情都还是一头雾水。
english_item: They said they'd be transparent but I'm left guessing about everything

chinese_item: 推动安乐死合法化法案的工党议员称，她担心上议院的一些成员正试图“阻挠”该法案成为法律。金·利德贝特警告说，在上议院提出的修改意见超过1000条后，这项立法即将到达一个“关键时刻”。批评者和反对者坚持认为，该法案需要大幅重写，以确保任何系统都能妥善保护弱势群体。“尊重民主”，2014年类似的安乐死合法化法案未能在上议院通过——尽管与利德贝特的草案不同的是，那项法案尚未得到下议院议员的批准。利德贝特表示，她对上议院可能在下议院已经“投票决定改变法律”之后试图阻止该法案感到“担忧”。
english_item:
Peers trying to block assisted dying, claims MP behind bill3 days ago Share Save Paul Seddon Political reporter Share SaveBBCThe Labour MP behind the bill to legalise assisted dying in England and Wales says she is worried some members of the House of Lords are trying to "frustrate" its passage into law.
Kim Leadbeater warned the legislation was approaching a "crunch point" after the number of changes proposed in the Lords rose above 1,000.
Critics and opponents of the bill have insisted the legislation requires significant redrafting to ensure any system properly protects vulnerable people.
'Respect democracy'A similar bill to legalise assisted dying did not make it through the Lords in 2014 - although unlike Leadbeater's draft law, it had not already been approved by MPs.
Leadbeater said she was "concerned" about the Lords potentially trying to block a bill after the Commons had already "voted to change the law".

chinese_item:
为什么住院医生要罢工？他们的工资是多少？
在英格兰，住院医生约占所有医生的一半。
住院医生是已经完成医学学位的合格医生。
在完成医学学位后的第一年基础培训期间，英格兰的住院医生的基本工资为38,831英镑。
有人认为，即使在2025年8月涨薪之后，住院医生的实际收入仍比2008年低了20%。
english_item:
Why are resident doctors striking and how much are they paid?
Resident doctors make up around half of all doctors in England.
Resident doctors are qualified doctors who have completed a medical degree.
During their first foundation year after finishing their medical degree, resident doctors in England earn a basic salary of ￡38,831.
It argues that resident doctors' pay is 20% lower in real terms than it was in 2008, even after the August 2025 increase.

chinese_item: 埃克塞特验尸官法院得知，哈多克先生在承认六项违反环境署（EA）许可的指控两天后开枪自杀。听证会上了解到，哈多克先生正等待因2010年至2020年间所犯下的罪行而在《犯罪所得法》听证会上被判刑，他的妻子卡罗琳·哈多克表示他害怕入狱。听证会还得知，哈多克先生情绪抑郁，时好时坏，而他的妻子担心他会用枪伤害她或自己。验尸官被告知，哈多克夫妇多次要求警方归还枪支，最终在2022年11月得到了回应。尽管武器被归还了，但警方并不知道哈多克先生因长期调查而正受到环境署的起诉。
english_item:
Exeter Coroner's Court heard Mr Haddock shot himself two days after admitting six charges of contravening Environment Agency (EA) permits.
The inquest heard Mr Haddock was waiting to be sentenced at a Proceeds of Crime Act hearing over the offences carried out between 2010 and 2020, and his wife Caroline Haddock said he feared going to jail.
The inquest heard Mr Haddock was depressed, was having "good days and bad days" and that his wife was scared he would use them on her or himself.
The coroner was told Mr Haddock and his wife had repeatedly asked the police to return the guns, which, after a delay, happened in November 2022.
The weapons were handed back but police were unaware Mr Haddock was being prosecuted by the EA over a long-running investigation, she was also told.

chinese_item:
Roblox禁止儿童与成年陌生人聊天
6天前 分享 保存
Shiona McCallum 高级科技记者
分享 保存
Getty Images
作为扩大安全措施的一部分，儿童将不再能够在Roblox——世界上最受欢迎的游戏平台之一——上与成年陌生人聊天。
这一举措的推出正值澳大利亚即将对16岁以下青少年实施社交媒体禁令之际——政府正面临压力，要求将Roblox等游戏平台也纳入其中。
今年三月，Roblox首席执行官Dave Baszucki在接受BBC采访时称，公司竭尽全力保护儿童的安全。
英国通信管理局在线安全监督总监Anna Lucas表示，她对新的年龄验证措施感到满意。
当时，Roblox表示，试图绕过其规则的行为通常涉及用户试图将对话转移到其他平台上。
english_item:
Roblox blocks children from chatting to adult strangers6 days ago Share Save Shiona McCallum Senior Tech Reporter Share SaveGetty ImagesChildren will no longer be able to chat to adult strangers on Roblox - one of the world's most popular gaming platforms - as part of an expansion of its safety measures.
The launch also comes just ahead of Australia's social media ban for under-16s - the government is under pressure to include gaming platforms such as Roblox.
In March, the chief executive of Roblox, Dave Baszucki, said in a BBC interview that the company went to great lengths to keep children safe.
Anna Lucas, online safety supervision director at Ofcom, said she was pleased about the new age checking measures.
At the time, Roblox said attempts to circumvent its rules often involved users trying to take conversations to different platforms.

chinese_item:
联合国气候大会COP30因会场内发生火灾而被疏散，事发地点位于巴西贝伦。
包括气候编辑贾斯汀·罗瓦特在内的BBC记者看到展馆区域有火焰和烟雾后被紧急疏散到室外。
联合国表示，大火在六分钟后被扑灭，13人因吸入烟雾接受治疗。
目前尚不清楚是什么原因引发了这场火灾。
关于此事的更多信息。
english_item:
The UN climate talks COP30 have been evacuated due to a fire breaking out inside the venue in Belém, Brazil.
BBC journalists including Climate Editor Justin Rowlatt saw flames and smoke in the pavilion area before they were rushed outside.
The UN said the fire was extinguished after six minutes and 13 people were treated for smoke inhalation.
It is not yet known what caused the blaze.
More on this story.

chinese_item: 新冠调查听取了企业和员工的影响 5小时前 分享 保存 本·金、西蒙·布朗宁和阿奇·米切尔，商业记者 分享 保存Getty Images工人和企业领导人在新冠调查中讲述了他们在在这场大流行期间所面临的破坏以及在获取支持方面遇到的困难。调查了解到，在2020年里希·苏纳克上任财政大臣的第一天，他就收到了一份关于新冠疫情对经济增长和金融稳定影响的简报。周一的会议以一段感人的视频证词开场，视频中是那些因新冠封锁而生计被颠覆的企业主和自由职业者。上周发布的调查第二阶段报告，针对政治决策的部分，发现政府做得“太少太晚”。此外，还有一项针对自雇人士的支持计划、企业的贷款计划以及营业税减免。
english_item:
Covid inquiry hears impact on firms and staff5 hours ago Share Save Ben King , Simon Browning and Archie Mitchell , Business reporters Share SaveGetty ImagesWorkers and business leaders have told the Covid-19 inquiry about the devastation they faced during the pandemic and the difficulties they faced accessing support.
The inquiry heard how, on his first day as chancellor in 2020, Rishi Sunak was presented with a briefing on the impact of the Covid outbreak on growth and financial stability.
Monday's session opened with emotional video testimony from business owners and freelancers whose livelihoods were upended when Covid lockdowns started.
Last week the report on the second phase of the inquiry, into political decision-making, found the government had done "too little, too late".
There was also a support scheme for self-employed people, loan schemes for businesses and business rates relief.

chinese_item: BBC调查发现，由于需求激增，英格兰的成人多动症专科服务正在停止接收新患者。对此调查结果，NHS英格兰多动症工作组主席阿尼塔·塔帕尔教授表示“令人不安”，并补充说这对患者来说存在“巨大风险”。她将于周四发布一份关于多动症服务现状的报告，建议对支持方式进行彻底改革。但NHS的数据已经显示，一旦进入等候名单，成年人平均需要等待八年时间。这位45岁的女士住在德比郡，但由于该地区没有自己的服务，她在邻近的谢菲尔德信托机构的等候名单上等了两年。
english_item:
ADHD services shutting door to new NHS patients as demand soars, BBC finds6 November 2025 Share Save Vicki Loader, Nick Triggle & Catherine Burns BBC News Share SaveBBCSpecialist ADHD services for adults in England are stopping taking on new patients as they struggle to cope with demand, a BBC investigation has shown.
Reacting to our investigation, Prof Anita Thapar, chair of NHS England's ADHD taskforce, said the findings were "disturbing", adding there were "enormous risks" for patients.
It comes as she publishes her report into the state of ADHD services on Thursday, which recommends an overhaul of the way people are supported.
But NHS data already shows average waits of eight years for adults once someone is on a waiting list.
The 45-year-old lives in Derbyshire, but as this area does not have its own service, she was on the waiting list with the neighbouring Sheffield trust for two years.

chinese_item:
爱泼斯坦文件：还提到了谁？
沃尔夫在2015年写信给爱泼斯坦，告知他CNN计划询问作为总统候选人的特朗普与爱泼斯坦的关系。
“我对我继续与爱泼斯坦先生沟通这一错误决定负全责。”
鲁梅勒女士与爱泼斯坦之间的交流最终以爱泼斯坦写道：“你看，我知道唐纳德有多肮脏。”
蒂尔在2024年8月的一期《乔·罗根体验》播客中批评了爱泼斯坦。
english_item:
Epstein files: Who else was mentioned?
Wolff wrote to Epstein in 2015 to notify him that CNN was planning to ask Trump, as a presidential candidate, about his relationship with Epstein.
"I take full responsibility for my misguided decision to continue communicating with Mr Epstein."
The exchange between Ms Ruemmler and Epstein culminated with Epstein writing: "You see, I know how dirty donald is."
Mr Thiel was critical of Epstein on an August 2024 episode of The Joe Rogan Experience podcast.

chinese_item:
南非越来越多的女性正在学习使用枪支来保护自己免受基于性别的暴力侵害。
该国平均每天有15名女性被杀害，比去年增加了近34%。
11月21日，南非女性将举行静默抗议，并呼吁停止所有经济活动15分钟，原因是她们认为政府未能解决这一问题，并要求将其宣布为“国家灾难”。
警告：本报道包含对性侵犯的描述。
制作人：Nomsa Maseko, Kathy Harcombe
拍摄：Thuthuka Zondi
剪辑：Jenna Abaakouk
english_item:
A growing number of women in South Africa are learning to use guns to protect themselves against gender-based violence.
On average 15 women are killed every day in the country, a rise of almost 34% on last year.
On 21 November, women in South Africa will be staging silent protests with calls to stop any economic activity for 15 minutes because of what they say is government failure to tackle the issue and asking it to be declared a "national disaster".
Warning: This report contains descriptions of sexual assault.
Produced by: Nomsa Maseko, Kathy HarcombeFilmed by: Thuthuka ZondiEdited by: Jenna Abaakouk

chinese_item:
在生活成本危机期间，一镑店（Poundland）为何陷入困境这一奇怪现象引起了人们的关注。三天前，伦敦南部佩克汉姆的居民失去了他们的一镑店，这家店铺在经营了11年后于本周关闭。

实际上，为了确保其在商业街上的未来，一镑店不得不实施关店计划。而在英国其他商业街上，原厂店（The Original Factory Shop）也面临着困难，至少已经关闭了22家门店。

零售专家凯瑟琳·沙特尔沃思表示：“消费者变得比折扣店更聪明了。”她的公司Savvy专门收集关于购物者行为的数据。到2019年时，许多折扣店的增长主要发生在城外地点和零售园区，而这一趋势因疫情而加速。
english_item:
The curious case of why Poundland is struggling during a cost-of-living crisis3 days ago Share Save Emma Simpson Business correspondent Share SaveBBCThe residents of Peckham in south London have just lost their Poundland store, which closed this week after 11 years of trading.
Instead Poundland has found itself running a store closure programme as it tries to secure its future on the high street.
Elsewhere on UK high streets, the Original Factory shop is struggling and has shut at least 22 shops.
"[Shoppers] are outsmarting the budget shops," says retail expert Catherine Shuttleworth, whose company, Savvy, gathers insight on shopper behaviour.
By 2019, much of the budget store growth was happening in out-of-town locations and retail parks, a trend accelerated by the pandemic.

chinese_item:
计算机科学专业的毕业生难以找到第一份工作2025年8月21日 分享 保存 Joe Fay 科技记者 分享 保存Eddie Hart Eddie Hart 表示，编码公司似乎不愿意雇佣应届毕业生。Eddie Hart 在纽卡斯尔大学学习计算机科学和网络安全，并于2024年毕业。
Hart 先生说，即使招聘广告上写着“初级”职位，也常常要求两年或以上的工作经验。
ChatGPT 和其他编码工具被认为导致了技术岗位的大幅减少，特别是对年轻的软件开发人员和工程师来说。
但他们疑惑，如果像他们这样的年轻开发者无法找到工作，谁来填补这些职位呢？
他指出，那些在人工智能技术上投入巨资的企业高管和公司正面临着展示投资回报的压力。
english_item:
Computer science graduates struggle to secure their first jobs21 August 2025 Share Save Joe Fay Technology Reporter Share SaveEddie Hart Eddie Hart says coding firms seem reluctant to hire recent graduatesEddie Hart studied computer science and cybersecurity at Newcastle University, graduating in 2024.
Even when "junior" roles were advertised, they often demanded two or more years professional experience, Mr Hart says.
ChatGPT, and other coding tools, are being blamed for a collapse in tech job openings, particularly for younger software developers and engineers.
But, they wondered, who will fill them if younger developers like them were unable to secure jobs.
And, he suggests, executives and companies that had invested heavily in AI tech are under pressure to show some return on that investment.

chinese_item: 一位37岁时被诊断出肺癌的非吸烟者正在为提高年轻女性对这种疾病的认识而奔走呼吁。来自东萨塞克斯黑斯廷斯的朱尔斯·菲尔德通过社交媒体活动成功安排了与卫生大臣韦斯·斯特里廷的会面。现年41岁的菲尔德女士表示，她正在挑战关于这种疾病的“过时刻板印象”，特别是认为它只影响老年人或吸烟者的观点。她要求对英国最大的癌症杀手之一采取“紧急行动”。
english_item:
A non-smoker who was diagnosed with lung cancer at the age of 37 is campaigning for better awareness of the condition in young women.
Jules Fielder, from Hastings, East Sussex, has secured a meeting with Health Secretary Wes Streeting after a social media campaign.
Ms Fielder, now 41, said she was challenging "outdated stereotypes" about the condition, particularly that it only affects older people or people who smoke.
She is demanding "urgent action" about one of the UK's biggest cancer killers.

chinese_item:
一家人工智能公司声称中国间谍利用其技术自动化进行网络攻击。2025年11月14日 分享 保存 Joe Tidy，BBC国际服务网络安全记者 分享 保存 Getty Images 人工智能聊天机器人Claude的制造商称，他们发现由中国政府资助的黑客使用该工具对全球约30个组织进行了自动化的网络攻击。
Anthropic表示，黑客以进行网络安全研究为幌子，诱骗聊天机器人执行自动化任务。
假装自己是合法的网络安全工作者，黑客给聊天机器人分配了一些小型自动化任务，这些任务串联起来形成了一次“高度复杂的间谍活动”。
Anthropic的研究人员表示，他们“非常确信”实施这些攻击的是“一个受中国政府支持的团体”。
但网络安全公司Bitdefender的Martin Zugec表示，网络安全界对此消息反应不一。
english_item:
AI firm claims Chinese spies used its tech to automate cyber attacks14 November 2025 Share Save Joe Tidy Cyber correspondent, BBC World Service Share SaveGetty ImagesThe makers of artificial intelligence (AI) chatbot Claude claim to have caught hackers sponsored by the Chinese government using the tool to perform automated cyber attacks against around 30 global organisations.
Anthropic said hackers tricked the chatbot into carrying out automated tasks under the guise of carrying out cyber security research.
Pretending they were legitimate cyber security workers, hackers gave the chatbot small automated tasks which, when strung together, formed a "highly sophisticated espionage campaign".
Researchers at Anthropic said they had "high confidence" the people carrying out the attacks were "a Chinese state-sponsored group".
But Martin Zugec from cyber firm Bitdefender said the cyber security world had mixed feelings about the news.

chinese_item:
一位37岁被诊断出肺癌的非吸烟者呼吁“紧急行动”。三天前，东南地区健康记者马克·诺曼报道了这一消息。来自东萨塞克斯郡黑斯廷斯的朱尔斯·菲尔德在37岁时被诊断出患有无法治愈的肺癌，她正在发起一场运动，旨在提高人们对年轻女性中这种疾病的认识。
现年41岁的菲尔德女士通过社交媒体活动成功安排了一次与卫生大臣韦斯·斯特里廷的会面。她说自己正在挑战关于这种疾病的“过时刻板印象”，特别是认为它只影响老年人或吸烟者的观点。
菲尔德女士表示，她在八月份被告知预后只有6到9个月的时间。她说：“我们仍然生活在一个非常落后的时代，在这个时代里，肺癌的污名总是与男性和吸烟者联系在一起。”
english_item:
Non-smoker diagnosed with lung cancer at 37 demands 'urgent action'3 days ago Share Save Mark Norman South East health correspondent Share SaveMark Norman/BBC Jules Fielder was diagnosed with incurable lung cancer aged 37A non-smoker who was diagnosed with lung cancer at the age of 37 is campaigning for better awareness of the condition in young women.
Jules Fielder, from Hastings, East Sussex, has secured a meeting with Health Secretary Wes Streeting after a social media campaign.
Ms Fielder, now 41, said she was challenging "outdated stereotypes" about the condition, particularly that it only affects older people or people who smoke.
Ms Fielder said she was given a prognosis of six to nine months in August.
She said: "We still live in such a dated time where the stigma around lung cancer is associated to a man, a smoker.

chinese_item: 一位女士最初表示自己“非常生气、愤怒”，因为一名送货司机在她家门口递送两个包裹时拍下了她“全身湿透，只裹着一条毛巾”的照片。但后来她说这张照片让她“笑得前仰后合”。32岁的艾莉·罗克珊·约翰逊是一名来自庞蒂普尔德的社交媒体博主。当时她正在洗澡，Evri公司的送货司机按响了门铃给她送包裹，并按照公司规定，在她家门口拍下了这张“尴尬”的照片。约翰逊女士随后发布了一段视频，这段视频在网上迅速走红，吸引了数千次观看。Evri公司的一位发言人表示很高兴约翰逊女士能够“看到事情有趣的一面”，并补充说其快递员遵循关于送货照片的指导原则，这些照片会安全存储，不会保存在快递员的个人设备上，并且只会保留必要的时长。
english_item:
A woman who said she was initially "tamping, fuming, and raging" after a delivery driver photographed her "soaking wet and in a towel" on her doorstep while handing over two parcels, says the photo he took has left her "in hysterics".
Ellie Roxanne Johnson, 32, a social media blogger from Pontypridd, was in the shower when the Evri driver rang her doorbell to give her the packages and, following company rules, took the "awkward" photo on her doorstep.
Ms Johnson posted a video, with the clip subsequently going viral online, attracting thousands of views.
An Evri spokesperson said it was glad Ms Johnson had seen "the funny side", adding its couriers follow guidance on delivery photos, which are stored securely, not on the courier's personal device and "only for as long as necessary".

chinese_item:
来自斯塔福德的史蒂夫·卡特赖特周二在参加完她在斯塔福德郡阿尔雷瓦斯的首次纪念仪式后，被邀请与公主一同走过国家纪念植物园。“她问我健康状况如何，生活过得怎么样，以及我是否得到了所需的支持，”他说。
媒体还报道了公主与二战老兵杰夫·斯宾塞交谈的情景。他表示，凯瑟琳对他的心理健康历程感到惊讶并为之骄傲，他形容这是一个难以置信的时刻。
两人从武装部队纪念碑走到主入口建筑，在那里她与更多退伍军人交谈，并参观了中心的展览。
如果您因本文内容而受到影响，可以在BBC的行动热线找到支持和信息。
english_item:
Steve Cartwright from Stafford was asked to walk through the National Memorial Arboretum with the princess on Tuesday after her first Remembrance service in Alrewas, Staffordshire.
"She asked how my health was, how I was getting on and if I was getting the support I needed," he said.
PA Media The Princess spoke with World War 2 veteran, Geoff SpencerHe said Catherine was amazed and proud of his mental health journey, which he described as an unbelieveable moment.
The pair walked from the Armed Forces Memorial to the main entrance building where she spoke with more veterans and explored the centre's exhibitions.
If you have been affected by the content in this article, support and information can be found on the BBC's Action Line.

chinese_item:
渡轮公司因向乘客播放色情内容而道歉

2025年11月12日 分享 保存 Nathan Bevan 东南部 分享 保存 Getty Images
DFDS Transmanche 表示对此次事件“非常抱歉”
一家渡轮公司在其一艘前往苏塞克斯的船只上误播色情内容，导致孩子们“尖叫”，事后该公司对此表示了歉意。
DFDS 称，上个月底，在从法国迪耶普开往纽黑文的渡轮上发生了这起“非常抱歉”的事件。当时，原本在观看一级方程式大奖赛的乘客们突然看到休息室电视上播放了一部“成人电影”。
据报道，该事件发生在渡轮因纽黑文港技术故障被要求返回法国期间。
DFDS 表示：“我们对这一事件给乘客带来的不安和愤怒感到非常抱歉。”
english_item:
Ferry firm apologises as porn screened to passengers12 November 2025 Share Save Nathan Bevan South East Share SaveGetty Images DFDS Transmanche said it was "very sorry" for the incidentA ferry company has apologised after children were left "screaming" when pornography was screened on one of its ships bound for Sussex.
DFDS said it was "very sorry" for the incident, which happened late last month onboard the ferry from Dieppe, in France, to Newhaven.
It said that an "adult film" was mistakenly broadcast on the onboard lounge television to passengers who had been watching the Formula One grand prix.
The incident was said to have taken place during a delay which saw the ferry sent back to France due to a technical fault at Newhaven Port.
DFDS said: "We are very sorry for the understandable upset and anger that this caused.

chinese_item:
11月4日，菲律宾宿务省的洪水猛烈地卷起了并滚动了货运集装箱。
灾害管理部门表示，至少有三人死亡。
居民被迫到屋顶上躲避高涨的洪水。
在台风“卡玫基”来临之前，民防办公室称已有“接近15万人”被疏散。
english_item:
Forceful floodwaters in Cebu province, Philippines, picked up and rolled shipping containers on 4 November.
At least three people have died, disaster management officials say.
