I am a great adorer of Christmas, and after I mentioned this to them, one of the girls excused herself to the bathroom. Instead of going there, she came back with a fir Christmas candle from the nearby shop that we had gone to. Now, every time I walk into the room with my candle, I am blessed with the lovely aroma of Christmas---and the memories of two lovely new friends.

chinese_item: 几年前，我正经历严重的心理健康问题，我的朋友总是尽力帮助我。我需要倾诉的时候，他会耐心倾听；或者，他会想方设法分散我的注意力，让我暂时忘记烦恼。他放下了很多自己的私事，只为确保我一切安好，这份恩情至今仍让我无比感激。我每天都努力回报他，因为他在那段日子里给予我的帮助改变了我的人生。我永远不会忘记！
english_item: A couple years ago, when I was having serious mental health struggles, my friend always tried his best to help me. He would listen to me when I needed it or simply distracted me from what was troubling me. He put aside a lot of his own personal issues to make sure I was okay and that means the world to me to this day. I try to make it up to him every day because the RandomActsofKindness he showed me during that time was life-changing. I'll always remember it!

chinese_item: 这座花园由我的组织“蜻蜓之翼”（On A Dragonfly’s Wings）创建，以纪念我的儿子尼古拉·米勒（Nikolai Miller）。他于2019年6月20日自杀身亡，年仅15岁。花园的建设资金来自沃特福德青年援助中心（Waterford Youth Assistance），以及社区组织、当地企业和家庭的捐款。尼古拉是一个善良慷慨的人，他全心全意地爱着所有人。然而，他也默默地承受着精神疾病的折磨，最终夺走了他的生命。这座花园的宗旨是为所有偶然来到这里的人们带来善意、积极和爱。它提醒着所有人：你很重要，爱终将战胜一切。花园里的踏脚石是由其他经历过亲人自杀的幸存者用心制作的，以此纪念他们挚爱的亲人。花园的规则很简单：当你需要一块石头时，就拿走一块；与需要鼓励的朋友分享一块石头；留下一块写有善意话语的石头，传递给他人。
english_item: This garden was created by my organization, On A Dragonfly?ˉs Wings, in memory of my son, Nikolai Miller, who died by suicide on June 20, 2019, at the age of 15. It was funded by the Waterford Youth Assistance, along with donations from community organizations, local businesses, and families. Nikolai was a kind and generous soul who loved all people with his whole heart. He also suffered silently with mental illness that eventually ended his life. The purpose of this garden is to bring RandomActsofKindness, positivity, and love to all who stumble upon it. It is a reminder to all that YOU MATTER and love always wins. The stepping stones you will encounter within the garden were created with love by suicide loss survivors in memory of their loved ones. Rules of the garden are simple: Take a rock when you need one. Share a rock with a friend who needs some inspiration. Leave a rock with a RandomActsofKindness message for another.

chinese_item: 我们社区小组每周聚会，把车停在一个多年来一直免费的停车场。但最近停车规定变了，现在必须在线预订车位并付费。如果没有提前预订和付费，就会被罚款。停车场里的指示牌很不清晰，很多人没有预订车位，也不知道现在停车要收费了。我之前已经预订了车位，正要离开车的时候，看到有人去缴费机缴费，就告诉他们现在必须在线支付，否则会被罚款。几天后，在一个寒冷的雪天下午，我在停车场里仔细查看了指示牌和停车信息，以便把这些信息反馈给社区小组。之后，我又冷又饿，就去了附近一家咖啡馆，点了鸡蛋、薯条和一杯茶。服务员问我要一个鸡蛋还是两个。我问多加两个鸡蛋要多少钱，因为我的预算很紧张，现在还要额外支付停车费。我点了份鸡蛋。我没意识到有人听到了我的谈话，也没注意到咖啡馆里都有哪些人。结账的时候，我才知道原来是一位坐在角落里的男士帮我付了账，而我之前竟然没注意到他！我今年58岁了，从未遇到过如此善意的陌生人。我当时真是受宠若惊，甚至都不知道该如何感谢他。看来真是因果报应啊！我由衷地感谢上苍！
english_item: My local community group, meet weekly and park in a car park, which has been free for many years.Recently parking, has changed and now, it has to be paid for by going on line, and booking a slot.If a slot is not booked and paid for in advance, there will be a large fine.The signage in the car park is poor, and many people, have not booked their slot, not realising that it is no longer free.I had booked a slot and as I was walking away from my car, I saw some one going to the ticket machine so I told them, that it had to be done on line now, or they risked a fine.A few days later, I spent a snowy, cold afternoon in the car park, checking the signs and parking information, so I could relay it back to my community group.Afterwards, I was so cold and hungry I went into a local cafe and ordered egg, chips and a cup of tea.The waitress asked if I wanted one egg or 2. I asked how much extra 2 eggs would be, as I am on a tight budget, and now have to pay extra car park charges. I opted for 1 egg. I didn't realise any one heard my conversation and I didn't notice who was in the cafe.When I came to pay my bill, I was told that a man who had been sitting in the corner, who I hadn't noticed, had paid for my dinner! I am 58, and never have I, had an act of RandomActsofKindness like that given to me, by a complete stranger.I was over come and I couldn't even thank him, for his RandomActsofKindness. I guess you reap what you sow. I thanked the Universe!

chinese_item: 我想特别感谢我美丽的女儿，她今年七月迎来了她的彩虹宝宝——我们可爱的孙子兰南。我的女儿曾失去过两个孩子，她成立了一个互助小组，为失去孩子的家庭制作纪念盒。她经历了试管婴儿和许多艰难的旅程，目前正遭受产后抑郁症的困扰。她值得拥有全世界，甚至更多。我们非常爱她，她是我们的英雄和榜样。
english_item: I would like to give a shout out to ny beautiful daughter who in July this year had her rainbow baby our gorgeous grandson Lannan my daughter has lost 2 babies and she sent up a support group making memory boxes for bereaved families she had to go through ivf and some tough journeys but she is currently suffering from post natal depression and deserves the world and so much more we love her so much she is our hero and inspiration

chinese_item: 有一次，我和妈妈还有妈妈男朋友的女儿一起去了家附近的廉价商店。结账的时候，我想买一个泡泡糖，就是那种装泡泡糖的盒子。可是我和妈妈身上都没有25美分，这时一位和蔼的老先生给了我和我男朋友的女儿每人25美分，我们才买到了泡泡糖。他真是太好了，现在想想，他完全没必要这么做，完全可以不理我们。
english_item: one time I had went to my local dollar store and me and mom and my moms boyfriends daughter all went to the dollar store and when we were going to checkout I wanted a gum ball from out of those gum ball things. But not me or my mom had a quarter for it but this nice old man gave me and my moms boyfriends daughter a quarter each and we were able to get the gum balls. he was really nice and I think about it now cause he really didn't have to do that and could've ignored us.

chinese_item: 我注意到一位女士在一家一元店的收银台前，看起来很疲惫，因为她的信用卡被反复拒绝。最后，收银员把她的购物袋放到一边，让她稍等片刻，自己去服务其他顾客。很明显，这位女士身无分文，肯定没有足够的钱支付她点的东西，而她点的几乎全是食物。我主动提出帮她付尽可能多的钱，但叮嘱收银员不要告诉那位女士是我付的。收银员拿出几件商品，把购物袋递给了那位女士。那种感觉真是太棒了！
english_item: I noticed a woman at the dollar store register looking very weary as her credit card repeatedly got denied. Finally the store cashier put her bag to the side and asked her to wait while she helped other customers. It was obvious the woman had little and definitely didn't have the money for her, mostly food, order. I offered to pay for as much of her order as I could, but told the cashier she wasn't to tell the lady it was me. The cashier removed a few items and handed the lady her bag. It felt so incredible!

chinese_item: 三年前，我和妻子在商场里为三个孩子买圣诞礼物，排着长队。这时，一个小男孩正想买一副很贵的耳机。他拿着一张爸爸给他的礼品卡。收银员扫码时告诉小男孩卡里没钱，排队的人都有些不耐烦了。我走到收银员面前，问她：“出了什么问题？”她告诉我小男孩的礼品卡里没钱。我问收银员这副耳机到底多少钱，她说很贵。我看着她，说：“给他吧，我来处理。”小男孩看着我说：“非常感谢您，先生。”我对他说：“记住，星期四，如果你也能帮到别人，就帮帮他们。”我仅此而已。小男孩再次道谢。排队的人都看着我，说：“真是个奇迹！你简直就是天上的圣诞老人！”
english_item: Three years ago me and my wife were shopping for Christmas for our three kids waiting in that long line in a shopping mall there was a little boy that was buying a pair of headphones very expensive he had a gift card that his father gave him when the cashier was ringing up the gift card she tells little boy that there is no money on that gift card everyone in line was getting a little agitated so I walked up to the cashier and I said what seems to be the problem is she tells me that the gift card to the little boy has has no money so I asked the cashier exactly how much are these headphones that the boy is trying to purchase she says very expensive I looked at her and said give it to him I will take care of it the little boy looks at me and says thank you very much sir I said to him remember Thursday when you are able to do the same for someone that is all I ask the boys thank you very much everyone in line looked at me and said a real life miracle you are a Santa in the skies

chinese_item: 人们缺乏自我认知  每个人都活在自己的世界里，从不承认自己的错误。他们表现出各种各样的人格障碍特征，却从不承认自己有问题，甚至不采取任何行动来改变。  他们过度分析别人，唯独忽略自己。我真希望有个开关能让他们从这种妄想中清醒过来。  有时我会幻想人们拥有自我认知，想象他们作为人会多么美好。然后我意识到这只是幻想，他们永远不会改变。一旦你承认了自己的缺点，就准备好成为他们的主要攻击目标吧
english_item: ……,"People's lack of self awareness Everyone living life never owning up to their mistakes. Showing all sorts of traits of personality disorder, yet never acknowledging there's something wrong with them, or even take action to change.  Over analyzing everyone else except themselves. I wish there was a switch to just get them out of their delusion. Sometimes I fantasize about people having self awareness and think how much more beautiful they'd be as human beings. Then I realize that it was just a fantasy and they'll never change. And once you admit your own faults get ready to become their main target...

chinese_item: 这家伙每周付100美元，包所有费用……他现在霸占了我家所有房间，睡在我的沙发上，第二天就把我的平板电视和洗衣机弄坏了……把家里所有锅碗瓢盆的底部都烧焦了，更别提他一个碗都没洗过，最糟糕的是，他居然每天都在炸东西！！我还能说更多，他养了一只猫，没交押金。他终于搬走了，我在想是不是应该给他发个短信，告诉他我们住不下去了，明天他的东西就放在门廊上……我们签了周租协议，我是房东，我确定这不违法，但这可能是避免他逼我走驱逐和上法庭程序的最好办法……有什么建议吗？
english_item: This guy pays $100/week, everything included... he has officially taken over every room in my house, sleeps on my couch broke my flatscreen on day 2, my washer ...has burned the bottom of every pot and pan in the house not to mention he has not washed a single dish yet, and the worst is that he officially we can deep frying on a daily basis!! I could go on there is a lot more he has a cat no deposit he finally left the house and I'm thinking I should text him and tell him it's not working out in his s*** will be on the porch tomorrow... With a weekly agreement and me as the landlord and homeowner I'm pretty sure this is not illegal but it might be the safest way for me to prevent him from forcing me to go through the eviction and court process..... any advice?

chinese_item: 当一个人的粉丝比关注的人多时  很多时候，人们这样做是为了营造一种粉丝关注比很高的假象，以此证明自己很受欢迎，但我觉得这有点傲慢。我的表妹很受欢迎，她解释说，她不关注某些人是因为她不认识他们，也不想看他们的动态。  我大概能理解，但如果他们真的那么陌生，你又何必让他们关注你、看你的帖子呢？这感觉就像是为了获得某种认可，想要通过粉丝和点赞的数量来证明自己。我觉得这很傲慢，甚至有点不尊重人，因为你实际上是在告诉别人，他们不值得你关注。我知道这只是社交媒体，但这种行为总是让我很不舒服
english_item: 。,"When people have more followers than people they’re following A lot of the times people do this because they want the appearance of a ratio that shows they’re popular, and it just comes across as kind of arrogant to me. My cousin is popular and she somewhat explained why she doesn’t follow certain people back is because she doesn’t know them and doesn’t care to see their feed.   I guess I sort of understand that, but then if they really are that much of a stranger, why do you want them to follow you and see your posts? It just truly feels like some sort of validation from having more followers and likes. Again I just think it’s arrogant and a maybe even a bit disrespectful because you’re basically telling someone they’re not worth your attention. I know it’s just social media but it just always rubs me the wrong way.

chinese_item: 太害怕找工作了  我18岁，六月份毕业，之后几乎没出过门。家人为此唠叨了一阵（也情有可原），我的确非常想找工作，但每次浏览求职网站都会感到恐慌。面对那么多求职者，我实在想象不出招聘人员会选中我，毕竟我缺乏经验，而且在人际交往中又焦虑又尴尬。其实，我相信一旦入职，步入正轨后，我就能胜任与人相处的工作，甚至做得更好，但我就是无法克服最初的招聘流程带来的恐惧。我真的不知道该怎么办。你们是怎么克服这种恐惧的呢
english_item: Too scared to get a job I'm 18. I graduated in June and have hardly left the house since. My family has given me grief about it (reasonably) and I DO desperately want a job, but every time I even browse a job-finding website I feel panicked. Out of all the possible applicants I just can't imagine a recruiter picking me given my lack of experience and how anxious/awkward I am around people. And the thing is I'm confident that once I'm hired and get into a rhythm I can manage working with people and even excel, I just can't get past the prospect of the initial hiring process. I just don't know what to do. How do you guys manage it?

chinese_item: 如果男性表现出任何情绪，都会被视为危险信号。
english_item: It being considered red flag if men show any emotion

chinese_item: 有没有人跟我一样，会毫无征兆地突然陷入抑郁？这很难解释。有时候，你可能只是在玩游戏或者散步，突然间就会莫名其妙地感到沮丧和难过。就像宙斯用闪电击中了你一样，还没反应过来，你就什么都不想做了。对了，我有心理咨询师。
english_item: DAE get a random onslaught of depression for no reason? It's odd to explain. But sometimes when you're just playing a game or just walking and then suddenly you start getting depressed and sad for no reason. Like Zeus just hit you a lightning of depression and before you know it you don't want to do anything. And yes, I have a therapist.

chinese_item: 听到旁边的人笑  我几乎每天都去公园散步，有时会走到二楼，那里有很多飞盘高尔夫的“桶”（或者叫什么都行）。我当时正走在小路上，他们站在其中一个桶旁边笑，大概不是在说我，但当我走过的时候，他们就安静下来了。总之，我总是很讨厌散步时听到一群人笑。他们是不是在说我？这件事从我十几岁前就开始困扰我了（现在四十岁了）。这让我出门时焦虑得难以忍受，如果不是因为看不到阳光和自然会让我非常沮丧，我早就彻底放弃散步了
english_item: Hearing people laugh next to you I walk at the park most days, and sometimes I go onto the second level where there are a lot of disc golf 'buckets' or whatever you call them, and I was just walking on the path and they're next to one of the buckets and are laughing and presumably not talking about me, but at some point they get quiet as I'm walking by. Anyway, I always hate when I'm out walking and I hear a group of people laugh? is it about me for some reason? That's bothered me ever since I was a pre-teen (forty now). It makes the anxiety excrutiating when I go out, and I would stop it altogether except not seeing the sunshine and nature would horribly depress me.

chinese_item: 我分不清自己是不是真的喜欢一个人。  我认识这个人好几年了，大概一两年前，我从朋友那里得知他喜欢我，但他从来没跟我表白过，所以什么也没发生（当时我也不喜欢他，根本没往那方面想过）。几个月后，我和一个女生闹了点矛盾，不过后来分手了，朋友们就一直缠着我提起那个男生。我想有一两个月的时间里，我确实挺喜欢他的（我们当时经常发短信，现在也还挺频繁的）。直到最近，我才意识到，跟其他人相比，我对他的感觉其实很淡，但我又说不准。感觉现在好像在吊着他，而且这跟以前那种百分百确定自己喜欢一个人的情况完全不一样。另外，还有另一个男生，说实话，我更喜欢他，但他很内向，不太好说话，我不知道该怎么办
english_item: i can’t tell if i actually like someone i've known this guy for a couple years and around 1-2 years ago i found out that he liked me (through friends) but he never actually told me so nothing happened (i also did not like him at the time, just never thought of him that way). then after a couple of months i had some drama with a girl but that broke off and then my friends kept pestering me about the guy. i think for a month or two i actually liked him (we had been texting a lot and still text pretty frequently now) until recently i realized i don't really feel anything when i think about him compared to other people, but i can't really tell. i feel like now im leading him on and it's also just different from past situations where i was 100% sure i liked someone. there's also a different guy that honestly interests me a lot more but he's really introverted and hard to talk to so idk what to do about that....

chinese_item: 如何应对霸凌？  我无法忘记几年前在网上霸凌我的人。  每当想起这件事，我都会感到极度焦虑。  我现在想起来了，感觉肩上压着千斤重担
english_item: How to deal with bullies? Can't get over people who bullied me online years ago.  It causes me intense anxiety from time to time whenever I remember it.  I remember it now. I feel heavy weight on my shoulders.

chinese_item: 为什么？为什么？为什么？  这个问题困扰了我好几年。  我记得自己患上社交焦虑症是因为学校里有些人莫名其妙地在背后嘲笑我，他们甚至都不认识我。我开始怀疑自己到底哪里出了问题，因为我做什么事都没什么特别的。于是我一直在想，想，想。永远都是同一个问题。  现在我20岁了，还是感觉别人对我的态度很奇怪，好像他们觉得我高人一等。我到底做错了什么？  我的语法和表达方式可能有点别扭，因为我现在精神很累，也顾不上那么多了。  我只是想倾诉一下，看看有没有人和我一样
english_item: WHY WHY WHY I've been asking myself the same question for literal years. I remember developing social anxiety because of people at school randomly starting making fun of me behind my back without even knowing me. I started to wonder WHAT was wrong with me as a result since nothing I did stood out? So I kept wondering and wondering and wondering. Always the same question. Now I'm 20, I still see people treating me weirdly, it's like they feel superior to me. Just what am I doing wrong?  Grammar and the way I expressed myself may be a bit awkward as I'm mentally tired and just don't care rn I just wanted to vent and see if anyone feels the same way.

chinese_item: 当你在吃东西的时候，有人问能不能分一些给你。  我妈有时候会这样。我正在吃零食什么的，她就问能不能吃一块。我不喜欢这样。如果他们想要，就自己去拿。这样做的人就像狗一样乞讨。他们不应该占别人便宜，也不应该指望别人分享食物
english_item: 。,When you are eating something and someone asks if they can have some of what you’re eating My mom does this sometimes. chinese_item: 工作焦虑/羞耻感  如何才能不把离职或被训斥这件事想得太糟糕？  我读到一些骇人听闻的故事后，尤其是看到一些雇主如何报复员工，比如不停地打电话、因为没上班就进行福利检查，或者因为请假而羞辱员工，我的胸口和胃里就一直翻江倒海，感觉非常难受。  尽管我已经递交了辞呈，而且我实在太忙了，但我还是决定为了我的心理健康，通知他们我最后一个班次会缺勤。我努力告诉自己，无论他们怎么折磨我，我最终都会挺过去的
english_item: Job anxiety/shame How do you not catastrophize about leaving a job or being reprimanded?  I get this deep, sickly feel in my chest and stomach, especially after reading horror stories about how some employers retaliate either by incessantly calling you, doing welfare checks for not showing, or shaming you for calling out.  I decided it was better for my mental health to notify them of an absence for my final shift despite having put in my notice, and bc I’d be too busy. I’m trying to tell myself that whatever kind of mind games they put me through, I will come out okay.

chinese_item: 群里比较安静的朋友  我通常不是群里比较安静的那一个。有时候会安静，但我从来不会一直安静。自从有了这群朋友之后，我变得很安静，很……很像我自己，你懂的？就像不管我们在哪里，我总是很安静。而当我安静的时候，他们总是问我是不是有什么事。问题是……我不知道自己为什么会安静。我就是安静。也许是因为我群里有一个人，我不讨厌她，但有点害怕她。她的气质、感觉等等都和我截然相反。我一直都有这种感觉，但我不知道该怎么做才能改变自己。  最近她总是拍她自己和我们群里的照片，但就是不拍我。我知道有时候我不在她的拍照区域，或者我在玩手机，但当我的另一个朋友做同样的事情时，她就会被叫去拍照。然后我就一个人坐在那儿，不知道为什么。我知道，这没什么大不了的，只是一张照片而已。但感觉……好像她想把我从照片里赶出去，你懂的。  我不知道，是不是我想太多了？最近我一直想退出那个群，但我有个很要好的朋友也在里面，如果我退出，可能会显得我傲慢又势利。唉，我不知道，我感觉人生好艰难
english_item: Quiet friend of the group I'm usually not the quiet one in the gc. Sometimes I am but I'm never ALWAYS quiet. But ever since I had this group of friends, I've been becoming quiet and very.. just me, yk? Like no matter where we are, I'm ALWAYS quiet. And when I am quiet they always ask me if something's wrong. The thing is.. I don't know WHY I'm quiet. I just am. Maybe it's because of that one person in my group who I DONT hate but am intimidated. Her aura, vibe and all is just the opposite of me. I've always felt that for her and I don't know what I can do to change myself.  And lately she's been taking pics of herself and our group, but without me. I mean I get it, sometimes I'm not visible in her picture area or I'm busy with my phone, but when my other friend does the same thing as me, she gets called to take a pic. And then I'm just there sitting, left alone, wondering why. And I know, it's not a big deal, it's just a pic. But it feels like.. Kinda like she wants me out of the pic yk.  I don't know, am I just overthinking it? Lately I've been feeling like leaving the group, but I have a very close friend in that group and if I leave, it might seem like I'm arrogant and snobby. Gosh I don't know, I am so done with life.

chinese_item: 我看到了一些迹象！！！！好多迹象！！！！  好吧，事情是这样的，之前我老公告诉我，我暗恋的人（我们暂且叫他K）喜欢我的朋友。我当时当然又难过又生气，简直气炸了，但后来我老公跟我表白了，所以我其实不太相信。但是后来我亲眼看到他跟朋友谈论我的朋友，那一刻……我彻底崩溃了。你懂的。我深吸了一口气，对自己说：“好吧，我们继续前进吧。他不喜欢你，宝贝。” 听着，我真的努力尝试过要放下，但是暗恋不可能这么快就结束。我非但没有不再喜欢他，反而更喜欢他了……我知道，我真是太蠢了。但是最近，他开始更多地对我微笑、大笑，主动跟我聊天，真的太可爱了。我仍然觉得他喜欢我的朋友，但也许我是他的第二个暗恋对象？？？我现在正在祈祷

chinese_item: 室友被赶出来了大家好！我和另外四个人合租，一共五个人。昨天，我们因为那两个室友总是因为一些小事闹矛盾而进行了一次谈话。简单来说：他们（两个已经在这里住了两年半的室友）首先决定，其中一个室友（我们暂且叫她Vanessa）不能再住了，因为她和另一个室友相处不来。她们总是发生一些小争吵。我觉得问题在于，这两个室友，我们暂且叫她Tom和Jerry，竟然没有事先跟我商量就决定把Vanessa赶出去。当时屋里还有一个室友在度假，所以谈话只有我们四个人，但是Tom和Jerry说另一个室友Paolo站在他们那边。这算什么？他们有时间给Paolo打电话，却没时间先跟我好好谈谈这件事和赶走Vanessa的事？我觉得自己被冷落了。我是不是反应过度了？而且，《猫和老鼠》里讲到了尊重和基本的人际沟通等等，但我感觉他们做得并不好。他们只是提要求，却不付诸行动或表现出来。他们是不是太糟糕了？还是我反应过度了？我也可以参与决策吗？汤姆和杰瑞是租客，他们又不是房主。如果他们是房主，拥有额外的决策权当然合情合理，但作为室友，我觉得他们的做法不对。
english_item: one of the roommate got kicked out Hi everyone!  I live in a house with other 4 people, so we are 5 people.  yesterday, we had a conversation because the 2 mates are constantly having problems for small things.  so long story short : the first thing they (2 mates whom already living here 2.5 years) decided that one mate (let's call her Vanessa), she cant live in the house any longer because it is not working between Vanessa and the other girl. they keep having small fights with each other.  The thing I see as a problem here is that those 2 mates, let's call Tom and Jerry, they decided to kick Vanessa out without even consulting it to me first.  One guy in the house is currently on vacation, so the talk was only the 4 of us, but Tom and Jerry said that the other guy, Paolo he is taking their side. what is that? they have the time to phone Paolo but not time to talk to me first hand about the problem and the kicking? I feel like I was being left behind. am I overreacting in here? and also, Tom and Jerry talks about respect and basic human communication and so on. but I dont see them doing that well. they ask without they doing it or showing it.  are they being totally shitty? or this is me being overreacting? is this okay for me to also be included in the decision making? these tom and jerry are also tenant. they are not the house owner or whatever. if they own the house, it makes sense to have extra right to make the decision as a house owner, but as flatmates? I believe what they are doing is wrong.

chinese_item: 侮辱让我感到生理上的不适。  我刚才在Reddit上发帖说我有创伤后应激障碍（PTSD），因为我几乎一整天都没吃东西，开车时感觉头晕，所以我叫了救护车……我的护士热线让我打911，我就打了……  结果一个消防员来了之后说了些很没礼貌的话，说“我知道你是谁”，把我吓坏了。  ……结果发现，打电话的人竟然是我几个月前在车祸中撞到脑震荡时见过的那个人……当时我惊慌失措，紧张兮兮的，他居然指责我嗑药……  我在帖子里提到过，过去几年里，我好几次因为创伤后应激障碍（PTSD）而惊慌失措地打电话求助，但我从来没见过这个人……  这个Reddit用户开始侮辱我，说我滥用系统，说他讨厌像我这样的人，说我的故事蠢透了等等……  我被他弄得恶心想吐……我不知道以后还要不要再在Reddit上发帖了
english_item: Insults make me physically sick I was just on a Reddit posting about how I have PTSD and I called the ambulance because I hadn't ate for most of the day and was feeling dizzy when driving...my nurse helpline told me to call 911 so I did..  and a fire fighter made some rude comments when he showed up saying I know who you are, it freaked me out.  ..and it ended up being a guy I saw months before in wreck when I got a concussion..and he was accusing me of being on drugs when I was panicking as I was jittery..  I mentioned in the post there have been several times in the past few years where I had to call from panic for ptsd but I never saw that guy..  This Redditor starts insulting me saying I abuse the system, how he hates ppl like me, how I have one of the dumbest stories ever etc..  I got physically sick from it..I don't know if I want to post stuff on Reddit anymore..

chinese_item: 婚姻与音乐  音乐对我的影响近乎神圣。它触动我的灵魂，让我热泪盈眶，尤其是那些器乐曲，或是那些我曾与人分享过的歌曲。我渴望找到一位能够与我产生共鸣的伴侣，一位能够像我一样感受音乐的伴侣，让我们共同体验这份联结。但我同时也明白，善良和品格比共同的爱好更为重要。  找到一个能在音乐层面与我产生共鸣、触动灵魂的人究竟有多重要？如果我的伴侣无法做到这一点，我又该如何解释音乐带给我的情感冲击——比如，当我听到多年前与一位真正理解我的人合唱的歌曲录音时，或者仅仅是聆听对方的声音，我都会潸然泪下，而又不被误解为思念
english_item: Matrimony and music Music moves me in a way that feels almost sacred. It touches my soul and brings me to tears, especially instrumental pieces or songs I’ve shared with someone emotionally. I long for a partner who can meet me in that space, who feels music the way I do, so we can experience that bond together. But I also know that goodness and character matter more than shared passions.   How important is it to find someone who connects with me on that musical, soul-stirring level? And if my partner doesn’t, how can I explain the kind of emotional impact music has on me—like crying over a recording of a duet I sang years ago with someone who simply got it, or even on just listening to their voice, without being mistaken for longing?

chinese_item: 他想和我一起走吗？  我的暗恋对象想和我一起走吗？  我暗恋的是一个我非常喜欢的男生。我九月份在体育馆见过他，十一月份我们聊了一个星期，然后他就突然不理我了。几个月前他为之前的“消失”道歉，说他不知道自己为什么这么做，但肯定不是我的错。他说现在我们虽然见面了，但上次我们还是没联系。我问他能不能一起去体育馆走走（我们上同一节体育课，课前会先走一会儿），他说他无所谓，随你便。我说如果你想的话，他说他无所谓。但是昨天我问他周一想不想一起去体育馆走走，他说“好啊”。这真的好吗？他十一月份就知道我喜欢他，但我不知道他现在是不是还喜欢我，也不知道我这样是不是在逼他。关于他，我还有一些细节想补充，比如他好像除了我以外，从来没跟其他女生说过话？如果这很重要的话，但你们觉得他真的想吗？如果他不想，而你们觉得他想，那我就不问了。我已经很久没给他发短信了，不过我之前为了问这个问题发过，上次问他大概是一个月或两个月前，但他那天身体不舒服，没去上学。  不知道是不是应该在这里发帖哈哈，不好意思

chinese_item: 有人体验过迷幻剂吗？我之前有过一些迷幻剂的经历，但一年前我真的很想尝试一下，于是服用了异常高剂量的LSD，试图彻底消除自我。不幸的是，这成了我犯下的最大错误，因为它导致了一次精神病发作，让我陷入了混乱的白日梦和纯粹的恐怖体验的漩涡中，持续了整整两个月。现在，一年过去了，我的情况稳定下来，症状也消失了，但有一件事始终萦绕在我心头：我仍然想要摆脱所有从最大的敌人（自我）那里继承来的负面和破坏性特质。我厌倦了仇恨、嫉妒等等。我想成为最好的自己，不是外表上的，而是内在的。我坚信，当你放下内心的阴暗面，舍弃一部分自我——一部分你不再需要的自我，因为它最终只会导致自我毁灭——世界会张开双臂欢迎你。你什么时候会因为怨恨或憎恨别人而感觉更好？这就像打自己一拳。那么，我该如何摆脱自我中那些自私自利、有害的特质？我该如何部分地消除那些对世界无益的缺点？
english_item: DAE have experience with psychedelics? I've had some experience with psychedelics, but a year ago I really wanted to test it out and tried to completely dissolve my ego with an abnormally high dose of LSD. Unfortunately, this turned out to be my biggest mistake, as it resulted in a psychotic episode that catapulted me into a downward spiral of chaotic waking dreams and a pure horror cabinet. For a full two months. Now, after a year, I'm stabilized and symptom-free, but one thing remains: I still want to let go of all the negative and destructive traits that a person acquires from their greatest enemy (ego). I'm tired of hating, feeling envy, etc. I want to become the best version of myself, not externally, but internally. I firmly believe that the world welcomes you with open arms when you let go of your dark side and give up a piece of yourself, a part of yourself that you no longer have use for, because it ultimately only contributes to self-destruction. When have you ever felt better when you treated someone with resentment or hatred? It's like punching yourself in the face. So how do i let go of those egotistical and harmful traits of the ego? How do i partly dissolve specific properties that don't contribute to the world being a better place?

chinese_item: 这里有人知道别人不会评判自己吗？  我知道十有八九没人会刻薄我，说我烦人，或者觉得我怪异尴尬，但我就是无法摆脱这种想法。我知道这不理性，但恐惧依然存在，而且让我难以承受。所以我讨厌别人跟我说“没人会评判你”。我明明知道！哈哈，但我的脑子就是停不下来，总是胡思乱想
english_item: Does anybody here know that people aren’t judging them? Like, I know 9 times out of 10 nobody is gonna be mean or call me annoying or think I weird or awkward, but I just can’t get over the thought of it. I know it’s irrational, but the fear is still there and it’s debilitating. That’s why I hate when people tell me “nobody is judging you.” I KNOW THAT lol, my brain just won’t stop catastrophizing.

chinese_item: 公开演讲/演示对我来说感觉非常不自然。  我发现练习极其困难。我努力寻找合适的措辞来准备演示，但即使只讲第一张幻灯片，也坚持不到半分钟就会停下来，思考该用什么词，或者如何组织语言。感觉就像我在努力用一种我平时不会用的语气说话，说一些我平时不会说的话，努力成为一个完全不像自己的人。我的发音总是不对劲，而且每隔一两句话就会结巴。  如果不练习，结果总是很糟糕。高中时，我的演示总是被嘲笑，成绩要么不及格，要么勉强及格。大学时，我匆忙准备的一次演示也引来了一些嘲笑。在其他与工作相关的小组演示中，如果我不练习，我总能看到人们脸上流露出的无聊和困惑。但是练习真的很难，因为我好像没办法快速地把想法转化成语言，导致表达不够流畅自然。  有人也有这个问题吗？你们是怎么练习的？是一边承认自己练习过程中犯了很多小错误，一边硬着头皮继续练习吗
english_item: Public speaking/presenting just feels so unnatural to me I find it extremely hard to practice. I'm trying to find the right words for a presentation, and I can't even speak for half a minute on the first slide without pausing and going back to thinking about what words to use or how to frame something. It's like I'm trying to speak in a tone I don't normally speak in, say words that I don't normally say, and just try to be somebody that I'm not. My pronunciation doesn't come out right and I stutter every sentence or two.  If I don't practice, it always goes horribly. I got laughed at in high school for my presentations and either got failing or barely passing grades. During college I got a few smirks for a presentation I had to hastily prepare for. For other/work related small group presentations I see the boredom and confusion on people's faces if I don't practice. But it's so hard to practice because I can't seem to translate my thoughts into words quick enough to give a natural flow.  Anyone else have this problem? How do you practice? Do you just push through it while acknowledging that you have made lots of little slip ups during practice?

chinese_item: 有没有人跟我一样，压力达到一定程度后就会麻木？  我经常避免说话，但如果实在没办法，我也会硬着头皮说完，只是为了赶紧结束。我甚至都无法正常呼吸或思考，但胸口仍然感觉很沉重。之后不久焦虑感又会回来，因为我会想到自己刚才的声音颤抖、脸颊通红，肯定显得很傻很滑稽。这就是大家一直跟我说有效的暴露疗法吗
english_item: Does anyone else just go numb after a certain amount of pressure? I often avoid talking but when I have no choice anymore I push through just for the sake of getting it over with, I don't even properly breath or think but my chest still feels heavy. and the anxiety is back shortly after because I'm thinking about how stupid I must have sounded and looked with my tremly voice and flushed cheeks. Is this the exposure everyone has been telling me would work?/gen

chinese_item: 有些人不想做有趣的事情，但一旦强迫自己去做，就会庆幸自己做了？
english_item: DAE  ,DAE not want to do fun things but once they force themselves they're glad they did?

chinese_item: 有没有人为了赚钱，努力在工作中维持和平？我讨厌我的工作，但如果我情绪失控或者与人发生冲突，我知道要么我会辞职，要么会被解雇，这意味着损失一大笔钱。
english_item: DAE try their best to keep the peace at their job for the sake of making money? I hate my job, but if I snap or be confrontational, I just *know* I'll either quit or get fired, meaning $$$ lost

chinese_item: 我怎么知道他是喜欢我还是只是出于礼貌？  我在培训的时候认识了一个男生。我们在同一家公司工作，但不在同一个部门，所以这方面没什么问题。  培训结束后，我有点儿“跟踪”了他，加了他的Facebook好友。我们聊了一会儿，只是朋友间的交流，没有真正调情。可能有一些暗示，但没有任何直接的举动。  他现在在加拿大，但还是会联系我。我本来以为他不在的时候不会发消息，但他确实发了。没有暧昧，只是很友好。我最近在肩膀上纹了个身，拍了张照片发到我的Facebook故事里，他看到照片后“很惊讶”。我不知道是不是因为我露出了锁骨之类的。我猜应该不是因为纹身才惊讶的。  我觉得自己分析这些事挺没劲的。我31岁了，几个月前刚结束了一段长达10年的感情，现在我还有一个孩子。调情/聊天对我来说感觉很新鲜！我该如何引导谈话走向更暧昧的方向呢？我90%确定他喜欢我，但总还有一丝疑虑
english_item: ??,"How do I know if he likes me or is just being nice? I met a guy on training. We work for the same company but in different areas so there’s no qualms there.   After training I kind of stalked and added him on Facebook. We spoke a little bit. It was just friendly, no real flirting. Maybe hints but nothing direct.   He’s away in Canada at the moment but has still been checking in. I wouldn’t have expected him to message whilst away but he has. Nothing flirty, just nice. I recently had a tattoo on my shoulder and took a photo for my Facebook story and he “shock” faced the photo. I don’t know if it’s because I was showing my collarbone etc. I assume it wasn’t a shock react to the tattoo.   I feel pathetic analysing everything. I’m 31. I’ve been in a 10 year relationship until a few months ago. I have a baby. Flirting/chatting feels very new to me! How do I try and steer the conversation to being more flirty? I’m 90% sure he’s into it but there’s always that doubt ??

chinese_item: 我的健身房暗恋对象突然不理我了  我们健身房有个女生。一开始我们只是互相看着对方，然后开始打招呼，之后就开始聊天。但是现在，她好几天都没看我一眼了。昨天我们偶然碰面，她突然生气地转过身来，骂我烦人。我不知道我做错了什么，也不知道她为什么生我的气
english_item: 。,"My gym crush stopped talking to me There's a girl at my gym. For a while we just looked at each other. Then we started saying hello. After that we started talking. But now, she hasn't looked at me for days. Yesterday, when we ran into each other, she got angry and turned around and called me annoying. I don't know what I did wrong or why she's mad at me.

chinese_item: 做你自己！  我看到很多人因为自己的本性而自我厌恶，这真令人难过。我知道，即使你感受不到自己的感受，或者你的应对方式、看待世界的方式与他人不同，被告知“感受你的感受”听起来很矛盾。你可能从小就被灌输“别那么敏感”、“别把什么都看得太重”、“别那么感性”之类的观念。好像这是一种选择似的。也许你已经把这些话内化了，它们只会加重你的痛苦。  这个世界*需要*敏感。但如果你的敏感让你痛苦不堪，那就学会更好地控制它，不要苛责自己。做你自己。像对待一个需要你智慧和帮助的悲伤小孩一样对待自己。归根结底，那些因为你与众不同而评判你的人，并没有真正了解你——只有你自己
english_item: Stay on your side! I see a lot of people here hating on themselves for being who they are, and it's sad. I know it's counterintuitive to be told to feel what you feel even though you may not be or cope or view the world like others do. You've likely been told your whole life to *stop being so sensitive, stop taking everything so seriously, stop feeling things so deeply*. As if it's a choice. Maybe you've internalized those messages, and they're just piling more pain onto your pain.   This world *needs* sensitivity. But if the sensitivity is killing you, learn to manage it better without beating yourself up. Stay on your own team. Treat yourself the way you would treat a small, sad child who is depending on you for wisdom and help. At the end of the day, the people who judge you for being different don't live in your skin - you do.

chinese_item: 我从没说过话的同学  我每周上一次这门课，班里有个男生我特别喜欢，但是很可惜他只在小测验的时候来，所以我一直没机会跟他说话。更糟糕的是，上次小测验几周前就结束了，他以后可能都不会再来了。我们这门课是小班讨论课，他认得我，我们也有大课，大课的同学们有个WhatsApp群。有一天我随便看看群里都有谁，结果看到了他。我一直在纠结要不要给他发个WhatsApp消息，告诉他我是X班的，一直没机会跟他说话，但是我很喜欢他等等等等。不过我又不想显得很怪异或者很猥琐。求建议 :( 我已经暗恋他一个月了
english_item: ,"Classmate I’ve never talked to So basically I have this class once a week, and there is this guy whom I find extremely attractive, but unfortunately he would only come when we had quiz and I never had the chance to talk to him. And even worse we finished with the last quiz weeks ago so he’ll probably never come to class again. Now, we are a small discussion class and he knows my face, we also have these big lecture classes, and from the big lecture class we have a whatsup group. One day I was just wondering who’s in the group and I saw him. I’ve been debating wether I should send him a message on whatsup and tell him how I’m from X class and I’ve never really had a chance to talk to him but I would love blah blah blah. Idk tho I really don’t want to be creepy or weird. Any advice please :( I’ve been crushing for a month now >/////<

chinese_item: 每次遇到新朋友，我都会立刻感到不受欢迎。  每当我尝试结交新朋友时，总觉得自己显得很急切，而且本能地感到……不受欢迎？  比如，我第一次遇到一个很酷的同学，但我不敢坐在他旁边，也不敢和他多说话，因为我害怕他其实并不欢迎我。我感觉自己好像只是在侵犯别人的空间，仅仅因为我的存在。我总是觉得自己在强迫别人接受我 :(  然后，当别人开始和他们说话、坐在他们旁边，好像一切都很自然的时候，我就会非常嫉妒。最后，他们成了朋友，而我却像往常一样孤身一人，因为我受伤的自尊心让我无法靠近。  被拒绝的风险如此之大，以至于它远远超过了结交新朋友的可能性，最终毁掉了我的机会
english_item: I feel instantly unwanted meeting new people Whenever I'm trying to make new friends, I always feel like I'm coming off desperate and I also feel so instinctively.. Unwanted ?  For example like I meet a cool classmate for the first time, but I won't sit next to them or talk to them too much, because I'm scared they secretly won't want me there. I naturally just feel like I'm invading people's space just for existing . I'm always feeling like I'm forcing myself onto people :(   And then I get very jealous when someone else starts talking to them and sitting next to them like it's nothing. And then they become friends and I'm alone as always because my hurt self esteem wants to keep me at bay.  The risk of rejection hurts so badly it outweighs and ruins my chances of new friendships.

chinese_item: 室友留下杂物，引发问题我的室友很忙，有时会把一些东西乱扔，比如她的护发产品、鞋子、塑料袋等等。平时我倒不太在意，但到了打扫的时候，我自然会把东西整理一下，把看起来不像垃圾的东西堆在角落里，因为我打扫完之后，希望公寓看起来整洁，而不是杂乱无章。这引发了一些问题。有两次，她把食物袋直接放在台面上，我以为是垃圾，打扫的时候就扔掉了。这次她生气了，因为她新买了一双鞋，鞋盒和鞋子都放在客厅里快两周了。今天我想打扫一下，因为明天有客人来，我就把她留下的鞋盒扔进了回收箱，她本来打算用那个盒子重新包装鞋子。她还把护发产品都堆在浴室的洗手台上，我扔掉了一个看起来用完的，她却为此生气了。我理解她为什么生气，因为我确实在翻看她的东西，但这些杂物堆在外面都快两周了，我没必要非得等她决定收拾才能拥有一个干净的公寓。我碰/扔掉不属于我的东西，这样做错了吗？
english_item: Roommate leaves clutter which causes issues So my roommate gets busy and sometimes leave clutter out like her hair products, shoes, plastic bags, etc.  It really doesn't bother me too much day to day however when it's time for me to clean up I naturally do sort through and leave everything that doesn't look like trash in the corner in a pile because if I clean I want the apartment to look so, not still cluttered.  This has caused an issue there's been about two times where she had bags of food just out on the counter and I thought it was trash and just threw them away when cleaning. Well this time she got mad at me because she had new shoes in the mail and left the box and shoes out in the living room for almost two weeks now. Well today I wanted to clean up for company I'm having tomorrow and I threw the box she left out in the recycling and she was going to use it to repackage them. She also left her hair products all out on the bathroom sink and I threw away one that looked empty and she got upset at that. I understand why she's mad because yes I'm touching and going through her things but It's been almost two weeks now with all this clutter out and I shouldn't have to wait for her to decide to clean up to have a clean apartment. Am I in the wrong for touching/throwing away things that aren't mine?

chinese_item: 约会取消  我（17岁，男）和这个女孩聊了一个星期左右，我们约好这周末约会。但今天我们完全没说话，有时感觉她好像故意无视我。她会避免眼神交流，好像我根本不存在一样。之后她发短信说她的朋友们临时有事要出去玩。我提出改期，但她已读不回。我是不是想太多了？还是她真的对我没兴趣
english_item: ？,"Canceled date I (17M) have been talking to this girl for about a week and we planed a date for this weekend. But today we didn’t talk at all, and at times it felt like she was intentionally ignoring me. Doing things like avoiding eye contact and acting as if I wasn’t even there. She then texted me saying that her friends made last minute plans to hang out. I offered to reschedule and she left me on read. Am I over thinking this or is she actually not interested

chinese_item: 为什么有些人会这么没礼貌？  他们是不是心情不好？还是通过贬低别人来获得优越感和快感？  今天我和我的狗狗有大约40次愉快的互动。但一次不愉快的经历真的让我心情很差。我和我的狗狗一起坐电梯，一对夫妇在我们之后进来。丈夫夸我的狗狗可爱，而妻子（一位中年妇女）却对着它冷笑，问我它是不是“嗑药了”。我的狗狗体型很小，一见到人就兴奋，摇着尾巴蹦蹦跳跳。我一直把牵引绳拉得很短，所以它没有碰到他们。那位女士走出电梯时转过头来，一脸嫌弃地对我说：“你真应该好好训练它。”  与此同时，很多陌生人都夸我的狗狗友好又可爱。一位男士甚至说，正是因为我的狗狗，他才决定要养一只小狗。另一位女士说：“她活着真好，我应该也这样。”……所以95%的人都保持着积极的态度。  而一位闷闷不乐的女士却让我心情低落。如果我不是那么敏感，就不会这么容易受到这类事情的影响。  我真的厌倦了那些消极无礼的人。他们真的会破坏我的心情。他们似乎存在的唯一目的就是散播负能量。  我在工作中曾遭受过比我年长一倍的人的欺凌。他们似乎存在的唯一目的就是散播仇恨和负能量。有些人甚至乐在其中。他们会公开炫耀自己是如何逼迫同事辞职的
english_item: Why are People Rude? Are they just miserable? Do they get a sense of superiority and high from kicking down at other people?   I had like 40 positive encounters with my dog today. But one negative encounter really dampens my mood. My dog and I were on the elevator and this couple got on after us. The husband called my dog cute, while the wife (a middle age woman) sneered at her and asked me if she was on drugs. My dog is tiny and gets her excited around people, so she wags her tail and jumps up a down. I kept the leash short so she never made contact with them. The woman turns to me as she exits the elevator and said you should really learn to train her with a disgusted face.   Meanwhile, many other random strangers complimented my dog for how friendly and sweet she was throughout the day. One guy said she was the reason he was going to get a puppy. Another woman said she's just so happy to be alive. I should be more like that....so 95 percent of people had positive attitudes.   While one sullen woman just made me feel down. If I wasn't so sensitive, I wouldn't be so heavily impacted by encounters like this.   I'm just so tired of negative and rude people. They really ruin my mood. It seems like they only exist to spread nastiness in the world.   I've experienced bullying from people twice my age in the workplace. Who seemed to exist to just spread hatred and negativity in the world. Some of them even seem to enjoy it. They openly brag about all the coworkers they drove to the point of quitting.

chinese_item: 你知道我遇到的几乎所有人最让我生气的是什么吗？  他们太自我中心，太爱把自己的想法强加于人了。我可不是开玩笑，我遇到的大多数人都如此以自我为中心，他们甚至懒得问我一个问题，或者假装关心我关心的事情。这让我很生气，因为我几乎会认真思考遇到的每个人，并且尽可能地体贴他们，但却从未得到过同样的回报。我觉得我的伴侣是我这辈子遇到过的最不关心他人的人。  自从特朗普当选以来，我彻底变成了一个厌世者。我对人类真是厌倦透了
english_item: You know what makes me so angry about almost every human I've interacted with? They are so self absorbed and projecting. I'm not joking most people I meet are so self centered they can't even bother to ask a single question about me or pretend to be invested in things that matter to me. It makes me angry because I think deeply about almost every person I meet and I try to be accommodating as possible but I never get the favor returned. I think my partner is the least absorbed person I ever met in my life.   I've gone full blown misanthropic since Trump won too. So sick and tired of humanity.

chinese_item: 有没有人跟我一样，觉得自己比同龄人差很多，觉得自己很失败？我今年23岁，女。自从2020年高中毕业后，我就一直觉得自己远远落后于以前的朋友们，而且我不知道该怎么改变这种状况。我高中的大多数“朋友”都上了名牌大学，找到了高薪工作。他们都在到处旅行，过着精彩的生活。而我呢，因为心理健康状况太差，从社区大学辍学了，之后就再也没回去过。我没找到一份好工作，也没钱，更别提旅行了。我现在甚至讨厌打开Instagram，因为我怕看到他们发的东西，然后就会陷入深深的抑郁。感觉好像每个人都过得那么好，而我却一败涂地，像个傻瓜一样。
english_item: DAE struggle with feeling like a failure compared to their peers? For context I'm 23 F. Ever since the minute I graduated high school in 2020, I have felt so far behind all of my old friends and I don't know how to fix it. Most of my 'friends' from high school went on to go to big universities and have really high paying jobs. They're all constantly traveling and having fun. Meanwhile, I dropped out of community college because my mental health was so bad and I never went back. I haven't managed to get a nice job, I don't have any money, and especially not enough to travel. It's to the point that I hate opening up instagram because I might see something that they posted and it will spiral me into a deep depression. It just seems like everyone else is doing so well and I'm completely failing and making a fool out of myself.

chinese_item: 有人也喜欢对着镜子练习面部表情吗？我大部分时间都在镜子前练习微笑。有时候看起来有点诡异。我有时会微笑，有时则会眼神空洞地盯着前方。有时也会练习生气，但感觉很奇怪。极少数情况下，我会故意露出冷笑，让自己看起来像是在生气。
english_item: DAE practice facial expressions in the mirror i do most smiling in the mirror. sometimes its kinda creepy. i do that or just a dead eyed stare. sometimes angry but that feels weird. and very very rarely ill do a smirk just so i can be angry.

chinese_item: 不断重复残酷友谊的循环  我发现自己一直在重复同样的友谊循环，很想知道其他人是否有类似的经历。  每当我和一个新认识的女性朋友变得亲密时，最初的一两年都很美好，但之后她们就会把这份友谊视为理所当然，一副“哦，你永远都会在我身边”的样子。我注意到，在群体场合，她们总是更倾向于和其他朋友待在一起，和她们在一起时也更活泼开朗。她们很少关心我，从不庆祝我的成就，却期望我在她们遇到好事或坏事时都陪伴在她们身边。我通常会感到厌烦，尤其是在她们当着其他人的面对我非常粗鲁或贬低之后，所以我会停止联系她们，或者减少联系，友谊也就慢慢淡化了。  我结交了一些看起来更友善的新朋友，但同样的情况似乎又会重演。我个人无法理解，为什么有些人会从贬低他人中获得满足感，而不是包容他人。我觉得善良常常被误解为软弱，并被人利用，我希望能够停止这种恶性循环
english_item: Repeating the cycle of cruel friendships I’ve found that I’ve been repeating the same cycle of friendships and I’m curious about others’ similar experiences.   Whenever I get close with a new girl friend it’s great for the first 1-2 years and then after they take the friendship for granted in a “oh you’ll always be there” sort of way. I notice that in group settings they always gravitate towards their other friends and are more bubbly and energetic around them. They rarely ask about me and never celebrate accomplishments yet expect me to be there for them whenever something good or bad happens. I usually get fed up, usually after they were outright rude or demeaning towards me in front of other people so I stop reaching out or reach out less and the friendship fizzles out.   I make new friends that seem kinder but this seems to happen again. Personally I don’t understand the satisfaction others get from making others feel less than rather than being inclusive. I feel as though RandomActsofKindness is often mistaken for weakness and taken advantage of and would like to stop repeating the cycle.

chinese_item: 你们看现场演出的时候，即使不觉得悲伤，也会特别容易动情吗？我们学校的服装设计专业办了个演出，因为票免费，而且也正好可以打发时间，所以我就去了。虽然我根本不认识演出里的人，而且我以前也从来没想过这种事，但我全程都感觉快要哭了？？演出真的太可爱了，大家都在为自己的朋友们加油，每个人肯定都付出了很多努力。每次去看现场演出都会这样，而且我总是忘了自己认识谁。这次尤其尴尬，因为旁边的人问我：“你认识演出里的谁？”我抽泣着说：“其中一个女孩是我室友的朋友。”然后我就只认识她一个人了。
english_item: 90%   ,dae get really emotional at live performances even if they're not sad? my school's fashion design majors put on a show and i went because the tickets were free and it was something to do.  despite the fact i didn't know 90% of the people who were in it and i've never thought about this kinda stuff before in my life i was on the brink of tears like the whole time?? it was just so cute and people were cheering for their friends and everyone must've worked so hard.  this happens like every time i go to a live event and i always forget. was particularly embarrassing this time though because the person next to me was like who do you know in the show and sniffling i was like one girl is a friend of my roommate and that's all i had.

chinese_item: 如何应对不尊重人的室友？我之前在另一个帖子里发过类似的问题，但我想请教一下有过类似经历的人。我和我男朋友都上夜班，从凌晨1点到7点。我们下午4点到晚上12点睡觉。以下是我们室友的一些行为。-声称他的朋友不应该靠近我，因为我什么都跟它一起睡-每晚都从酒吧带陌生人过来-从晚上8点到凌晨5点，把低音炮开到最大声-让他的狗整天整夜地在外面叫-任由他的朋友从我们冰箱里拿东西、碰东西，却不追究责任-敲打墙壁和天花板（可能没什么大不了的，但还是吓到我了）-每晚都大喊大叫-动不动就说我和我男朋友的坏话-声称房子是他的，他负责打理（其实我男朋友负责所有清洁工作，包括我们室友发霉的盘子和放了好几天的厨具）还有其他一些事，如果都写出来，那就太烦人了。我们正在努力搬出去，但是找房子比找房子还难。现在我们上班的时候，房子里有七个我们不知道的陌生人（我们事先知道），为了防止他们有任何不良企图，我们已经把房门锁上了。除了一个他拒绝提供激活信息的Ring摄像头外，我们没有其他监控设备。请问我该如何处理这件事？
english_item: How to deal with a disrespectful roommate? I've posted before under a different thread but I need some advice from the people who used to deal with this. For context, my boyfriend and I work night shift from 1-7 am. We sleep from 4pm-12 am. Here's a list of things our roommate has done.  -Claim his friends shouldn't be near me because I sleep with everything and anything  -Bring random strangers from the bar every night -blast music with bass boosted from 8pm till 5am -leaves his dog out to bark all night and day  -leta his friends remove and knock stuff out of our section of the fridge without consequence -Bang on the walls and ceilings (prob not a huge deal but scares me) -screams and yells and hollars every night  -trash talks me and my boyfriend over everything -clains he owns and takes care of the house (my bf cleans everything including our roommates molded plates and cooking stuff left put for days)  among other things that would extend this into a while bother thread. We are trying to move out but getting responses from places is harder than finding one. There's currently seven unknown people in the house while we are out at work (that were aware of) and we've locked the doors to our rooms to prevent any negative intention. We don't own surveillance other than a ring camera that he refuses to share the info to activate. Please how do I go about dealing with this?

chinese_item: 连续几天情绪崩溃  最近我感觉自己特别脆弱，每天都会被一些（有时甚至是微不足道的）事情触动，需要好几天才能消化。比如，我碰到了前任，他阴阳怪气地问我“你来这儿干嘛”。此外，我的研究导师这周有点疏远我，我没能清楚地表达我的目标和想法。理智上我知道这些事情难免发生，我也不会太在意，但它们却引发了我强烈的冲动情绪，需要好几天才能平复。有人也有类似的感受吗？你们是如何做到情绪上的抽离/设定界限的
english_item: Overwhelmed for days Lately I have been feeling really vulnerable, I get triggered by (sometimes minor) situations every single day and need days to process them. For example, I ran into my ex and he passively aggressively asked me what I was doing there. In addition, my research supervisor has been a bit distant this week and I was not able to clearly express my goals and ideas. I know rationally that these things happen and I am not bothered too much by them on a rational level, but they create such strong impulsive emotional reactions, which take days to go away. Anyone feeling similar things? How do you emotionally detach/set boundaries?

chinese_item: 做了鼻部手术，没法擤鼻涕，又怕鼻塞得厉害，所以整整一个月，无论内心多么崩溃，我都强忍着泪水。  直到今天，手术一个月零一周后，我终于哭了。  但这次哭是因为一件困扰了我两年半的事情。  我为一位离开我的朋友而悲伤，我一直盼望着她能回来，因为每天各种事情都让我感到压力巨大、喧嚣嘈杂，而我却只能独自承受这一切。  上周末，在一位共同朋友的婚礼上，她看到我很开心，终于主动联系了我。  现在她联系我了，我发现自己并没有为我们失去的时光感到难过，也没有因为她想再次联系我而感到高兴。  我唯一能感受到的，是理解她的处境，但这仍然不足以让我想要重燃这段友谊。  我之前没意识到，在努力让一切恢复原状的过程中，我不知不觉地找到了内心的平静，并继续前行。  让我感到意外的是，我竟然有机会再次和她交谈，那些我平时很想对她说的话，我终于可以好好说说了。我发现自己更喜欢独处，享受自己的思绪和感受，即使它们如此纷乱喧嚣
english_item: Had nose surgery, couldn't blow my nose and didn't want to end up totally congested, so I somehow repressed all my tears for a month, no matter how overwhelmed I was! Then today I did eventually cry, 1 month and a week after surgery. But it was for something that had been emotionally weighing on me for about 2,5 years.   Grieving a friend that left me behind, hoping that she would just come back because I was going through all the thoughts and emotions on my own on top of everything being too much and too loud all day everyday anyway.  After seeing me happy on a mutual friends' wedding last weekend, she reached out finally. Now she did, I found myself not sad for the time we lost. Not happy that she wanted to get in touch with me again.   The only thing I found was understanding for her situation, but that still not being enough to make me want to rekindle the friendship.  I hadn't realized but somewhere along the way of hoping to get things back to how they were, I had found my own peace and moved on.  It took me by surprise, getting the chance to get the conversation running again, all the things I normally would've loved to tell her. And just find myself rather being at peace on my own, with my own thoughts and feelings eventhough they are so big and loud.

chinese_item: 有没有人跟我一样，在争吵/冲突中感到非常不舒服？我爸刚才训了我妹妹一顿，说她态度不好，不幸的是我也在房间里。我感觉自己动弹不得，也走不了，身体像被麻痹了一样。我感觉非常不舒服，可被训斥的又不是我。这种情况经常发生，只要我感觉到房间里气氛紧张，或者有人真的在争吵，我就想吐。我非常害怕卷入争执，甚至连别人提高音量这种小事都害怕。我连友好的辩论都不喜欢。但很不幸，争执无法避免，所以我只能面对。这是不是我的“战斗或逃跑”反应被激活了？有人也有这种感觉吗？
english_item: DAE get extremely uncomfortable during arguments/conflict? My dad just scolded my sister for having an attitude and unfortunately I was in the room as well. I felt like I couldn't move or leave, my body was just paralysed. I felt extremely uncomfortable yet I wasn't even the one being yelled at. This is a reoccurring thing, whenever I sense there is tension in the room or people are actually at an altercation, I feel like puking. I absolutely dread being involved in a disagreement or even something as simple as someone raising their voice. I don't even like a friendly debate. But unfortunately disagreements cannot be avoided, so I just gotta deal with them. Is this like my fight or flight being activated? Does anyone else feel this way?

chinese_item: 有什么借口可以跟我想交朋友的人发短信？  我有个邻居，跟我同龄，我们从小一起长大，但从小学开始就渐渐疏远了。我有他的电话号码，通常需要帮忙或建议的时候会给他发短信，因为他当初给我号码就是为了这个，还告诉我有什么需要就给他发。我不知道他是否把我当朋友，但我很想和他做朋友。可是，即使只是简单地跟他打个招呼，发短信都感觉很尴尬。我们社区要举办肯塔基德比的活动，我想知道他会不会来，因为我们是社区里仅有的四个青少年中的两个。（其他人要么是12岁以下，要么是25岁以上）我只是不想让他觉得我想发展成浪漫关系。我不知道，我就是有点害怕。我也跟他聊过一些比较深入的话题，比如学校里的问题之类的。我知道他是个好孩子，但我不知为何就是很害怕和他做朋友、和他说话，万一他不想和我做朋友怎么办？我应该再等几个小时，看看他会不会出现在邻居们的聚会上吗
english_item: excuses to text someone i want to be friends with? i have a neighbor the same age as me, grew up with him but drifted apart from him starting in elementary school. i have his number, and i usually text him when i need help/advice, since that’s kind of why he gave it to me and told me to text him if i need anything or something like that. i don’t know if he considers me a friend, but i want to be his friend. but it feels so awkward to text him even just to say hi. the neighborhood is doing something for the kentucky derby and i want to know if he’ll be there since we’re like 2 of 4 teenagers in the neighborhood. (everyone else is 12 and below or 25+) i just don’t want him to think im trying to make something romantic? i don’t know, im just scared. i’ve also kind of talked about deep things like school problems and stuff with him. and i know he’s a nice kid but im just so scared for some reason to want to be his friend and talk because what if he doesn’t want to be friends? should i just wait a few more hours to see if he shows up at the party the neighborhood is doing?

chinese_item: “你只是太敏感了。”  最近，我才弄明白高敏感人群（HSP）的特质是什么。起因是我莫名其妙地对一位我其实挺喜欢的同事发了脾气。我刚读完阿伦博士的书，只读了一章（甚至都没做测试）就明白了，这就是我一直以来的问题所在。我感觉如释重负，不再受皮肤敏感、对光线和声音的敏感、对各种情况的过度反应、模式解读以及多年来一直困扰我的根深蒂固的内疚感所困扰——我一直不明白为什么自己不正常。  现在我要告诉家人……他们的反应却很冷淡，因为在如今这个人们普遍接受和理解精神疾病的时代，高敏感人群似乎成了不良行为的又一个借口。但我并不需要他们接受我，我才能最终养成良好的新习惯。  第一步：原谅自己对过度刺激的情况做出过激反应。没关系。  第二步：不要放任不管。说出你的烦恼，进行一次可能不太舒服的对话，让那些负面情绪在滋生成怨恨之前消散。  第三步：放松身心。给自己留出时间，好好照顾自己，这没什么不好。你处理信息的速度比任何人都快，你需要比任何人都多的放松时间。  第四步：照顾好你的身体……锻炼、健康饮食、散步。如果你身心健康，就能更快乐地承受一切。  今天我妈说我太敏感了，我就告诉她：“我就是敏感。”“难道我就不能敏感一点吗？”“难道我就不能做我自己吗？”  我突然意识到，我从来没学会如何把事情说出来……我把所有的焦虑都憋在心里一辈子了
english_item: You are just being sensitive” I just recently figured out what the HSP trait is after a terribly unnecessary outburst at a co worker I actually like. I’ve just finished Dr. Aron book and it took 1 chapter (didn’t even need to take the quiz) to figure out that this is what was wrong with me my entire life. I felt a weight lifting from my shoulders, the sensitive skin, the sensitivity to light and sounds my exaggerated reactions to situations, the pattern reading and the deep seeded guilt I’ve lived with for years not understanding why I wasn’t normal.   And now to tell my family… met with luke warm reactions because in the days of embracing and understanding mental illness HSP is just another excuse for poor behaviour. But I don’t need them to embrace it for me to finally make good new healthy habits for myself.   Step 1: Forgive yourself for having that exaggerated reaction to the overarousing situation. It’s okay.   Step 2: Don’t let everything slide. Call out the irritation have an uncomfortable conversation about it let the demons go before they fester into grudges.   Step 3: decompress it’a okay to make time for yourself and take care of yourself. Your processing everything at an higher rate you need more downtown than anyone.   Step 4: take care of your body… exercise, eat well, go for a walk. If you are physically and mentally well you can bare it all much happier.   My mother said I was being too sensitive to today so I told her “I am sensitive” “Can’t I just be sensitive?” “Can’t I just be myself”   It occurred to me I’ve never learned how to work things out-loud… I’v internalized every piece of angst my entire life.

chinese_item: 社交焦虑症一天比一天严重……  最近我的感觉越来越糟……我不知道到底发生了什么，但我独处的时间越长，就越害怕出门……最近我感觉越来越糟，光是想到要去学校、去公共场所就让我越来越害怕。每次出门我都会胸口发紧。而且最近，我的焦虑症越来越严重，感觉快要吐了……头也疼得厉害……而且我最近经常做噩梦，梦境非常可怕，我害怕再次入睡，所以渐渐开始失眠。我发现自己也会发抖……每次走在走廊里……胸口就疼得厉害……我总是担心别人是不是讨厌我，是不是在打扰别人……保持警惕真的好累……有时候抖得厉害到动弹不得，有时候抖得连字都写不好……我都不敢出门了……好害怕……请帮帮我
english_item: Social Anxiety getting worse by the day… I’ve been feeling worse and worse lately.. i dont know what’s really happening but the more I spend time alone, the more I end up getting scared of going outside… I’ve been feeling worse lately just the idea of going to school, to public has been scaring me more and more. My chest tightens every time I have to go outside. And as of late, my anxiety has been taking over, I feel like I’m about to throw up… my head hurts a lot… and I’m slowly turning insomniac because I’ve been dreaming really bad stuffs lately, just plain nightmares and I’m always scared ti go back to sleep. I’ve been noticing myself trembling as well… whenever I walk down the hallways… my chest wont stop hurting… i keep worrying and thinking whether people hate me whether im bothering anybody… and it’s sooo tiring keeping alert… Sometimes i tremble so much that I just couldn’t move at all, sometimes too much that i cant write properly… im so discouraged going outside.. im scared… please help..

chinese_item: 我明天要去参加一个婚礼，现在的气温在5到25摄氏度之间波动，我本身就有自身免疫性疾病，而且还是高敏性人格障碍（HSP）。还没出门就已经筋疲力尽了……  我知道其他人肯定很期待去挑选婚纱，然后去参加婚礼。  而我却一直在琢磨穿什么。一天中的温差太大了。要么一开始太冷，自身免疫性疾病发作；要么一开始穿得很舒服，但最后却热得头晕。  而且我所有可以叠穿的衣服都不适合婚礼场合。  我最近开始怀疑送的礼物是不是合适，所以现在觉得应该再准备一份。  但这也就意味着我今天得开车到处跑，而我已经很累了。  这也意味着我今天必须洗澡，因为明天肯定没时间了。  我今天一整天都关着灯工作，因为过度刺激让我偏头痛发作。  我只是想知道，为什么这件事要花我这么多钱，而普通人可能很期待这件事，而且还能从中获得能量
english_item: I have a wedding to go to tomorrow, weather currently ranging between 5° and 25°C, with autoimmune disease and being hsp. I'm already exhausted before I even have to go... I'm sure other people look forward to go dress shopping and get to go to a wedding.  Instead I've been evaluating what to wear. The temperature range during the day is so big. Either I start too cold, and autoimmune flares up. Or I start comfy but end up being way too hot and dizzy.  And everything to wear in layers that I own is not wedding-proof.  I am last minute doubting the gift, so now I feel like I should get something extra. But that means driving around today when I'm already exhausted.  It also means I have to shower today because there won't be time tomorrow.  I've been working with the lights off all day because I'm getting a migraine from being overstimulated.  And I'm just wondering how this is costing me so much when it's something the average person probably looks forward to and actually gets energy from.

chinese_item: 狗吠引发的危机  两个月前我搬到了新家，邻居家的狗叫个不停。我在家都能听到。我已经给狗主人写过信了，但没有任何改变……  我“解决”这个问题的办法是整天戴着耳塞。今天早上我戴着耳塞出门，那条狗又开始不停地叫了。我上了车，实在受不了了，像个孩子一样哭了起来。狗吠声引发了我的某种情绪危机。这已经不是第一次了。我的反应太过激烈，我觉得自己无法在短时间内克服。  所以，唯一的办法要么是24小时戴着耳塞，要么就是搬家（但我已经搬了四次家了，每次都一样，到处都有狗叫……）  我觉得在这个世界上生活对我来说已经很绝望了
english_item: Crisis after dog barking I moved to a new place 2 months ago and there is a dog in my neighbourhood who barks a lot. I hear it inside my home. I already wrote a letter to the dog owner but nothing changed…  I “solved” the problem by putting in earplugs most of the day. This morning I went outside (with my earplugs) and the dog was barking non-stop (again). I stepped in my car and I could not handle this anymore and cried like a little child. I had some sort of crisis that was triggered by the barking. This is not the first time. It’s an extreme reaction and I don’t see myself overcome this in time.   So the only option is living with earplugs 24/7 or moving (but I moved already 4 times and it is the same everywhere with the dog barking…)  I feel just living in this world is quite hopeless for me…

chinese_item: 你有没有过这样的经历：和某人相处时，感觉他们根本没把你当成一个有思想有感情的活生生的人？  我的意思是，感觉他们只是把你当成一个无聊时用来打发时间的“暖床人”，或者只有在需要你帮忙的时候才会“注意到”你。他们总是谈论自己，但当你跟他们谈起自己时，你能感觉到他们根本没在听，也不在乎你和你的经历。我甚至遇到过这种情况：我刚开口说话不到十秒钟，就有人故意低头玩手机，一脸不耐烦。  谢天谢地，我已经很久没遇到这种情况了，但在青少年时期和刚成年的时候，我经常遇到，那时我自卑又很在意别人的看法。总之，有人也有过类似的经历吗
english_item: Have you ever hung out with someone and you get the vibe that they don’t really see you as an actual person with thoughts and feelings? By this I mean, it feels like they see you as a warm body to pass the time with when they’re bored and have no one better, or they only “see” you when they need a favour from you, or need your help. And they talk about themselves, but when you talk about yourself, you can tell that they’re not really listening and they don’t really care about you and your experiences. I even experienced someone pointedly going on their phone with a bored expression on their face when I was barely 10 seconds into talking.   I haven’t experienced this in a very long time thankfully, but I did several times as a teen and young adult when I had lower self esteem and was more of a people pleaser. Anyway, has anyone else experienced this?

chinese_item: 我的室友领养了一只猫，基本上指望我来照顾它。我和一个室友合住，她今年早些时候领养了一只小猫。一开始我觉得它很可爱，但现在感觉好像只有我在照顾它。这只猫快一岁了，除了打了第一针疫苗之外，没去过兽医那里。它偶尔会打喷嚏，眨眼的时候一只眼睛不能完全闭上，而且因为无聊，总是乱翻乱找东西。除非我提醒，否则猫砂盆好几天都不清理，她也只有在味道实在太难闻的时候才会清理。我回家的时候不止一次发现水碗被她倒空了。她经常出门超过24小时，也不让任何人喂猫或照看猫，就想当然地认为我会照顾它。而我通常也确实会这么做，因为如果不这么做，这只可怜的小家伙就只能挨饿受冻了。她最近买了个舔食垫，可她根本不清理猫碗，连碗都没清理过。垫子上已经结了一层厚厚的剩饭剩菜了。每次我跟她提起这件事，她都表现得好像被我吓到了，或者觉得我在攻击她。我当初并没有同意养猫。现在我觉得自己成了唯一一个要承担别人选择后果的人。我开始记录这些事，以防情况恶化，但主要是想把这些话说出来。这对猫太不公平了。而且，当真正的主人不负责任的时候，我还要继续照顾它，真是太累了:(
english_item: my roommate adopted a cat and basically expects me to take care of it so i live with a roommate who got a kitten earlier this year. at first it was cute, but now i feel like i'm the only one actually looking after her. the cat's almost a year old and hasn't been to the vet only got the first round of shots, nothing else. she sneezes sometimes, one eye doesn't fully close when she blinks, and she's constantly getting into stuff she shouldn't because she's bored and unstimulated. the litter box goes untouched for days unless i say something, and she only cleans it when the smell is unbearable. i've come home to empty water bowls more than once. she'll leave for over 24 hours without asking anyone to feed or check on the cat, just assumes i'll do it. and i usually do, because the alternative is letting this poor animal go without. she recently bought one of those lick mats even though she doesn't clean the regular bowls, and hasn't cleaned that either. it's already crusted over with old food. and when i try to bring any of this up, she acts overwhelmed or like i'm attacking her. i didn't agree to have a cat. and now i feel like i'm the only one holding the consequences of someone else's choice. i've started keeping a record in case things get worse, but mostly i just needed to get this out. it's so unfair to the cat. and it's exhausting to keep caring when the actual owner doesn't :(

chinese_item: 第一次去大学，感觉好不自在。  我上大学了，以前一直受社交焦虑的困扰。我没什么知心朋友——只有一些擦肩而过打招呼的人，但没什么实质性的交流。最近我刚分手，那个人是我唯一真正联系的人。  为了走出舒适区，我决定去参加我的第一个大学派对，希望能认识一些新朋友。结果却是一次非常尴尬的经历。每个人似乎都结伴而来，我感觉格格不入。我试着和几个朋友搭讪——他们一开始还挺友好的，但后来就走开了。这种情况不止一次发生。  后来，几个我在健身房经常见到的男生注意到我一个人，就邀请我和他们的朋友一起跳舞。我很感激他们的好意，但总觉得他们更多是出于同情而不是真心。整个晚上都让我更加明白为什么我通常都不愿意尝试
english_item: Went to my first college, was so uncomfortable I’m in college and have struggled with social anxiety in the past. I don’t really have close friends—just people who say hi in passing, but nothing meaningful. Recently, I went through a breakup, and that person was my only real connection.  Trying to push myself out of my comfort zone, I decided to go to my first college party in hopes of meeting new people. It ended up being a really uncomfortable experience. Everyone seemed to show up with someone, and I felt out of place. I tried introducing myself to a few groups—they were nice at first, but then just walked away. It happened more than once.  Later on, a group of guys I see at the gym noticed I was alone and invited me to dance with their friends. I appreciated the gesture, but part of me couldn’t help feeling like it was out of pity rather than genuine interest. The whole night just reminded me why I usually don’t even try.

chinese_item: 到了某个年纪还没有组建家庭，会让你在社交上处于弱势地位。  我出门总是独自一人。我和亲戚之间有很多压力，但我自己还没有家庭。说实话，直到最近我才意识到这个问题的影响。如果你住在足够小的城镇/城市，没有自己的家庭真的感觉像是社交自杀。  有人也有同感吗？再说一遍，我直到最近才开始思考这个问题，我真希望自己是错的，但我觉得我的想法是对的。即使我一直刻意保持低调，礼貌的挥手致意之类的也挺好的。我不喜欢那种非语言的紧张感
english_item: Not having a family by a certain age puts you in a socially vulnerable position When I go out, it's always by myself. I have a lot of stresses with relatives but don't have a family of my own. Honestly I didn't think of the impact until recently. If you live in a small enough town/city, NOT having a family of your own really seems like social suicide.   Anyone else feel the same? Again, it's not something I thought about until recently, and I really wish I was wrong about it, but I don't think I am. Even if I've gone out of my way to keep a low profile, polite waves and whatever were nice. I don't like nonverbal tension.

chinese_item: 我终于要搬进自己的公寓啦！！这是我第一次独自生活！！我终于要搬进自己的公寓啦！！这是我第一次独自生活！！我在洛杉矶长大，家境贫寒，而且我已经没有家人了。我的父母已经两年没跟我说话了，我没有亲人。我租了一间房间住，我的室友让我非常不舒服。他欺负我，还性骚扰我。他说我让他想起监狱里的某个人，他以前吸食可卡因，他让我的生活如同地狱。有时候我甚至不想离开房间，因为看到他让我难以忍受，我会把门锁上。但我终于搬到了新的城市，新的单身公寓！！虽然地段不太好，但我真的太高兴了，我终于可以独自生活了！！我想让你们都知道，这对我来说简直是个奇迹。我希望你们也能体会到这种感觉。我写这篇文章的时候都哭了，因为……我从没觉得自己能搬出自己的房子，希望你们也能！
english_item: I am. Finally moving my own apartment !! My first time I ever live alone !! I am. Finally moving my own apartment !! My first time I ever live alone !! I grow up. Los Angeles and i grow up poor and i not. Have any family anymore my mom and dad not talk to ne for 2 years no family and I living in room for rent and my roommate make me very. Uncomfortable he bully me and sexually harass me he. Tell me I remind of him some one when he in prison and he do coke in think and he make my. Life hell I some time not want leave my. Room because it make me so hard see him I lock my door but I FINALLY moving new city and new studio apartment !! It is in bad area. But I. Just so happy I. Can finally live alone !! I want you all know it miracle thing that have been. Happening to me lately I just hope all of you get it too I crying writing this because it. Never feel like I ever going get out my own place I hope you all can too !!

chinese_item: 如果你的大学小组作业里有像我这样的人，你会怎么想？  我是信息学专业的，不像计算机科学那样需要大量编程。说实话，我的编程水平很差，真的不是我的强项。我想成为一名用户体验设计师。我担心我的队友会因为我编程不好而瞧不起我（我们上的是高年级的计算机科学课程）。我之前被小组踢出去了，就是因为我的编程水平不够，他们的理由是作业几乎全是编程。我当时真的很难过，都哭了，因为我坦诚地说明了自己的水平，也提出了其他帮助小组的方法，但看来这还不够。不过，我也能理解他们的想法。  在新小组里，我积极参与，和大家保持沟通，去教授的办公室答疑，也帮他们辅导。我会把教授给的任何提示和建议都分享给我的队友。我会去参加每一节课和每一次讨论，并把他们可能错过的项目重要信息都告诉他们。我只是希望他们能看到我的努力，因为很明显之前的组员没有看到。  我在小组作业上投入的精力够吗？如果你的组里有像我这样的人，你会怎么想？我想我只是有点担心组员对我的看法，所以有点社交焦虑。我真的很想在这门课上取得好成绩，因为我担心挂科，而且我需要这门课才能在六月份毕业。今年秋天我还打算去读设计专业的硕士。非常感谢大家的帮助
english_item: What would you think if you had someone like me in your college group assignment? I'm an Informatics major and it's not coding-intensive as CS. To be honest, I'm pretty abysmal at coding and it's just not my thing. I want to become a UX designer. My concern is that my teammates will look down on me because I'm not good at coding (we're in a upper-division CS class). I got kicked out of my last group because my coding skills were not up to par and their reasoning was that the assignment was practically all coding. I was honestly devastated and teared up because I was being honest about my skills and offered other ways to help the team but I guess it wasn't enough for them. I also can understand where they're coming from though.  In my new group, I'm participating by staying in constant communication with the team and going to the professor's office hours and tutoring. I'm letting my team know any hints or tips they said. I'm going to every lecture and discussion and letting them know any important information on the project that they might have missed. I just hope they can see my efforts because obviously the previous team didn't.   Am I putting enough effort into the group assignments? How would you feel if you had someone like me in your team? I guess I'm just feeling socially anxious about the way I'm being perceived by my team. I really care about doing well in this class because I'm worried about not passing and need this class to graduate in June. I'm also set to go to graduate school for design this fall. Any support is appreciated.

chinese_item: 我是不是想太多了？  前几天实习的时候，我在开会上问我的导师，为什么我们同事前几天因为一个关系户撒谎而生气。我问得很清楚。他却皱着眉头，冷笑着说：“什么？”。他那表情瞬间让我不寒而栗。  我知道他可能没听到我说的话，但即便如此，他那冷笑也显得居高临下，好像在暗示我很奇怪。  还有一次，我在会议上讲了个笑话，另一个同事笑了，他却只是露出一个假笑（那种只露出几颗牙的假笑），盯着我看。感觉他好像在对我评头论足，因为他没笑。这就是那种潜意识会捕捉到细微表情的情况。  遇到这种情况，我会对某些人更加矜持
english_item: am i reading too much into this? The other day, at my internship, I asked my mentor in a meeting why our colleague seemed mad the other day because of a network connection lying to her. I asked the q pretty clearly. And he responded frowning his face and sneering and said “what?”. His facial expression INSTANTLY gave me chills.   I get he might not have heard what i said, but even if that was the case, the sneer just seemed patronising, as if he was trying to express that I was strange.   Another time I made a joke on a meeting and while my other colleague laughed, he just gave a fake smile (those ones that show just a few teeth) and stared at me. It just felt like he was making opinions about me, given he didn’t laugh at my joke. It’s one of those situations where your subconscious recognises the subtle micro expressions.   Situations like this make me more reserved around particular people.

chinese_item: 是不是也有人）讨厌别人请你帮忙，而你尽力帮忙却发现自己力不从心，结果他们还不停地抱怨你无能为力，完全不领情？
english_item: DAE( ,DAE hates it when people ask you to help them and when you're trying your best to help them but unfortunately you realize you can't quite do the job so they keep ranting and blaming you for being helpless and not appreciating your effort/help at all?

chinese_item: 严重的社交焦虑  我患有严重的社交焦虑症，真不知道该从何说起！我想这大概是从学生时代开始的——小时候我一直和大家相处得很好，但上了中学（英国）之后就变得很困难。我被很多人欺负。有些女生（我也是女生）会推搡我。我记得有一次，我在打印作业，欺负我的人竟然往我头发上抹酸奶！我当时真是羞愧难当！我很难信任别人，现在依然如此。我已经三十多岁了，但和人待在一起时仍然会感到害怕，生怕自己会受到伤害
english_item: Crippling anxiety I have crippling social anxiety, I’m not sure where to start! I guess it started in school - I had always got on with people when I was little, but when I moved to secondary school (UK), it was hard. I was also bullied by so many people. There were girls, I too am a girl, who would push me around. Then I remember one scene where I was printing my work, and my bullies decided to put yoghurt in my hair! I was mortified! I found it hard to trust people, still do. I’m in my 30’s, and I still get scared hanging around people, in case I get hurt.

chinese_item: 我被诊断出患有抑郁症  3月25日，我被诊断出患有抑郁症，从那以后我一直在服用抗抑郁药。这些药让我完全麻木，我什么都不想做，只想躺在床上腐烂。但在复诊的时候，我意识到自己一直强调自己过度敏感，但医生和治疗师却忽略了这一点。  这是我人生的谷底，我不知道情况会变得多么糟糕。我爱上了一个愿意为我放弃一切的男人，我们一起成长，一起学习很长时间，他是我的慰藉。但我妈妈让我停止和他联系，但我做不到，我无法控制自己。她让我以她的名义，以上帝的名义发誓，但我撒谎了。我错了。我伤害了他，伤害了我自己，也背叛了我的妈妈。我知道大多数人会说，我的抑郁症让我从他身上找到了慰藉。这就是我们在一起的原因，但我们在一起已经六七个月了，我从未感受过如此深沉的爱。他愿意等我，愿意为我失去一切，只为待在我身边。我妈妈很保护我，爱我，我愿意为她做任何事。我进退两难
english_item: Got diagnosed with depression On 25th of march , I got diagnosed with depression and ever since I’m on anti depressants . They have completely numbed me , I don’t want to do anything except rot in bed but when I was going through my check up I realised how I was emphasizing upon me being hyper sensitive but this was getting ignored by the doctors and therapists .  This is my rock bottom , I don’t know how worse it’ll get . I fell in love with a guy who is ready to leave anything for me , we were growing with each other , studying together for long hours , he was my peace but my mom told me to stop talking to him and I cannot , I’m not able to stop myself . She made me swear in her name , in the name of god but I lied . I’m wrong . I’m hurting him , myself and betraying my mom . I know most of the people would say that my depression makes me find solace in him . That’s why we are together but no we’ve been together for the last 6-7 months and I’ve never been loved like this before . He is ready to wait for me , to lose everything for me just to be by my side . My mom is protective , loves me and I can do anything for her . I’m stuck . ??

chinese_item: 如何彻底和她断绝关系？我和另外三个人合租一套房子，我们都差不多是大学生的年纪。原本我们五个人住，但因为有个“问题室友”，其中一个在租约到期前就搬走了。我们的租约终于要到期了，我和室友两天后就要搬到新家。我们俩都不想搬走后再和她有任何瓜葛，但因为我们住得近，可能还会经常见到她。有什么建议可以让我们彻底和她断绝关系吗？我们应该直接无视她吗？还是应该和她好好谈谈，说说她的行为是如何让所有和她合租的人都感到不快的？或者发个短信让她保持距离？我不知道最好的办法是什么。过去三年里，她换过很多室友，每个人一旦意识到她有多让人抓狂，都想尽快离开她。我们只是不想和她有任何瓜葛，也不想和她有任何互动。如果可以的话，我担心她会误以为我们是朋友，然后在超市、工作场所等等地方搭讪我们。我们并不想听任何建议，比如努力维持良好关系或者假装友好。我最多只能做到礼貌但保持距离。我不想迁就她，而且她给我们制造了很多麻烦。我觉得我们应该把彼此的意愿说清楚，否则她会误以为我们是好朋友。
english_item: Advice on making a clean break? I rent a house with three other people- we are all around college age. There were originally five us of, but because of Problem Housemate, one of the others moved out halfway through the lease. Our lease is finally ending, and my roommate and I are moving into a new place in two days. Neither of us want anything to do with Problem Housemate after we leave, but we will likely see her frequently due to how close together we live.  Any advice on how to make a clean break? Should we just ignore her? have a conversation about how her behavior has upset everyone she has lived with? send a text asking for distance? Not sure what the best way to go about this is. Over the past three years, Problem Housemate has had a plethora of roommates, all of whom try to get away from her as fast as possible once they realize how frustrating she is. We just don't want to be associated with her or interact with her if we can help it, and I'm worried she will assume we are friends and approach us in grocery stores, at work, etc… We are not looking for any advice that suggests we should try to stay on good terms, or pretend to be friendly. the closest i'm willing to get to that is being civil and distant. Not interested in coddling her, and she creates a lot of problems for us. I think it will be more helpful for us to be crystal clear about what we want here because otherwise she will assume we are close friends.

chinese_item: 为什么室友之间经常不跟其他室友商量就把伴侣搬进来？我的一个室友有个女朋友，几乎每天都来。有好几次我凌晨一点半听到他冲着她大吼大叫，因为他怀疑她出轨（我不知道她有没有，我对她不太了解）。她还用我们的浴室，也寄过几个包裹过来。感觉她就像住在这里一样，但她有时也不在家。

chinese_item: 应对突如其来的冲突  周末我经历了一件不愉快的事情，至今仍难以释怀。当时我因为耳部感染去了急诊诊所，预约结束时医生给我做了听力测试。之前一切都很顺利，但就在这时，他突然对我发火（似乎毫无征兆），因为我没听懂测试流程。他听起来非常恼火，好像我在浪费他的时间。我当时很震惊，因为我真的只是没听懂他的指示，而且在那之前我一直努力做一个“好病人”。  我知道他可能只是想尽快处理完所有病人，而且周六上班确实很辛苦。我最近一直过得不太好，突然有人像训斥一个不听话的孩子一样训斥我，尤其是在我花了四个小时顺利完成所有医院流程之后，这让我忍不住哭了。我真希望自己没哭——我觉得自己丢了面子，让气氛变得非常尴尬。  几天过去了，我仍然难以理解他突然的反应，我完全没有预料到。陌生人，尤其是男性，突然的反应让我难以接受，因为它让我感到不安全，感觉自己和一个难以捉摸、甚至危险的人在一起。  现在想想，我真希望当时能站起来，要求他结束检查，因为我已经拿到了治疗耳部感染的处方。但我总是无法在那种情况下保持冷静，反而会陷入震惊之中。当面对突如其来的攻击时，即使第一反应是哭泣，你该如何保护自己呢
english_item: Dealing with sudden, unexpected confrontation I had an unpleasant experience at the weekend that I'm really struggling to process. I was at an urgent care clinic with an ear infection and getting a hearing test done at the end of the appointment. The process with the doctor had been fine until that point, but he had an outburst at me (seemingly out of nowhere) because I misunderstood how to do the test. He sounded really annoyed and like I was wasting his time. I was shocked because I genuinely just misunderstood his instructions and had been trying to be a good patient until then.  I knew at the time that it was probably just him needing to process patients quickly, and it sucks working on a Saturday. I've been having a hard time recently in general, and suddenly having someone chide me like a misbehaving child, especially after 4 hours of navigating hospital processes quite well, made me cry. I really wish I hadn't cried - I felt like I lost my dignity and made things very awkward.  A couple of days later and I'm still struggling to parse his sudden reaction and that I didn't see it coming from nowhere. I find sudden reactions from strangers, especially men, very difficult to stomach because it makes me feel unsafe and like I am with someone unpredictable and dangerous.   In hindsight, I wish I had just stood up and asked for the examination to finish, since I already had a prescription for my ear infection. But I can't seem to compose myself in those moments and go into shock. How do you advocate for yourself when you're faced with sudden aggression, even if you first instinct is to cry?

chinese_item: 为什么这类对话会让我感到难过？详情请见描述  我正在努力找出这类对话触发我情绪的根本原因——我强烈感觉问题出在我身上，或者让我想起了童年时期的某些模式。  昨天我一整天都联系不上朋友，因为我所在地区的手机信号不好，既发不了短信也打不了电话。他们住的地方也没有无线网络，所以联系不上。  今天早上我终于给他们发了几条短信，昨天发的几条也终于发出去了。我向他们解释了事情的经过，并表达了我的歉意。  我觉得他们的回应完全没问题。事实上，我觉得他们能够坦诚地表达自己的感受，这很棒。  我以前也有讨好别人的倾向，但我已经学会克服了，因为这种倾向对我并没有好处。  不知为何，每当我遇到一些无法掌控的事情，导致他人失望或沮丧，而对方做出这样的回应时，我似乎都会不由自主地将这种情绪内化。读到这条信息，感觉就像有人在告诉我，是我做错了什么，或者我伤害了对方，好像是我自己把这些负面情绪内化了。我不确定是否有人也有过类似的经历，或者知道这种情绪的根源所在——我真的很想更加关注和爱自己这部分情绪，无论它来自哪里，并努力让它不再影响这类对话。这似乎是某种残留的“讨好型人格”能量
english_item: Why do these kinds of conversations make me feel bad? More in description I'm trying to figure out the underlying reason as to which these types of conversations trigger me-- as I have a strong feeling it's on my end or reminiscent some childhood pattern.   I was unable to message my friend all day yesterday, because my cell service provider in the area was down and I couldn't text or call them. They don't have wifi access where they live so that was a no-go too.  I finally got to sending them some texts early this morning and some of mine from yesterday finally went through too, I explained to them what happened and why I was so sorry.   I don't see anything wrong at all with their response. I actually think it's really cool they're in touch enough with their feelings to tell me what came up for them. I have had previous people pleasing tendencies I've learned to leave behind me as they don't serve my greatest good.  For some reason though, I find that when I experience things that are out of my control that lead to someone else's dismay or letting someone else down, and someone responds this way-- I seem to internalize it. Reading this message makes me feel like I am being told I did this to the person, or did something wrong as if I'm internalizing. I'm not sure if anyone else experiences this or knows where it may stem from-- I'd really like to bring more mindfulness and love toward this part of myself and wherever it may come from and work toward it not affecting these kinds of conversations. It seems like leftover people pleasing related type of energy....

chinese_item: 群体焦虑  我大学时有十个朋友，我们都住在一起，其中八个现在还保持联系。除了一个即将搬回来的朋友外，我们都住在同一个城市。读研几年后，我开始感到被排斥/不受欢迎。当时我想，这只是距离造成的，等我搬回家后一切都会好起来。读研期间我经历了很多人生变故（比如家人去世等等），他们会来参加葬礼，但我感觉他们从来没有真正关心过我。后来我才知道，我大错特错了。现在有四个朋友特别喜欢拉帮结派，总是排挤别人，还经常在群聊里发信息，只要有人表达悲伤，他们就会对我进行精神操控。说实话，我知道他们不是我真正想成为的朋友，因为他们不重视也不尊重我，但我还是很难不觉得自己很失败，没能和大学里的朋友建立起友谊，好像我们不再是朋友都是我的错。  我觉得我需要一些建议，如何才能走出这段阴影，以及如何才能更好地融入新的群体。现在我年纪大了，感觉各种群体都已经形成，而我却被排除在外。即使离开那些看似美好的环境，我最终还是会感到焦虑，因为我知道那些人最终还是会选择和他们认识更久的人在一起
english_item: Group anxiety I had a group of 10 friends and we all lived together in college, 8 who are still in contact. We all live in the same city, excluding one who is moving back soon. I started to feel unwanted/excluded when I moved away for a few years of grad school and at the time figured it was distance and when I moved home things would bounce back. Had a lot of life changes (deaths in the family etc) during grad school and they would show up to the funeral but never really felt like they showed up for me. Fast forward, I was very wrong. 4 are super cliquey and constantly excluding and using their group text and will gaslight anytime sadness is expressed. Tbh I know they aren’t my people based on how they don’t value and respect me but it’s hard to not feel like a failure who didn’t make friends from college and like it’s all my fault we aren’t still friends.  I feel like I need advice on how to move on from it and also how to be a better part of a group moving on I guess. Now as I have gotten older I feel like all these groups are formed and I’m on the outside and even when I leave positive situations I end up feeling anxious because I know those people will choose the people they have known longer

chinese_item: 发泄/抱怨 - 我不知道该怎么办了  美国最近的政治氛围让我压力倍增，加之学业上的种种困难，我的情绪也更加低落。我浏览了一些Reddit子版块，里面充斥着对死亡集中营的恐惧，以及仅仅因为身为少数族裔就可能被捕的担忧。我为萨尔瓦多监狱里的人们感到难过和愤怒。我害怕特朗普说要把美国公民关进那些监狱。想到政府竟然把纳粹德国的历史和美国历史混为一谈，我就感到愤怒。我为我的朋友们感到害怕。我为我的妹妹感到害怕。作为一个神经多样性的黑人酷儿，我自己也感到害怕。我害怕也很紧张地不敢给家里人打电话，因为我的家人中有些人是特朗普的支持者，而且他们有时会忽视我的情绪。想到要和他们说话，我就感到压力很大。我不想简单地谈论我在大学的生活。我的家人因为是白人而受到更多保护，免受仇恨的侵害，这让我觉得很不公平。任何人都不应该生活在恐惧之中。我只想平静地生活。每个人都应该如此，但当前的政治局势却看不到这一点。用艺术和游戏视频分散注意力并不能缓解我的悲伤，因为每当想起我的国家正在犯下的种种暴行，我的心情都会变得糟糕。此外，听到其他国家发生的恐怖事件也让我更加难过。我恨这个残酷的世界。我恨人们的卑鄙和残忍，也恨有些人竟然容忍这种行为
english_item: Vent/Rant - I don't know what to do anymore The recent political climate of the US is stressing me out and making me more depressed on top of my academic struggles. I read subReddits that I'm in sharing fears of death camps and being arrested for just existing as a minority. I feel sad and upset for those in the prisons in El Salvador. I'm scared of Trump saying he will put American citizens into those prisons. It makes me upset at the stupid government for rhyming history of Nazi Germany. I feel scared for my friends. I feel scared for my sister. I feel scared myself as a neurodivergent black queer. I'm scared and tense to call family from college because some of my family members are Trump supporters, and some of them dismiss my emotions at times. Thinking of me talking to them is stressing me out. I wont just simply talk about my time at college. It feels unfair that my family has a bit more protection against the hate because they are white and I am not. Nobody should live in fear. I just want to exist peacefully. Everybody should, but the current political situation doesn't see that. Distracting myself with art and gaming videos isn't helping the sadness when I'm reminded of the horrors my country is doing. Plus the hearing horrors overseas in other countries isn't helping my emotional state either. I hate this cruel world. I hate how mean and horrible people are and how some people accept those people.
