chinese_item: 对现代职场动态的沮丧  有没有人和我一样讨厌老板有时跟员工说话的方式？或者，当我们因为任何原因请假时，都会被灌输内疚感？或者，如果我们做错了什么，哪怕是一点点小错误，都会让我们从此背负恶名？即使你总体上是个好员工，这一点也会被忽略。  我以前没意识到，有些人跟我说的话会对我一天的心情和内心状态产生如此大的影响，因为员工会因为没能完美完成一些并非必须（尽管有时确实必不可少）的事情而感到内疚。我只是把时间借出去换取金钱，仅此而已。我的生活可能并不完全符合别人的期望，但没必要为了这种交易（而且通常情况下，员工在这方面投入的远不止这些）而对别人进行情感操控。  人们的生活如此围绕着他们的公司/零售业，这让我感到震惊。说到底，这些人根本不在乎你。随着时间的推移，我对一些老板越来越不信任，他们今天可能笑容满面、和蔼可亲，但一旦事情影响到他们，就会立刻翻脸不认人。  希望有人能感同身受
english_item: Frustration with modern workplace dynamics Anybody else hate the way that work bosses speak to employees sometimes? Or how were made to feel guilty when we have to call out, for any reason? Or if we don’t do something right, any little mistake paints you in a bad light from henceforth? Even if you’re a good employee overall, that goes out the window for anything.  I didn’t realize how much some things said to me very much impacted my day or my inner state due to the way employees are made to feel guilty for not being perfect at something that is both optional (albeit sometimes understandably essential). I’m lending my time for money, that’s it. My life may not match up exactly with my other people expectations, and it’s unnecessary to emotionally manipulate people for something that’s transactional (and oftentimes, something employees give far more to).  It astounds me how much people live, bathe, and breathe their corporate/retail lives. At the end of the day, these people don’t care about you, and I’ve grown distrustful over time of how some work bosses will smile and be kind one day but then shift and turn on you when something affects them somehow.  Hopefully anyone here can relate.

chinese_item: 说某人忍受恶劣行为是“圣人”是不对的  宽容是一回事，而且我认为这通常是件好事。但当有人在帖子中描述某人做了糟糕的事情，而且往往是反复如此时，如果受害者忍受了，人们就会说“他们真是圣人，居然还忍受着”或者“他们比我好多了，我绝不会允许别人那样跟我说话”之类的话，这真的让我很恼火。  拜托，逆来顺受并不代表就是圣人。那只是说明他们逆来顺受而已。这通常是由于并非他们自身过错的创伤，或是他们极度讨好他人的习惯造成的，所以我并不是说我不同情他们。但我觉得把这种行为称为“圣人”只会强化他们一开始就容忍别人那样对待他们的原因。他们不应该把维护自身权益视为不够好
english_item: 。,"Saying that someone “is a saint” for putting up with awful behavior It’s one thing to be a forgiving person of course, and I think that’s generally a good thing. But it really annoys me when in posts about somebody doing something awful, often repeatedly, when the victim puts up with it people say stuff like “they’re a saint for staying with them” or “they’re a better person than me, I would never let someone talk to me like that” etc.   Like no, being a doormat doesn’t make someone a saint. It just makes them a doormat. It is often because of trauma that isn’t they’re fault or extreme people-pleasing habits, so I don’t want to make it sound like I don’t have sympathy. But I feel like calling that saint-like only reinforces the reason la they let people treat them that way in the first place. They shouldn’t see standing up for themselves as not being as good a person.

chinese_item: “受害者心态”我讨厌这个词。每当受压迫群体中的人表达他们和其他人所经历的苦难时，总会有人跳出来说他们有“受害者心态”。前几天我在这里发了一篇关于头发的帖子，就遇到了这种情况。我删掉了帖子，因为我最不想看到的就是继续收到这种评论。人们的无知和偏见真是令人沮丧。我不明白，历史摆在那里，是什么驱使人们说出这种话。过去确实有一些群体遭受过不公的待遇，如今依然如此。这不是编造的。他们没有“受害者心态”。我希望这只是网络上的现象。
english_item: Victim Mentality" I hate that phrase. Whenever someone of an oppressed group expresses what they and others go through, someone comes along and says they have a "victim mentality". It happened on my post about hair that I posted here the other day. I deleted the post because the last thing I want is to continue getting those kinds of comments and having to see them. It's upsetting how ignorant and bigoted people can be.  I just don't understand what could prompt someone to say that when history is there. There's groups of people that were treated badly in the past and are still being treated badly today. It's not made up things. They don't have a "victim mentality". I hope this is an online thing.

chinese_item: 有些人听不懂“不”这个字。  比如：  “嘿，你想尝尝我做的寿司吗？真的很好吃。” “哦，看起来不错，不过不用了，谢谢。我不太喜欢海鲜。” “哎呀，你还没尝过我的呢，你会喜欢的，尝一口。” “哦，不用了，谢谢。寿司吃过太多次了，真的不适合我。” “哎呀，你根本尝不出鱼的味道。”  然后他们会一直这样纠缠，直到你尝一口或者被迫离开。问我“你确定吗？”或者问两遍我倒不会觉得烦，这只是礼貌，也给你改变主意的机会。但有些人总是做得过火
english_item: 。,"People that don’t comprehend the word “no” For example,  “hey do you want to try my home made sushi it’s really good” “oh it looks good but no thank you I don’t really like seafood” “oh come on you haven’t tried mine you’ll like it take a bite” “oh no thanks I’ve tried sushi so many times it’s not for me” “oh just come on you can’t even really taste the fish”   then they continue this interaction until you try a bite or are forced to try to leave the conversation, asking me “are you sure” or asking like twice doesn’t annoy me as that’s just being polite and allowing you to change your mind, but it always seems to be taken to an extreme.

chinese_item: 在工作中动不动就哭，真的好尴尬  我在联邦政府工作，今天第二次在主管面前哭了。这份工作我才做了四个月。我为自己这么容易哭而感到难为情。其实我很喜欢这份工作，但偶尔他们需要我详细汇报工作内容。通常是因为我效率不够高。我小时候因为觉得自己不够好而留下了心理创伤，所以任何冗长的专业批评（比如会议）都会让我焦虑，然后我就忍不住哭。脑子里一片混乱，感觉很不耐烦。有人能感同身受吗
english_item: So so embarrassed about crying easily at work I work a job with the feds and I cried today in front of my supervisor for the second time. I’ve had this job just 4 months. I’m so embarrassed that I cry so easily. I actually really like my job but occasionally they need a detailed report about why I do what I do. Usually it’s about not being efficient enough. I have trauma from my childhood about not feeling like I am enough so any kind of professional critique that is drawn out (like meetings) makes me anxious and my reaction is to cry. Racing thoughts and feeling impatient. Anyone else can relate?

chinese_item: 现实版“寄生虫”？女子冒充闺蜜近十年，还骗取闺蜜母亲300万
english_item: A Real-Life Parasite? Woman Impersonated Her Best Friend for Nearly a Decade and Scammed Her Friend's Mother Out of 3 Million

chinese_item: 内塔尼亚胡：一年内摧毁“伊朗轴心”，必将实现所有战争目标
english_item: Netanyahu: Destroying the Iranian Axis within a year will definitely achieve all war objectives

chinese_item: 世卫组织总干事：目前最令人担心的是缺乏团结
english_item: The WHO Director-General: What is most concerning at present is the lack of unity.

chinese_item: 对话｜湖南高考文科第一名何润琪：带着妈妈遗照来清华报到
english_item: Dialogue | He Runqi, Top Scorer in Liberal Arts of Hunan's College Entrance Exam: Enrolling at Tsinghua with a Photo of His Late Mother

chinese_item: 中小学生心理健康问题检出率持续上升，学校家庭社会应联动施治
english_item: The detection rate of mental health issues among primary and secondary school students continues to rise, calling for a coordinated response from schools, families, and society.

chinese_item: 担心租售房屋成“凶宅”掉价，房东赶走晚期癌症租户
english_item: Fearing that their property might become a haunted house and lose value, landlords evicted a tenant with late-stage cancer.

chinese_item: 视频｜一声枪响，特朗普盟友倒在美国校园演讲现场的血泊中身亡
english_item: Video | A gunshot rings out, and a Trump ally falls dead in a pool of blood at a U.S. campus speech scene

chinese_item: 问界M9车主自述行驶中失去动力靠停后整车断电车门被锁，4S店回应
english_item: Owner of the Aito M9 Reports Loss of Power While Driving, Vehicle Shuts Down and Locks Doors After Stopping; 4S Store Responds

chinese_item: 夫妻离婚都不要长女，法院：不准离+发出《关爱未成年人提示》
english_item: When a couple sought divorce and neither wanted custody of their eldest daughter, the court: denied the divorce and issued a Notice on Caring for Minors"

chinese_item: 315维权｜七旬老人在养生门店一年多消费47万：去世后才发现，家人质疑其遭诱骗
english_item: 315 Consumer Rights Protection | A 70-Year-Old Spent $470,000 at a Health and Wellness Store Over a Year: The Family Raised Concerns of Deception After His Passing

chinese_item: 家长跪地让学生从背上踩过？河南中牟一中学举办“愧疚教育”活动引争议，校方致歉
english_item: Parents Kneel to Let Students Walk Over Their Backs? A Guilt Education Activity at a Middle School in Zhongmu, Henan Province, Sparks Controversy; School Authorities Apologize

chinese_item: 今天学校进行了消防演习。当时我正在厕所拉屎，更糟糕的是，我还因为“消防演习期间操作不当”被停课两天。我以前都不知道拉屎也会被停课。
english_item: Today, there was a fire drill at my school. I was in the bathroom taking a dump, and if that wasn't bad enough, I got suspended for two days for 'improper procedure during a fire drill'. I didn't know you could get suspended for taking a dump.

chinese_item: 今天我花了大约半个小时纠结要不要买一件上衣，因为它虽然很漂亮，但真的很贵。最后，我决定买下它，因为想着如果改变主意还可以退货。结果回到家才发现我把它落在公交车上了。
english_item: Today, I spent about half an hour trying to decide whether to buy a top, because even though it was lovely, it was really expensive. Eventually, after deciding to buy it because I could always return it if I changed my mind, I got home and realised I'd left it on the bus.

chinese_item: 今天，我试图捉弄我的女朋友。我说：“我看到你和别的男人接吻了！”她向我道歉了。
english_item: Today, I tried to prank my girlfriend. I said, “I saw you kissing another guy!” She apologized.

chinese_item: 今天我和一个很喜欢的男生约会吃饭。我猜我当时玩手机玩得太久了，因为约会进行到一半的时候，他发短信告诉我我该付多少账。
english_item: Today, I was on a dinner date with a guy I really like. I guess I was on my phone too much because halfway through the date he sent me a text saying how much my half of the bill would be.

chinese_item: 今天我在午睡。显然，我两岁的女儿因为害怕雷雨，就爬到我的被子上。我以为她是猫，就把她踢了下去。结果她撞到了墙上。
english_item: Today, I was taking a nap. Apparently, my two year old daughter decided to crawl on top of the covers on my bed because she was scared since there was a thunderstorm. I thought she was one of our cats so I kicked her off. She hit the wall.

chinese_item: 今天，我运用了从一本“如何取悦女人”的书里学到的一些技巧。我妻子一开始非常开心，但结束后，她就开始哭喊，说我只有出轨才能学到这些。我解释了，但她根本不相信。
english_item: Today, I applied some things I learned reading a How to please a woman book. My wife was in heaven until it was over, then she started crying and yelling about the only way I would learn those things is if I was having an affair. I explained but she doesn't believe me.

chinese_item: 今天，我告诉家人我又怀孕了。我男朋友现在坐在外面，一边哭一边喝酒。我的大儿子正在找房子租，因为他不想再听到婴儿的哭声，我的两个小儿子也在哭，因为他们也不想要弟弟妹妹。
english_item: Today, I told my family I’m pregnant again. My boyfriend is now sat outside, crying and getting drunk. My oldest son is looking at apartments for rent because he doesn’t want to be around screaming babies again, and my younger two are crying because they don’t want another sibling either.

chinese_item: 今天，我把周末给自己买的可爱小叮当连帽衫拿给未婚夫看。没想到他并没有像我预想的那样喜欢，反而说我幼稚的穿衣风格很丢人，还说除非我换身衣服，否则他不会跟我一起出门。
english_item: Today, I showed my fiancé the darling Tinkerbell hoodie I'd bought myself during the weekend. Instead of liking it as I'd hoped, he told me my childish wardrobe was embarrassing, and he wasn't going to be seen in public with me until I wore something different.

chinese_item: 今天我去参加一个聚会，警察来了。他们问有没有人带枪，但我听到的却是“好玩”，于是我就举起了手。结果他们搜了我的身。
english_item: Today, I was at a party when the cops showed up. They asked whether anyone had a gun, but I heard "fun" instead and raised my hand. I got searched.

chinese_item: 今天我开车送老板回家。我手机开着免提模式，所有来电都会自动播放。这时，我正在申请的新工作打来电话，老板全程都在听。
english_item: Today, I gave my boss a ride home from work. I had my phone on hands-free mode, so all calls would come through on speaker. I got a call from the new job I was applying at, with my boss listening to each word.

chinese_item: 今天，当我为了避免与人对视而移开视线，结果发现那人竟然是个纸板人像时，我才真正意识到自己有多么害羞和笨拙。
english_item: Today, I realized just how shy and awkward I really am when I averted my eyes to avoid making eye contact with someone who turned out to be a cardboard cut-out.

chinese_item: 今天，我正走向我的车，突然看到一个身材高大的男人跟在我身后。他走得很快，我赶紧去开车门，但门锁打不开，我顿时慌了。后来我才意识到，那根本不是我的车。我刚要走开，他又走过来，把车门打开了。
english_item: Today, I was walking to my car when I saw a large man walking behind me. I hurried to open my car as he was approaching quickly, but the door wasn't unlocking and I panicked. I then realized that it wasn't even my car. As I walked away from it, he walked up and unlocked the door.

chinese_item: 今天我在商场外面抽烟，突然听到有人放屁。结果发现是个小女孩。他们四处张望，我就开玩笑说：“我们什么都没听到。”她家人都咯咯地笑了起来，我们也跟着笑，直到大家发现小女孩开始哭了起来。我真是个混蛋。
english_item: Today, I was finishing a cigarette outside of the mall when we heard someone fart. Turns out it was a little girl. They looked around, so jokingly I said, We didn't hear anything. Her family giggled and so did we, until everyone realized the little girl was now sobbing. I'm a POS.

chinese_item: 今天，我的教授让一个迟到30分钟的男生进了我的哲学课，理由是“时间只是一种错觉”。而这位教授之前就因为我迟到2分钟把我赶出了教室。
english_item: Today, my professor let a guy into my philosophy class 30 minutes late because his excuse was, Time is just an illusion. This is the same professor that kicked me out of the classroom for being 2 minutes late.

chinese_item: 今天我订婚了。我打电话告诉在外地待几天的父亲这个消息时，他的反应是：“你为什么要这么做？”
english_item: Today, I got engaged. When I called my father, who is out of state for a few days, to tell him, his response was, What'd you do that for?

chinese_item: 今天，我跟五岁的女儿解释说，她姐姐（我丈夫前妻所生）和她妈妈住在一起，而我女儿和我们住在一起。她惊呼：“这不公平！我也想要像她一样有两个妈妈！我们能换一下吗？反正我更喜欢她妈妈！”
english_item: Today, I explained to my 5 year old daughter that her older sister from my husband's first marriage lives with her mommy, and my daughter lives with us. She exclaimed, It's not fair! I want two mommies like she has! Can we swap, I like her mommy better than you anyway!

chinese_item: 今天是我工作的最后一天。我找到了一份更好的工作，并且接受了。为了不让现在的上司失望，我请求给予一些时间提交离职通知。在我培训接替我的人期间，新公司的老板考虑到淡季的形势，决定不再招聘新员工。
english_item: Today, it was my last day at work. I was offered a better job and accepted. Not wanting to leave my present boss hanging, I asked for time to give notice. While I trained my replacement, the owner at the new job had time to think about how slow the season is, and he decided not to fill the position.

chinese_item: 今天我向女朋友求婚了。她答应了，但是戒指戴在她手上有点紧。她为此狠狠地训了我一顿，说我什么都做不好，然后又改口说不答应了。
english_item: Today, I proposed to my girlfriend. She said yes, but the ring turned out to be quite tight on her finger. She then chewed me out, saying that I can't do anything right, then changed her answer to no.

chinese_item: 今天凌晨一点，我出去抽烟。以为周围没人，就放了一连串响亮又难听的屁。我往左边一看，发现一个素未谋面的邻居也在抽烟，正盯着我看。这就是他对我的第一印象。
english_item: Today, I stepped outside for a smoke. It was 1 a.m. Thinking no one was around, I let out a series of loud, nasty-sounding farts. I looked over to my left to see the neighbor, whom I've never met, also smoking, and staring at me. That was his first impression of me.

chinese_item: 今天在赛百味刷卡被拒了，我只好走了半小时路去最近的自动取款机，慌慌张张地算算卡里还有多少钱。结果我正要从钱包里掏卡的时候，卡从手里滑落，掉进了下水道。我身后的人哈哈大笑起来。
english_item: Today, my card got declined at Subway, so I walked to the nearest cashpoint thirty minutes away to frantically figure out how much cash I had in my card. As I went to pull my card out of my purse, it slipped from my grip and fell into the sewer. The guy behind me snorted with laughter.

chinese_item: 今天我和女朋友一起看了电影《誓约》。电影结束后，我们走到影院大厅，我听到她喃喃自语：“我值得拥有像他这样的男人。”
english_item: Today, I watched The Vow with my girlfriend. When the movie ended, we walked out to the theatre's lobby, and I heard her mutter, I deserve a guy like him.

chinese_item: 今天，我终于找到了我的比特犬，之前我可是疯狂地找了三个星期。我们回到家后，我给他准备了食物和水。我去叫他，发现他在我的房间里，正对着我摇尾巴。他把尿撒在了我的被子、刚叠好的衣服，还有我那件价值60美元的新冬装上。欢迎回家，凯恩。
english_item: Today, I found my pitbull after three weeks of frantic searching. When we returned home, I put out food and water for him. I went to get him and found him in my room, wagging his tail at me. He'd peed on my comforter, freshly folded clothes, and new 60-dollar winter coat. Welcome home, Caine.

chinese_item: 今天我在给女儿包礼物，尽量保持安静。结果我身后的猫爬上了圣诞树，树倒下来砸在我身上，我动弹不得。女儿只好把我扶起来。现在她知道今年圣诞节会收到哪些礼物了。
english_item: Today, I was wrapping presents for my daughter, trying to be really quiet. Behind me, the cat decided to climb the tree, which then fell on top of me and I couldn't move. My daughter had to help me up. She now knows everything she's getting for Christmas this year.

chinese_item: 今天，我交往三天的女朋友问我们能不能开始给未来的孩子取名字。
english_item: Today, my girlfriend of three days asked if we could start naming our future children.

chinese_item: 今天，我和女朋友睡在一起，做了一个噩梦，梦里她不停地冲我大吼大叫，让我这个“梦中的自己”越来越生气。就在我快要从噩梦中惊醒，情绪达到顶峰的时候，我不小心打到了她的胳膊和脸。现在她不理我了。
english_item: Today, when sleeping next to my girlfriend, I had a nightmare that she was yelling incessantly at me, making my dream self more and more upset. Just as my dream-frustration peaked and I began waking up from the nightmare, I accidentally hit her in the arm and face. Now she won't talk to me.

chinese_item: 今天我去公司医务室看肌肉痉挛和疑似肋骨骨裂。结果，那个老庸医和几个过于热心的护士给我开了强效泻药，还灌了三次肠，其中两次灌的量还挺大的。即便如此，我还是得回去上班。
english_item: Today, I went to the company's health clinic to treat muscle spasms and a possible cracked rib. In the process the old quack doc and overly eager nurses wound up giving me a storng laxative and 3 enemas, two of them quite large. Then I still had to return to work.

chinese_item: 今天，我被告知我不能再担任助理经理了。我已经告诉家人我要当助理经理了，他们都说为我感到骄傲。
english_item: Today, I was told that couldn’t become assistant manager of my job anymore. I already told my family I was going to be one, and they'd all said how proud of me they were.

chinese_item: 今天，老板“委派”我负责公司最大的客户，因为她特意挑选了我。我们刚开始单独通话，她就问：“你结婚了吗？”我如实回答：“当然！”她随即挂断了电话，之后再也不接我们的电话了。她在我们公司的消费额比我们所有其他客户加起来都多。
english_item: Today, my boss entrusted me with the company's biggest client because I was handpicked. Immediately when our solo call started, she asked, Are you married?, I honestly responded, I sure am! She abruptly hung up and no longer responds to our calls. She spends here more than all our other clients put together.

chinese_item: 今天，我老婆生我的气，因为我害得她不得不和她最好的朋友断绝来往。为什么？因为她朋友跟踪我，一直劝我和老婆离婚，甚至还闯进我家偷东西，害得我好几次报警，可这一切居然都是我的错。
english_item: Today, my wife is mad at me because she’s had to stop seeing her closest friend because of me. Why? Because her friend is stalking me, keeps asking me to divorce my wife, and has even broken in and stolen my stuff, forcing me to involve the police several times, and somehow this is all my fault.

chinese_item: 今天上班时，我不得不听一些以前的电话录音，其中一位同事的声音尖锐刺耳，令人难以忍受。更让我震惊的是，我发现这些录音竟然是我的，也就是说，那个令人讨厌的声音其实是我自己的声音。我的同事们一致认为他们受不了我说话的声音。
english_item: Today, I had to listen to some old phone call recordings at work, in which a certain worker had the most annoying high-pitched voice. To my horror, I discovered that they were my call recordings, so the annoying voice was my own. My colleagues all concurred they cannot stand the sound of me talking.

chinese_item: 今天，我那五岁、乳糖不耐受的女儿决定吃点巧克力。结果就是：我凌晨三点开始擦浴室墙壁，四点半才擦完，然后五点又得重新开始擦，因为她吃的东西又让我漏擦了一块地方。
english_item: Today, my 5 year old lactose intolerant daughter decided to have some chocolate. The result: me cleaning the bathroom walls at 3am, finishing at 4:30am, and then start cleaning again at 5am when her stomach contents decided I had missed a spot.

chinese_item: 今天我在超市滑倒，摔断了鼻子。要不是我半小时前自己放的“小心地滑”的牌子没看见，这倒也不至于这么尴尬。
english_item: Today, I slipped on a wet floor at the supermarket and busted my nose. It wouldn't be as embarrassing if I hadn't missed the "CAUTION: WET FLOOR" sign that I'd put there myself just 30 minutes earlier.

chinese_item: 今天，我终于找到了心仪已久的圣诞礼物——一套书法套装，送给了我的父亲。我找了整整一个月。今天，父亲兴高采烈地带着同样的书法套装回家了，说这是他给自己准备的圣诞惊喜。而且他买的比我便宜。
english_item: Today, I finally got a Christmas gift, a calligraphy set, for my father that I have been looking for for a month. My dad came home happily with the same calligraphy set today, saying that he surprised himself for Christmas. He got it cheaper than me.

chinese_item: 今天我接到一个陌生号码打来的电话。是个说话有点口吃的男人，我便开始模仿他。原来他是我应聘的那家店的经理，想安排一次面试。
english_item: Today, I got a phone call from a number I didn't recognize. It was a man with a speech impediment, and I began imitating him. He was the manager of a store I applied at. He wanted to arrange an interview.

chinese_item: 今天，我打电话给我的手机运营商，想终止合约。销售代表花了半个多小时试图说服我重新考虑，但我一直拒绝。最后，我还是妥协了，接受了一份“更经济实惠”的合约，但我没注意到这份合约的价格几乎是之前那份的两倍。
english_item: Today, I called my mobile phone provider to end my contract. A sales rep spent over half an hour trying to convince me to reconsider, and I kept refusing. I ended up breaking down and accepting a "more economical" contract, which I didn't notice costs almost twice as much as the last one.

chinese_item: 今天本来我应该在姐姐的婚礼上当伴娘，但她不想让我出现在照片里，因为我比她和其他伴娘都高出一英尺多，照片里会很滑稽。我告诉她我干脆不去了，结果我妈居然也站在她那边。
english_item: Today, I’m supposed to be a bridesmaid at my sister's wedding, but she doesn’t want me in the photos because I’m over a foot taller than her and the other bridesmaids, and it will look silly in the photos. I told her I won’t even bother attending, and mom actually took her side.

chinese_item: 今天，我和大学毕业后就没见过面的前男友约会了。他带我去了一家酒吧，他异常安静，但喝得酩酊大醉。当酒保问我们是否一切都好时，他回答说：“这是我的前女友。你能相信她以前那么瘦吗？”
english_item: Today, I went out on a date with an ex-boyfriend who I hadn't seen since college. He took me to a bar, where he was oddly quiet, but drank heavily. When the bartender asked us if we were ok, he replied, This is my ex-girlfriend. Can you believe she used to be skinny?

chinese_item: 今天，我当着所有人的面，当众羞辱了我的经理——他曾经是我的朋友，我还主持过他的婚礼——然后就辞职了。结果演变成一场街头公开争吵。我也不知道自己为什么会这么做，大概是因为受够了他对待所有人的方式吧。
english_item: Today, I quit my job by insulting my manager - who is/was a friend, whose wedding I officiated - in full earshot of everyone. It turned into a pretty public argument on the street. I don’t really know why I did it, other than just feeling so burned out by his treatment of everyone.

chinese_item: 今天，我实在受够了丈夫对我视而不见、对狗的关注和爱护远胜于对我，再加上我决定去姐姐家住几晚，他终于在第二天发短信问我：“你到底回家不回家做饭？” 现在已经是第四天了，他之后就再也没联系过我。
english_item: Today, after being tired of my husband acting like I’m invisible, giving more attention and affection to the dog than to me, and me going to spend a few nights at my sister’s house, he texted me, You coming home to make dinner or what? on the second day. It's now day 4 and he hasn’t said anything else since.

chinese_item: 今天，我丈夫因为我玩宝可梦游戏时没有按照他指示的按键操作而生气，并冲出了家门。
english_item: Today, my husband got angry and stormed out of the house because he claims I wasn't pressing the buttons he told me to while playing Pokemon.

chinese_item: 今天，我和父母一起开车，我一边解释一边说像我这样的年轻人开车更好，因为我们反应更快。突然，我听到一声巨响，车子撞上了一辆停着的车。
english_item: Today, I was driving with my parents while explaining that young people like myself are better drivers because we have better reflexes. My explanation was suddenly interrupted with the sound of me crashing the car against a parked car.

chinese_item: 今天在机场候机时，我坐在一对母子旁边。我拿出水瓶时，她俯身对儿子说：“答应我，你永远不要像你旁边那个人那样做。” 我真不知道自己到底做错了什么。
english_item: Today, while at the airport waiting for my flight, I sat down next to a mother and her son. As I pulled out a water bottle, she leaned over to her son and said, Promise me you will never do what the man next to you just did. I have no idea what the hell I did wrong.

chinese_item: 今天，我父亲失业了8年，而我父母结婚才25年，母亲仍然供养着他。我失业三个月了，母亲却要把我赶出家门。不同的是，我真的在积极找工作，而他却整天沉迷于电子游戏。
english_item: Today, my father has been unemployed for 8 of my parents' 25 years of marriage, and my mom still supports him. I've been unemployed for three months and my mom is kicking me out. The difference is, I'm actually applying places. He just plays video games.

chinese_item: 今天我去参加一个家庭圣诞聚会。到了晚餐时间，我坐到餐桌旁准备吃饭。所有的食物要么含有坚果，要么含有肉类。我对坚果过敏，而且我已经做了三年素食主义者。
english_item: Today, I went to a Christmas party to visit family. Dinner time came around and I sat down at the table to eat. All of the food either had nuts or meat. I am allergic to nuts and I've been a vegetarian for three years.

chinese_item: 今天，我快26岁了，胡子终于长出来了。可惜的是，它和我的头发一样，已经有一半变白了。
english_item: Today, at almost 26 years old, my beard is finally coming in. Too bad it, like the hair on my head, is 50% grey already.

chinese_item: 今天，交往两年的男友告诉我，他越来越喜欢我了。我觉得挺可爱的，直到他补充道：“就像食肉细菌一样。”
english_item: Today, my boyfriend of two years told me that I had grown on him. I thought it was cute, until he added, like a flesh eating bacteria.

chinese_item: 今天我打电话给我妈妈，问候一下她。她最近经济有些困难，所以上周我把身上仅剩的100美元寄给了她，希望能帮她撑到下次发工资。结果她用这笔钱给家里的狗实施了安乐死。
english_item: Today, I called my mother to check up on her. Lately, she's been having some financial problems, so last week I sent her my last $100 to help her out until her next paycheck. She used the money to euthanize the family dog.

chinese_item: 今天，我得知自己可能要流落街头了。我的未婚夫在我们两周年纪念日那天和我分手了，因为我的精神状况急剧恶化。我最近失去了工作和一位亲人。我一直把自己封闭起来，没有任何人可以依靠。我只希望我的生活能重新找到意义。
english_item: Today, I learned that I am probably going to be homeless. My fiancé broke up with me on our two year anniversary because my mental health is declining rapidly. I recently lost my job and a parent. I have been isolating and no longer have supports. I just want my life to have meaning again.

chinese_item: 今天，我因为举报店里有人没戴口罩而被老板狠狠训了一顿，理由是“没人喜欢告密者”。我是保安，向她汇报是我的职责。
english_item: Today, I was chewed out by my boss for reporting someone not wearing a mask in our store, because, no one likes a snitch. I'm the security guard. It's my job to report that to her.

chinese_item: 今天我发现，和我交往了 16 个月的男朋友在我们在一起之前就有一个“网恋”女友，但她对他来说从来都不是“真实”的，所以他觉得这不会影响到我们之间的关系。
english_item: Today, I found out that my boyfriend of 16 months has had an internet-only girlfriend since before we got together, but she wasn't ever real to him, so he didn't think it would get in the way.

chinese_item: 今天，自从我瘦了很多之后，所有那些之前拒绝我、说“只喜欢我做朋友”的男生，突然都给我发私信，说“嗨，美女”，还约我出去。真好，看来他们只是喜欢我的身材。
english_item: Today, now that I've lost a significant amount of weight, all the guys that turned me down saying they “liked me as just a friend” all of a sudden are in my DMs saying, “Hey beautiful” and asking me out on a date. Nice to know I’m only liked for my body.

chinese_item: 今天是我妈妈被诊断为糖尿病前期一周年的日子。从那以后，她就把所有不健康的食物都给我吃。妈妈，恕我直言，我可不想自己也很快得糖尿病。
english_item: Today, it's been a year since my mom was diagnosed as being borderline diabetic. Since then, she has been giving all her unhealthy foods to me. With all due respect Mom, I don't plan on becoming diabetic myself any time soon.

chinese_item: 今天，我那自以为是心理学家的哥哥指责我撒谎，说我前任对我施暴和精神虐待的事情说得太详细了，就因为我描述得太详细了，他说只有骗子才会这么做。谢谢你们的支持。
english_item: Today, my wannabe psychologist of a brother accused me of lying about all the violence and emotional abuse my ex inflicted on me, all because I went into too much detail when describing it, which he says is something only liars do. Thanks for the support.

chinese_item: 今天是大学秋假的第一天，我特别兴奋，想着可以睡个懒觉，好好放松一下。结果老板好像察觉到我的喜悦，给我安排了每天早上8点到下午2点的班，“看样子我也没事干”。
english_item: Today, it was the first day of fall break from college, and I was really excited to sleep in and relax the entire weekend. Apparently my boss caught wind of my happiness and scheduled me 8am-2pm each day of break, "seeing how I don't have anything else to do.

chinese_item: 如今，我的丈夫和儿子已经一年多没说过话了。我尝试过各种方法，从讨价还价、哭泣，甚至对他们俩大吼大叫，但他们似乎铁了心要互相憎恨。照这样下去，儿子迟早会搬出去，我们就再也见不到他，也见不到我们未来的孙辈了。
english_item: Today, my husband and son haven’t spoken to each other in over a year. I’ve tried everything from bargaining, crying, and even screaming at them both, but they seem determined to hate each other. At this rate, our son will move out and we’ll never see him or our future grand babies.

chinese_item: 今天公司组织了一次聚餐，地点是一家我从未听说过的餐厅。为了给新老板和同事留下好印象，我花了一整周时间，结果却穿着短裤和一件星球大战T恤就去了。结果发现，这竟然是城里最高档的餐厅之一。
english_item: Today, we had a get together for work at a restaurant I've never heard of. After spending all week trying to make a good impression on my new boss and co-workers, I showed up in a pair of shorts and a Star Wars T-Shirt. Turns out it was one of the fanciest restaurants in town.

chinese_item: 今天我和男朋友没说话。他想熬夜“找工作”，所以我去睡觉了。一个小时后，我被他的尖叫声吵醒。我跑过去看发生了什么事，发现他正在玩电子游戏。他坚持说我不应该生他的气，因为那是“超级稀有掉落”。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend and I aren't speaking. He wanted to stay up late to look for jobs, so I went to bed. An hour later, I was awoken to him screaming. When I ran in to see what was going on, he had a video game open. I shouldn't be mad at him because it was a mega rare drop, he insists.

chinese_item: 今天我面试迟到了，就想抄近路穿过一条阴暗潮湿的小巷。结果被一群流浪猫追赶，到面试地点时浑身是抓痕和猫毛。
english_item: Today, I was running late for a job interview so I took what I thought was a shortcut through an dank alleyway. I ended up getting chased by a pack of stray cats and arrived at the interview covered in scratches and cat hair.

chinese_item: 今天，我一直努力追求的那个人给我写了一首很美的诗，学校里几乎所有人都看到了，而且都很喜欢。诗的内容是我们永远不可能在一起。
english_item: Today, the person I've been trying so hard to get with wrote me a beautiful poem that almost everyone at my school saw and liked. It was about how we'd never be together.

chinese_item: 今天我在男朋友家上厕所，当时拉肚子很厉害，快要拉完的时候，发现地上有只蜘蛛。吓坏了，我赶紧抓起一大团卫生纸想把它弄死。这时我才意识到，我的卫生纸用完了。
english_item: Today, I was going to the bathroom at my boyfriend's house. I had awful diarrhea and was almost done, when I noticed a spider on the ground. Being terrified, I took a giant ball of toilet paper to kill it. I realized then that I had no toilet paper left to use.

chinese_item: 今天，我给过度保护我的父亲打了电话，他花时间告诉我，他为我终于找到一个好又体面的男朋友而感到骄傲。他还说，他很后悔自己当初判断失误。我打电话是想借钱把我的“好又体面”的男朋友从监狱里弄出来。
english_item: Today, I called my very overprotective father, and he took the time to tell me how proud he was of me for finally finding a good and respectable boyfriend. And that he was sorry he misjudged. I was calling for bail money to get my good, respectable boyfriend out of jail.

chinese_item: 今天我和朋友聊起昨晚的约会，突然冒出一个傻乎乎的想法：我想假装自己发错了信息，然后把回复发给约会对象，让他知道我的感受，这样应该挺有意思的。我应该校对一下的，因为我本来想说“约会很顺利，他真的很温柔！”，结果发成了“约会很顺利，他真的好汗！”
english_item: Today, I was texting a friend about how my date last night went, which gave me a goofy idea: I thought it would be cute to pretend that I'd made a mistake and send my response to my date, just so he'd know how I felt it went. I should've proofread, because instead of “It went well, he was really sweet!”, I sent him “It went well, he was really sweaty!”

chinese_item: 今天，为了让宿舍邻居觉得我很受欢迎，我把音乐开得很大声，还扯着嗓子大喊大叫，搞得好像在开派对一样。结果宿舍管理员给我开了张噪音违规罚单，还要求进来查看我们是不是在喝酒。我只好解释为什么我一个人在宿舍。
english_item: Today, to make my dorm neighbours think I'm popular, I blasted music and screamed at the top of my lungs so it sounded like I was having a party. My residence manager slapped me with a noise violation, and demanded to come in to make sure we weren't drinking. I had to explain why I was by myself.

chinese_item: 今天我在夜店认识了一个很不错的女孩。我们聊着聊着，她让我五分钟后在外面等她。结果我喝得烂醉，跌跌撞撞地进了洗手间，意识到自己犯了错后，我绝望地蜷缩在地上哭了起来。
english_item: Today, I met a really nice girl at a club. One thing led to another, and she told me to meet her out front in 5 minutes. I was so drunk that I stumbled into the restroom instead, then curled up on the floor crying in despair when I realized my mistake.

chinese_item: 今天，我女朋友跟我分手了。我问她为什么，她说她之前联系的那个算命先生（号码是44644之类的）说我们俩的匹配度只有2%。这怎么解释我们四年来的甜蜜恋爱呢？
english_item: Today, my girlfriend broke up with me. When I asked her why she did, she said that the psychic that she was texting (one of those 44644 numbers) said we have a 2% compatibility rating. How does that explain 4 years of happy dating?

chinese_item: 今天我得知公司给了我一次假期作为奖励。目的地是加勒比海的某个地方，那里被称为“地球上阳光最充足的地方”。我得了皮肤癌。
english_item: Today, I found out my work gave me a vacation for my performance. It's a trip to somewhere in the Caribbean, with the nickname The Sunniest Place on Earth. I have skin cancer.

chinese_item: 今天，我看了前女友发的一个视频。那是她三个孩子在公园玩耍的可爱小视频。她现在婚姻幸福美满。而我，自从12年前分手后，就一直单身。
english_item: Today, I watched a video my ex-girlfriend posted. It was a cute little video of her three children playing at a park. She’s happily married. Meanwhile, I haven’t had a girlfriend since we broke up… 12 years ago.

chinese_item: 今天我才意识到，邻居们不仅能透过我家薄如纸的墙壁听到我在浴室唱歌，他们还乐此不疲地录下来，好在下次朋友聚会时大声播放。我真想消失。
english_item: Today, I realized that my neighbors can not only hear me singing in the shower through my apartment's paper-thin walls, they also take great delight in recording it so that they can play it at high volume for their friends when they next throw a party. I want to disappear.

chinese_item: 今天，我女朋友告诉我她要去新罕布什尔州参加她奶奶的葬礼，要待几天。后来我发现，她竟然用我们共同的账户花了1000多美元，和她出轨的那个男人一起去度假。
english_item: Today, my girlfriend told me that she had to go to New Hampshire for a few days for her grandma's funeral. Later I found out she spent over $1,000 dollars (on our joint account) to take a vacation with the man she was cheating on me with.

chinese_item: 今天，我参加了一个工作Zoom会议，原本应该在下午5点结束，也就是我的下班时间。会议拖到了5点以后，所以我决定退出会议回家，因为我没有加班费。我的经理打电话来质问我为什么提前离开，说我不专业，然后当场解雇了我。
english_item: Today, I was in a work Zoom meeting that was supposed to end at 5 pm, which is my shift end time. It dragged after 5 pm so I decided to disconnect and leave to go home, since I don’t get paid overtime. My manager called demanding to know why I left early, said I was unprofessional, and fired me on the spot.

chinese_item: 今天我在沃尔玛上班，正悠闲地在店里走来走去，突然脚被什么东西绊了一下，一下子向前踉跄了一下，吓得我大叫一声，吓得我赶紧装作跑了三秒钟，然后有人挡住了我的路，我只好停了下来。所有人都盯着我看。
english_item: Today, I was at work at Walmart, casually walking in the middle of the store, when my foot caught on something, so I went flying forward and yelled, being caught off guard, to the point I had to pretend I was running for 3 seconds, then someone blocked my path so I suddenly had to stop. Everyone was staring at me.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友发现我有强迫症。我用一只手碰到什么东西后，必须用另一只手也碰一下，否则我会惊慌失措。有一次，我用手背擦过他的脸，他一把把我扑倒在地，按住我，看着我惊慌失措地试图用另一只手去碰他，他却哈哈大笑。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend found out I have OCD. When I touch something with one hand I have to touch it with the other or I freak. After I brushed his face with the back of my hand he tackled me to the floor, held me down, and laughed at me while I panicked and tried to touch him with my other hand.

chinese_item: 今天半夜我被惊醒，发现有个身影拿着刀悬在我头顶。我吓得尖叫起来，那身影却哈哈大笑。原来是我妈。她这是在报复我昨晚做好饭后没洗碗。
english_item: Today, I woke up in the middle of the night to a figure holding a knife above me. After I screamed in terror, the figure burst into laughter. It was my mom. She did this as payback for me not washing the dishes last night after making food.

chinese_item: 今天，我去公共洗手间洗手，结果遇到一个正在整理头发的女人，她因为我偷偷溜进女洗手间而狠狠地扇了我一巴掌。后来她看到小便池才意识到我没走错洗手间。
english_item: Today, I went into a public bathroom to wash my hands, only to be met with a woman fixing her hair, who promptly slapped me for sneaking into the ladies room. I was in the right bathroom, which she realized after seeing the urinals.

chinese_item: 今天，我把家里的Wi-Fi改名为“请跟我说话，莎拉”，想暗示一下我暗恋的邻居。后来我发现整栋楼的人都能看到，也猜到了是谁的。现在陌生人老是问我莎拉有没有跟我说话。她还没有。
english_item: Today, I renamed my home Wi-Fi to “PleaseTalkToMeSarah” to hint to my crush/neighbour. Later, I realized the whole apartment building could see it, and had worked out who it belonged to. Now strangers keep asking if Sarah had talked to me yet. She hasn’t.

chinese_item: 今天，我女朋友因为我没把最后一块饼干给她，就把她在脸书上的感情状态改成了“一言难尽”。这种事经常发生。
english_item: Today, my girlfriend changed her relationship status on Facebook to 'It's Complicated' because I didn't give her my last cookie. This happens all the time.

chinese_item: 今天，我帮一个把钥匙锁在车里的家伙打开了车门，他道了谢就走了。十分钟后，一个女人从超市出来，惊慌失措地说有人偷了她的卡车。而我，却帮一个家伙偷了一辆卡车。
english_item: Today, I helped this guy get into his truck after he'd locked his keys in it, and he said thank you and went on his way. Ten minutes later, a woman came out of the grocery store and freaked out, saying someone stole her truck. I helped a guy steal a truck.

chinese_item: 今天我试穿鞋子的时候，感觉鞋跟突然断了。这双鞋不仅花了我两份工资，而且我离开的时候还听到售货员说：“我们真应该限制一下试穿我们产品的顾客的体重。”
english_item: Today, I was trying on some shoes when I felt the heels break underneath me. Not only did they cost two paychecks worth, but as I was leaving I heard the sales girl say that we really should have a weight limit for who can try on our products.

chinese_item: 今天，我妈带着她的狗来我家玩，我收拾完东西后，发现厨房台面上放着一个小药瓶。她是不是忘了吃药？我摇了摇药瓶，里面发出一种奇怪的、轻柔的声音。我打开盖子，想倒几片药到手上，结果发现里面不是药片，而是两只肥大的蜱虫。
english_item: Today, I was cleaning up after my mom visited with her dogs. She'd left a little pill jar on the kitchen counter. Had she forgotten her medicine? It made a weird, soft sound when I shaked it. I opened the lid to shake some pills into my hand, only it wasn't pills. It was two fat ticks.

chinese_item: 今天，我女朋友发短信跟我分手了。当时她就坐在我旁边，我们正在进行10个小时的车程，而旅程还有6个小时才结束。
english_item: Today, my girlfriend broke up with me by sending me a text. She was sitting right beside me on a 10 hour car trip, and there was still 6 more hours to go.

chinese_item: 今天，我知道我丈夫因为初为人父而承受着巨大的心理压力，但我完全不知道他承受的压力有多大，直到我发现他在电脑上设置了一个长达 18 年的倒计时，标题是“时间不多了，你能行的！”我们的儿子才出生 6 天。
english_item: Today, I knew my husband was struggling mentally with being a new dad, but I had no idea how much until I found he had set an 18 year timer on his computer entitled, “Not long to go, you can make it!” Our son is only 6 days old.

chinese_item: 今天我数了数自己正在服用的药物种类：14种。我正在等待另一位专科医生的会诊，他可能会再给我开2种药。我现在服用的药物比我奶奶还多。
english_item: Today, I counted how many medications I'm on: 14. I'm waiting to see another specialist who might put me on 2 more. I'm currently on more medications than my grandmother.

chinese_item: 今天，我一个朋友吐了一大口电子烟，被校长看到了，就把我们叫到办公室。我们互相推诿，校长就把我们俩的书包都翻了一遍。结果发现，我朋友不知怎么把他的笔偷偷塞进了我的书包里。我根本不抽电子烟。
english_item: Today, one of my friends blew a giant vape cloud and the principal saw and called us into his office. We blamed each other, so the principal checked both of our backpacks. Apparently, my friend snuck his pen into my bag somehow. I don't even vape.

chinese_item: 今天，一个朋友嘲笑我们老师的车，叫它“傻瓜车”，说只有傻瓜才会买那种车。那辆车跟我刚买的那辆一模一样。
english_item: Today, a friend was making fun of our teacher's car, calling it dorkmobile and saying only idiots would own that car. It's the same as the car I just bought.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友一直跟我说我闺蜜前几天晚上身上的味道有多好闻，还说我应该也用那种味道的香水。可我正好有跟她一模一样的香水，而且已经用了好几个月了。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend was continuously telling me how great my best friend smelled the other night and how I should wear some perfume that smelled like that. I have the same exact perfume and have been wearing it for months.

chinese_item: 今天，女朋友决定请我吃晚餐吃蛋糕庆祝生日。我妈觉得被冷落了，冲着女朋友大吼大叫。女朋友回家了。我只能一个人待在房间里过生日了。
english_item: Today, my girlfriend decided to treat me out to dinner and cake for my birthday. My mom felt left out and yelled at my girlfriend in an angry tirade. My girlfriend went home. I'm spending my birthday, alone in my room.

chinese_item: 今天，我把自己的婚礼计划得非常周全，包括给宾客的回礼、甜点自助餐以及我想要的花束胸针。可惜我还是单身。
english_item: Today, I planned my own wedding down to the very last detail, including favours for my guests, the sweets buffet and the bouquet of flower brooches I want. Too bad I'm still single.

chinese_item: 今天在呼叫中心上班时，我去储物柜拿手术后服用的止痛药。打开药瓶后，一半的药片撒了一地。我的老板走过来，说道：“我就知道！”
english_item: Today, at work in a call center, I went into my locker to get my pain pills from a recent surgery. When I opened the bottle, half my pills spread all over the floor. My boss walked by and said, I knew it!

chinese_item: 今天，奶奶送了我一串念珠作为生日礼物。她告诉我，我最好开始祈祷能找到个好丈夫。
english_item: Today, my grandmother gave me rosary beads for my birthday. She told me I'd better start praying for a husband.

chinese_item: 今天，我前任说我们分手的原因是我不擅长做家务。其实我完全可以做一些基本的家居维修。但如果她每次我伸手去拿工具的时候都围着我转，气喘吁吁地大喊“你在干什么？”，那我可就什么都做不了了。
english_item: Today, my ex said that the reason we didn't work out was because I wasn't handy around the house. I'm quite capable of basic home repairs. I'm not capable when she's hovering over me, hyperventilating, and screaming, WHAT ARE YOU DOING? every time I reach for a tool.

chinese_item: 如今，我觉得电子游戏既没吸引力又不够爷们儿。我跟一个很棒的小伙子说，他必须在我和电子游戏之间做个选择，他立马就说他选了电子游戏，然后就让我走了。去你的，loser。
english_item: Today, I find video games very unattractive and unmanly. I told a great guy that he had to choose between me and his video games, and he immediately told me he chose video games, then asked me to leave. Whatever, loser.

chinese_item: 今天我在地上捡到了100美元。我妈因为当时在场，所以拿走了40美元。
english_item: Today, I found $100 on the ground. My mom is taking $40 because she was there.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友被确诊为肾衰竭。他已经病了好几周了，我一直叮嘱他多喝水、多吃蔬菜。结果发现这对肾病患者来说非常不利。我之前给他喝的水和菠菜沙拉简直是在害他。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend found out that he has kidney failure. He was feeling sick for a few weeks and I had told him to drink lots of fluids and eat vegetables. Apparently that is really bad for kidney patients. I was killing him with water and spinach salads.

chinese_item: 今天我回家时发现室友三年来第一次把垃圾倒了。不幸的是，我放在门口的那袋脏衣服也被一起倒掉了。
english_item: Today, I came home and saw my roommate had taken out the garbage for the first time in the three years we have lived in the same house. Unfortunately, the bag of laundry I had by the door was taken out with it as well.

chinese_item: 小时候，我一直以为只要我看着路灯，它们就会亮起来。有一天，我想向父母展示我的“魔法”，于是出门的时候，我走到一盏路灯下，抬起头，摆了个魔术师的姿势。看到父母哈哈大笑，我心里很难过。后来，父母决定告诉我真相，我更是难过不已，因为拥有这种魔法一直是我的梦想。
english_item: When I was a child, I used to believe that the street lamps switched on when I loook at them. One day, I wanted to show at my parents my power, so when we went out, I went under a street lamp, raised my head and made a magician pose. When I saw that my parents were laughing, I was so sad . After that, my parents decided to tell me the truth and I was so sad because my dream was to have such powers.

chinese_item: 七岁之前，我一直以为只有秃头才不会得癌症。有一天，妹妹病得很重，我也不知道为什么，总觉得她得了癌症，于是就想“救”她，就把她的头发剪了。我当时特别得意，觉得妹妹会好起来。爸妈发现后，对我大吼大叫，我当时很懵，根本不知道自己做错了。现在，每次家庭聚餐，我们都会拿这件事开玩笑，全家人都叫我“邪恶理发师”。
english_item: Up until I was seven, I used to believe that you had to be bald not to have cancer..One day, my little sister was very sick and I don't know why, I used to think that she had cancer, so i decided to "save" her by cutting her hair...I was really proud of me because I used to think that my little sister would feel better. When my parents discovered what I did, they started to scream at me, I was really confused because I didn't even know that what I did was wrong.Nowaday, at every family dinner we make jokes about it and my whole family call me the evil hairdresser.

chinese_item: 小时候，我总觉得我们才是自己人生的主角，其他人都是演员，这都是因为我看了《楚门的世界》。所以，当我不在家的时候，我会偷听父母说话，看看他们是不是在谈论除了我之外的生活。有一次，我甚至到处张望，看看他们是不是在拍摄像头。结果父母回家后发现家里乱糟糟的，狠狠地训了我一顿。我从来没告诉过他们我为什么会那样做。现在，我庆幸自己不再那样想了。
english_item: When I was a kid, I used to think that we were the main character of our life and everyone else were actors, just because I saw "The Truman Show".So when I was not in the room, listened to my parents to see if they talked about their life outside of me. Once I was so convised, that I looked everywhere if they were something like cameras. When my parents arrived, my home was messy, so they scolded me. I never told them why I did that. Now fortunately I don't think that anymore

chinese_item: 小时候，我总觉得我的娃娃们（艾玛、克洛伊、瓦莱西、莉娅、莱奥、托马斯等等）晚上会说话。我有点害怕把它们留在房间里，觉得它们有自己的秘密生活。有时候睡觉的时候，我会跟它们说话，想跟它们友好相处。现在我知道，那只是我的幻想而已。
english_item: When I was a little child , i used to think thought dolls (Emma, Chloé, Valésy, Léa, Léo, Thomas ans the others names) talked at night. I was a bit scared to leave them in my room. I thought they had a secret life. When I sleep somentime i talket to them to be nice.Now I know it was just in my head.

chinese_item: 小时候，奶奶送我一个毛绒玩具，是一只老虎，它的名字叫“噩梦吞噬者”。因为我相信它会吃掉我所有的噩梦，让我睡得香甜。现在我知道这都是假的，但我仍然觉得它既好笑又可爱。虽然我知道它没用，但我还是会抱着它睡觉。
english_item: When i was little i used to have a stuffed animal that my grandmother gave me ,it was a tiger and his name was The eater of nightmares, because i believe that he eated all of my bad dreams so that i can sleep well.Now that i know it was false i find it funny and cute ,even thought that i know it doesn't work i still sleep with him.

english_item: A new CDC study published Monday found that more than 1 million children were affected by long COVID in 2023. Higher levels were found in lower-income households.

chinese_item:
加勒比地区国家正遭受飓风梅丽莎带来的破坏和洪水的影响，牙买加、海地和古巴受灾严重。
牙买加至少有四人确认死亡，而海地因洪水导致至少二十人死亡。
该地区的居民表示，清理和重建工作将十分艰难。
“恢复需要很长时间，”一位古巴居民说道。
english_item:
Caribbean countries are reeling as Hurricane Melissa has left a trail of devastation and flooding in Jamaica, Haiti and Cuba.
At least four people in Jamaica are confirmed dead and at least 20 people have died in Haiti flooding.
Residents across the region say clean up and rebuilding will be difficult.
"It will take a long time to recover", one Cuban resident said.

chinese_item:
55岁的莎拉·福雷斯特在周五晚上7点左右被发现没有呼吸，当时警方到达了她位于斯温顿莫尔登贝顿路的住所。一名13岁女孩因涉嫌谋杀被捕，并被拘留接受审讯，但随后在调查继续进行期间被保释。
“我其实有点震惊，还没有完全消化这件事，”她告诉BBC。
“老实说，我真的非常震惊。”
更多关于此事件的信息：涉嫌谋杀斯温顿心理咨询师的13岁女孩被保释
english_item:
Sarah Forrester, 55, was not breathing when officers arrived at her house on Baydon Close in Moredon, Swindon, at about 19:00 GMT on Friday.
A 13-year-old girl was arrested on suspicion of murder and taken into custody for questioning, but has since been bailed while enquiries continue.
"I feel a bit shocked really, I've not really processed it yet," she told the BBC.
I was really shocked to be honest."
More on this story Girl, 13, released on bail over murder of Swindon counsellor

chinese_item:
尼日利亚旅游博主阿尔玛·阿辛诺比试图打破七大洲最快旅行记录，但签证问题和航班取消阻碍了她的计划。她向BBC非洲讲述了自己是如何得知这一挑战不可能完成的，以及如果再次尝试的话她会做哪些改变。
制作人：杰利拉特·奥拉瓦莱和乌切·阿科利萨。
摄像：阿德科拉·奥拉瓦莱和约书亚·阿金耶米。
剪辑：阿德科拉·奥拉瓦莱。
english_item:
Nigerian travel vlogger Alma Asinobi attempted to break the record for the fastest journey across all seven continents - but visa challenges and flight cancelations got in the way.
She tells BBC Africa when she found out it would be impossible and what she'd change if she tried it again.
Produced by Jelilat Olawale and Uche Akolisa.
Filmed by Adekola Olawale and Joshua Akinyemi.
Edited by Adekola Olawale.

chinese_item:
“世界各地的冰川都在融化，”不来梅大学地理研究所的本·马泽恩教授说道。
直到最近，阿尔卑斯山的冰川学家还认为一年内失去2%的冰量就已经是“极端”情况了。
然而，2022年打破了这一观念，在这一年里，瑞士几乎失去了其剩余冰量的6%。
在17、18和19世纪的小冰期期间，冰川经常前进。
但对于依赖冰川获取淡水的山区社区来说，冰川的消失将带来尤为严重的影响。
english_item:
Glaciers are melting everywhere in the world," says Prof Ben Marzeion of the Institute of Geography at the University of Bremen.
Until recently, glaciologists in the Alps used to consider 2% of ice lost in a single year to be "extreme".
Then 2022 blew that idea out of the water, with nearly 6% of Switzerland's remaining ice lost in a single year.
In the cold snaps of the 17th, 18th and 19th Centuries - part of the Little Ice Age - glaciers regularly advanced.
But the loss of ice will be particularly acutely felt by mountain communities dependent on glaciers for fresh water.

chinese_item:
在英格兰的121个信托机构中，只有3个能够在62天内迅速为癌症患者提供治疗，专家警告称延误可能会危及生命。
表现最佳的服务在过去12个月里达到了62天的目标——分别是卡尔德利和哈德斯菲尔德、东赫特福德郡北部以及博尔顿NHS信托。
五十多岁的保罗几周前在史蒂文尼奇的利斯特医院被诊断出患有前列腺癌，该医院隶属于东赫特福德郡北部NHS信托。
此前，在7月份发布的10年NHS计划中，癌症被列为“核心优先事项”。
卫生部发言人表示：“随着我们扭转NHS十多年的忽视状况，癌症护理是我们的首要任务。”
english_item:
Just three trusts out of 121 in England are treating cancer patients quickly enough - within 62 days - with experts warning delays could be putting lives at risk.
How best-performers are doing itThere are just three cancer services that are achieving the 62-day target over the past 12 months - Calderdale and Huddersfield, East and North Hertfordshire and Bolton NHS trusts.
Paul, who is in his 50s, was diagnosed with prostate cancer a few weeks ago at the Lister Hospital in Stevenage, part of East and North Hertfordshire NHS Trust.
It comes after cancer was named as a ‘core priority’ in the 10-year NHS plan published in July.
A Department of Health spokeswoman said: "Cancer care is a priority as we turn around more than a decade of neglect of our NHS.

chinese_item:
阻燃化学品有望让建筑更安全
2025年11月7日 分享 保存
克里斯·巴拉纽克 科技记者 分享 保存
盖蒂图片社
耐火材料可以为消防员争取更多时间
我正盯着一个大桶，里面装着一种完全透明的液体——这是一种特殊的木材阻燃剂。
无论是麦肯先生还是丹麦公司Burnblock的首席执行官赫罗尔·贝-斯密特都不会透露其成分。
阻燃剂，即添加到产品中以减缓燃烧速度的化学物质，已经存在了几个世纪。
但许多20世纪开发的阻燃剂都具有高度毒性。
我问及是否曾有使用Halt处理过的木材建造的建筑或设施遭遇过火灾——答案是“没有”。
english_item:
Fire-blocking chemicals promise safer buildings7 November 2025 Share Save Chris Baraniuk Technology Reporter Share SaveGetty Images Fire resistant materials can buy time for fire fightersI'm peering into a large vat containing a perfectly clear liquid – a special kind of flame retardant for wood products.
Neither Mr McCann nor Hroar Bay-Smidt, chief executive of Burnblock itself, a Danish firm, will confirm the ingredients.
Flame retardants, chemicals added to products to try and slow down how they burn, have been around in various forms for centuries.
But many of the flame retardants developed in the 20th Century are highly toxic.
I ask whether any of the buildings or facilities constructed with wood treated by Halt have ever been affected by a fire to date – "No" is the answer.

chinese_item:
新的昆虫调查显示昆虫数量“令人担忧”地下降
4天前 分享 保存 Joshua Askew 东南地区 分享 保存Getty Images
一位野生动物专家表示，需要“紧急行动”来帮助昆虫。
根据一项新研究的“令人担忧”的数据，肯特郡的昆虫数量持续下降。
2025年的“虫子重要性飞溅调查”显示，在短短五年内，该县飞行昆虫的数量减少了66%。
年度调查利用公民科学家记录车辆牌照上的昆虫飞溅痕迹。
报告称，自2021年调查开始以来，来自近2000次行程、总里程达64,545公里（40,106英里）的数据表明，肯特郡的昆虫数量每年平均下降23%。
肯特野生动物信托基金的罗西·布莱特说：“这些结果极其令人担忧。”
english_item:
'Troubling' fall in insects, says new bug survey4 days ago Share Save Joshua Askew South East Share SaveGetty Images "Urgent action" is needed to help insects, says a wildlife expertInsect life in Kent continues to plummet, according to "troubling" data in a new study.
The 2025 Bugs Matter "splat survey" revealed the number of flying bugs in the county has fallen by 66% in just five years.
Steps to reverse insect declineThe yearly survey uses citizen scientists to record insect splats on vehicle number plates.
Data from nearly 2,000 journeys over 64,545km (40,106 miles) shows in Kent there has been an annual average decline in insects of 23% since the survey began in 2021, said the report.
"These results are extremely concerning," said Rosie Bleet of the Kent Wildlife Trust.

chinese_item:
“聚类分析图”向部长们准确展示了哪些人正在领取失业救济金以及他们的位置。
“有很多心理健康问题，比如抑郁和焦虑，”卡姆告诉我。
在这些日益增多的工作中患病的人群中，有很大一部分最终会领取某种形式的伤残津贴。
他认为，从历史上看，福利系统通过一种中间方式有效应对了这一问题，这种方式允许个人将兼职工作与部分福利相结合。
然而，这需要额外的资金支持，以及提供更加个性化的求职服务和更好的心理健康支持的方法。
english_item:
Cluster analysis maps" reveal to ministers exactly who is claiming out of work benefits and where they are.
"There's a lot of mental health, depression and anxiety," Qam told me.
From that pool of growing in-work sickness, a significant proportion ends up on some form of incapacity benefits.
He argued that, historically, the welfare system responded effectively through a middle ground that allowed individuals to combine part-time work with partial welfare benefits.
However, that requires extra funding, as well as a way of providing more personalised job searches and better mental health support.

chinese_item:
系统是否辜负了那些因新冠疫苗而受害的人？
新冠疫苗带来的益处是有充分记录的。
然而，我们不仅需要讨论新冠疫苗带来的巨大积极影响，还需要关注因阿斯利康新冠疫苗而受伤或失去亲人的少数群体。
自疫情爆发以来，针对新冠疫苗的索赔案件接近16,000起，其中有180起获得了赔偿。
在这些赔偿案例中，除了极少数例外，都是由于阿斯利康新冠疫苗造成的伤害，该疫苗目前已不再使用。
english_item:
Is the system letting down people who were harmed by Covid vaccines?
The level of benefit from Covid vaccines is well documented.
However, we need to discuss not just the huge positives that Covid vaccines brought, but also the small minority left injured or bereaved by the AstraZeneca vaccine.
Since the pandemic there have been almost 16,000 claims against Covid vaccines and 180 awards.
Of the awards, all but a handful are for damage done by the AstraZeneca Covid vaccine, which is no longer used.

chinese_item:
唐纳德·格洛弗在舞台上透露，他去年中风了。这里看到的是格洛弗周六晚上在洛杉矶表演时的情景，他在现场透露自己去年曾中风。在他2024年8月开始的新世界巡演大约一个月后，格洛弗推迟了巡演，并最终取消了剩余的演出日期，原因是健康问题。
“我在路易斯安那时头部剧痛，但我还是坚持完成了演出，”格洛弗在舞台上说。
“我当时视力不太好，所以我们到了休斯顿后，我就去了医院，医生告诉我，‘你中风了。’”
美国演员兼说唱歌手唐纳德·格洛弗，以Childish Gambino为艺名，在一场音乐会上向观众透露，他去年曾中风。
在舞台上，格洛弗随后变得严肃起来，告诉观众当他第一次得知自己中风时，感觉自己像是让所有人失望了。
english_item:
Donald Glover reveals on stage he had a stroke last yearDonald Glover, seen here performing in Los Angeles on Saturday night, revealed he had a stroke last yearAbout a month after his New World tour began in August 2024, Glover postponed the tour, and then later cancelled the remaining dates, citing health issues.
"I had a really bad pain in my head in Louisiana and I did the show anyway," Glover said on stage.
"I couldn't really see well, so when we went to Houston, I went to the hospital and the doctor was like, 'You had a stroke.'"
American actor and rapper Donald Glover, who performs as Childish Gambino, revealed on stage during a concert that he had a stroke last year.
On stage, Glover then turned more serious, telling the crowd that when he first found out he had had a stroke, he felt like he was letting everyone down.

chinese_item:
美国教练在Netflix系列剧集中出镜，在加州校园内遭到枪击，袭击者尚未被抓获。
据美国媒体报道，曾在Netflix系列剧《最后机会大学》中大放异彩的前美式足球教练约翰·比姆遭到枪击。
后来他们向美国媒体确认，现年66岁的学院体育总监比姆先生确实中枪了。
比姆先生在奥克兰执教足球超过四十年，去年才退休。
莱尼学院是一所成立于1953年的公立社区学院。
english_item:
US coach featured on Netflix series shot on California school campusThe attacker, who has not been identified, is still on the run.
Former American football coach John Beam, who was prominently featured in Netflix series Last Chance U, has been shot, according to US media.
They later confirmed to US media that Mr Beam, the college’s current athletic director, had been shot.
Mr Beam, 66, spent more than four decades coaching football in Oakland before retiring from coaching last year.
Laney College is a public community college founded in 1953.

chinese_item:
在这段视频于5月20日发布后，BBC当天晚些时候报道说，一位联合国人道主义负责人表示，如果援助卡车不能在接下来的48小时内到达加沙地带的社区，那么加沙可能有14,000名婴儿会死亡。
在接受BBC第四电台《今日》节目采访时，汤姆·弗莱彻说数千辆装满援助物资的卡车“已经准备好出发”，并补充说这些卡车上装载着“婴儿食品和营养品”。
以色列指责哈马斯滥用和盗取援助物资，但哈马斯对此予以否认。
以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡周一表示，“我们不能让饥荒发生”，并补充说以色列只会允许一个“最低限度的基本桥梁”来防止饥饿。
请关注此事件的最新进展。
english_item:
: Following publication of this video on 20 May, the BBC reported later that dayA UN humanitarian chief has said 14,000 babies in Gaza could die in the next 48 hours if lorries of aid do not reach communities in the Strip.
Speaking to the BBC's Radio 4 Today programme, Tom Fletcher said thousands of trucks of aid were "ready to go", adding that the lorries contained "baby food and nutrition".
Israel has accused Hamas of misusing and stealing aid, which Hamas denies.
The country's prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, said on Monday that "we must not reach a situation of famine", adding that Israel will only allow a "minimal, basic bridge" to prevent hunger.
Follow the latest updates on this story.

chinese_item:
“你需要逃跑，你需要逃跑。”袭击发生在LNER列车离开唐卡斯特一个多小时后。
“他径直朝我们跑来……我们决定躲在一辆出租车里。”目击者说。在下一节车厢H车厢中，YouTube用户奥利·福斯特听到了“快跑，快跑，有个人真的在捅所有人”的喊叫声，起初他还以为这是万圣节恶作剧。
躲在餐吧内
列车的餐吧变成了那些逃离袭击者的临时藏身之处。
他提供给BBC的一段在餐吧内部拍摄的视频显示，里面有多名乘客，至少有一人在打电话给紧急服务部门。
阿利斯泰尔说，他看到一个之前和他在餐吧里的男子被救护人员抬上了救护车。
english_item:
'You need to run, you need to run'The attack started just over an hour after the LNER train left Doncaster.
'He ran right towards us... we decided to hide in a taxi', says eyewitnessIn the next carriage, coach H, YouTuber Olly Foster heard shouts of "run, run, there's a guy literally stabbing everyone", and initially thought it was a Halloween prank.
Sheltering inside the cafeThe train's cafe bar transformed into an impromptu hiding space for those fleeing the attacker.
A video he provided to the BBC from inside the cafe bar shows multiple passengers inside, with at least one on the phone to emergency services.
Alistair said he saw a man who had been in the cafe bar with him being carried towards an ambulance by paramedics.

chinese_item:
警方在布里斯托尔寻找一名失踪男子时发现了一具尸体。警方称，Rehaan在与朋友外出夜游时失踪。警方正在搜寻一名28岁的失踪男子，并表示他们已经从市中心的一条水道中打捞出一具尸体。
阿冯和萨默塞特警方表示，来自威尔士兰内利的Rehaan在布里斯托尔与朋友外出夜游时失踪，最后一次被目击是在周日凌晨1点左右，在该市的港口附近。
警方说：“我们遗憾地报告，在搜寻28岁失踪者Rehaan的过程中，从水中找到了一具尸体。”
“我们将这起死亡事件视为原因不明，但不认为有可疑之处，并将准备文件提交给验尸官。”
english_item:
Body found in search for man missing in BristolPolice say Rehaan disappeared while on a night out with friendsPolice searching for a missing 28-year-old man say they have recovered a body from a city centre waterway.
Avon and Somerset Police said Rehaan, from Llanelli, in Wales, disappeared on a night out with friends in Bristol and was last seen at around 01:00 GMT on Sunday near the city's harbourside.
"We are saddened to report that a body has been recovered from the water during the search for missing 28-year-old Rehaan," the force said.
"We are treating this death as unexplained, but not suspicious, and will be preparing a file for the coroner.

chinese_item:
消防部门可能削减安全计划以节省开支
2025年11月12日 分享 保存 Lewis Adams 埃塞克斯 分享 保存
Lewis Adams/BBC
埃塞克斯消防局长Rick Hylton表示，他希望保护一线消防员的工作岗位。
埃塞克斯消防部门警告称，如果被迫接受一项被认为资金不足的新资助协议，一些重要的安全计划可能会被取消。
该部门领导层看到的提案建议明年将削减13.7%的资金——相当于510万英镑。
该部门领导在接受BBC埃塞克斯采访时说，优先保护一线工作岗位，这意味着任何初步削减将首先针对预防计划。
埃塞克斯消防部门强调，目前消防员人数比十年前减少了25%。
“老旧的资助体系”
由住房、社区和地方政府部主导的资助改革被称为“公平资助审查2.0”。
english_item:
Fire service may axe safety schemes to save money12 November 2025 Share Save Lewis Adams Essex Share SaveLewis Adams/BBC Essex fire chief Rick Hylton said he wanted to protect frontline firefighting jobsEssex's fire service has warned vital safety programmes could be scrapped if it has to accept a new funding deal that it believes is inadequate.
Proposals seen by the service's leaders suggest it would have a 13.7% cut in funding next year – amounting to ￡5.1m.
The service's leaders told BBC Essex that protecting frontline jobs would be prioritised, meaning any cuts in the first instance would be made to prevention schemes.
Firefighter numbers in Essex are 25% lower than a decade ago, the service stressed.
'Outdated funding system'The funding reforms, led by the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government, have been named the Fair Funding Review 2.0.

chinese_item:
一名17岁的怀孕少女与一名男孩一同失踪，警方表示对这名失踪少女的安全感到担忧。
格洛斯特郡警方正在寻找来自迪恩森林辛德福德地区的17岁女孩凯西-蕾。
据信她与另一名同样17岁的失踪少年乔治在一起，乔治来自沃尔弗汉普顿地区。
两人于周日格林尼治时间约17:30在格洛斯特国王广场被看到，当天晚上20:00左右又在格洛斯特火车站的监控录像中出现。
english_item:
Pregnant teen, 17, goes missing with boyPolice say they are concerned about the welfare of a missing heavily-pregnant teenage girl.
Gloucestershire Police officers are trying to find Kacey-Rae, 17, from Cinderford in the Forest of Dean.
She is believed to be with another missing teenager, known as George, who is from the Wolverhampton area and is also 17.
The pair were seen together in Kings Square in Gloucester at about 17:30 GMT on Sunday and were later spotted on CCTV at Gloucester railway station at about 20:00 that day.

chinese_item: 10月30日，纽约市遭遇创纪录的降雨，至少两人确认死亡。据当地媒体报道，一名39岁男子的遗体在布鲁克林的一处被淹地下室中被发现，而一名43岁的死者则是在曼哈顿一个被水淹没的锅炉房内被找到。纽约市应急管理在X平台上发帖称，部分地区降水量打破了历史记录，中央公园记录到了1.80英寸的降雨量，超过了1917年的记录；拉瓜迪亚机场的降雨量为1.97英寸，打破了1955年创下的记录。
english_item:
At least two people were confirmed dead after record rainfall hit New York City on 30 October.
The body of a 39-year-old man was recovered from a flooded basement in Brooklyn, while a 43-year-old was found dead in a submerged boiler room in Manhattan, according to local media.
In a post on X, the NYC Emergency Management said some areas saw record-breaking rainfall, with 1.80 inches recorded in Central Park, surpassing a 1917 record, and 1.97 inches at LaGuardia Airport, breaking the previous record set in 1955.

chinese_item:
奥克兰警方表示，嫌疑人从未为比姆打过橄榄球，但他认识这位教练。
枪击事件发生在周四，在加利福尼亚州奥克兰市的莱尼学院。
曾出现在Netflix纪录片《最后机会大学》中的前美式橄榄球教练约翰·比姆在被枪击后去世。
该系列记录了他和他的队伍——莱尼鹰队如何在北加州城市中对抗对手。
周三，在天际高中发生了一起枪击事件，一名学生受伤。
english_item:
Oakland police said that the suspect never played football for Beam but knew the coach.
The shooting took place at Laney College in Oakland, California, on Thursday.
Former American football coach John Beam, who was featured in Netflix series Last Chance U, has died after being shot.
The series profiles him and his team, the Laney Eagles, as they fend off rival teams in the northern California city.
A shooting took place at Skyline High School on Wednesday, injuring one student.

chinese_item:
卫生大臣韦斯·斯特里廷表示，医生因薪酬问题再次罢工给患者带来了痛苦和苦难。英格兰的住院医生（即新名称下的初级医生）将进行为期五天的罢工，直到周三格林尼治标准时间早上7点结束。
医院将面临最大的压力——住院医生约占其医疗人员的一半。
有些住院医生在她的医院参加了罢工，但也有一些人来上班了。“通常每个病房会有四名住院医生，而现在可能只有一名或者根本没有。”
english_item:
Doctor strike inflicting pain and misery on patients, says health secretary14 November 2025 Share Save Nick Triggle Health correspondent Share SaveWatch: Doctors' strike 'completely irresponsible' says health secretaryDoctors going on strike again over pay is "inflicting pain and misery" on patients, says Health Secretary Wes Streeting.
The five-day walkout in England by resident doctors, the new name for junior doctors, runs until 07:00 GMT on Wednesday.
Hospitals will come under the most strain - resident doctors make up about half their medical workforce.
Some resident doctors have observed the strike at her hospital, but others have come in.
"Normally we'd have four resident doctors per ward and we may have one or zero now.

chinese_item:
澳大利亚的有毒藻类爆发被州长称为“自然灾害”——2025年7月22日 分享 保存 西蒙·阿特金森和蒂凡妮·特恩布尔 BBC新闻，悉尼 分享 保存前后对比视频显示了有毒藻类爆发的影响一场将南澳大利亚通常清澈的水域染成有毒绿色并导致大量海洋生物窒息死亡的藻类灾难被州长宣布为“自然灾害”。
当局表示，已有超过400种海洋生物死亡，当地产业也受到影响。
藻类爆发是自然发生的，但由海洋变暖、海洋热浪以及营养污染引起——所有这些都因气候变化而加剧。
“这是一场自然灾害，应该被如此认定……我认为政客们在纠结于技术细节时可能会自讨苦吃，”南澳大利亚州州长彼得·马利诺斯卡斯周二在接受澳大利亚广播公司（ABC）采访时说道。
english_item:
Australia's toxic algae bloom is 'natural disaster' - premier22 July 2025 Share Save Simon Atkinson and Tiffanie Turnbull BBC News, Sydney Share SaveBefore and after footage shows impact of the toxic algae bloomAn algal bloom catastrophe which has turned usually pristine South Australian waters toxic green and suffocated masses of marine life is a "natural disaster", the state premier has declared.
Authorities say more than 400 species of marine life have died and local industries are suffering.
Algal bloom is naturally occurring but is caused by ocean warming, marine heatwaves, and nutrient pollution - all exacerbated by climate change.
"This is a natural disaster and should be acknowledged as such...
I think politicians can do themselves a disservice when they get caught up in technicalities," South Australian Premier Peter Malinauskas told the Australian Broadcasting Corporation (ABC) on Tuesday.

chinese_item: 54岁的安东尼·费尔顿在3月5日于阿伯文的圣约瑟夫罗马天主教综合学校袭击事件后，承认了蓄意造成严重身体伤害未遂。51岁的理查德·派克在费尔顿从背后袭击他之后被送往医院治疗轻微伤势。派克先生倒地后试图踢开费尔顿，随后被听到动静的同事救下。派克先生表示，费尔顿“将我置于完全无助的境地”。在袭击发生后，费尔顿扔掉了扳手并驾车离开，并向所有员工发送了一封电子邮件，为他的行为可能带来的问题和困扰道歉。
english_item:
Anthony Felton, 54, admitted attempted grievous bodily harm with intent after the attack at St Joseph's Roman Catholic Comprehensive in Aberavon, Neath Port Talbot, on 5 March.
Richard Pyke, 51, was treated for minor injuries in hospital after Felton sought him out and attacked him from behind.
Mr Pyke fell to the ground and attempted to kick away Felton before being helped by colleagues who heard the disturbance.
Mr Pyke said Felton had "manipulated me into a position of complete vulnerability".
Crown Prosecution Service Following the attack Felton threw the wrench away and drove off before sending an email to all staff apologising "for the problems and distress his actions were likely to cause".

chinese_item:
氯胺酮帮助我摆脱了消极的想法——然后它差点要了我的命
2025年7月4日 分享 保存
露丝·克莱格 BBC新闻健康与福祉记者 分享 保存

艾比第一次开始使用氯胺酮时只有16岁。那些从小就在她脑海中挥之不去的消极想法开始逐渐消散。氯胺酮与其他许多街头毒品不同，因为它与大脑的互动方式独特。“我的想法不再对我产生负面影响——生活就这样流逝，但我无需参与其中。”去年九月，她发现25岁的梅茜对氯胺酮上瘾，这已经对她的肾脏造成了可能无法逆转的损害。
english_item:
Ketamine helped me escape my negative thoughts - then it nearly killed me4 July 2025 Share Save Ruth Clegg Health and wellbeing reporter, BBC News Share SaveAbbie Abbie first began using ketamine when she was 16Abbie was 16 years old when she started using ketamine.
The negative thoughts that had swamped her mind since a young age began to dissipate.
Ketamine is unlike many other street drugs due to the way it interacts with the brain.
"My thoughts no longer had a negative effect on me - life was passing me by, but I didn't have to engage with it."
Last September she discovered that Maisie, 25, was addicted to ketamine, which had caused potentially irreversible damage to her kidneys.

chinese_item: 一位正在等待肝脏和肠道移植的幼儿的父母恳请其他家庭讨论如果处在相同情况下他们会怎么做。扎卡里·布拉德福德在出生前就被诊断出腹部缺陷，并且已经经历了一次肝脏移植。现在他急需再次进行移植手术才能存活。扎卡里的母亲和父亲，杰德和里斯，正试图提高人们对极小儿童器官捐赠需求的认识。
english_item:
The parents of a toddler waiting for a liver and bowel transplant are pleading with families to have the conversation about what they would do in the same situation.
Zachary Bradford was diagnosed with an abdominal defect before birth and has already gone through one liver transplant.
He now urgently needs another round of transplants to survive.
Zachary's mother and father, Jade and Rhys, are trying to spark awareness of the need for organ donation for very young children.

chinese_item:
他们向那些支付大笔金钱的客户承诺财富和权力，这些客户错误地相信人体部位可以使这种符咒更加强大。
在塞拉利昂，甚至在许多警察中，对巫术的信仰也根深蒂固，以至于常常害怕进一步追查案件——因此大多数案件都未能解决。
但我想了解更多关于这种地下人体部位交易的情况，它所到之处留下了一片悲剧。
他还指了指他神龛后面的一个坑：“这就是我们悬挂人体部位的地方。”
“没有任何人体部位是我们不使用的。”
english_item:
They promise things like prosperity and power to clients who pay large sums in the false belief that human body parts can make such charms more potent.
Belief in witchcraft is also so deeply ingrained in Sierra Leone, even among many police officers, that there is often a fear of pursuing cases further - and most go unsolved.
But I wanted to find out more about this underground trade in human body parts that leaves tragedy in its wake.
He also pointed to a pit behind his shrine: "This is where we hang human parts.
"There are no human parts that we don't work with.

chinese_item:
雪莉·巴拉斯说母亲的肺部状况“令人恐惧”。两天前，露米娜·贾汉吉尔和乔·麦格拉斯报道。雪莉·巴拉斯是她母亲奥黛丽的看护者，奥黛丽在2022年被诊断出患有慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD）。

《舞动奇迹》首席评委雪莉·巴拉斯表示，看到她的母亲因这种估计影响英国超过三百万人的肺病而呼吸困难，这让她感到“非常害怕”。

“我妈妈是个烟民，在过去的三年里，我亲眼目睹了她气喘吁吁的样子。”她在接受BBC曼彻斯特电台采访时说道。

巴拉斯与88岁的母亲同住并照顾她，而她的母亲正在尝试戒烟。巴拉斯提到，她的母亲有雾化器和喷雾器，但“让她使用这些设备就像拔牙一样难”。

巴拉斯说，她与母亲有着“A*的关系”，为了让她女儿从小学习舞蹈，她的母亲曾同时打四份工。
english_item:
Shirley Ballas says mum's lung condition 'terrifying'2 days ago Share Save Rumeana Jahangir , North West and Joe McGrath , North West Share SaveGetty Images Shirley Ballas is a carer for her mum Audrey, who was diagnosed with the lung condition COPD in 2022Strictly Come Dancing head judge Shirley Ballas said watching her mum struggle to breathe with a lung disease estimated to affect more than three million people in the UK was "terrifying".
"My mum's a smoker and over these last three years, I've got to witness her being out of breath," she told BBC Radio Manchester.
Ballas lives with and cares for her 88-year-old mother, who is attempting to quit smoking.
Her mother has a nebulizer and puffer, Ballas said, but "getting her to use that is like pulling teeth".
Ballas said she had an "A* relationship" with her mother, who took on four jobs so her daughter could learn to dance as a child.

chinese_item: 他感到非常沮丧，并担心不得不缩减与未婚妻拉拉·罗素梦想中的婚礼和蜜月计划。两年后，由于他的肾脏捐赠者——63岁的父亲布莱恩的帮助，他的未来发生了转变。基兰安排了一次前往纽卡斯尔的旅行，以感谢他的父亲。基兰“极其讨厌”体内留置的支架。有八个人主动提出要捐肾给他，其中包括拉拉的父亲以及基兰的兄弟姐妹。布莱恩和他的儿子基兰说，在移植手术之后，他们之间的关系变得更加紧密了。
english_item:
He was devastated and worried that he would have to curtail plans of a dream wedding and honeymoon with fiancée Lara Russell.
Two years later his future has been transformed thanks to his kidney donor - his 63-year-old dad Brian.
Brian Innes Kieran arranged a trip to Newcastle to thank his dadKieran "absolutely hated" having the stent.
Eight people came forward to offer their kidney including Lara's dad and Kieran's brother and sister.
Brian Innes Brian and his son Kieran say they now have a strong bond following the transplant

chinese_item:
雷鬼传奇吉米·克里夫去世，享年81岁

6小时前 分享 保存
马克·萨维奇 音乐记者
分享 保存
吉米·克里夫的热门歌曲包括《跨越千山万水》、《美好的世界，美丽的人们》和《如果你真的想要》。

作为雷鬼音乐最杰出且最受喜爱的代表人物之一，吉米·克里夫在81岁时离世。
自20世纪60年代起，他就成为了一位明星，并通过诸如《美好的世界，美丽的人们》和《如果你真的想要》等热门歌曲将牙买加的声音带给了全球听众。
“我怀着深切的悲痛告诉大家，我的丈夫吉米·克里夫因癫痫发作后并发肺炎而去世。”她写道。
1986年，克里夫在接受雷鬼档案学家罗杰·斯蒂芬斯采访时谈到这首歌时说：“我的音乐的核心就是斗争。”

《艰难之路》在美国上映时不得不加上字幕，因为角色们的牙买加方言非常浓重。
english_item:
Reggae legend Jimmy Cliff dies, aged 816 hours ago Share Save Mark Savage Music correspondent Share SaveGetty Images Jimmy Cliff's hits included Many Rivers To Cross, Wonderful World, Beautiful People and You Can Get It If You Really WantJimmy Cliff, one of the most prominent and beloved proponents of reggae music, has died at the age of 81.
A star since the 1960s, he helped to bring the sound of Jamaica to a global audience through hits such as Wonderful World, Beautiful People and You Can Get It If You Really Want.
"It's with profound sadness that I share that my husband, Jimmy Cliff, has crossed over due to a seizure followed by pneumonia," she wrote.
Cliff reflected on the song in 1986, telling reggae archivist Roger Steffens: "The essence of my music is struggle.
Getty Images The Harder They Come had to be subtitled in the US because of the character's thick Jamaican patois

chinese_item: 警方告诉BBC乌尔都语频道，袭击者携带武器冲向位于巴基斯坦西北部白沙瓦的联邦宪兵总部。周一，两名自杀式炸弹袭击者攻击了巴基斯坦一支准军事部队的总部，造成三名安保人员死亡，至少十二人受伤。巴基斯坦塔利班，也被称为巴基斯坦塔利班运动（TTP），在该省活动频繁，并曾声称对全国范围内的类似袭击负责。两周前，在巴基斯坦首都伊斯兰堡的一家法院外发生了一起自杀式袭击事件，造成十二人死亡，至少二十七人受伤。今年二月，在开伯尔-普赫图赫瓦省的一所伊斯兰神学院发生的自杀式袭击中，有六人丧生。
english_item:
Police told BBC Urdu that the attackers were armed as they charged at the Federal Constabulary's headquarters in Peshawar in north-western Pakistan.
Two suicide bombers have attacked the headquarters of a Pakistani paramilitary force on Monday, killing three security officials and wounding at least 12 people.
The Pakistani Taliban, also known as the Tehreek-i-Taliban Pakistan (TTP), is active in the province and had claimed responsibility for similar attacks across the country.
Two weeks ago, a suicide attack outside a court in Pakistan's capital Islamabad killed 12 people and injured at least 27 others.
In February this year, six people were killed in a suicide attack at an Islamic seminary in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

chinese_item:
数百人参加为患癌少年举办的捐赠活动。16岁的里奥来自伍斯特郡的布罗姆斯格罗夫，他已经与急性肝病斗争过一次，但现在又被诊断出患有血液癌症。
为了帮助这位患有白血病的少年，超过700人参加了干细胞捐赠活动。
里奥需要找到匹配的捐献者进行干细胞移植，这是他康复的最佳机会。
为了帮助他和其他患者，他的家人在周日组织了一场活动，共有718人登记成为捐赠者，并为协助举办此次活动的血液癌症慈善机构DKMS筹集了超过4000英镑的资金。
据家人说，即使在捐赠活动结束后，为DKMS筹集的资金数额仍在继续增加。
english_item:
Hundreds attend donor drive for teen with cancerLeo had already battled an acute liver disease but has now received a blood cancer diagnosis.
More than 700 people attended a stem cell donor drive in aid of a teenage boy suffering from leukaemia.
Leo, 16, from Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, needs a stem cell transplant from a matching donor as his best opportunity for recovery.
In an attempt to help him and others, his family organised an event on Sunday which saw 718 people register as donors and more than ￡4,000 raised for blood cancer charity DKMS which helped organise the gathering.
The money raised for DKMS continued to rise even after the donor drive, the family said.

chinese_item: 随着刚果东部冲突的加剧，人们担心这场战争可能会蔓延到邻国。由卢旺达支持的M23叛军与刚果军队之间曾达成过停火协议，但很快就破裂了。现在，人们对冲突可能波及邻国布隆迪感到担忧。诺姆萨·马塞科在布琼布拉采访了布隆迪总统埃瓦里斯特·恩达伊施米耶。摄像：图图卡·宗迪；制作：罗伯特·基普托和马尔科·奥里翁托；剪辑：珍娜·阿巴库克和玛塔·保西利
english_item:
As the conflict in the eastern Democratic Republic of Congo is deepening, there are fear the war could spread to its neighbours.
A ceasefire was reached between the Rwanda-backed M23 rebel group and the Congolese army but it was short-lived.
Now the prospects of a spillover into neighbouring Burundi is raising concerns.
Nomsa Maseko was in Bujumbura to interview the Burundian President évariste Ndayishimiy.
Filmed by Thuthuka.ZondiProduced by Robert Kiptoo and Marco OriuntoEdited by Jenna Abaakouk and Marta Pausilli

chinese_item:
来自沃灵顿的迈克尔·埃克斯利在20世纪80年代开始于萨默塞特郡韦尔斯对一名儿童进行了“虐待行为”，期间他向受害者赠送了大量礼物。受害者表示，这种虐待“摧毁了他”，并给他造成了“心理伤害”。最初，受害者向另一支警察部队报告了这一虐待事件，随后该案件于2021年转交给了埃文和萨默塞特警方处理。

在庭审过程中，陪审团得知埃克斯利会“慷慨”地给受害者送礼，试图以此“换取他的接受和沉默”。

埃文和萨默塞特警方的侦探本·特雷恩说：“迈克尔·埃克斯利所犯下的罪行完全背叛了信任，并且是对一个年轻且脆弱的受害者的权力滥用。”
english_item:
Michael Eckersley, from Warrington, was said to have lavished gifts on the child during his "campaign of abuse" which began in the 1980s in Wells, Somerset.
His victim, who cannot be named, said the abuse "broke him" and he had suffered "psychological damage".
The victim initially reported the abuse to another police force, before it was handed over to Avon and Somerset Police in 2021.
'Angry and heartbroken'During the trial, the jury heard Eckersley would "lavish" his victim with gifts, in an effort to "buy his acceptance and silence".
Det Con Ben Train from Avon and Somerset Police said: "The crimes committed by Michael Eckersley represent a complete betrayal of trust and an appalling abuse of power against a young and vulnerable victim.

chinese_item:
仅仅五年前，一升装的超市自有品牌橙汁售价仅为76便士。
然而，问题不仅仅局限于橙汁——追踪超市货架上各种其他食品的价格，你会发现类似的趋势。
因此，了解橙汁价格的变化可以让我们窥见整体食品账单为何突然变得如此昂贵。
浓缩橙汁是由美汁源商业化的。橙汁中近90%是水。
八月份，英格兰银行的一份报告指出，高食品价格通胀部分原因是这些规定导致的。
english_item:
Only five years ago, a typical supermarket own-label carton of orange juice could be bought for 76p for 1 litre.
Yet the problem is not isolated to orange juice - track the prices of all sorts of other groceries in supermarket aisles and you'll see a similar pattern.
And so understanding what has happened to orange juice offers a glimpse into how our overall grocery bills suddenly seem so expensive.
Hulton Archive/Getty Images Orange juice from concentrate was commercialised by Minute MaidOrange juice is nearly 90% water.
In August a Bank of England report said that high food price inflation is driven partly - and among other things - by these regulations.

chinese_item:
凯特·埃文斯警官告诉伍利奇刑事法院，这次受伤让她“剧痛难忍”。
科纳先生否认了另外一项对凯特·埃文斯警官造成严重身体伤害的指控。
埃文斯警官说，当时她正试图给其中一名女性被告戴上手铐，突然感到背部被“重重地”击打了一下。
埃文斯警官只记得被击中了一次，但她的同事彼得·亚当斯表示，他看到科纳先生两次用锤子击打了她的背部。
english_item:
Sgt Kate Evans told Woolwich Crown Court the injury left her with "severe pain".
'Massive shock'Mr Corner denies a further charge of causing grievous bodily harm to Sgt Kate Evans.
Sgt Evans said she was attempting to place handcuffs on one of the female defendants at the scene when she felt a "thud" on her back.
Sgt Evans said she recalled only one blow, but her colleague Peter Adams said he saw Mr Corner hit her on her back twice.
More on this story 'Palestine Action activist hit officer with hammer'

chinese_item:
风暴伯特本周末袭击了英国部分地区，带来了强降雨和大风——这种天气因气候变化而变得更加频繁。
至少有五人在此次风暴中丧生，洪水淹没了房屋，并对公路和铁路网络造成了严重影响。
随着英国各地的一些社区开始清理工作，乔纳·费舍尔解释了气候变化如何使极端天气更加可能，并探讨了未来可以采取哪些措施来更好地为国家做好准备。
摄像师：格温达夫·休斯。
english_item:
Storm Bert lashed parts of the UK this weekend with heavy rainfall and strong winds – weather made more likely by climate change.
At least five people died in the storm this weekend that flooded homes and brought major disruption to road and rail networks.
As some communities across the UK begin the clean-up process, Jonah Fisher explains how climate change makes extreme weather more likely, and explores what can be done to better prepare the country in the future.
Cameraman: Gwyndaf Hughes.

chinese_item: 北海油田的数千名工人被告知，如果他们想继续出海工作就必须减肥，否则可能会失去工作。据OEUK称，目前有超过2200名工人的体重超过了限制，在最坏的情况下可能会失去工作。一名海上工人菲尔·佩里告诉BBC苏格兰新闻，他正在努力减肥，但担心新规定生效后同事们可能会失业。OEUK表示，自2008年以来，海上工人的平均体重增加了近10公斤（约1.5英石）。实施安全体重限制的决定是在过去两年半的时间里由行业专家审查后做出的。
english_item:
Lose weight or lose your jobs, offshore workers told7 November 2025 Share Save Rebecca Curran , BBC Scotland and Ken Banks , North east Scotland reporter Share SaveGetty ImagesThousands of North Sea oil workers are being told they must lose weight if they are to keep flying offshore - or face losing their jobs.
OEUK said more than 2,200 workers were currently above the weight limit, and jobs could be lost in the worst case scenario.
One offshore worker, Phil Perry, told BBC Scotland News he was managing to lose weight - but was worried colleagues could lose their employment when the new rules come into force.
OEUK said the average weight of offshore workers had risen by almost 10kg (1.5st) since 2008.
The decision to implement a safe weight limit for offshore workers follows a review by industry experts over the past two-and-a half years.

chinese_item: 斯蒂芬·钱伯伦在2024年8月17日于剑桥郡斯特雷瑟姆A1123公路上发生的一起涉及沃克斯豪尔汽车的碰撞事故后三天，在医院去世。去年六月，在旧金山联邦法院的审判中，钱伯伦先生和林奇先生被判无罪。一份目击者陈述称，钱伯伦先生被抛到了“大约15英尺”的空中，“整个事件只持续了几秒钟”。验尸官询问马斯特斯先生是否认为这是一起无法避免的碰撞时，他回答说：“是的，没错。”验尸官最终裁定，钱伯伦先生死于交通事故。
english_item:
Stephen Chamberlain died in hospital three days after a collision involving a Vauxhall car on the A1123 at Stretham in Cambridgeshire on 17 August 2024.
Mr Chamberlain and Mr Lynch were found not guilty of the charge in June last year following a trial at a federal court in San Francisco.
A witness statement said Mr Chamberlain was thrown "approximately 15ft" in the air and "the entire incident must have been a matter of seconds".
Asked by the coroner if it was his view that it was not an avoidable collision, Mr Masters replied: "Yes, that's correct".
The coroner concluded that Mr Chamberlain died as the result of a road traffic collision.

chinese_item:
工党现在陷入了多大的麻烦——首相是否是合适的人选？
“你还需要看到多少数据点才能明白，他真的不擅长当首相？”
盖蒂图片社的数据显示，工党内每个人都厌倦了几个月来令人震惊的民调结果。
坦率地说，首相的位置也因为没有共识谁比他更适合这个职位而得到了保护。
一位高层人士毫不愉快地总结了当前的情况——关于更换工党领袖的讨论“既是疯狂的，也是真实的”。
english_item:
How much trouble is Labour in - and is the PM the right man for the job?
"How many more data points do you need to see that he is just not very good at being prime minister?"
Getty ImagesEveryone in the Labour party is fed up with months of shocking polls.
The prime minister's position is also, frankly, protected by the fact there is no consensus about who could do a better job than him.
One senior figure sums up the situation with no pleasure – discussion about changing the Labour leader "is both lunatic, and real".

chinese_item:
凯瑟琳和女王在停战纪念日敬献花圈，全国缅怀11月11日 2025年 分享 保存 詹姆斯·格雷戈里 分享 保存观看：威尔士王妃在国家纪念林园敬献花圈威尔士王妃和女王参加了英国的停战纪念日活动，同时世界各地也举行了相关纪念仪式。
凯瑟琳出席了斯塔福德郡国家纪念林园的仪式，在那里，《最后岗位》号声响起，标志着格林尼治时间上午11点开始全国两分钟默哀，以纪念第一次世界大战结束。
卡米拉女王则乘坐火车前往伦敦帕丁顿车站参加敬献花圈仪式。
这是凯瑟琳首次参加国家纪念林园的纪念仪式。
卡米拉女王与通勤者一同乘坐从威尔特郡奇彭纳姆出发的09:28列车前往帕丁顿，在那里为军人及其家属举行了一场纪念仪式。
english_item:
Catherine and Queen lay Armistice Day wreaths as nation pays tribute11 November 2025 Share Save James Gregory Share SaveWatch: Princess of Wales lays wreath at National Memorial ArboretumThe Princess of Wales and the Queen have joined services to mark Armistice Day in the UK as events took place around the world.
Catherine stood at the ceremony at the National Memorial Arboretum in Staffordshire, where the Last Post signalled the start of a national two-minute silence at 11:00 GMT to mark the end of World War One.
Queen Camilla was at Paddington Station in London for the wreath-laying ceremony, having travelled by train.
ReutersIt was the first time Catherine had attended the service at the National Memorial Arboretum.
Queen Camilla joined commuters on the 09:28 train from Chippenham in Wiltshire to Paddington where a service was held for service personnel and their families.

chinese_item:
埃德·米利班德暗示政府正在考虑降低能源账单的增值税率。面对减少家庭能源开支的压力，工党在选举前曾承诺到2030年将平均账单降低300英镑每年。
根据慈善机构Nesta的数据，取消家庭能源账单的增值税可以为普通家庭每年节省86英镑，但实施这一措施预计每年将花费约25亿英镑。
BBC了解到，这可能还包括减少目前加在能源账单上的一些监管附加费。
影子能源大臣克莱尔·库蒂尼奥表示，她的政党计划将每个人的电费降低20%。
english_item:
Ed Miliband hints at cut to VAT on energy bills19 October 2025 Share Save Becky Morton Political reporter Share SaveBBCThe government is looking at the possibility of cutting the rate of VAT on energy bills, Ed Miliband has suggested.
The government is under pressure to reduce household energy costs and before the election Labour pledged to lower average bills by ￡300 a year by 2030.
Scrapping VAT on domestic energy bills would save the average household ￡86 per year and cost an estimated ￡2.5bn per year to implement, according to the charity Nesta.
The BBC understands this could also include reducing some of the regulatory levies currently added to energy bills.
Shadow energy secretary Claire Coutinho said her party's plans would cut electricity bills for everyone by 20%.

chinese_item:
政府将启动一项针对越来越多的年轻人既不工作也不上学现象的独立审查。前工党卫生大臣艾伦·米尔本将领导这项针对“尼特族”（指那些不在教育、就业或培训中的年轻人）的调查。

这并不是一个新问题，但近年来，这类年轻人的数量——现在是每八个中就有一个——一直在增加，并接近一百万。其中四分之一的人表示长期疾病或残疾是障碍，而且申请健康和残疾福利的人数也在上升。

政府表示，艾伦·米尔本的审查将深入探讨这一增长背后的原因，并研究减少青年人口不活跃带来的长期成本的方法，帮助年轻人脱离福利并进入工作岗位。
english_item:
Inquiry to review rise in young people not working or studying9 November 2025 Share Save Ben Wright , BBC Political Correspondent and Tabby Wilson Share SaveGetty ImagesAn independent review into the rising number of young people not working or studying is being launched by the government.
Former Labour Health Secretary Alan Milburn will lead the inquiry into "Neets" - the acronym for young people who are not in education, employment or training.
It is not a new problem but the number of young people who are Neet - now one in eight - has been rising in recent years and is approaching one million.
A quarter cite long-term sickness or disability as a barrier and the number claiming health and disability benefits is rising too.
The government says Alan Milburn's review will dig into the reasons behind the rise and examine ways of cutting the long-term costs of youth inactivity and getting young people off benefits and into work.

chinese_item:
酒吧里听到的对话

*莫斯科骡子：*等等。莱斯特不是你的真名？

*可乐朗姆：*我可没说过那是。

*莫斯科骡子：*莱斯。

*可乐朗姆：*莱斯利的简称。

*莫斯科骡子：*我的脑子要炸了。

*可乐朗姆：*这是个老姓氏。我们家大概有十二个莱斯利。我小时候，我爸在一家公司做采购。销售人员总是巴结他，还给我姐妹俩带礼物。他们会给我带娃娃和茶具，以为我是个女孩。我受够了。就改名叫莱斯了。再也没改回去。
english_item:
Conversation overheard at the bar
*Moscow Mule:* Hold it. Lester’s not your real name? 



*Coke and Rum:* I never said it was. 



*Moscow Mule:* Les. 



*Coke and Rum:* Short for Leslie. 


*Moscow Mule:* My mind is exploding. 



*Coke and Rum:* It’s an old family name. We’ve probably got twelve Leslie’s in our lineage. But my dad was a buyer for a company growing up. People selling were always sucking up to him and they’d bring gifts for my sisters and I. They’d bring me dolls and tea sets assuming I was a girl. I got sick of it. Changed to Les. Never went back.

chinese_item:
真高兴是劳动节长周末！

我穿着短裤出门，完全忘了我从四月份就没刮过腿毛了。

我真想回家换条长裤（因为腿毛多，我平时都穿长裤），但我告诉自己可以的。

我只需要去朋友家的路上顺便去趟超市买点东西就行了。

车开进停车场，看到几乎空无一人，我真是松了一口气。
