chinese_item: 今天，老板感谢我一直以来“可靠”，之后我向她坦白说我焦虑症很严重，害怕让她失望，最终丢掉工作。即使她向我保证她绝不会那样做，那种感觉依然挥之不去。我想我需要接受心理治疗。
english_item: Today, after my boss thanked me for being so reliable all the time, I confessed to her that I have really bad anxiety, which has given me a crippling fear of disappointing her and ending up jobless. Even after reassuring me that she would never do that, the feeling is still there. I think I need therapy.

chinese_item: 今天，我在Facebook上给一个女孩发了条友好的开场白。她回复说：“我知道你们这种人是什么样的。哦，还有，五条信息之后就邀请我约会？想都别想。”
english_item: Today, I sent a girl a friendly conversation starter on Facebook. She replied, I know what you guys are like. Oh, and that invitation to a date in about 5 messages time? Not a chance.

chinese_item: 今天我见到了我哥哥的女朋友。我们聊了起来，然后就聊到了纹身。我说我有多讨厌那种腰部纹身，觉得它们会让女孩看起来很俗气。她问：“像这样吗？”然后给我看了她的纹身。
english_item: Today, I met my brother's girlfriend. We got talking, and we got onto the subject of tattoos. I said how much I hated tramp stamps, and how they make girls look trashy. She said, Like this? and showed me hers.

chinese_item: 我已经卧床两周了，一直都是得了流感。我男朋友只是因为我没洗衣服才开始担心，他怕自己连续两天穿着同样的衣服去公司对面的咖啡店，那里的女孩们会怎么想。
english_item: Today, I've been bedridden with the flu for two weeks. My boyfriend only got concerned because I haven't done any laundry, and was worried about what the girls at the coffee shop across from work would think if he turned up wearing the same clothes two days in a row.

chinese_item: 今天，这已经是连续第五周了，我爸又开始闷闷不乐，动不动就发脾气，因为他那个神经病女友不跟他说话。他现在还说他的人生完了。我感觉自己像是被一个十几岁的女孩养大的。
english_item: Today, and for the fifth week in a row, my dad has been moping around and acting pissy about everything because his psycho girlfriend won't talk to him. He now claims his life is over. I'm being raised by a teenage girl.

chinese_item: 今天，我妈把我锁在门外了。为什么？她说她和狗需要单独谈谈。
english_item: Today, my mother locked me out of the house. Why? The dog and her needed some time to talk.

chinese_item: 今天，自从几年前我捡到一些金币——虽然没什么值得大惊小怪的，但足够帮我父母还清房贷——之后，某个已经是百万富翁的地主混蛋现在声称我捡到金币的湖是他的，还起诉我，要我赔偿金币的全部价值。如果我败诉，我父母可能就得卖房子了。
english_item: Today, after I found gold coins a few years ago, nothing newsworthy but enough to pay off my parents' mortgage, some landowning douche, who is already a millionaire, is now claiming the lake where I found the coins is his, and is suing me for the coins' full value. If I lose in court, my parents may have to sell their house.

chinese_item: 今天，我和男朋友分手了，因为我意识到我们根本不合适。他说他一直都知道，但他觉得我“很适合做家务”。
english_item: Today, I broke up with my boyfriend after concluding we're not compatible at all. He said he knew it all along, but he thought I was good for all the house stuff.

chinese_item: 今天我和女朋友去山里徒步。她没告诉我她把肉放在我的包里准备做饭。出发大约两个小时后，一只狼袭击了我，但我用辣椒喷雾喷了它，它就跑了。之后我女朋友看着我说：“你没必要伤害那只狗。”
english_item: Today, my girlfriend and I went hiking in the mountains. She didn't tell me that she had packed meat to cook in my bag. About two hours after we set out, a wolf attacked me but I pepper sprayed it and it ran off. After that my girlfriend looked at me and said You didn't have to hurt the doggy.

chinese_item: 今天，我父母带我去酒吧庆祝我21岁生日。他们带了我的弟弟，但是保安不让他进去，所以他们让我陪着弟弟在外面等，自己进去喝酒。
english_item: Today, my parents took me to a bar to celebrate my 21st birthday. They brought my little brother, but when the bouncer wouldn't allow him in, they made me wait outside with him while they went in for drinks.

chinese_item: 今天我买了部新手机。它防震、防水，什么都防。就是防不了小猫。400美元就这么打了水漂。
english_item: Today, I bought a new phone. It's shock proof, water proof, you name it. Just not kitten proof, it seems. That's $400 down the drain.

chinese_item: 如今，我的伴侣更关心的是喝酒和看电视，而不是她的孩子和宠物。
english_item: Today, my significant other cares more about her drink and the TV than her kids and pets.

chinese_item: 今天，我躺在床上，正想着自己的事，妈妈突然进了房间。几周前，男朋友向我求婚了，妈妈进来告诉我，男朋友的妈妈打电话来了。原来，他从她抽屉里偷走了订婚戒指。
english_item: Today, I was lying in bed minding my own business when my mom entered the room. I was proposed to a few weeks ago by my boyfriend, and my mom came in to tell me that my boyfriend's mom was on the phone. Turns out, he stole the engagement ring from her drawer.

chinese_item: 今天，我的父母因为我看书而不是像其他家人一样看电视而训斥了我，因为他们认为看书是“反社会的”。
english_item: Today, my parents told me off for reading, as opposed to watching TV like the rest of the family, because it was "anti-social".

chinese_item: 今天，我和经理聊起了我们新招的一位员工，我和他相处得挺融洽。经理对这位新员工的工作表现很满意，但对他和同事们的互动不太满意。嗯……这都是我的错。我的失误。
english_item: Today, my manager and I were talking about one of our new hires, who I have been getting on well with already. My manager is happy with the newbie's work, but not with their interactions with our coworkers. Yeah… that's on me. My bad.

chinese_item: 今天，我姐姐被解雇了，我升职接替了她的职位，还涨了不少工资。我和姐姐的关系从此彻底改变了。
english_item: Today, my sister got fired and I got promoted to her job, got a nice payrise for it. My relationship with my sister will never be the same again.

chinese_item: 今天，我参加一个重要的会议迟到了20分钟，谎称找不到钥匙。其实钥匙一直都在我手里，直到我伸手去拉门把手的时候才发现。所有人都看到我停在半空中，难以置信地盯着自己的手。
english_item: Today, I showed up to an important meeting 20 minutes late, claiming I couldn't find my keys. They were in my hand the whole time, and I realized it just as I reached for the doorknob. Everyone saw me pause mid-step, staring at my hand in disbelief.

chinese_item: 今天，直到他脑子里长了个肿瘤，我丈夫以前总是很开心。从那以后，他慢慢变成了一个郁郁寡欢的家伙。医生说，那个肿瘤扰乱了他的大脑，让他产生了一种虚假的快乐，所以他现在其实已经恢复正常了。肿瘤只有半颗豌豆那么大，而且是良性的，所以他本来可以保留它的。
english_item: Today, and until he had a tumour removed from his brain, my husband used to be happy. Since then he's slowly turned into a miserable bastard. According to the doctor, the tumour messed with his brain to make him artificially happy, so he's actually back to normal. It was the size of half a pea and benign, so he could have kept it.

chinese_item: 今天我和暗恋对象一起出去玩，想看看他对我的看法。我没有直接问他，而是拽了拽自己的衬衫，说：“我不知道我为什么要穿这件上衣。我穿这件衣服总是显得很丑。” 他说：“你是想听我开个关于我身材的玩笑吗？”
english_item: Today, I was hanging out with my crush and wanted to see what he thought of me. Instead of asking him straight, I tugged at my shirt, saying ''I don't know why I wear this top. I always look awful in it. He said, Are you fishing for a fat joke?

chinese_item: 今天我没去参加奶奶的70岁生日派对。我患有自闭症，而且听力障碍，听力异常敏感，听觉异常亢奋，所以我实在无法忍受派对上的嘈杂。现在，奶奶以为我恨她，因为我把自己的心理健康放在第一位。
english_item: Today, I skipped out on my grandmother's 70th birthday party. I'm autistic, and I have a hearing disorder that significantly enhances my hearing to a painful extent, so I couldn't tolerate how noisy it was. Now, my grandmother thinks I hate her because I put my mental health first.

chinese_item: 今天我才知道，我面试表现得糟透了，甚至连拒信都没收到。
english_item: Today, I found out I did so horrible during my interview that I didn’t even get a rejection email.

chinese_item: 今天，我把圣诞包装纸套在了旧书和我已有的东西上，因为我意识到这是我今年能在圣诞树下收到礼物的唯一办法。
english_item: Today, I put Christmas wrapping on old books and things I already own, because I realized that it's the only way I'll have anything under the tree this year.

chinese_item: 今天，我爸妈帮我搬家。唯一一个突然弹开的箱子是装避孕套和大量卫生纸的。我爸搬箱子的时候，避孕套和卫生纸撒了一地。我妈把它们捡了起来。
english_item: Today, my parents were helping me move flats. The only box to spring open was the box containing condoms and copious amounts of napkins for clean up. They spilled all over the road as my dad was carrying it. My mum picked them up.

chinese_item: 今天，我丈夫在浏览一个减肥手术网站，我问他在看什么。他说：“哦，是你的周年纪念礼物。惊喜！”他可不是开玩笑。我礼貌地拒绝了他的礼物后，他生气了，然后气呼呼地说：“你知道吗，你不喜欢我送你的东西，我真的很难过。”
english_item: Today, my husband was looking at a bariatric surgery website and asked him what he was reading. He said, Oh, your anniversary gift. Surprise! He wasn't kidding. He got mad when I politely declined his gift, then angrily said You know, it really hurts when you don't like the things I get you.

chinese_item: 今天，我爸爸让我退出网课，回到公立学校上课，因为显然我玩电脑的时候，他的电子游戏就会卡顿。
english_item: Today, my dad made me quit my online school classes and go back to public school, because apparently when I'm on the computer, it makes his video games lag.

chinese_item: 今天我在一家夜店的吧台工作。给一个男的上了酒之后，他问我能不能把酒端出去给两个等着他的女孩。我瞪了他一眼，告诉他我不是服务员。这时我才发现他只有一只胳膊。
english_item: Today, I was working behind the bar at a club. After serving drinks to a guy, he asked me if I could carry them outside to the two girls waiting for him. I scowled at him and told him I wasn't a waitress. That's when I realised he had one arm.

chinese_item: 今天我在收银台上班，一个男人叫我“超市奴隶”。我差点生气了，但转念一想我的工资，我就觉得自己像个超市奴隶。
english_item: Today, I was at my job as a cashier when a man called me his "Grocery Slave." I was almost offended, but then I thought about my salary. I am a Grocery Slave.

chinese_item: 今天我去洗手间，锁上了隔间的门，结果还是被人闯了进来。这已经是这周第八次发生这种事了，好几个人都觉得我蠢到连门都不会锁。
english_item: Today, I went to the bathroom. I locked the stall door, but got walked in on anyway. This is the eighth time this has happened this week, and multiple people think I’m just too stupid to lock the door.

chinese_item: 今天，我提醒美术课上的一个女生使用美工刀时要小心，因为她不小心把手指割伤了，而且割得很厉害。话音刚落，我就被美工刀割破了手指。
english_item: Today, I was warning a girl in my art class to be careful with a Stanley knife, as she had managed to cut her finger quite badly. Just as I said it, I sliced my finger open with a Stanley knife.

chinese_item: 如今，我丈夫年纪越大，就越没教养。家里有客人时，我不得不提醒他穿上裤子；吃饭时，他竟然在餐桌上抠肚脐眼。
english_item: Today, my husband is becoming more uncivilised the older he gets, as I had to remind him to put trousers on while we have guests in the house, and over dinner he was picking his belly button at the table.

chinese_item: 今天我特别兴奋，因为我从大一就喜欢的那个女生约我出去。她来我家，结果我妈给她看了我小时候的照片，照片里我鼻子里塞着卫生棉条，因为我当时流鼻血了。更糟糕的是，还有一张我15岁的时候也做了同样的事。
english_item: Today, I was really excited because the girl I'd liked since freshman year asked me out. She came to my house and my mom decided to show her baby pictures of me with tampons up my nose because I'd had a nose bleed. Even worse, there was one picture of me when I was 15 doing the same thing.

chinese_item: 今天，我的一位前同事去世了。他是一位和蔼可亲、充满爱心、鼓舞人心的人，我一直很敬重他。我丈夫安慰他的方式是：“老人都会死，别太在意。”
english_item: Today, a man I once worked with passed away. He was a lovely, caring, and inspirational person whom I looked up to. My husband's form of consolation? Old people die. Get over it.

chinese_item: 今天，我在爷爷的葬礼上不小心放了个屁，我表弟笑得前仰后合。这引发了一连串的笑声，其他堂兄弟姐妹和我的兄弟姐妹也都跟着笑了起来。现在我的姑姑们都不想跟我们说话了。
english_item: Today, I accidentally farted in the middle of my grandfather's funeral and my cousin started cracking up. It caused a chain reaction of laughter throughout all of the other cousins and my siblings. Now my aunts won't speak to any of us.

chinese_item: 今天，我交往两年的男朋友因为太紧张不敢自己向我求婚，就请他的朋友代他向我求婚。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend of two years asked his friend to propose to me for him, because he was too nervous to do it himself.

chinese_item: 今天我给男朋友发短信，他假装自己是汉堡王的员工，捡到了一部丢失的手机，这样就不用跟我说话了。
english_item: Today, I texted my boyfriend, and he pretended he was a Burger King employee who found a lost phone, just so that he wouldn't have to talk to me.

chinese_item: 今天我去看了一场音乐剧。剧中播放了一首新歌，我觉得似曾相识，觉得好像以前听过。我随着歌曲的进行轻轻地跟着哼唱，确信自己听过这首歌。期待着下一段副歌，我放声高歌。结果，这首歌是纯音乐。
english_item: Today, I attended a musical. A new song was played, and I thought I'd heard it before because it sounded strangely familiar. I sang along quietly as the song progressed, positive I knew it. Anticipating the next chorus, I belted out the lyrics with all my heart. It was instrumental.

chinese_item: 今天，我和男朋友跟他家人一起去玩迷你高尔夫。我们比赛打球，当我连续两次一杆进洞时，他开始生气，嘟囔着说我离恢复单身不远了。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend and I went mini golfing with his family. We had a competition going on, and when I managed to get two consecutive holes in one, he started seething and muttered that I'm dangerously close to becoming single.

chinese_item: 今天，我父母接到英语老师的电话。她说我因为逃课被留校14天。我每天都去上课，但她显然没注意到我。
english_item: Today, my parents got a call from my English teacher. She told them that I have 14 days of detention because I've been cutting class. I've been there every day, but apparently she never noticed me.

chinese_item: 今天是我父亲的婚礼。他其实不太在意我，而且他的未婚妻和我同龄，但我还是觉得如果我去的话，他会很感动。我本来应该在婚礼前一天等他打电话告诉我路线和时间的。但他一直没打来。
english_item: Today, it was my father's wedding. He never really cared for me, and his fiancée is my age, but I thought it would mean a lot to him if I went. I was supposed to wait for his call the day before, so he would give me directions and tell me when it starts. He never called.

chinese_item: 今天，在女友连续几周催我浪漫一下之后，我决定为我们准备一个浪漫的泡澡，还放了精油浴珠。准备泡澡的时候，她把手伸进水里，说她不想泡，因为“感觉黏糊糊的”。我只好独自享受了浪漫的泡澡。
english_item: Today, after weeks of my girlfriend telling me to be romantic, I decided to make a romantic bath for us, complete with oil bath beads. After we get ready to take the bath, she puts her hand in the water and says she won't get it because 'it feels slimy'. I enjoyed a romantic bath alone.

chinese_item: 今天，我问妈妈能不能和朋友们一起去学防身术。妈妈说我不需要，因为我的脸就是最好的武器，能吓退任何人。
english_item: Today, I asked my mom if I could join my friends in getting lessons in self defense. My mom told me that I didn't need them because my face was a better weapon to repel anyone.

chinese_item: 今天，我交往了六个月的男朋友因为“厌倦了同时取悦两个女人”而和他在《侠盗猎车手》里的女朋友分手了。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend of six months dumped me for his girlfriend on Grand Theft Auto because he was tired of having to please two women at once.

chinese_item: 今天，我带了一个纸杯蛋糕到学校给我朋友过生日。她只咬了一口就惊呼这是她吃过最难吃的东西，还说我们应该起诉卖蛋糕的那家店。蛋糕是我自己烤的。
english_item: Today, I brought a cupcake to school for my friend's birthday. After taking one bite, she exclaimed that it was the worst thing she had ever tasted and that we should sue the store that I bought it from. I baked it myself.

chinese_item: 今天，我在等红灯时被一个边开车边化妆的女人追尾了。她直到完美地画完唇线和唇彩后才下车来看我是否安好。
english_item: Today, I got rear-ended at a stoplight by a woman who had been doing her make-up while driving. She didn't get out to see if I was okay until she had finished perfectly applying both lipliner and gloss.

chinese_item: 今天，我开了四个小时的车去看我交往一年的女朋友，她让我陪她住几天。我到的时候，她告诉我她喜欢上了别人，只想和我做朋友，但她希望我能留下来陪她几天，这样我们就可以一起培养友谊。
english_item: Today, I drove 4 hours to see my girlfriend of a year, as she had asked me to stay with her for a few days. When I arrived she told me she wanted to be friends as she liked someone else, but wanted me to stay the few days so we could work on being friends.

chinese_item: 今天，在还清两年的事故保险费后，我又被追尾了。肇事司机还是上次撞我的那个人。
english_item: Today, after 2 years of paying off the insurance fees after an accident, I got rear-ended. It was the same driver who crashed into me the first time.

chinese_item: 今天我跟技术支持通了一个多小时的电话，越来越恼火。好不容易问题解决了，我本以为已经挂断了电话，却讽刺地说：“谢谢你，天才，真是帮了大忙。”结果发现我还没挂。那位技术人员冷冷地回答说：“不客气，天才。”
english_item: Today, I was on the phone with tech support for over an hour, getting increasingly frustrated. After finally fixing the issue, I sarcastically said, Thanks for nothing, genius, thinking I'd hung up the call. Turns out, I hadn’t. The tech guy coolly replied, You’re welcome, genius.

chinese_item: 今天我正准备洗澡的时候脚下一滑，摔晕了过去。醒来的时候有人在敲门。原来是个警察，来查看我是否安好。我问他怎么知道要来的，他说是一位“匿名男邻居”通知的。看来我家有偷窥狂了。
english_item: Today, I slipped as I was about to take a shower, knocking myself out cold. I woke up to someone banging on my door. It was a cop checking to see if I was okay. When I asked how he knew to come, he said he was notified by a male neighbor who called anonymously. I guess I have a peeping Tom.

chinese_item: 今天，我和男朋友一起看一个关于野生动物的电视节目。当旁白提到“孔雀”这个词时，他突然歇斯底里地大笑起来。他笑到眼泪都出来了，不得不找个借口离开。我这是在和一个巨婴谈恋爱吗？
english_item: Today, my boyfriend and I were watching a TV show about wildlife. The moment the narrator said the word peacock, my boyfriend broke down into hysterical laughter. He laughed to the point of tears, and had to excuse himself. I'm dating a man-child.

chinese_item: 今天是我告诉丈夫我有多讨厌“孩子的妈妈”这个词的第四天。也是他开始叫我“我孩子的妈妈”的第四天。我们甚至都没有孩子。
english_item: Today, it's been four days since I told my husband how much I dislike the term baby mama. It's also been four days since he started calling me my baby mama. We don't even have kids.

chinese_item: 今天凌晨一点我回家，发现我妈坐在我家沙发上，大声嚷嚷我不应该熬夜。我都26岁了，真不知道她是怎么进到我家来的。
english_item: Today, I came home at 1 am to find my mom sitting on my couch, ranting about how I'm not supposed to stay up this late. I'm 26 and I don't know how she got into my house.

chinese_item: 今天，我的家人还在劝我“放下”我姑婆的去世。这位姑婆总是送我最棒的生日礼物，也是我见过最和蔼可亲的人之一，可我却不被允许为她的离世感到悲伤。对了，她去世的那天正好是我的生日。
english_item: Today, my family is still telling me to get over the death of my great aunt. The great aunt who always gave the most wonderful birthday gifts, and was overall one of the most pleasant people I've ever met, and I'm NOT allowed to be sad that she's gone. Did I mention she died on my birthday?

chinese_item: 今天我需要打电话给我妈问点事，就用我的工作电话拨了她的号码。结果不到两秒钟，我的手机就响了。我当时特别生气，因为我最讨厌别人在上班时间打我手机。是我自己打的，我拨错了号码。
english_item: Today, I needed to call my mom to get some info so I dialled the number on my work phone. Not 2 seconds after, my cellphone rang. I got super pissed off because I hate when people call me on my cell at work. It was me. I'd dialled my own number.

chinese_item: 今天我和哥哥在Skype上聊天。我刚念完一个超好笑的笑话，他突然说他女朋友劈腿了。我忍不住哈哈大笑，之后他就一直不接我电话。
english_item: Today, I was chatting to my brother on Skype. Out of the blue, and just as I read the punchline to a hilarious joke, he said his girlfriend had been cheating on him. I couldn't stifle my side-splitting laughter, and he's been ignoring my calls since.

chinese_item: 今天，我无数次梦见自己回到高中，每天早上醒来都觉得我已经完成了两遍学业，而且我的所有朋友都还在。
english_item: Today, I’ve dreamt of going back to high school so many times, every morning I wake up thinking I finished it twice and still have all my friends.

chinese_item: 今天，我接到一个知名乐团的电话，邀请我加入他们。他们对我还在读高中这一点特别感兴趣。我打电话过去表示接受，结果却发现我妈妈已经替我拒绝了，因为我的GPA“只有”3.7。
english_item: Today, I got a call from a prominent orchestra asking me to play with them. They were especially interested because I'm still in high school. I called to accept only to find out that my mother had already declined the offer for me because I only have a 3.7.

chinese_item: 今天，我和妈妈要去商店。她进去的时候，我待在车里。旁边车里的驾驶座上有一只狗，正冲着我叫。我闲着没事，也跟着叫了几声，直到我意识到副驾驶座上有人在看着我。
english_item: Today, my mom and I were going to the store. I stayed in the car while she went in. In the car next to me, there was a dog in the driver's seat barking at me. Bored, I barked back at it until I realized there was someone in the passenger's seat watching me.

chinese_item: 今天我参加了高中同学聚会，对自己的健身成果感到非常满意。我容光焕发，准备重温昔日荣光，结果却和一个我不认识的人聊了起来。他不得不提醒我，我们曾经一起上过两年的化学课。我完全不知道他是谁。
english_item: Today, I attended my high school reunion and was feeling good about the gym progress I’d made. Looking fabulous, I was ready to relive my glory days when I got into a conversation with someone I didn’t recognize. He had to remind me that we were in the same chemistry class for two years. I had no idea who he was.

chinese_item: 今天，我们开了六个小时的车才到度假小屋，结果发现我女朋友把行李箱落下了。她很不高兴，就让我开车六个小时回她公寓去拿。等我到了她公寓，才发现她公寓的钥匙还放在她六个小时前在度假小屋的包里。
english_item: Today, we drove six hours to get to our holiday cottage only to realise that my girlfriend had forgotten her suitcase. This put her in a bad mood, so she made ME drive six hours back to her flat to get it, then when I got there, I realised HER keys to HER FLAT were still in HER handbag six hours back at the cottage.

chinese_item: 今天是我和女友交往两周年半的纪念日，虽然是个小小的纪念日，但却意义非凡。她给了我一个惊喜，她亲手制作了一盘三重巧克力双倍薄荷曲奇，上面还撒满了安第斯薄荷糖。而我则给了她一个惊喜——我把她新买的野马跑车撞到了水泥隔离带上。
english_item: Today, it was my two-and-a-half year anniversary with my girlfriend, a small but noble occasion. She surprised me with an invention of hers, a plate of triple-chocolate double-mint cookies topped with Andes mints. I surprised her by crashing her new Mustang into a cement divider.

chinese_item: 今天，戒酒25年后，我终于戒了。不值得。我的生活和身边的人依然糟糕透顶。所以我又开始喝酒了。
english_item: Today, after 25 years, I quit drinking. It wasn’t worth it. My life and everyone around me still sucked. So I started up again.

chinese_item: 今天，我妈妈在Facebook上发布了我分娩的视频。
english_item: Today, my mother posted a video of me giving birth, on Facebook.

chinese_item: 今天我上班迟到了，只好打车。司机告诉我他最近试图自杀。我听他讲了20分钟，坐在公司外面，没打表。他收了我5.80英镑，老板警告我迟到。
english_item: Today, I was late for work and took a taxi. The driver told me he tried to commit suicide recently. I listened to him for 20 minutes, sat outside my workplace with the meter off. He charged me ￡5.80 and my boss gave me a warning for being late.

chinese_item: 今天，我妈跟我女朋友讲了一件关于我的糗事，大概意思是说，每次爸妈带我去买校服，我都会哭，因为我讨厌他们给我的所有选择。最近一次发生这种事？去年。我今年18岁。
english_item: Today, my mom told my girlfriend an embarrassing story about me, along the lines of whenever my parents would take me school clothes shopping, I'd cry because I hated all the choices they gave me. The most recent incident of this? Last year. I'm 18.

chinese_item: 今天，我问一个男的能不能帮我买包烟，因为我还没满18岁。他拿了我的钱，进了超市，然后肯定是从侧门溜出去了，因为他再也没回来。
english_item: Today, I asked a guy if he could buy me a pack of cigarettes, since I'm still under 18. He took my money, went into the supermarket, and must have slipped out a side-entrance, because he never came back.

chinese_item: 今天我撞到了一辆停着的车。碰巧那是我驾校教练的车。当时他正坐在副驾驶座上指导我。我觉得我考不过了。
english_item: Today, I hit a parked car. It happened to be my driving instructor's car. While he was instructing me, sitting in the passenger seat. I don't think I'll pass.

chinese_item: 今天，我丈夫把所有家具都往左边挪了几英寸，因为他在网上看到这样会让在家里走动变得非常困难，所以他想亲自试试。不幸的是，真正体验的人是我；我回到家，刚坐下，就撞到茶几上，摔断了两个脚趾头。
english_item: Today, my husband moved all the furniture a few inches to the left because he saw online that it makes moving around the house really difficult, and he wanted to test it out. Unfortunately, the one who tested it out was me; I got home, went to sit down, and broke 2 toes on the coffee table.

chinese_item: 今天，我发现我妈妈会画画，而且在我告诉她我是无神论者后不久，我就被画成了撒旦。
english_item: Today, I found out that my mom paints, and that I was artistically represented in a painting, as Satan, in a painting made shortly after I told her that I was an atheist.

chinese_item: 今天，我亲眼看到经理把一整盘顾客投诉信都没看就直接倒进了回收箱。这至少解释了为什么我们一直都是“本地区顾客满意度最高的门店”。现在我不知道该如何面对眼前发生的一切。
english_item: Today, I watched my manager take his entire in tray of customer complaints and tip them straight into the recycling without reading them. At least this explains why we are consistently the “best store in the region for customer satisfaction.” Now I don’t know what to do about what I saw

chinese_item: 今天我和一个我很喜欢的男生约会。约会本来很顺利，直到他突然想用我的头发来剔牙。
english_item: Today, I went on a date with a guy I really liked. The date was going great until he decided to try flossing his teeth with my hair.

chinese_item: 今天我在健身做跳箱练习。我朋友觉得好玩，在我跳上箱子的时候把箱子踢开了。现在我两颗牙都崩掉了。
english_item: Today, I was working out and doing box jumps. My friend thought it would be funny to kick the box aside as I tried to jump onto it. Now I have 2 broken teeth.

chinese_item: 今天，我和男朋友去看了泰勒·斯威夫特的演唱会。演唱会现场立了个牌子，上面写着“喜欢乡村男孩就尖叫”。我男朋友看了一眼就尖叫起来。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend and I went to a Taylor Swift concert. At the concert they put up a sign that said "Scream if you love country boys." My boyfriend took one look at it and started screaming.

chinese_item: 今天情人节，我送了我男朋友一个价值300美元的保温箱。我问他送了我什么，他指了指我的肚子。我已经怀孕三个月了，怀的是他的孩子。
english_item: Today, I gave my boyfriend a $300 cooler for Valentine's Day. When I asked what he got me, he pointed at my stomach. I'm 3 months pregnant with his baby.

chinese_item: 今天，我正在沙发上打盹儿，我两岁的女儿突然觉得爸爸需要掏耳朵。她笨手笨脚地用棉签戳破了我的耳膜。现在我听不见她过来了。
english_item: Today, I was taking a nap on the couch when my 2 year old daughter decided that daddy needed an ear cleaning. With all the grace of toddler-hood, she stabbed me in the eardrum with a Q-tip. Now I can't hear her coming.

chinese_item: 今天，男朋友带我去了一个惊喜约会，目的地未知。我精心打扮，他穿了燕尾服。我们去了麦当劳。
english_item: Today, my boyfriend took me on a surprise date, destination unknown. I dressed up, he had a tux on. We went to McDonalds.

chinese_item: 今天我去一位教授的实验室面试。他看起来是一位非常和蔼可亲、慈祥和蔼的老先生。我们起身去参观实验室，他张开双臂迎接我……于是我上前拥抱了他。结果发现他只是示意我先进去。
english_item: Today, I had an interview for a job in a professor's lab. He seemed like a really nice, grandfatherly old guy. We got up to go take a look around the lab, and he held out his arms really wide to me… so I went in for a hug. Turns out he was just gesturing for me to go through the door first.

chinese_item: 今天我和爸爸一起去超市。他放了一个很轻但极其恶臭的屁。后面的人都开始干呕，于是他转过身，指着我说：“那是我女儿放的。”
english_item: Today, I was at the grocery store with my dad. He let out a very silent but foul abomination of a fart. The people behind us started gagging, so he turned, pointed at me and said, "That was my daughter.

chinese_item: 今天，我的父母告诉我，他们与上帝的关系比他们与我的关系更重要。
english_item: Today, I was informed by my parents that their relationship with God is more important than their relationship with me.

chinese_item: 今天我穿了一套新衣服，拍了很多自拍，然后把最满意的一张发到了Instagram上。十分钟后，我奶奶评论说：“你看上去很累。你吃饱了吗？”
english_item: Today, I put on a new outfit, took a bunch of selfies, and posted the best one to Instagram. Ten minutes later, my grandma commented, “You look tired. Are you eating enough?”

chinese_item: 今天，我不得不使用和哄我2岁的孩子刷牙一样的技巧来哄我24岁的丈夫刷牙。
english_item: Today, I have to use the same techniques to trick my 24-year-old husband into brushing his teeth, as I do my 2-year-old.

chinese_item: 今天，我女儿哭着回家，因为一个大学男生竟然“胆敢”（没错，就是“胆敢”）拒绝了她。她开始大发雷霆，说他“声称自己有女朋友”，还“显然不知道她有多受欢迎”。显然，我养了个“恶女”，而且她将来很可能离三次婚。
english_item: Today, my daughter came home in actual tears because a guy from college “dared”, yes “dared” to turn her down. She then went on a rant about how he “claimed to have a girlfriend” and “clearly doesn’t know how popular she is.” Clearly, I’ve raised a Mean Girl with a future as a 3-time divorcee.

chinese_item: 今天，我丈夫让我别再和我最好的男性朋友来往了，因为我不让他和他的前任出去玩。
english_item: Today, my husband told me to stop being friends with my best guy friend because I won't let him hang out with his ex.

chinese_item: 今天，我和未婚夫就抽薄荷烟不能代替刷牙这件事进行了长时间的谈话。他仍然不相信。
english_item: Today, I had a long conversation with my fiancé about how smoking menthol cigarettes is not a substitute for brushing your teeth. He still isn't convinced.

chinese_item: 今天，我把写给暗恋对象的一封情书发给了朋友，让她帮我看看文笔，然后再决定要不要发给他。不知怎么的，我一时冲动，不小心抄送给了我妈。她回复了三个笑哭的表情。
english_item: Today, I sent a love letter I'd written meant for my crush to a friend so she could evaluate my prose before I actually sent it to him. For some reason, my emotions got the best of me, and I mistakenly CC'd my mom. She replied with three crying-with-laughter emojis.

chinese_item: 今天我去慢跑了。天气很冷，但我穿得很轻薄，因为运动时容易出汗。不幸的是，我把自己锁在门外了。四个小时后，我妻子回来发现我正抱着我们的狗躲在狗窝里取暖。
english_item: Today, I went jogging. It was cold but I dressed lightly because I overheat when I exercise. Unfortunately, I locked myself out. My wife returned four hours later to find me spooning our dog in the doghouse to keep from freezing to death.

chinese_item: 今天我参加了德语口语考试。考试本来很顺利，直到考到一半的时候，我打了个响亮的嗝。我甚至不知道德语的“对不起”怎么说。
english_item: Today, I had my German oral exam. It was going well, until halfway through I did the biggest burp I could have ever imagined. I don't even know how to say sorry in German.

chinese_item: 今天，我结婚19年的妻子告诉我，她一年半以来一直在播放的那些关于出轨的歌曲，应该已经足够暗示我该离婚了。
english_item: Today, I was told by my wife of 19 years that all the songs about cheating that she's been playing for a year and a half should have been a good enough hint. Getting a divorce.

chinese_item: 今天我开会迟到了。会议室的门是玻璃的，上面写着“拉”，但我匆忙之中用力过猛，把门推得碎成了小块。
english_item: Today, I was late for a meeting. The meeting hall door was made of glass, and it said pull, but in my rush, I pushed the door so hard that it shattered into small pieces.

chinese_item: 今天我自告奋勇去帮我侄子看孩子。他居然把自己锁在浴室里，然后还把水槽里的水都弄洒了。我只好打电话给他爸妈，他们现在正结束浪漫的周年纪念晚餐回家呢。我这可是分文不取的。
english_item: Today, I volunteered to babysit my nephew. He somehow managed to lock himself in the bathroom and then flood it with the sink. I had to call his parents, and they're now on their way home from their romantic anniversary dinner. I'm not even getting paid for this.

chinese_item: 今天是我的生日。我的未婚夫决定送我一份“自由”的生日礼物。反正他是这么说的。
english_item: Today, it's my birthday. My fiancé decided to give me the gift of freedom. That's how he put it, anyway.

chinese_item: 今天我儿子遇到了住房问题，所以我让他暂时住在我家。今天，他发现隔壁那个看起来有点安静、有点呆萌的教授竟然是个综合格斗选手。他半夜试图闯入教授家，现在正在医院里。
english_item: Today, my son is having housing issues, so I let him stay at my place for a while. Today, he found out that the quiet, dorky-looking professor who lives next door is an MMA fighter. He tried to break into the guy's house in the middle of the night and is now in the hospital.

chinese_item: 今天，我给一岁的儿子画了浓密的眉毛，让他看起来像个卡通反派。他对着镜子咯咯地笑，我拍了几张可爱的照片。结果我老公看到后，大发雷霆，指责男孩子化妆，我被气得眼泪都出来了。
english_item: Today, I playfully drew thick eyebrows on my one-year-old son to make him look like a cartoon villain. He laughed cutely in the mirror as I took some adorable pictures. When my husband saw, he threw such a horrendous fit about boys and makeup, I was reduced to tears.

chinese_item: 今天，我的辅导员告诉我，我在学校话剧里扮演一个非常傻乎乎的角色，演得非常好。我并不是故意要装傻，导演告诉我，我之所以能得到这个角色，是因为我扮演的角色“就像我一样”。
english_item: Today, my guidance counselor told me that I did a really good job playing someone who was really airheaded in my school's play. I wasn't trying to act like an airhead, the director told me that I got cast for the part because the character I was playing was "just like me".

chinese_item: 今天我不得不给一位客户打电话。我通常尽量避免给客户打电话，因为我有很严重的口吃。结果，我打的这位客户也有口吃，她以为我在嘲笑她。她挂断了我的电话，并向公司正式投诉。
english_item: Today, I had to call a customer. I usually try to avoid calling customers because I have a very prominent speech impediment. Well, it turns out the customer I called also has a speech impediment and thought I was mocking her. She hung up on me and filed a formal complaint with my company.

chinese_item: 今天我才知道，我一直误会了，之前我一直指责隔壁家的猫每晚都往我的车上撒尿。其实是我16岁的儿子干的。
english_item: Today, I found out that I'd been wrong to constantly accuse next door's cat of peeing on my car every night. It was actually my 16-year-old son.

chinese_item: 今天，我的未婚夫被要求重复一遍“我愿娶你，艾米丽，为我合法妻子”这句话时，他竟然把艾米丽的名字念成了“瑞秋”。我当时震惊极了，他笑着解释说他根本不认识一个叫瑞秋的人。他居然因为一句《老友记》里的台词毁了我们的婚礼。
english_item: Today, my fiancé said Rachel instead of my name when asked to repeat, I take thee, Emily, to be my lawfully wedded wife. I was shocked, so he explained while laughing that he doesn't even know a Rachel. He ruined our wedding for a Friends quote.

chinese_item: 今天，我收到一位教授的邮件，说我因为缺勤天数超过规定而无法通过考试，这是学校的规定。我指出我因为一场危及生命的疾病住院两周，他还特地来看望过我。他却说：“规矩就是规矩。”
english_item: Today, I got an email from a professor saying he was going to fail me for missing the allotted absences, which is school policy. I pointed out I was in the hospital for two weeks with a life threatening illness and that he even came to visit me. He told me, Rules are rules.

chinese_item: 今天，我的经济学期中考试得了全班最高分。然而，我的教授非但没有表扬我，反而当着所有人的面批评我“太努力了”。
english_item: Today, I got the best grade in class on my economics midterm. Rather than tell me I did a good job, my professor criticized me in front of everyone about how I was working too hard.

chinese_item: 今天，我11岁的妹妹在Facebook上把我从好友列表里删除了，因为我“不够酷”，不配出现在她的个人主页上。
english_item: Today, my 11 year-old sister unfriended me on Facebook because I'm not "cool enough" to be seen on her profile.

chinese_item: 今天，我男朋友送了我十二朵玫瑰，说他会爱我直到最后一朵花凋谢。我想起之前在Facebook上点赞过，就开始找那朵假的，但没找到。我告诉他，这十二朵玫瑰都是真的，几天之内就会凋谢，他回答说：“没错。”
english_item: Today, my boyfriend gave me twelve roses and told me that he would love me until the last one dies. Remembering the Facebook like, I began looking for the fake one but couldn't find it. When I pointed out that all twelve were real and would die within days, he responded, "Exactly.

chinese_item: 今天，我平安夜值班。经理们都休假了，把我这个严重缺乏培训的员工留下来负责整个部门。不出所料，第一个顾客接待就以我崩溃大哭告终，就因为我把她那个真人大小的暴风兵气球吹错了。
english_item: Today, I was working Xmas Eve. The managers let themselves off today leaving me, a severely inadequately trained employee, to handle the department. Of course the first customer interaction ended with me bursting into tears, all because I blew up her life-sized storm trooper balloon wrong.

chinese_item: 小时候，我总觉得月亮会跟着我到处走。晚上开车的时候，我总能看到它在天上，永远在同一个地方。我觉得它像个守护神一样守护着我。有时候我甚至还会朝它挥手！这让我觉得自己很特别。后来我才知道，那只是我的错觉，月亮其实并不会跟着我走。但好多年，我一直都坚信那是属于我的月亮。
english_item: When I was a child, I used to believe that moon followed me everywhere I went. I would look out of the car at night and see it in the sky, always in the same place.I thought it was watching over me like a guardia. I even waved at it sometimes! It made me feel special. Later, I leanrned it was just an impression and the moon didn't move with me. But for years I truly believed it was my moon.

chinese_item: 小时候，我总觉得我的安抚毯每晚睡前都会消失。我确信不是我自己弄丢的，所以一直觉得是什么魔法把它藏了起来。几乎每天晚上，我都会哭着跑到爸妈家，因为没有它我就睡不着。后来有一天，这种情况突然消失了，我总能找到我的安抚毯。这个谜团一直没解开，直到不久前的一天，我姐姐笑着坦白说，是她把我的安抚毯藏起来的，这样大家才能一起找，她自己也能晚点睡觉。
english_item: When I was a little girl, I used to believe my security blanket dissapeared every night before I went to sleep. I was sure it wasn't me that lost it, so I used to think it was something magical that hide my security blanket. Almost every night I went to my parent's, crying and whining, because I couldn't sleep without it. One day, it stopped and I always found my security blanket. The mistery was still complete, until a day, not long ago, my sister, laughing, confessed that she was the one who hide my security blanket, so everyone was searching for it and she could go to bed later.

chinese_item: 我小时候总是喜欢做鬼脸。有一天，我妈妈告诉我，如果我做鬼脸的时候铃声响了，我的脸就会一直保持那个表情。从那以后，我每隔一小时就害怕地做鬼脸。我信以为真了很久，直到有一天，我爸爸也做了鬼脸，我告诉他：“别再这样做了，你会一直保持那个表情的。”他笑着跟我解释了真相。
english_item: When I was young ,I used to makes faces everyme .One day ly mother told me if i pull a face and the bell ring,i would be stuck with this face .After that i used to scare each hour to make a face .I believed that during a long time and one day my father pulled faces and i told him "Don't do that anymore you will be stuck".He laughet at me and explain me the thruth

chinese_item: 小时候，我总觉得厕所里住着一条蛇。我怕坐下它会咬我的屁股。所以每次小便，我都像忍者一样悄悄地坐在马桶上。有一天，我不小心滑倒了，尖叫着说“它咬我了！”。我妈赶来了。我当时浑身湿透，动弹不得，吓得魂飞魄散。其实根本没有蛇，只是我太害怕了。现在想想，真是觉得好笑。
english_item: When i was little, i used to thimk a snake lived in the toilets.I thought it would bite me in the butt if i sat down. So i got on the toilet to pee, like a ninja.One day I slipped and screamed " It bit me" . My mother arived. I was just wet, stuck and scared .The was no snake just my fear.When a think about I find funny now

chinese_item: 我的同事说我们会一起成功，但团队取得成绩时他却独自揽功。
english_item: My coworker said we'd succeed together but takes solo credit for team success

chinese_item: 他们记得我们的内部笑话，却不记得我们之间的严肃对话。
english_item: They remember our inside jokes but can't remember the serious conversations we've had

chinese_item: 我的家人总是不停地向我求助，但当我需要帮助时，他们却觉得我太自私了。
english_item: My family asks me for favors constantly but I'm being selfish when I need something

chinese_item: 朋友说他们想把事情解决好，但却一点都没有尝试过
english_item: Friend said they wanted to make things right but hasn't tried at all

chinese_item: 朋友说想成为我生活中的一部分，但却缺席了所有重要的事情。
english_item: Friend said they wanted to be part of my life but opts out of everything important

chinese_item: 他们发帖谈忠诚，却因为一次分歧就取关了我。
english_item: They posted about loyalty but unfollowed me after one disagreement

chinese_item: 我的伴侣和我在一起时，花在给别人发短信上的时间比真正跟我聊天的时间还要多。
english_item: My partner spends more time texting other people when we're together than actually talking to me

chinese_item: 恭喜你订婚了，我们分手才两个月你就找到了新的人，不过谁还在意这个呢
english_item: Congratulations on your engagement, we broke up 2 months ago and you already found someone new but hey who's counting

chinese_item: 我的室友说他们会体谅别人，但实际上却表现得好像自己一个人住似的。
english_item: My roommate said they'd be considerate but acts like they live alone

chinese_item: 他们发帖宣传心理健康意识，但当我敞开心扉时却说我想太多了。
english_item: They post about mental health awareness but tell me I think too much when I open up

chinese_item: 他们发帖谈论个人成长，却抗拒任何真正的改变。
english_item: They post about personal growth but resist any real change

chinese_item: 我的伴侣说我们需要谈谈，但随后又不愿意谈论任何实质性的问题。
english_item: My partner said we need to talk but then doesn't want to talk about anything real

chinese_item: 朋友说他们太忙了没空出来玩，但他们的动态显示他们其实就在家里啥也没干
english_item: Friend said they're too busy to hang out but their story shows them doing absolutely nothing at home

chinese_item: 每个人在帖子中都被点名感谢了，除了我和其他帮忙的人只是被统称为“大家”。
english_item: Everyone got thanked by name in their post except me who was just and everyone else who helped

chinese_item: 朋友说他们会不离不弃，但其实只在顺境时出现。
english_item: Friend said they'd be there through thick and thin but only shows up during the thin

chinese_item: 他们发帖谈论无条件的爱，但实际上他们的爱附带着一长串的条件。
english_item: They post about unconditional love but theirs comes with a long list of conditions

chinese_item: 他们记得庆祝别人的成就，却忽略了我所做的努力。
english_item: They remember to celebrate everyone else but my achievements go unnoticed

chinese_item: 朋友问我意见，但当我给出了他们要求的诚实回答后，他们却生气了。
english_item: Friend asked for advice then got mad when I gave them the honest answer they asked for

chinese_item: 好几周都在试图安排计划，他们终于回复说“天啊好的”，然后又消失了
english_item: Been trying to make plans for weeks and they finally respond with omg yes then ghost again

chinese_item: 注意到他们经常截取我的故事，但却从不真正发消息给我……这是什么情况
english_item: Noticed they screenshot my stories a lot but never actually message me... what's the thesis here

chinese_item: 大家都因为自己的辛勤工作得到了认可，而我却被告知我可以做得更好。
english_item: Everyone got acknowledged for their hard work and I got told I could do better

chinese_item: 他们三个月前说我们应该尽快聚一聚，可我到现在还在等这个“尽快”。
english_item: They said we should hang out soon three months ago and I'm still waiting for that soon

chinese_item: 我的家人说他们尊重我的选择，但实际上却把它们当作是一时的冲动。
english_item: My family said they respect my choices but treats them like phases

chinese_item: 我的伴侣说他们爱我，但却似乎无法以任何有意义的方式表现出来。
english_item: My partner said they love me but can't seem to show it in any meaningful way

chinese_item: 大家都得到了合理的解释，而我则被告知要自己处理这件事。
english_item: Everyone got a proper explanation and I got told to just deal with it

chinese_item: 他们记得每次我让他们失望的时候，但我却不记得他们有哪次出现过。
english_item: They remember every time I let them down but I can't remember them ever showing up

chinese_item: 朋友说他们为我高兴，但他们的表情却讲述了一个完全不同的故事。
english_item: Friend said they were happy for me but their face told a completely different story

chinese_item: 朋友说他们想念我们的谈话，但实际上已经不再参与聊天了。
english_item: Friend said they missed our talks but doesn't actually engage in conversation anymore

chinese_item: 我的伴侣说我们应该努力改善我们的关系，但却只想让我改变。
english_item: My partner said we should work on us but only wants me to change

chinese_item: 大家都得到了真诚的道歉，而我得到的却只是借口。
english_item: Everyone got a genuine apology and I got excuses

chinese_item: 我的家人说他们会支持我，但每当我寻求帮助时，他们却总是不在。
english_item: My family said I can count on them but they're never available when I reach out

chinese_item: 朋友说他们在意我的意见，但最后还是按照自己的想法行事。
english_item: Friend said they care about my opinion but does whatever they want anyway

chinese_item: 我的家人说他们支持我，但这种支持让我感到有压力。
english_item: My family said they're supportive but their support feels like pressure

chinese_item: 他们说会补偿我，但从来没有做到，后来还提起这事，好像真的做了似的。
english_item: They said they'd make it up to me but never did and brought it up later like they did

chinese_item: 发了一条展示脆弱状态的动态，收到了一些支持性的评论，但没有一个人私下里来关心我
english_item: Posted a vulnerable moment, got supportive comments, but not a single person checked in privately

chinese_item: 他们说会试着从我的角度看问题，但实际上从来没有做到过。
english_item: They said they'd try to see things from my perspective but never actually do

chinese_item: 我的伴侣说他们希望我快乐，但当我没有和他们在一起时，他们就会不高兴。
english_item: My partner said they want me to be happy but gets upset when I am without them

chinese_item: 我的伴侣说他们没事，但他们那些含沙射影的评论却表明并非如此。
english_item: My partner said they're fine but their passive aggressive comments say otherwise

chinese_item: 我的同事说我们会一起工作，但最后却各自为政。
english_item: My coworker said we'd work together but ended up doing their own thing

chinese_item: 他们发帖说自己很真实，但其实整个人设都是刻意打造出来的。
english_item: They post about being genuine but their whole persona is manufactured

chinese_item: 朋友说他们喜欢和我在一起，但总是找借口提前离开。
english_item: Friend said they love spending time with me but always has an excuse to leave early

chinese_item: 大家都被邀请分享自己的想法，但我的话却被打断了。
english_item: Everyone got invited to share their thoughts and mine got talked over

chinese_item: 他们发帖谈论有意义的联系，但他们的所有关系看起来都只是表面功夫。
english_item: They post about meaningful connections but all their relationships seem surface level

chinese_item: 他们说想要诚实，但却接受不了任何形式的批评。
english_item: They said they want honesty but can't handle any form of criticism

chinese_item: 他们总能找到借口说为什么来不了，但我却看到他们在和其他人出去玩。
english_item: They always have an excuse for why they can't make it but I see them out with other people

chinese_item: 朋友对我倾诉了好几个小时，但当我试图分享时，他就转移话题了。
english_item: Friend vents to me for hours but changes the subject when I try to share

chinese_item: 大家都带了一个伴儿去参加婚礼，就我没有……显然我不需要约会对象。
english_item: Everyone got a plus one to the wedding except me... apparently I don't need a date

chinese_item: 他们发帖说要向前看，但还是不断提起过去的问题。
english_item: They post about moving forward but still bringing up past issues

chinese_item: 他们发帖谈论自我提升，但却抗拒任何反馈。
english_item: They post about self-improvement but resist any feedback

chinese_item: 我的伴侣给别人发的帖子都点赞评论，却几乎不理会我的。
english_item: My partner likes and comments on everyone's posts but barely acknowledges mine

chinese_item: 我的伴侣指责我没有尽力，但实际上只有我在努力。
english_item: My partner accused me of not trying hard enough but I'm the only one making effort

chinese_item: 我的伴侣记得我们的纪念日，但却忘了去年我们做了什么特别的事情。
english_item: My partner remembered our anniversary but forgot what we actually did last year that was so special

chinese_item: 我的伴侣说他们会妥协，但前提是只有我让步才行。
english_item: My partner said they'd compromise but only when it means I give in

chinese_item: 我的同事请求复印了我的笔记，结果成绩比我好，却连句谢谢都没说。
english_item: My coworker asked to copy my notes then got a better grade and didn't even say thanks

chinese_item: 我的同事说他们会帮我学习，但每次我提问时都让我觉得自己很笨。
english_item: My coworker said they'd help me learn but makes me feel stupid for asking questions

chinese_item: 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡在接受ABC新闻独家采访时再次拒绝了在加沙停火的想法，除非人质被释放。
english_item: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu once again rejected the idea of a cease-fire in Gaza unless hostages are released in an exclusive interview with ABC News.

chinese_item: 史上最长的政府停摆可能在第43天结束，但最终结果几乎不能让任何人满意。
english_item: The longest government shutdown in history could conclude as soon as Day 43 with almost no one happy with the final result

chinese_item: 特朗普政府要求各州撤销法院近期判决发放的疫情食品券全额补贴。
english_item: President Donald Trump's administration is demanding that states reverse full SNAP benefits issued under recent court orders

chinese_item: 据乌克兰当局称，俄罗斯对乌克兰中部和东部地区进行了大规模空袭，造成至少4人死亡，26人受伤。
english_item: Russia has carried out a massive aerial attack across central and eastern Ukraine, killing at least four and injuring 26 others, according to Ukrainian authorities.

BBC记者威尔·弗农正在涉水穿过因克劳迪娅风暴而遭受广泛破坏的蒙茅斯镇中心。一户家庭向BBC威尔士讲述了他们在黑暗中如何被船只救出的经历，而一些商家表示他们在洪水中损失了价值“数千”的货物。
南威尔士消防救援服务部门宣布蒙茅斯发生重大事件，该地区共接到82起与洪水有关的求助电话。
地方议会官员表示，他们已经做好了准备，但没想到河水会达到“前所未有的”水平，因此未能应对这种程度的情况。
english_item:
BBC correspondent Will Vernon has been wading through flood water that has caused widespread damage to Monmouth town centre as a result of Storm Claudia.
A family has told BBC Wales how they were rescued from their homes in the darkness by boat, while business owners said they have lost stock worth "thousands" in the flooding.
A major incident has been declared in Monmouth by South Wales Fire and Rescue Service, with crews called to 82 flood-related incidents in the wider area.
Council bosses said they were "ready and prepared but not to this level" due to rivers reaching "unprecedented" levels.

chinese_item: 这位女士希望保持匿名，她和她的两个孩子住在雷克瑟姆的一处公屋里，其中一个孩子患有自闭症。她说，雷克瑟姆市议会未能解决这个问题，也没有为她们找到附近合适的住所，让她和家人感到失望。这位女士声称，老鼠咬坏了或在家中物品里筑巢，还毁掉了孩子们婴儿时期的一些无法替代的物品。当这些老鼠死在墙壁里或厨房橱柜下时，她们还得忍受腐烂老鼠的气味。“我们用陷阱抓到过一些死老鼠，当他们把阁楼里的隔热材料拆掉时，发现里面有很多死老鼠，还有很多活的老鼠在他们脚边乱窜。”
english_item:
The woman - who wished to remain anonymous - lives in a council house in Wrexham with her two children, one of whom is autistic.
She said Wrexham Council let her and her family down by failing to eradicate the problem or find them a suitable new home nearby to live in.
The woman claimed the rats had chewed through or nested in household items, as well as destroying irreplaceable items from when her children were babies.
Then when they drop dead in the walls or under the kitchen cupboards we have to deal with the smell of rotting rats.
"We've had some dead ones in traps and when they took the insulation out of the attic there was a load of dead ones went with that and a load of live ones running round their feet while they did the work.

chinese_item:
医生罢工已经结束——接下来会发生什么？
“喘息空间”随着时钟滴答作响，当英国医学协会宣布将在继续进行其在工党执政期间的首次罢工时，这场争端变得愈发激烈。
工会回应称，国民保健署让资深医生过度承担因住院医生罢工而留下的工作量，这将患者置于风险之中。
同时，英国医学协会也注意到，公众舆论似乎已经转向反对住院医生。
他还提到了需要解决住院医生在完成前两年培训后转入专科岗位时所面临的职位短缺问题。
english_item:
The doctor strike has ended - what comes next?
'Breathing space'With the clock ticking, the dispute turned acrimonious when the BMA announced its first strike under Labour would go ahead.
The union has responded by accusing the NHS of putting patients at risk by stretching senior doctors covering for striking resident doctors too thinly.
It has also not gone unnoticed within the BMA that public opinion appears to have swung against resident doctors.
He also mentions the need to tackle the shortage of speciality jobs that resident doctors move into after the first two years of training.

chinese_item:
初级医生的罢工可能已经结束。
这一切或许都是真的，但提供给初级医生的待遇在NHS其他地方也引起了注意。
像护士、助产士、急救人员和理疗师这样的员工所获得的加薪幅度仅略高于初级医生的一半。
“我们并不嫉妒医生们的加薪。”皇家护理学院领导人尼古拉·兰格教授说道。
而且已经有迹象表明，初级医生们很快又会回来要求更多。
english_item:
The junior doctors' strikes may be over.
That may all be true, but what’s on offer to junior doctors has not gone unnoticed elsewhere in the NHS.
Staff such as nurses, midwives, paramedics and physios have received a little more than half the rise junior doctors have won.
“We do not begrudge doctors their pay rise,” RCN leader Prof Nicola Ranger says.
And already there are signs the junior doctors themselves will be back asking for more.

chinese_item: 她说，他的五个孩子都很想念他们的父亲，而家人仍然焦急地等待着答案，不知道他是否真的在那艘被击中的船上。哥伦比亚总统古斯塔沃·佩特罗批评了这次袭击事件，称9月15日被击中的船上载有哥伦比亚公民，并随后声称卡兰萨先生是遇难者之一。针对他首次关于哥伦比亚公民遇害的声明，白宫表示期待佩特罗总统“公开撤回其毫无根据且应受谴责的言论”。卡兰萨先生来自一个大家庭，与大约20名亲戚一起住在加伊拉渔村一条土路旁的小房子里。为卡兰萨先生部分家庭成员工作的美国律师丹尼尔·科瓦利克（他也为佩特罗总统工作）表示，卡兰萨先生的妻子和他的大女儿从美国发布的袭击视频中认出了他的船。
english_item:
His five children are missing their dad, she says, and the family are still waiting anxiously for answers, not knowing if he was even on the boat hit in the strike.
Colombia's President Gustavo Petro has criticised the strikes, saying Colombian citizens were on board the boat hit on 15 September, and later claiming Mr Carranza was among those killed.
Responding to his first statement about Colombian citizens being killed, the White House said it looked forward to President Petro "publicly retracting his baseless and reprehensible statement".
Mr Carranza comes from a huge family, living with about 20 relatives in a small house off a dirt track in the fishing village of Gaira.
A US lawyer working for some of Mr Carranza's family, Daniel Kovalik, who also works for President Petro, says Mr Carranza's wife and older daughter recognised his boat from the US-released footage of the strike.

chinese_item:
来自谢菲尔德的18岁女孩罗西·哈尔萨尔正在发起一项运动，旨在为中学女生提供免费的运动文胸及适配服务，让她们能够参与体育活动并改善长期健康状况。
已经有一家公司联系了这个团体，该公司在学校提供运动文胸适配服务，并表示愿意与哈尔萨尔小姐合作推进她的提议。
谢菲尔德中央选区的工党议员阿布蒂萨姆·穆罕默德提出与哈尔萨尔小姐会面，讨论如何进一步发展她的运动。
罗西的想法是一个简单而有力的解决方案，可以为许多年轻女性打开大门。
哈尔萨尔小姐表示，在学龄期使用运动文胸也会带来长期的健康益处。
english_item:
Rosie Halsall, 18, from Sheffield, is campaigning for free sports bras and fittings for secondary school girls, allowing them to participate and improve their long-term health.
The group has already been contacted by a company which offers sports bra fittings at schools which want to work with Miss Halsall on her proposal.
The Labour MP for Sheffield Central, Abtisam Mohamed, has offered to meet with Miss Halsall to discuss how her campaign could be developed.
Rosie's idea is a simple and powerful solution that could open doors for many young women."
Miss Halsall said the use of sports bras at school age would also bring long-term health benefits.

chinese_item:
但是在经历了18个月的求职后，凯特琳开始怀疑四年的大学生活和获得学位是否真的值得。
学生雇主研究所最新的研究显示，毕业生职位的竞争达到了“历史新高”，据估计去年有120万份申请竞争17,000个毕业生职位。
“有一段时间我完全失去了动力，不再相信上大学或拿学位的意义。”
在她申请的所有职位中，有221个进入了评估阶段，并且她在最终面试了五次之后才找到了工作。
最新数据显示，2024年每个可用的毕业生职位平均收到了140份申请。
english_item:
But after 18 months of job hunting, Caitlin was left wondering if going to university for four years and getting a degree was worth it.
Latest research from the Institute of Student Employers shows competition for graduate roles is at a "record high" as estimates suggested there were 1.2 million applications for 17,000 graduate vacancies last year.
"There was a period where I was feeling completely demotivated and didn't believe in going to university or getting degrees."
She reached the assessment stages for 221 of the roles she applied for and had five final interviews before getting a job.
Latest data estimates an average of 140 applications were received for each available graduate job in 2024.

chinese_item:
肯特郡一所小学的学生通过戴安娜王妃设立的慈善机构培训成为了反欺凌大使。汤布里奇查瓦塞主教小学的学生接受了戴安娜奖的培训，以帮助他们倾听同伴并传播积极的信息。
作为大使之一的玛丽说：“如果我们看到有任何欺凌行为发生，我们有权站出来发声。”
调查还指出，在有特殊教育需求的学生中，经历过欺凌的孩子数量更高。
来自该校的十名学生接受了培训，并呼吁同学们承诺使用“善的力量”来防止欺凌。
english_item:
Pupils train as anti-bullying ambassadors13 hours ago Share Save Ian Palmer , in Tonbridge and Patrick Barlow , South East Share SaveIan Palmer / BBC Bishop Chavasse School in Tonbridge has been aiming to tackle bullying with new anti-bullying ambassadorsChildren at a Kent primary school have trained as anti-bullying ambassadors through a charity set up by Princess Diana.
Pupils at Bishop Chavasse Primary School in Tonbridge received training from the Diana Award to help them listen to peers and spread a positive message.
Mary, one of the ambassadors, said: "We have the right to speak up if we see any bullying going on."
The number of children who have experienced bullying is also higher among pupils with special educational needs, the survey added.
Ian Palmer / BBC Bishop Chavasse Primary School's anti-bullying ambassadorsTen children from the school have received the training and have called for pupils to pledge to use the "power of good" to prevent bullying.

chinese_item:
《在线安全法》是什么——以及如何保护儿童上网安全
2025年7月24日 分享 保存 分享 保存
Getty Images
英国人浏览互联网的方式正在发生变化。
根据《在线安全法》，平台必须采取措施——例如进行年龄验证——以防止儿童从7月起接触到非法和有害内容。
如果服务提供商不遵守英国全面的在线安全规定，将面临巨额罚款。
《在线安全法》的核心目标是让互联网对英国人尤其是儿童更加安全。
english_item:
What the Online Safety Act is - and how to keep children safe online24 July 2025 Share Save Share SaveGetty ImagesThe way people in the UK might navigate the internet is changing.
Under the Online Safety Act, platforms must take action - such as carrying out age checks - to stop children seeing illegal and harmful material from July.
Services face large fines if they fail to comply with UK's sweeping online safety rules.
What is the Online Safety Act and how will it protect children?
The Online Safety Act's central aim is to make the internet safer for people in the UK, especially children.

chinese_item:
封锁本可以避免——新冠调查的关键发现

四天前 分享 保存 Nick Triggle, Jim Reed, Dom Hughes 和 Michelle Roberts 分享 保存Getty Images

期待已久的独立报告终于发布，该报告评估了政府在应对新冠疫情方面的表现。

调查主席、前法官黑尔特女男爵表示，英国的应对措施可以用“太少太迟”来概括。

报告称，如果早在2020年3月中旬之前就采取诸如社交距离和隔离有症状者及其家庭成员等措施，那么封锁完全可以避免。

但等到部长们采取行动时已经为时已晚，封锁不可避免。

2020年3月16日开始实施自愿措施，一周后全面实行居家封锁。
english_item:
Lockdown could have been avoided - key findings from Covid inquiry4 days ago Share Save Nick Triggle, Jim Reed, Dom Hughes and Michelle Roberts Share SaveGetty ImagesThe long-awaited independent report into how well or badly the government handled the Covid pandemic has been published.
Chairwoman of the inquiry, former judge Baroness Hallett, said the UK's response could be summarised as "too little, too late".
Lockdown could have been avoided completelyThe report says lockdown could have been avoided if steps such as social distancing and isolating those with symptoms along with members of their household had been introduced earlier than mid-March 2020.
But by the time ministers took action it was already too late and a lockdown was inevitable, it says.
Voluntary measures were brought in on 16 March 2020, followed by the full stay-at home lockdown seven days later.

chinese_item: 布莱克浦北部和弗利特伍德的工党议员洛林·比弗斯提到16岁的萨莎·马斯登被大卫·明托谋杀的案件时说，受害者的家属需要“更公平地获得量刑上诉的机会”。在下议院发言时，比弗斯敦促政府确保凶手最终不会拥有比受害者或其家属更多的权利。“尽管在量刑过程中需要结案，但犯罪者却有多次上诉机会，而受害者家属只有一次机会。政府将采取什么措施来确保受害者家属在这个过程中不会比犯罪者拥有更少的权利？”“我决心与她以及所有其他为受害者争取正义的家庭合作，以确保我们能够正确处理这个问题。”
english_item:
Labour MP for Blackpool North and Fleetwood, Lorraine Beavers, said families of victims needed "fairer access to sentencing appeals", citing the murder of 16-year-old Sasha Marsden by David Minto.
Speaking in the Commons, Beavers urged the government to ensure killers did not ultimately end up with greater rights than their victims, or their families.
"Despite the need for closure in sentencing, perpetrators are given multiple appeal opportunities, while victims' families have just one chance.
"What will the Government do to ensure that victims' families do not have fewer rights than perpetrators in this process?"
"I am determined to work with her and all the other Justice for Victims families to ensure that we get this right.

chinese_item:
因赌债纠纷杀害邻居的女子被判至少20年监禁
2025年10月24日 乔尼·曼宁，东北和坎布里亚地区报道；梅根·帕特森，纽卡斯尔皇家法院报道

诺桑比亚警方称，布伦达·赫斯洛普被判处至少20年的监禁。
一名女子因赌债纠纷杀害了她的邻居，被判至少20年监禁。
哈迪先生设法到了一位朋友家，朋友叫了救护车，但他还是在去医院的路上去世了。
侦缉总督察马克·阿瑟顿表示，哈迪先生是以“最残忍的方式之一”被杀害的。
他认为她并不想杀死哈迪先生，但确实意图对他造成“非常严重的伤害”。
更多关于此案件的信息：女子因60英镑债务杀害残疾邻居

Mr Hardy managed to make it to a friend's house, who called an ambulance, but he died on the way to hospital.
Det Ch Insp Mark Atherton said Mr Hardy had been killed in "one of the cruellest ways possible".
He did not believe she wanted to kill Mr Hardy, but had intended to cause him "really serious harm".
